C: 民主政治对于翁法罗斯不同城邦的公民来说，始终焕发着无穷的魅力。在奥赫玛建立初期，奥赫玛的民主曾是少数特权阶层的民主；而后，在不断改革中，奥赫玛的公民大会走上历史的舞台，奥赫玛的民主从此转变为「全体人民的民主」——所有重大的城邦事务都由公民大会来决定。 需要注意的是，随着黑潮临近，不同城邦的公民进入奥赫玛中参与城邦政治中，原本奥赫玛公民手中的宝贵权利也不断稀释…因此，希望促进奥赫玛的公民大会制度改革的声音也层出不穷。 民主只是文明发展的结果之一，而非其原因。民主要有成效，就必须为不同的社会，不同的情况，不同的问题制定不同的规则。没有一种规则对于一切情况都是最合适的。 换言之，在成书的当下，奥赫玛的公民大会制度仍然会经历变革。由于时间所限，本书只是考察当前奥赫玛的公民大会，对于之后的变动概不进行研究，请列位读者谨慎参考本书内容。 奥赫玛城邦的公民、公民权与公民政策 在深入研究奥赫玛公民大会运行机制和主要职能之前，我们必须先谈一下奥赫玛的公民、公民权以及公民政策问题。曾有元老指出，奥赫玛是自由公民的集合体，公民的权力如此之大，必须要对公民的资格严加限制，以保证公民享有自己的权利。 围绕着是否承认归化民权利的讨论，曾经一直是黄金裔领袖与元老院论辩的焦点。随着历史发展，翁法罗斯中诸多城邦的陷落，黑潮逼近，公民权改革迫在眉睫…从最后的结果上来看，不同城邦公民在圣城平等地拥有公民资格，并能够平等地参与公共事务之中。 诚然，不同的人在社会上存在差异的，有穷人，有富人，有本地人，也有异邦人，但圣城奥赫玛不会让社会差异成为政治差异，一切公民在政治上完全平等。 （下略） 公民大会的运行机制 除紧急情况外，奥赫玛公民大会的召开都要遵循固定的模式。当届的元老院作为城邦代表组成的权力机构，他们将在大会召开前，在纪名英雄墙前公布即将召开的公民大会议事日程，以及开会地点——通常来说，为圣城的黎明云崖。 通常在大会召开前由元老院成员发起议题，并且经过议事会过半数同意后，该议题将成为公民大会的正式议题。议事会要预先拟定，应当受理哪些事情，哪一天做哪些事情。在确定后，议事会主席将公民大会的议事日程移交给元老院的「会议主席」，将由其主持会议。 通常情况下，任何没有经过议事会先期讨论的事务都不能在公民大会上讨论。议事会讨论的事务只有两个结果：一个是已经在议事会上详细讨论，只需要公民进行表决的。另一个是还没有形成任何建议，而是由公民在大会上进行论辩以形成最后的决议。 投票结果将由「{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}符文赐福的陶片」记录并统计，在大会召开期间，奥赫玛全城将设立投票用陶罐收集公民意见。所有议案被充分讨论和投票决定后，元老院会公开已通过的法令，并将其张贴于纪名英雄墙前。 （下略） 公民大会的主要职能 公民大会实际拥有立法权、人事任免权、宣战、缔和乃至指挥具体战争的重要权力。 不过从历史实践的角度出发，奥赫玛的公民大会并非完全交由「公民」管理与通知，而是一种保证由比较符合社会大多数成员意愿的「精英」有效地管理社会事务的方式。 换言之，现如今由黄金裔领袖和元老院共同主理奥赫玛城中大小事务的局面，也是由奥赫玛的公民大会制度决定的。公民并不亲自管理社会事务、做出政治决定，而是通过投票等多种政治参与方式来影响政策制定者。 （下略） 附录•元老院的主要成员 元老院是由翁法罗斯的城邦代表们组成的权力机构。其中大部分成员由不同城邦推选，少数成员由现役元老院成员直接邀请，由公民大会赋予权力，实际处理奥赫玛城中的大小事务。 其中最为有名的名誉元老为吕枯耳戈斯，为黄金战争前就几乎灭迹的安提基色拉人——曾在黄金世中多次与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}直接交流，并向刻法勒传递世人的凡音，是名副其实的「神礼观众」——吕枯耳戈斯的中立态度有目共睹，这也是他屡次被推选为公民大会会议主席的主要原因。 值得一提的是，元老凯妮斯在奥赫玛城中的事务颇有成效，并且拥有大量拥趸。不少人相信，凯妮斯将利用手中积累的资源，改变「黄金裔掌握实权」的现状，并重塑奥赫玛的政治生态。
E: Democratic politics has always fascinated citizens of different city-states in Amphoreus. When Okhema was first established, its democracy was limited to a privileged minority. However, through ongoing reforms, the Okheman citizens' assembly took to the stage, transforming Okhema's governance into a "democracy for all" — where the citizens' assembly made every major decision. It's important to note that as the black tide draws near and citizens from other city-states join Okhema's political life, the precious rights of Okhema's original citizens are becoming increasingly diluted... Consequently, voices calling for reforms with the Okheman citizens' assembly system grew ever louder. Democracy is only one of the consequences of civilization's development, rather than the cause of development. For democracy to be productive, it must enact different rules for different societies, situations, and issues. No single rule can be optimal for all scenarios. In other words, Okhema's citizens' assembly system will continue to evolve as this book is written. Due to time limitations, this publication focuses only on the current Okheman citizens' assembly, not its future developments. Readers should bear this limitation in mind. Citizens, Citizenship, and Citizenship Policies of Okhema Before examining the Okheman citizens' assembly's operational mechanisms and core functions in-depth, we must first address the matter of citizens, citizenship rights, and citizenship policies of Okhema. The elders have once noted that Okhema is a collective of free citizens. Due to the substantial power citizens possess, citizenship qualifications must be strictly regulated to ensure citizens' rights. Discussions on the recognition of naturalized citizens' rights were once the foci of disputations between the leader of the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders. As more Amphorean city-states fell over time and as the black tide drew closer, citizenship rights reforms became imperative... Judging from the final outcome, citizens from all city-states have equal citizenship rights in the holy city and can have equal participation in public matters. While social differences naturally exist — between rich and poor, locals and travelers — the holy city of Okhema would not allow these social distinctions to become political divisions and will ensure complete political equality among all citizens. (Continued) Operational Mechanisms of the Citizens' Assembly Barring emergencies, Okhema's citizens' assembly follows strict protocols when it is called. The current Council of Elders, a governmental entity made of representatives of the city-state, posts the upcoming citizens' assembly agenda and venue — usually Dawncloud in the holy city — at the Wall of Heroes before each meeting. Usually, topics are proposed by Council of Elders members before the assembly and become official assembly items after receiving majority council approval. The Council pre-determines which matters to address and when. Once confirmed, the council chairman hands over the agenda to the Council of Elders's "Assembly Chair," who presides over the meeting. Normally, matters cannot be discussed at the citizens' assembly without prior council review. Council-reviewed matters yield only two outcomes: Either they're already thoroughly discussed and only need citizen votes, or they require citizens to hold debates to reach final resolutions during the assembly. Results are tallied using pottery shards blessed with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s runes, with voting dolia placed throughout Okhema during assemblies. After thorough discussion and voting of all proposals, the Council of Elders posts approved decrees at the Wall of Heroes. (Continued) Core Functions of the Citizens' Assembly The assembly wields the important capacities of legislative power, the appointment of government officials, declaring war, conceding peace, and the actual control of armies during wartime. Yet, historically and practically, Okhema's citizens' assembly isn't fully controlled and directed by "citizens," but rather a means to ensure that "elites" who represent the majority social interests can effectively manage social matters. In other words, the current system where the leader of the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders jointly manage Okhema was decided by the Okheman citizens' assembly system. Citizens influence policymakers through voting and other means of political participation rather than directly managing social affairs or making political decisions. (Continued) Appendix: Principal Members of the Council of Elders The Council of Elders is a governmental organization consisting of representatives from Amphoreus's city-states. While most are elected by their city-states, some receive direct invitations from current Council of Elders members. Authorized by the citizens' assembly, they manage various practical affairs within Okhema. The most renowned honorary Elder is Lycurgus, an Antikytheran — a race that was already nearly extinct before the Chrysos War. He had communicated directly with {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} multiple times during the Era Chrysea and passed the wishes of mortals to Kephale, showing himself as a true "Theoros." Lycurgus's neutrality is well noted by all, which explains his frequent selection as the citizens' assembly chair. Significantly, Elder Caenis has shown great effectiveness in Okhema's governance and gathered many followers. Many believe Caenis will leverage accumulated resources to challenge the current situation where the Chrysos Heirs hold real authority and transform Okhema's political structure.

C: …… 「别让他们跑了！」鼹鼠队身后不断传来了集会者的喊叫声，这些贪婪的坏蛋已经追了过来。小鼹鼠们没有减慢速度，直接冲进了铁卫禁区。三只小鼹鼠回头张望，只见得这些鬼鬼祟祟的集会者们在禁区外气得捶胸顿足。 帕瓦的叔叔是银鬃铁卫的军官，在他的帮助下，小鼹鼠们在银鬃铁卫的保护下来到了军营的深处——也就是德雷克宝藏提到的地方。「帕瓦，并不是我不厚道，你难道不能叫你的叔叔把那些坏蛋都抓起来吗？」卡宾还有些生气。「他们过去将你抓走，这就已经违反法律了。」 「放心，他们逃不掉的。」帕瓦的叔叔曾经无数次帮助鼹鼠队化险为夷，他是鼹鼠队最可靠的伙伴。「这些事情就交给我们大人来处理吧，你们的冒险还差最后一步，去完成它吧。」 贝琪打开了德雷克最后的讯息：「勤勉又机智的士兵每天都会检查4处枪架，确保它们各自摆放着3把枪支，不多不少。」 「嗯…真的有人会在禁区里藏什么宝藏吗？」帕瓦的叔叔从来就不相信隐形的宝藏，因为这里是军队驻扎的地方，无论是几百年前的德雷克，还是几百年后的谁谁谁，都不可能在军队里藏起不为人知的宝藏。 「既然是隐形的宝藏，就一定有定位它的方法。」卡宾略作思考，他已经知道隐形的宝藏所在之地了。 ——亲爱的小读者们，你们知道他该找到宝藏了吗 鼹鼠提示： 仔细观看周围的符合「3把枪支」的摆设，自然可以找出答案。
E: ... "Don't let them get away!" The gathered crowd shouted incessantly from behind The Moles as these greedy criminals pursued them. The little moles rushed right into the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, not stopping at all. When the three little moles turned around, they saw the pursuers beyond the restricted zone stomping their feet in rage. Pava's uncle was a Silvermane Guards officer, and with his help, the little moles made their way to the camp's depths — the location where Drake's treasure had hinted. "I'm not heartless, Pava, but couldn't you get your uncle to arrest all those bad guys?" Carbine was still enraged. "They kidnapped you, which is against the law." "Don't worry. They're not getting away from it." Pava's uncle had helped the Moles countless times in perilous situations, and he was their most dependable collaborator. "Leave these things to us adults. Your adventure is still one step away from being completed. Go finish it." "The industrious and smart soldier will check the 4 gun stands every day to make sure there are exactly 3 guns per stand, no more and no less." Becky read from Drake's last message. "Hmm... would someone really bury treasure in a restricted zone?" Pava's uncle never believed in the invisible treasure because this was where the army was stationed. Neither Drake from hundreds of years ago nor anyone centuries in the future could have buried unknown treasures in the middle of the army. "Since it's an invisible treasure, there has to be a means to find it." Carbine paused for a moment, convinced that he already knew where the invisible treasure was hidden. — Have you got any ideas on how he will find the treasure, my young readers? Mole Tip: If you pay close attention to the decorations nearby that fit the description of "3 guns," you'll be able to figure out the answer on your own.

C: 「无数流星划过今夜的天空…如果选中了正确的那一颗，它将把你的愿望带向千百个世界。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 命运的罗盘上标着三个方向：未知、已知和不可知。可以忍受「未知」，却绝不能屈服于「不可知」。 阿基维利离开孤绝世界裴伽纳，不断开拓着宇宙未知的边界，试图找寻存在之树的端点。但祂的命运因意外而终结。
E: "Countless shooting stars streak across the night sky... If you can pick the right one, it will carry your wish to thousands of distant worlds." — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith There are three directions on the compass of destiny — the Unknown, the Known, and the Unknowable. THEY can tolerate the Unknown, but will never bow to the Unknowable. Akivili left the isolated world of Pegana and continued to expand the unknown edges of the universe, trying to find an endpoint of the Tree of Existence. Unfortunately, Akivili's destiny was abruptly ended due to an accident.

E: Outworld

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 自我毁灭亦是毁灭的表征。被囚于匣中的残念，至今仍渴求着彻底的消亡。
E: Self-destruction is yet another form of utter ruin. The restless obsession trapped in the void long ago craves tranquility and peace.

C: 疯狂的大守护者葬身于此。再次踏足永冬岭，回忆与可可利亚的最后一战。
E: Here rests the Supreme Guardian caught by insanity. The last battle with Cocolia on the Everwinter Hill shall echo through eternity.

C: 撕裂负世的执念，巨械于憎恨中自我加冕。再度身入灵知的葬仪，闭熄烬灭的劫火。
E: Tearing apart the obsession to bear the world, the colossus crowned itself in hatred. Enter once more the funeral of wisdom and extinguish the flames of karma.

C: 铁蒺藜和拒马界定了战线的最前沿。铁卫们在此线上誓死坚守，未曾让怪物更近一步。
E: Caltrops and chevaux de frise define the frontlines of the battlefield. The Silvermane Guards have sworn to hold this line and never let the monsters take a single step closer.

C: 贝洛伯格北方的绝壁，无尽冰期的发端——雪国圣徒将在此处对世界的命运作出判决。
E: Imposing cliffs to the north of Belobog where the endless ice age began. From here, the saints of the snow country issue their judgment on the fate of the world.

C: 迴星港的植船流水线的作业平台之一。在此处，船体的「种子」被注入息壤培养基中簇生萌发。
E: One of the work platforms of the Ship Nursery pipeline in Stargazer Navalia. This is where the "seed" of the ships are inserted into the Fallow Earth growth medium to allow for germination and budding.

C: 考验参选者是否拥有能与「盛会之星」身份相匹配的战斗实力的关卡，不知为何一分为二。这是一号擂台。
E: A stage that tests whether the participant possesses combat prowess worthy of the title of "Festive Superstar." For unknown reasons, the arenas were split into two. This is Arena I.

C: 通往树冠的空中连廊，神识幻作的金蝶扼守要道，唯有心存无私之爱的来者方可向上觐见。
E: The aerial walkway leading to the treetop, guarded by golden butterflies formed from soul essence. Only those with selfless love in their hearts may ascend and seek audience.

C: 人们曾在此处拾级而上口诵祷言，觐见负世泰坦。人们也在此处沿阶而下逃离黑潮，悼念创生之神。
E: People once ascended these steps, chanting prayers to meet the World-Bearing Titan. Now, they descend these same steps, fleeing the black tide and mourning the God of Creation.

C: 侵晨巨剑的剑柄所在处，盗火的业身在此地迎来安眠。
E: Here lies the hilt of the greatsword Dawnmaker. The sinful body that reft the flames found its final rest in this place.

C: 裂界与现实交错的入口，如无必要，勿入其中。
E: The entrance intersecting the Fragmentum with reality. Do not enter unless absolutely necessary.

C: 以「存护」之星神命名的宏伟堡垒，亦是「大守护者」的居所和指挥中心。
E: This magnificent fort, named after the Aeon of Preservation, is also the Supreme Guardian's residence and command center.

C: 这节车厢曾经承载了很多故事，而现在它只是供列车组成员休息的客房。
E: This express car had witnessed many stories, and now it is only a guest area for the Crew to rest in.

C: 陈机铺的老板连烟信奉「物尽其用」的原则，所以你能在她这里买到不少「垃圾」。正如连烟所倡导的那样，这世上没有无用之物，只有不懂「物尽其用」的人。
E: Lianyan, the proprietress of the Oldies Depot, is a firm believer in "everything has a purpose," hence you'll find quite a bit of "trash" available for purchase at her store. As per Lianyan's mantra, there are no useless items in the world, just people who fail to fully utilize them.

C: 美馔阁已连续多年入围「星际美食家协会•星际严选」前<unbreak>10000</unbreak>名。矮阿姨希望能在有生之年突破前<unbreak>8000</unbreak>名，但这个梦想还遥遥无期。
E: The Delicacy Pavilion has entered the top <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> rankings for the Interastral Gourmet Association's Interastral Selection over the course of multiple years. Short Auntie hopes that she can break through the top <unbreak>8000</unbreak> before her time is done, but this dream remains long and far away.

C: 挥洒青春和汗水的大树，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: A great tree that shines with youth and sweat. A place where Origami Birds gather.

C: 《折纸小鸟外传》已经完成制作，动画师们正在此处进行宣传活动，去跟他们聊聊吧。
E: Origami Bird's Extras has been completed, and the animators are here to conduct promotional activities. Go have a chat with them!

C: 身形庞大的木马，它以「记忆残晶」为柴薪，一度跨越门径，让肚子里的东西变得更加多彩——当然，定价也更合理。
E: A towering wooden horse once crossed the Passage, fueled by "Memory Crystal Shards." It made the treasures within its belly more vivid, more varied — and, of course, more reasonably priced.

C: 自远古时期便在翁法罗斯存在的自然生物，由裂分之枝，瑟希斯为其赋予活性。从未被任何城邦驯服过，性情暴烈不羁，泰坦的赐福同时也成为了致命的武器。
E: A natural creature from the ancient Amphoreus era, brought to life by Cerces, the Bough of Rift. Untamed by any city, they are feral and unruly. As it turns out, the blessings of the Titans have transformed into a lethal weapon.

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是「苏乐达」汽水的派送员，失控后仍在挥洒甜蜜，让所有人都来品尝美味的饮品。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally a SoulGlad deliveryman, this out-of-control servant continues to exude sweetness, enticing everyone to indulge in the tasty drink.

C: 回忆之蕾 • 拟造花萼（金）
E: Calyx (Golden): Bud of Memories

After defeating enemies in the overworld, additionally receive a small amount of credits. After defeating enemies in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, additionally receive a small amount of Cosmic Fragments with a small chance to obtain 1 random Curio.

E: Enemies cannot take actions or detect your team. When entering battle, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> base chance for each enemy to become Frozen, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

E: Stops all enemy actions within the Special Dimension.

E: Enemy Wind DMG taken +<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the DMG dealt by the ally with the highest ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

E: All enemies receive increased <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nAt the start of every Cycle, there is a high chance of inflicting <color=#f29e38ff>Bleed</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Burn</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear</color> on all enemies. Status inflicted in this way will last for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 每层【迷音】使敌方目标受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。「战意汹涌」期间，忆灵攻击后使目标陷入<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层【迷音】。
E: Every stack of "Echo Enigma" increases enemy target's DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. During "Surging Grit," enemy targets gain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Echo Enigma" after a memosprite attacks them.

C: 每场战斗中，我方全体首次施放战技造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG dealt by the first Skill used by all allies in each battle increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方全体普攻伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases the Basic ATK DMG of all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: Summon-type weapons' SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 在拥有【坚防守备】的敌方单位被弱点击破前，累积受到的追加攻击伤害值。在弱点击破后对该单位造成等同于累积伤害值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的附加伤害。
E: Before enemy units with "Steadfast Safeguard" are Weakness Broken, tally the amount of Follow-Up ATK DMG they receive. When the unit is Weakness Broken, deal to this unit Additional DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tallied DMG.

C: 提升【流金铄石】的剑压伤害。

Attacks all enemies upon taking action. For every different Weakness the enemy target has, it takes the corresponding Type DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG, and has a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> fixed chance of triggering consecutive attacks, up to a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> times.

C:
各位亲爱的御主：
大家好，我是巡海游侠波提欧。
阿斯德纳的晚风逐渐有了夏天的感觉，万望各位领导玉体金安，不因痰火郁热而伤风，白白误了这盛夏的良辰好景。
身为一介通缉犯，却能有幸与诸位领导一起角逐「圣杯」，我倍感荣幸。
因此，怀着无比崇敬与感激的心情，我郑重邀请您莅临「克劳克影视乐园」。我将以薄酒愚肴盛宴相待。
在这处暑时节，「克劳克影视乐园」如诗如画，宛若人间仙境，定会为您带来难忘的回忆。
如蒙应允，不胜欣喜，敬候嘉音。愿此小聚成为我们关系的美好见证，亦期盼能为您带来些许愉悦与放松。
顺致崇高的敬意与衷心的祝福。
此致，
敬礼！
您卑微的
波提欧
E:
To my dearest Masters,
Greetings to you all. I am Boothill, the Galaxy Ranger.
As the evening breeze of Asdana carries with it the tender whispers of approaching summer, I humbly pray that your noble selves remain in radiant health, untouched by the vexations of seasonal ailments, so as not to miss the splendor of this midsummer's enchanting beauty.
Though but a humble fugitive, it is my profound honor to stand alongside your esteemed selves in the pursuit of the Holy Grail.
As such, with a heart brimming with reverence and gratitude, I extend to you a most earnest invitation to grace Clock Studios Theme Park with your presence. There, I shall humbly offer a modest feast of wine and fare in your esteemed company.
In this season of summer's retreat, Clock Studios Theme Park has transformed into a realm of poetic wonder, a paradise on earth that promises to etch unforgettable memories upon your hearts.
Should you deign to accept my invitation, I would be overjoyed beyond measure. I shall eagerly await your reply. May this humble gathering serve as a cherished testament to the bond we share, and may it bestow upon you a moment of delight and respite amidst your noblest endeavors.
With the highest regards and the deepest wishes,
Here's to you,
Salutations from,
Yours humbly,
Boothill

C: 铁卫的补贴里有几张黄金大剧院的票，杰帕德原本是想邀请姐姐和妹妹一起来看的…但是那两位似乎抽不出空闲时间，正好你出现了。剧院散场后，你的审美雷达嗡嗡作响，那毫无疑问是部烂剧，可杰帕德他却感动得哭了——
E: The Silvermane Guard's benefits include a few tickets to the Golden Theater. Gepard wanted to invite his two sisters... But those two are too busy, and you are here and available. As the play draws to a close, your aesthetic radar starts beeping — it's indubitably a crappy play, but Gepard is moved to tears...

C: 「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——」红发少年卢卡赢下了拳赛的上半场。中场休息的期间，你偷听到对手正在商量着肮脏的战术，出于好心的你将这件事告诉卢卡…少年却摆摆手，说自己心中有数——
E: "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion—" The red-haired young man Luka has won the first round of the fight tournament. During the intermission, you overhear the opponent discussing dirty tactics to use. Out of kindness, you tell Luka about this... But the young man just dismisses it and says he knows what he's doing...

C: 自打你和驭空见面时，她就已经是沉稳的天舶司司舵了。但是鉴于*很多人*都提到了她曾经狂野的一面，你决心在天舶司里翻找档案，佐证你心中的猜想。搜索…「连闯六个红灯…狐人飞行士…」，是否点击「确定」，你有些犹豫——
E: Ever since you've known Yukong, she was already the steadfast Sky-Faring Helm Master. But in light of *many people* mentioning her once-wild side, you decide to rummage through the files at the Sky-Faring Commission to ascertain your speculation. Searching... "Ran six red lights in a row... Flying foxian..."... Hit "Confirm"? You hesitate for a moment...

C: 应对策略：优先攻击有相同属性标记的目标以解除我方单位的属性附魔效果，在首领幻影的部位再生前，消灭所有部位，以击破首领幻影。
E: Strategy: Prioritize attacking specific targets to remove the Type Infusion effect from its targets. Eliminate all parts of the Boss Mirage before regeneration to inflict Weakness Break on the Boss Mirage.

C: 当我方【点数】小于等于首领幻影时，优先消灭【点数】小于等于我方的骰子，以累积点数。
E: When allies' Points are equal to or less than the Boss Mirage's, prioritize defeating dice with Points that are equal to or less than allies' Points to accumulate more Points.

C: 应对策略：在首领幻影施放强力技能前，尽可能地消灭【残破容器】以降低【灾难之力】层数，优先消灭【完整容器】。
E: Strategy: Before Boss Mirage uses their powerful ability, defeat as many "Long-Shattered Vessels" as possible to lower the "Calamity Power" stacks. Prioritize defeating "Complete Vessels."

C: 首领幻影的召唤物会锁定我方目标并对其施放【万劫不复】，造成高额伤害。
E: Entities summoned by Boss Mirage will lock onto a target and use Eternal Condemnation against them, dealing massive DMG.

C: 消灭虫群召唤物，触发【蛰亡语】或【蚀亡语】并对首领幻影造成伤害时，会削减其1点虫卵。
E: When defeating Swarm summons and triggering "Entomon Eulogy" and "Decay Eulogy" to deal DMG to Boss Mirage, 1 Insect Egg will be reduced.

C: 当首领幻影处于【死亡的芬芳】状态时，对首领幻影和其召唤物造成伤害，可以削减首领幻影的生命值，进而削减【濒死梦泡】，以此解除【死亡的芬芳】状态。
E: When Boss Mirage is in the "Fragrance of Death" state, dealing DMG to Boss Mirage and its summons will reduce Boss Mirage's HP, which in turn reduces the "Desperate Bubble," thereby dispelling the "Fragrance of Death" state.

C: 应对首领幻影的控制效果
E: Counters Boss Mirage's control effects

C: 应对没有弱点属性的首领幻影
E: Counters Boss Mirage that has no Weakness Type

C: 如何解除我方单位的【负载生命值】状态
E: Dispelling "HP Overload" From Ally Units

C: 杰帕德会加入战斗并为首领幻影提供保护。首领幻影会将自身弱点属性<color=#f29e38ff><u>转移</u></color>给召唤物，但当召唤物被消灭时，自身韧性值受到额外削减。
E: Gepard will join the battle and provide protection for Boss Mirage. Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff><u>Transfer</u></color> its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.

C: 守护者创造的巨大冰矛，能释放出席卷全场的刺骨霜风。
E: A giant lance of ice created by the guardian. It can unleash a piercing frost wind that sweeps across the field.

C: 以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，负责移动的附肢上装置着信号灯，似乎曾用于采集或建造作业。\n战斗中，自动机兵「甲虫」会创造力场护盾保护自己。
E: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. A signal light is placed on its legs, and the unit may have been used for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Beetles can create forcefields to shield themselves.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为美梦剧团的演员们，蒙受了「秩序」的恩典，化作宣明法度的傀儡。它们在至高的诫命下起舞，献演迎接乐园的剧目。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is the actors of the Sweet Dreams Troupe who have accepted the grace of the Order and become puppets that declare the law. They dance under the supreme commandments, beginning a show that will welcome the coming of paradise.

C: 星际和平公司「战略投资部」的高级干部，「石心十人」之一。借由基石分得「存护」令使的权能，以身作骰，置之死地而后生。
E: A senior manager in the IPC Strategic Investment Department and one of the Ten Stonehearts. Using his Cornerstone, he obtained a share of the authority of an Emanator of Preservation. He throws his own body into the game as a die, ready to face death in order to walk away alive.

E: Black Mud will appear in battle to enhance the Boss. After enhancement, "Cocolia (Corrupted)" will immediately use "Wrath of Winterland Saints" and "Punishment of Endless Winter."

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动对我方全体施放【剿灭指令】。
E: Enters the Charging state. The next action uses "Purge Order" on all targets.

E: Summons Automaton Beetle and Automaton Hound at random.

C: 召唤建木枝梢【缃叶之杪】。
E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Marple Leaf"

E: Deals minor Wind DMG to all targets.

E: Adds "Summon the Pack" to the Action Order. Whenever "Summon the Pack" takes action, summons "Sableclaw Wolftrooper" or "Eclipse Wolftrooper."

C: 使除自身外的敌方全体立即行动。
E: Causes all friendly units apart from this unit to immediately take action.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 使敌方随机单体和自身转变为【狂乱】状态，并为其附加【<u>班味</u>】状态。只能在【讥讽】状态下使用。
E: Makes one random friendly unit and this unit switch to the "Rabid" state and applies "<u>Overworked</u>" to them. This can only be used in the "Mocked" state.

C: 使我方全体攻击力提高。只能在【讥讽】状态下使用。
E: Increases all targets' ATK. This ability can only be used while under the "Mocked" state.

C: 大概率使我方全体陷入【<u>异梦</u>】状态。
E: High chance of inflicting <u>Alien Dream</u> to all targets.

C: 大幅提升自身造成的伤害，持续1回合，陷入弱点击破状态后解除。
E: Greatly increases DMG dealt for 1 turn. This effect is removed when this unit becomes Weakness Broken.

C: 立即对上一名施放普攻、战技、终结技的我方目标发动致命攻击，使其陷入【梦死】状态。
E: Immediately launches a killing blow on the last-acting target who used Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, and inflicts Morbid Dream on them.

C: 进入【夜幕将临】状态，为我方全体恢复能量，期间会锁定2名最先行动的我方目标。下次行动时使用【如水逝于水中】。
E: Enters the Nightfall state, regenerates energy for all targets, and locks onto the 2 targets who are due to act next. Uses Watery Dissolution in the next action.

C: 对芒寒色正的银骑士施加1层【桂冠】，大幅提高下一次【不可抵挡的命运】的伤害。
E: Applies 1 stack of Wreath to Silver Knight of Virtuous Gallantry and greatly increases the DMG from the next use of Undeniable Fate.

C: 我方角色使用燃烧战技点或受到【灼烧】伤害后，将使我方陷入【<u>焚身</u>】状态。当萨姆解除【次级燃烧】时，【<u>焚身</u>】效果将被移除。
E: When a target uses Combusted Skill Points or receives Burn DMG, inflict <u>Immolation</u> on the target. When Sam dispels the Secondary Combustion, the <u>Immolation</u> effect is removed.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量量子属性伤害，对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one target and its adjacent targets. This DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" against targets with HP percentage above a certain value.

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Imaginary DMG to random single targets.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 施放【沉默的悲叹】时，消耗生命值召唤【残破容器】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。当拥有的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0时，若【残破容器】受到致命攻击，则立即消耗1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>和一定比例的生命值，重新召唤【残破容器】。施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】时，吸收【残破容器】并回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值。
E: When using "Silent Sorrow," consumes HP to summon a "Long-Shattered Vessel" and converts the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> When stacks of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> are not at 0 and if a "Long-Shattered Vessel" receives a killing blow, immediately consumes 1 stack of <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and a percentage of HP to re-resummon a "Long-Shattered Vessel." When using "Cry Not For The Discarded," absorbs any "Long-Shattered Vessel" and restores the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u>

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害，消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>额外造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数越多，伤害的段数越多。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more <u>"Calamity Power"</u> stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG.

C: 获得一定层数的【减伤】，使自身受到的伤害降低，每有1个【残破容器】被消灭后失去1层。
E: Receives a certain number of stacks of "DMG reduction," reducing DMG received by this unit. 1 stack is lost after defeating 1 "Long-Shattered Vessel."

C: 对指定我方单体造成伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。

E: Remnants

E: Let Blank Wishes Become Whole

E: Cry Not for the Discarded

E: S—S—S—Scared

E: Phew... Escaped

E: Disarm Ban

E: Cost Reduction

E: Stratagems' Wagering

C: <color=#f29e38ff>击破</color>首领幻影后会大幅提高其受到的伤害，使我方全体恢复战技点并激活终结技。
E: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> the Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and Ultimates are activated.

C: 可以嘲讽敌方全体，为我方提供<color=#f29e38ff>全体护盾</color>。
E: Taunts all enemy units and provides a <color=#f29e38ff>Collective Shield</color> to allies.

C: 比例模型，冰封的虚卒•掠夺者（跪立）。
E: Scale model of a frozen Voidranger: Reaver (Kneeling)

C: 佩佩有话说！来尝试翻译它的叫声吧！
E: Peppy has something to say! Try and translate its barks!

C: 无望冽风的幻灭者
E: Annihilator of Desolation Mistral

C: 「药王秘传」器元士
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus: Ballistarius

C: 丰饶灵兽•长右
E: Abundance Sprite: Malefic Ape

E: Slumbernana Monkey

E: Sublime, Radiant, Avatar of the Sky

E: Arna

E: "Gourmet Expert: King of Meat"

E: Prison Guard Captain

E: Theory of Four Apocalypses (Theory)

C: 星穹铁道•第八辑
E: Star Rail: Volume Eight

C: 破碎的前一秒，我仅存的希望已经全部流走。
E: In that moment before it broke, all the hope I had left drained away.

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 在奥帝商业中心进行「饮食」相关的消费
E: Make a "food-related" expenditure at the Oti Mall

C: 发现折纸小鸟在黄金的时刻的聚集地
E: Locate the gathering place of Origami Birds in Golden Hour

C: 触碰某人关于玩具的记忆
E: Touch upon someone's memory about toys

C: 探索流梦礁居民区，了解「万千铁桶之神」
E: Explore the Dreamflux Reef residential area and learn about the God of Innumerable Iron Cans

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 末日兽
E: Doomsday Beast

C: 调律过后，众多「停云」化作花瓣消散，最终汇聚于一处。自新生的莲花中，新生的停云向你们问好。
E: After the tuning, countless "Tingyun" scattered like flower petals, eventually converging in one place. From within the newly bloomed lotus, the reborn Tingyun greeted you all.

C: 跃迁过后，车窗外仍然空无一物。黑天鹅动用忆者能力，为你揭示翁法罗斯的全景。
E: After the warp, there was still nothing outside the window. Black Swan activated her Memokeeper ability to reveal a panoramic view of Amphoreus for you.

C: 艾丝妲周身被诡异的灵火包裹。在你触碰到她之前，艾丝妲便消失不见。
E: Asta was wrapped in a strange, spectral Phase Flame. Before you could reach her, she vanished.

C: 末日兽一战后，你再次醒来。丹恒已在身旁守候多时，并向苏醒的你问好。
E: After the Doomsday Beast fight, you woke up again. Dan Heng had been waiting by your side and greeted you.

C: 你们在旅店休息，梳理下层区情况。丹恒认为必须有所防备。布洛妮娅从与奥列格的交谈中归来，主动提出由她守夜。
E: You rested at the inn and reviewed the situation in the Underworld. Dan Heng believed it was necessary to remain vigilant. Bronya returned from her conversation with Oleg and offered to take the night watch.

C: 你们向娜塔莎传达胜利的消息，称可可利亚牺牲，星核已被封印，布洛妮娅将继任「大守护者」。娜塔莎拜托你们把胜利传达给民众们。
E: You brought news of the victory to Natasha: Cocolia had fallen, the Stellaron was sealed, and Bronya would take up the title of Supreme Guardian. Natasha asked you to spread this hope to the people.

C: 连接上下层的缆车开通，你与虎克、克拉拉等人重回地面。在经历长期的隔绝之后，下层区民众终于得以重见天日。
E: The cable car linking the two worlds roared was reopened. With Hook, Clara, and the others, you stepped onto the surface once more. After a long age of isolation, the people of the Underworld could finally bask in the light of day.

C: 跨越三千万世，为了将所有被遗忘的轮回保存下来，昔涟倾尽了一切。昔涟相信，总有一天会有人翻开这近乎「永恒」的一页。
E: Cyrene gave everything to record all the forgotten recurrences across thirty million cycles. She believed that someday, someone would turn over this nearly "eternal" page.

C: 怀炎正代表仙舟奉迎宝剑<color=#f29e38ff>「孤云」</color>归乡，云璃却听闻此剑出自其父<color=#f29e38ff>「含光」</color>之手。她当即出声阻止仪式，并声称要将这柄魔剑熔断。在云璃负气出门后，怀炎拜托你跟上她。
E: Huaiyan was representing the Xianzhou in welcoming the sword <color=#f29e38ff>Guyun</color> back to its homeland, yet Yunli learned that this blade was forged by her father, <color=#f29e38ff>Hanguang</color>. She immediately halted the ceremony, intending to melt down this cursed sword. After Yunli stormed out in anger, Huaiyan asked you to follow her.

C: 灵砂号令云骑缉捕涛然，涛然却挟持白露作为人质。涛然欲以褪鳞转生来勾销罪孽，而丹恒不会让其得逞，毅然出手惩凶。
E: Lingsha ordered the Cloud Knights to arrest Taoran, but he took Bailu hostage. Taoran tried to erase his crimes through exuviation and rebirth, but Dan Heng would not let this criminal escape justice.

C: 龙师涛然的一切盘算落空。景元来到鳞渊境，计划由方壶的伏波将军主持对涛然的处置，以此清算龙师，让罗浮上下的持明族心服口服。
E: Preceptor Taoran's elaborate schemes crumbled completely. Jing Yuan arrived at Scalegorge Waterscape, planning to have the Seiche Queller from the Fanghu oversee Taoran's punishment, settling accounts with the Preceptor and ensuring the Vidyadhara across Luofu would respect the judgment.

C: 桑博向你们介绍「地髓」。这是一种能供暖的矿石，下层区矿民以挖掘地髓为生。如今上下交通已经被封锁，只有地髓运输线仍在运行。
E: Sampo introduced you to the Geomarrow, a type of ore used for heating, which the miners in the Underworld rely on for their livelihood. With Overworld-Underworld transit blocked, only the Geomarrow transport line remains operational.

C: 「持明遗卵，浴月沐华。古海泱泱，浴月复生。」壁画描绘的是持明族之卵在波月古海蜕生，再世为人的开端。
E: "Beneath the lunar glow adorned, Vidyadhara eggs begin to form, and from the ancient sea reborn, to walk again on solid earth." The mural illustrated the Vidyadhara hatching rebirth in the Lunarescent Depths — the beginning of self-reincarnation.

C: 你在梦境贩售店遇到「爱德华医生」。它邀请你体验一枚梦泡，据说其中的记忆来自已陨的阿基维利。
E: You encountered Dr. Edward at the Dreamscape Sales Store. They invited you to experience a dream bubble, and it is said that the memories within came from the fallen Akivili.

C: 米沙带你们参观流梦礁最壮观的景色，瓦尔特认出其是由忆质凝聚形成。
E: Misha took you to see the most spectacular sights of Dreamflux Reef, and Welt recognized that the scenery was formed from condensed memoria.

C: 你赢得与银枝的对决，获得其信任与支持，银枝自愿退让桂冠，并为你送上祝福与欢呼。
E: You defeated Argenti and gained his trust and support. Argenti voluntarily gave up the champion's crown, saluting you with blessings and cheers.

C: 你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等你准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
E: Take your time to savor this moment. Once you felt ready, step onto the final stage.

C: 你与丹恒无法联系上星穹列车，只好动身寻找坠毁车厢之外的根据地。你感觉到附近神殿的入口处，有什么东西在偷偷看着你。
E: Having lost contact with the Express, you and Dan Heng left to find shelter beyond the crashed car. At a nearby temple entrance, you felt something watching you.

C: 你与白厄捡到一块写着悬锋城古语的石板，暂时无法释读。你们决定与万敌会合之后，把石板交给他看。
E: You and Phainon found a stone tablet with ancient Kremnoan writing that you couldn't read. You decided to show it to Mydei when you met up with him again.

C: 你与白厄再次与万敌见面，他称自己已经击败三十个敌人。白厄提及刻着悬锋古语的石板，换回的只是万敌对白厄「野史学家」的调侃。
E: You and Phainon ran into Mydei again, who said he'd beaten thirty enemies. When Phainon showed him the tablet with ancient Kremnoan writing, Mydei just teased him for being an "amateur historian."

C: 你们再次遇到武器商人，他正在捡拾逝者的兵锋。格奈乌斯欲以杀戮惩罚这种卑劣之举，但遐蝶认为死亡不可轻率漫滋，选择留其一命。
E: You came across the weapon merchant once more, scrounging among the fallen for usable blades. Gnaeus sought to punish such disgrace with death, yet Castorice stayed his hand. To her, death was no trifling matter to be sown recklessly. Thus, the merchant's life was spared.

C: 母亲对缇宝说，她要去主持秘密的祭祀仪式。如果一直没有回来，就说明找到了赶走黑潮的办法。缇宝与母亲约定好，明天见。
E: Tribbie's mother told her that she was to preside over a secret ritual. If she did not return, it would mean she found a way to chase away the black tide. Tribbie promised her mother that she would see her tomorrow.

C: 下一届公民大会召开在即，白厄担心那刻夏被元老院利用来反对逐火之旅。白厄想为那刻夏争取更多时间，希望你与丹恒理解他的努力。
E: The next citizens' assembly was soon to arrive, and Phainon feared that the Council of Elders would try to use Anaxa to oppose the Flame-Chase Journey. He wanted to plead for Aglaea to give Anaxa more time, and hoped you and Dan Heng would understand his efforts.

C: 在接受试炼前，还有些时间好好休息。丹恒已经习惯在日光下入睡，他预感到翁法罗斯的「开拓」即将步入新的阶段。
E: Before accepting the trial, you still had some time to rest. Dan Heng was already used to sleeping in broad daylight. He suggested that a new phase of your Trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus was about to begin.

C: 那刻夏看到名为「格奈乌斯」的战士灵体与形似瑟希斯的灵体对话，慨叹其长枪被黑潮毁蚀。然而瑟希斯称自己并不记得「格奈乌斯」。
E: Anaxa saw the soul of a warrior named "Gnaeus" conversing with a soul that resembled Cerces, lamenting that the black tide had destroyed his spear. Cerces claimed that they did not know anyone by the name of "Gnaeus."

C: 灵魂球揭露出遐蝶的身世。斯缇科西亚于冥河席卷中覆灭，唯有女王与龙腹少女幸存。阿蒙内特答应照料少女成长，为其命名「遐蝶」。
E: This time, the spirit orb revealed Castorice's origin. Styxia perished in the River of Souls, with only its queen and her dragon-born daughter surviving. Amunet promised to raise the child, and named her "Castorice."

C: 索拉比斯和露奈比斯的灵魂得以重逢，而艾格勒的印记再次飞逃。索拉比斯认可你们挑战「天空」的决意，引领你们前往猎神。
E: Solabis's and Lunabis's souls reunited, and the Mark of Aquila fled once more. Solabis, recognizing your will to challenge the "Sky," led you onward in your quest for deicide.

C: 浑象仪缺乏能源驱动。丹恒注意到殿厅两侧有一些巨大物体，或许与能源有关。白厄拜托你操控「扎格列斯之手」将其修复。
E: The celestial globe lacked energy, and Dan Heng noticed some large objects on the walls of the chamber. He guessed they had something to do with the energy source. Phainon tasked you with controlling the Hand of Zagreus to repair them.

C: 你与迷迷一起回到创世涡心，寻找白厄，见证最后一颗火种归位，以及再创世仪式的开始。
E: You and Mem returned to the Vortex of Genesis in search of Phainon, just in time to witness the return of the final Coreflame and the beginning of the Era Nova ritual.

C: 在仪式开始前，白厄感谢你陪他走到最后一刻。如果没有你，翁法罗斯恐怕无法迎来预言中的明天。
E: Before the ceremony began, Phainon thanked you for staying with him to the very end. Without you, Amphoreus might never have reached its prophesied tomorrow.

C: 斯科特通过葛瑞迪的宝具来观看其他参赛者，发现了「战略投资部」的翡翠与砂金。
E: Using Grady's Noble Phantasm, Skott observed the other participants and spotted Jade and Aventurine from the Strategic Investment Department.

C: 知更鸟的分裂导致同谐的力量被削弱。Saber与音符小姐留下来保护知更鸟，你与Archer出发收集更多知更鸟以使其聚合。
E: Because of the split, Robin's powers of the Harmony had weakened. Saber and Miss Note stayed behind to protect Robin, while you and Archer set out to gather the remaining Robins and help her fuse back together.

C: 刻律德菈与城邦代表们即将入场，海瑟音询问你们歇息得如何。若准备妥帖，便随她一同前去议会。
E: Cerydra and the city-state delegates were about to enter. Hysilens asked if you had rested well. If you were prepared, she would escort you to the meeting.

C: 你和迷迷来到黑塔空间站，看到卡芙卡和银狼。迷迷会守在这里，等你回望过去。
E: You and Mem arrived at the Herta Space Station, where you saw Kafka and Silver Wolf. Mem stayed behind to keep watch, waiting for you to look back on your past.

C: 当「憎恨」分离万物，「爱」尚不存于世间。只有「哀怜」，最初抗拒分离的情感，能让「毁灭」停下脚步，再追上那失却一切的旅途，记录下故事里所有的「记忆」。
E: When "hatred" had separated all things, and "love" had yet to exist in this world, only "lament," the first emotion that fought against the pain of separation, could stall the Destruction's steps, then catch up to that journey where all was lost, and record all the memories within the story.

C: 博识尊向翁法罗斯投来目光，「铁墓」一战的结果，会成为「智识」数算的新锚点。昔涟请你和所有人一起，走完史诗的最后一页。
E: Nous had cast THEIR gaze upon Amphoreus. The outcome of the battle with Irontomb would become a new anchor for the Erudition's computations. Cyrene invited you and everyone else to walk through the final page of this epic together.

C: 「记忆」浮黎瞥视翁法罗斯。在刹那的永恒中，昔涟将你唤醒。昔涟看到无数心识飘荡在星空中，只要收拢这些记忆，她就能创造出一片停滞的忆域，一片小小的「善见天」。帕姆鼓励你向前奔跑，哪怕全银河都停下了脚步，你也要继续奔跑下去，这就是「开拓」的意义。
E: Fuli the Remembrance glanced at Amphoreus. In that fleeting moment of eternity, Cyrene awakened you. Cyrene saw countless consciousnesses drifting through the starry sky. If she could gather those memories, she could create a stagnant Memory Zone, a small Eden of Blessed Insight. Pom-Pom encouraged you to keep running forward. Even if the entire cosmos comes to a halt, you must continue running. This is the meaning of Trailblaze.

C: 虎克查看笔记以寻找宝物位置，可惜笔记的后半部分无法辨识。见此情景，你决定用「家用寻物仪」帮虎克找找。
E: Hook checked her notes to find the treasure's location, but unfortunately, the latter half was illegible. Seeing this situation, you decided to help Hook by using the Home-Use Object Finder.

C: 玲可与佩拉发现营地中有一只次元扑满。佩拉认为扑满是很危险的裂界生物，应当消灭；玲可则出于科考的需要，想要为扑满拍张照。
E: Lynx and Pela discovered a Warp Trotter in the camp. Pela believed the Trotter was a dangerous Fragmentum creature that should be eliminated, while Lynx wanted to take a photo of it for scientific research purposes.

C: 你与希儿、卢卡来到机械聚落。希儿有些不耐烦，卢卡请你们跟他去找一位名为卡西迪的机械师。
E: You, Seele, and Luka arrived at the Robot Settlement. Seele grew impatient, while Luka asked you to help him find a mechanic named Cassidy.

C: 希儿打开卢卡留下的匣子，发现一本陈旧的笔记本。看着像是小孩子的字迹，还有涂鸦。希儿请你一起来看看。
E: Seele opened the box Luka had left behind. Inside was a worn notebook filled with childish handwriting and scribbled art. She invited you to take a look with her.

C: 蜃影是持明族蜕生时留下的前世记忆。你们经过第一处蜃影，他告诉你们，当年的丹枫擅用「化龙妙法」造出孽龙，而后众人齐力将它斩杀。事后龙师们则想通过「族内审判」逼迫丹枫交出「化龙妙法」。
E: The Mirage Echo is the past life memory left behind from the Vidyadhara's hatching rebirth. The first Mirage Echo you passed revealed to you that Dan Feng once used the Transmutation Arcanum to create an abominable dragon, which was then slain by a unified effort. Afterward, the Preceptors attempted to force Dan Feng to surrender the Transmutation Arcanum through an internal clan trial.

C: 景元等人调查步离人机甲残骸。景元认为，将机甲送入幽囚狱的一系列布局与步离人的一贯作风大相径庭，幕后一定有其他主谋。
E: Jing Yuan and the others investigated the borisin mech wreckage. He noted that the series of arrangements to send the mech into The Shackling Prison differed vastly from the borisins' usual tactics, suggesting there must have been other masterminds behind the operation.

C: 三月七走出休息室，在不远处就遭遇了拦路的步离人，与之进入战斗。
E: March 7th exited the lounge and soon encountered borisin blocking the way, engaging them in battle.

C: 据这位云骑所说，他的武器找上了彦卿准备收徒，而他变得神智昏乱也是因为武器中的岁阳。你们得知彦卿的剑已被岁阳凭附。
E: Based on the Cloud Knight's account, his weapon had approached Yanqing seeking to make him a disciple, and the heliobus inside the weapon had made him delirious. You learned that Yanqing's sword had been possessed by a heliobus.

C: 久追无果后，桂乃芬提出效仿故乡抓飞鼯的方法，让藿藿拿着「藏月瓠」蹲守死角，其余人将白露赶来此处抓住，以此诱使岁阳现身。
E: When the pursuit proved unsuccessful, Guinaifen proposed a technique from her home for trapping flying squirrels: Huohuo would wait at a corner with the Lunaumbra Gourd while everyone else herded Bailu toward that spot to capture her, thereby drawing out the heliobus.

C: 在岁阳的影响下，藿藿以为尾巴也要离她而去，陷入痛苦之中。尾巴决定将所有离开的人拉回来，以此拯救藿藿。
E: Under the heliobus's influence, Huohuo believed that Tail would also leave her and fell into despair. To save Huohuo, Tail decided to bring back everyone who had turned away.

C: 盛会巨鹰
E: Festive Superhawk

C: 淬砺回火
E: AnnealedbyFire

C: 寻找热点事件的嗅觉非常敏锐哦。
E: Someone's got a keen sense for hot scoops.

C:
佚名之人自漫长的沉眠中醒来，遥远而熟悉的紧张感挥之不散，幻痛清晰锐利。过去种种成了锋利的碎片，自己的姓字也已忘却。

在漫无目的的流离中，他接饮落雪解渴，搏杀野兽充饥，信手斩下一截枯枝作木簪绾住长发。

黑发如山泉流水汩汩而出，皮下肌肉如江鲫翻涌般抽搐鼓动…奇妙的力量不断重塑着躯体，传来筋骨断开复又连接的苦楚。伴随着无数次幻痛折磨，支离破碎的过往开始缝合完整…他从水中窥觑自我倒影时，惨剧的始末也逐渐清晰。

直到水中的面孔不再陌生，佚名之人倏忽间看见枯枝生出了花芽。

他恍然醒悟。长生不死的诅咒其势甚烈，旧日的恩怨并未死去，他就是这条枯枝上新生的花朵。
E:
A distant and yet familiar feeling of nervousness wrapped around him, sharp and distinct with phantom pain, as the unnamed woke from his long and deep slumber. His past was shattered into razor-edged shards, and he forgot even his own name.

Wandering aimlessly, he drank melted snow to quench his thirst, hunted wild beasts to fill his stomach, and chopped a withered branch to use as a wooden hair-stick to fasten his flowing hair.

Like the incessantly flowing stream of a mountain spring, his long, black hair never ceased growing. His flesh twitched and throbbed beneath his skin, like river carps flipping and swarming... Fascinating powers ceaselessly reconstructed his body, bringing an everlasting pain of bones and tendons rupturing and healing. As countless phantom agonies and torments tore through his body, his shattered past was also beginning to come together... As he glanced at his own reflection in the water, the story of that tragedy gradually cleared in his mind.

When the face in the reflection was no longer a stranger's, the unnamed suddenly realized the dead branch was sprouting flower buds.

Epiphany struck him like lightning. The curse of immortality still raged on, and the grudge of past misgivings never died out. HE was now the newborn flower on this once-dead branch.

C:
在匹诺康尼的诸多传闻中，「钟表匠」有着截然不同的身份与外表。

在虚构无端的故事里，他时而是和蔼的老者，时而是优雅的淑女，甚至有传言说他是一位身高百尺的巨人绅士…但无论在哪个故事里，他总有一身华丽的行头。

传言钟表匠会在晨昏交界的梦境中，将自己的秘密分享给舞伴。听闻此言，人们纷纷步入华服舞会，向每一位藏在金装玉裹的人群中的神秘宾客发出邀请——越来越多的逐梦客借此相识相知，舞会也渐渐变成友情与爱情的交际场。价格高昂的入场券总是开售即空，哪怕传闻中身着华服的主人从未现身，也不妨碍来宾们寻求邂逅的热情。

「瞧您的打扮，莫非就是大名鼎鼎的钟表匠？」这句话从最初的真诚询问，到后来的夸赞奉承，最终成了邀舞的托词。

钟表匠多了一份舞会的生意，而梦境中也多了一份浪漫与激情。
E:
In the various legends in Penacony, the Watchmaker has very diverse identities and appearances.

In these rootless fables, he is sometimes a kind old gentleman, an elegant lady, and even a giant gentleman hundreds of feet tall... however, no matter the version of the story, he is always magnificently dressed.

Legends say that the Watchmaker will share his secret with his dance partner at the Dreamscape where dusk and dawn intertwines. Hearing this, people eagerly join the dance floor and invite every single mysterious guest hidden in the lavishly-dressed crowd — More and more Dreamchasers meet each other in this way and the ball gradually becomes a place to socialize for friendships and love. The expensive tickets are always sold out upon release. Even if the master dressed to the nines from legends never appeared, it did not hinder the passion with which the guests sought an encounter with him.

"Your outfit... could you be the famous Watchmaker?" This question went from what was initially a genuine query to an expression of flattery, finally becoming a code phrase for an invitation to a dance.

The Watchmaker gained a new business of hosting balls, and the Dreamscape had an extra dash of romance and passion added to it.

C: ……想起一则关于「虚无」的轶事：曾经有人想要刺杀Ⅸ。那是一伙「泯灭帮」，没有胆量加入军团，却也想跟着纳努克为非作歹的废物。他们某天突发奇想，打算实现以人类之身干掉星神的零的突破，正好Ⅸ与世无争，认为宇宙、命途、生命毫无意义，泯灭帮就觉得：或许这位星神很好对付呢。据说他们真的在某位星神的帮助下踏上了行刺Ⅸ的旅途，当然，后面再也没有人知道这群人的下落。这个故事也确实毫无意义，除了一点：赞助泯灭帮的星神是「欢愉」阿哈，祂觉得这帮人的想法很有意思，于是出力送了他们一程。凡是跟阿哈有关的故事，说真的，我都欢愉不起来……
E: ...I recall a story about the Nihility — Some people had once tried to assassinate IX. Those were the Annihilation Gang, trash who were too scared to join the Legion but still wanted to wreak havoc with Nanook. They had a mad idea about wanting to be the first humans to kill an Aeon. They thought IX might be easy to handle because the Aeon is peaceful and thinks there is no purpose to the universe, Paths, and life. Apparently, with the assistance of another Aeon, they really did launch their plan to assassinate IX. As expected, nobody heard from this gang ever again. This story is pretty much pointless except for this: The Aeon that helped the Annihilation Gang was Aha the Elation. Aha thought these people had a fun idea, so THEY lent these humans THEIR power for a while. Seriously, I can't get elated from any stories related to Aha...

C: 可预料的，星际能源学派的研究遭遇了极大的阻碍。其中不仅有技术的瓶颈，也包含传统能源供应商的抵制，哪怕是星际和平公司，不同部门间，对于新能源的态度也截然不同。 在星际能源战争中，星际和平公司投入的大量资金，极大促进了博识学会在掘进、储能、探测等多项领域的突破性发展。开发一种优质、高产的新型能源，为这一目标，各学派的「权杖」配额，都当首先满足星际能源学派的研究需求。即便如此，仍有不止一篇史料表明，在学会的指示下，星际能源学派曾主动拖延了「权杖」的演算进程…… 纵观后世史料，无数的意外让这场战争以最恶劣的形式延长，让我不由怀疑，冥冥之中是否有股力量，在操弄我们前进的步伐？ ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: As expected, the research of the School of Interstellar Energy Resources faced significant hurdles. Not only were they beset by technical bottlenecks, but there was also resistance from traditional energy suppliers. Even the different departments within the IPC had varying attitudes toward new energy sources. During the Interstellar Energy War, the IPC invested massive funds to supercharge the progress of the Intelligentsia Guild's breakthrough developments in multiple fields, including drilling, energy storage, and detection. In order to achieve the goal of developing a new energy source superb in both quality and yield, the Scepter quotas of the various schools prioritized the research requirements of the School of Interstellar Energy Resources. Even so, there are multiple historical records stating that under the Guild's directives, the School of Interstellar Energy Resources once deliberately delayed the extrapolation progress of the Scepters... By perusing later historical records, countless incidents caused the protraction of this war in the worst possible manner. I can't help but wonder if there is some unseen force in the darkness that is manipulating our path forward? — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 奇异蝶
E: Strange Butterfly

C: 权杖攻击时，每次造成伤害都会额外造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的随机属性追加攻击伤害，并为我方随机角色附加<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>层【湍流】：每层使速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>层，持续<unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>回合。
E: When a Scepter attacks, every time DMG is dealt, additionally deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of Follow-Up ATK DMG of a random Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG and applies to random ally targets <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Deluge": Every stack increases SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting for <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

C: 权杖攻击时，每次造成击破伤害后额外造成等同于原伤害<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的附加伤害。
E: When the Scepter attacks, each instance of Break DMG dealt will additionally deal Additional DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG.

C: <color=#87e0ffff>【扩散】</color>对韧性值最低的敌方目标造成可扩散的量子属性伤害，并无视弱点削减韧性，若目标已处于弱点击破状态则额外造成击破伤害，重复<unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>次。并使目标在受到击破伤害后，使我方全体目标恢复能量且行动提前。
E: <color=#87e0ffff>"Blast"</color> deals Quantum DMG that can Blast to the enemy target with the lowest Toughness and reduces Toughness regardless of Weakness, additionally dealing Break DMG if the target is already Weakness Broken, repeating <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s). Also, after the target receives Break DMG, regenerates Energy for all ally targets and advances their action.

E: After an ally target gains any action advance effects, they deal more DMG in their next turn. While in the "<u>Butterfly Soul</u>" state, further increases the DMG dealt.

E: Increases Weakness Break Efficiency. Increases SPD and ATK after Breaking enemy target's Weakness.

C: #鲁珀特二世自称继承了天才俱乐部#27帝皇鲁珀特的记忆，并展开席卷寰宇的第二次反有机帝皇战争，战争期间生灵涂炭。在第二次反有机帝皇战争结束后，星际和平公司曾花费天价信用点，多次对#鲁珀特二世遗体进行鉴定，却最终得出骇人的结论：#鲁珀特二世为血肉之躯。
E: #Rubert II professed to have inherited the memories of Emperor Rubert, listed as Genius Society #27, and initiated the second cosmos-spanning anti-organic Emperor's War. With the war came terrible calamity, and at the end of the conflict, the IPC spent vast amounts of credits to repeatedly appraise #Rubert II's remains. This, however, led to a dreadful revelation: #Rubert II was a being of flesh and tissue.

C: 石语者用身体排出的固态信息结片，这种具备高等智慧的类棘皮动物用它们来记录所有的事物，从个体的只言片语，到整个社会的历史。由于石语者特殊的神经构造，结片内的信息能被各种星际文明以较低的成本解读，因而在联觉信标诞生前，它们便早早加入了公司体系，成为寰宇交流的重要助力。
E: Solid-state information flakes excreted from the bodies of Lapispeakers. These highly intelligent Echinodermata-like animals use these solids to record everything — from the broken words of an individual to the history of entire societies. Due to the unique neuronal structures of the Lapispeakers, the information in the solids can be decrypted by other interstellar civilizations at a relatively low cost. Therefore, they joined the IPC's system many years before the creation of the Synesthesia Beacon, becoming a key supporting function to cosmic communications.

C: 据不可靠史料记载，在古兽尚且穿行于寰宇的时代，世上只存在一种形式的寿司。当「秩序」崩塌，「贪餮」消失无踪，原初的寿司崇拜信仰也分裂成诸多学派。在一众寿司师傅中，还原主义寿司学派的烹饪理念格外质朴，他们认为，寿司的本质，应该是被一层可食用外皮包裹的能量集合。因此，全宇宙最符合寿司定义的应该是——内燃机。
E: According to unreliable historical records, in the age when the Leviathans still traversed the cosmos, there existed only one type of sushi. When the Order collapsed and the Voracity vanished without a trace, the original sushi faith also splintered into numerous factions. Among the sushi masters, the Sushi Restoration faction's cooking philosophy was simple — They believed that the essence of sushi should be a gathering of energy wrapped within an edible layer. Therefore, the thing most fitting of the definition of sushi in the universe should be — the internal combustion engine.

C: 用于「调和星际矛盾」的投票箱，根据使用者的意愿，你能从中得到任何东西。以太编辑的病毒代码，破坏力惊人的袖珍枪械，一支特米微型人组成的飞船舰队，甚至包括一张白旗。尽管它们总是突兀地出现在星际战场的各个角落，以「均衡」的名号高呼和平万岁，但正如所有人都知道它们出自假面愚者之手一样，自称「和平」的箱子也从来不会带来和平。
E: A ballot box used to mediate interstellar conflict. According to the user's wishes, you could obtain pretty much anything from within. An aether-edited virus code, a portable firearm with massive destructive power, a fleet of spaceships built by the tiny Thermians, white flag inclusive. Though they regularly pop up incongruously across all corners of interstellar theaters of war, proclaiming peace in the name of Equilibrium, these boxes calling themselves Peace will never bring peace — Just like how everyone knows they are the work of the Masked Fools.

C: 被做成奶酪外型的多面棱镜，每一个小孔都是单独镜面，被不同棱面照射到会产生不同效果，部分参与实验者被棱面照射后身体被放大或缩小，而部分参与实验者被照射后身体与原来并无区别，却无一例外接收了不属于自己的记忆，他们患上虚构记忆症，并认为在棱面中看到了星神浮黎谜样的面容。
E: A multifaceted prism made in the shape of cheese. Every hole is an individual surface, and reflections from each prism surface produce a different effect. Some participants in experiments have their bodies physically enlarged or reduced after being reflected in the prism. Meanwhile, other participants have no bodily alterations, but instead receive memories not of their own. They become diagnosed with fictmemoria, and claim that they saw the enigmatic face of the Aeon Fuli in the prism.

C: 如何令一个商业模式持续运作下去？在银河大乐透广获好评之后，星际和平公司的业务巩固部接棒奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德的产品远见，出售了星际大乐透，他们祈愿它同样能够获得成功，并为此打造了八十六条配套产业链一并推广——虽然公司打造的代言人「大乐透女神」宝乐思•梅丽在此后因不明原因身亡，但更多信用点最终涌入了星际和平公司！
E: How do you make a business model last? After getting rave reviews for their Cosmic Big Lotto, the Interastral Peace Corporation's Business Consolidation Department followed Oswaldo Schneider's product vision and put the Interastral Big Lotto on the market, hoping that it would bring them success as well. They even connected eighty-six complementary industrial production chains and promoted them as a single entity. However, although the "Lotto Goddess" Beatrice Mellanine the IPC wished to develop as their spokesperson for their product perished due to reasons unknown, the IPC still reaped a windfall of credits in the end!

C: 星际和平公司市场开拓部发售的银河大乐透，其营销方针正如奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德本人一样充满激情与热血，只需一块星际货币就可以赌一次自己的好运，贩卖人人都有机会成为宇宙富豪加入商业体系的造梦体验，在奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德的营销下，通常很少有新世界能抵御这种诱惑——他们为了赢得入场券，纷纷加入星际和平公司的宇宙商业体系，从而获得在自己的国度开展银河大乐透活动的加盟资格。
E: The marketing tactics for the Cosmic Big Lotto, sold by the Interastral Peace Corporation's Marketing Development Department, is as passionate and hot-blooded as Oswaldo Schneider himself. You just need one galactic currency to bet on your luck and become a trader in the experience of making dreams, where everyone has a chance to become a cosmic tycoon and join the business structure. Under Oswaldo Schneider's marketing strategy, few new worlds are able to resist such temptations — They eagerly join the Interastral Peace Corporation's universal business structure to win an entry ticket, obtaining the right to operate the Cosmic Big Lotto in their own realms.

C: 当腊梅-Ⅱ在引力坍缩下化作黑洞，引来无数游人围观时，你忽地产生一股冲动，想要就此打开观光船的护壁，朝着那片光与暗交织的视界一跃而下。死亡总是诱人的，它如同丛林里最娇艳芬芳的食虫植物，将找不到方向的飞虫吸引，却又断绝它们的前路。\n\n生命应该去往哪里？你无从知晓，可答案绝不会是死亡。你聆听着每一个悲伤的故事，它们渗透进银河的间隙，绝望的前路令人寸步难行。尽管如此，你仍想做一个黑洞边缘的守望者，抓住那些想要跳进虚无的孩子，告诉他们，「未来应该在另一个方向」。
E: When Wintersweet-II turned into a black hole due to gravitational collapse, drawing numerous onlookers, you suddenly had the urge to open the protective barrier of the sightseeing ship and take a leap toward the event horizon of intertwining light and darkness. Death is always tempting — it is like a carnivorous plant with the brightest colors in the forest that lures the lost insects yet cut off their path.\n\nWhere should life lead? You have no clue, but you are certain death is not the answer. You listen to each sorrowful tale, seeing them seep into the crevices in the cosmos, making the hopeless journey seem insurmountable. Even so, you still yearn to be a guardian at the edge of the black hole. You want to stop the children who intend to plunge into nihility and tell them, "The future lies in the other direction."

C: 翅膀停止了振动，它们就这样不听使唤地僵住，甚至没法收进甲壳里。疲惫，年迈，虫子的大脑不允许你理解这样复杂的概念，更别提你只是一只普通的蛰虫，短暂的寿命甚至不存在成年时期。你拖着坏死的翅膀，来自种族的记忆会告诉你要去哪里，残照王虫叫你丢掉跗节上的食物，向着诞生的地方前进。可就是这点距离，对于一只将死的蛰虫而言，也显得遥不可及。\n\n寒冷的真空里，数以万计的蛰虫仍忙碌地飞行着，但它们突然停下了工作，将你抬起来送往目的地，和幼虫的其它食粮一起。
E: When the wings cease fluttering, they stiffen beyond control, unable to be tucked in the carapace. The brain of a tired and aged insect doesn't allow you to digest such a complicated concept, not to mention you are just an ordinary Sting whose lifespan is so short that you do not even reach maturity. Dragging along your dead wings, the memory of your species will tell you where to go. The Afterglow Swarm King urges you to get rid of the food on your tarsi and proceed to your place of birth, but even such a short distance seems insurmountable to a dying Sting like you.\n\nIn the freezing vacuum, thousands of Stings that are busy flying around suddenly pause their work. They carry you to the destination where you will join the rest of the larvae's food.

C:
有一些孩子极其不幸，他们生来就是复仇的工具，
这些孩子又被称为孤童稚刃，一个令人闻风丧胆的名字。
一瓶毒药，一把匕首，这就是他们童年的全部，
翁法罗斯最优秀的杀手会传授他们技艺。
直到孩子被金主买下，去完成肮脏又危险的任务，
试想，哪位大人物会害怕一个天真无邪的孩童呢？
正是利用这个弱点，匕首如羽毛般划过脖颈，
当侍卫反应过来时，地上只留下两具尸体。
其中一具是孩子自己，那瓶毒药为此准备，
既然目标已经死去，他们也没有了存在的意义。
E:
Some children are unfortunately born as tools for vengeance.
Orphaned Daggers, they're called. A name that breathes fear into everyone's hearts.
Poison vials for teething rings. Daggers for bedtime tales.
They inherited the skills of Amphoreus' finest assassins.
Taught until they were bought by schemers for dangerous and dirty work.
After all, what lord would fear an innocent child?
Utilizing this weakness, blades kissed necks like feathers.
When the guards came to their senses, they found two corpses,
one of which was the child themself, for this was why they had prepared the poison vial.
With their target perished, their existence no longer held any meaning.

C: 卡戎·塔尔金星系联盟通过生产两种类型的思想改变装置来维持经济运转，外界抵达该联盟皆需通过一位庞大智械生命的神经滑轨。据传卡戎·塔尔金文明与有机生命敌对——它们是典型的反有机文明，对待有机生命手腕狠辣，而其中尤以卫星#900最为邪恶。但它最终被当地人排挤在外，只因其自豪的机械外表在已将全体居民改造为有机伪装的卡戎·塔尔金星系联盟中格格不入。
E: The Charon-Targin System Alliance's economic operations are supported by the sale of their two types of thought-altering devices. Should the outside wish to reach the alliance, they must pass through the neural pathways of a titanic Intellitron life form. It is said that the Charon-Targin System Alliance is hostile to all organic life, and is a very typical anti-organic civilization in the ruthless tactics it employs against its foes. Of their many instruments of ruination, Satellite #900 stands among the vilest of them all. However, the satellite was ultimately disregarded by the denizens of the Charon-Targin Alliance due to its obvious and proud mechanical visage which integrated poorly with the populace who had taken to disguising themselves as organics.

C: 一位焚化工将她的事业视作苦修，坚信一切「记忆」需在管理和限制之下。她将自己的记忆也分类放入轮盘，剔除其中无意义的内容，只选取有用的部分进行认知。可不完整的记忆往往会形成错误的判断，重要的信息遭到抹除，废料却被留下。她的记忆轮变得千疮百孔，这场苦修也只持续了半个琥珀纪便宣告终结——因为她把焚化工的身份也给忘了。
E: A Cremator viewed her career as penance, believing that all memories should be restricted and governed. She placed even her own memories into the Cycle and sorted them into categories, erasing the meaningless content within and retaining only the useful parts to assess with her cognition. However, incomplete memories would often lead to incorrect judgments, and important information would be erased while useless content is left behind. Her Memory Cycle became wrecked with cracks, and this penance only lasted half an Amber Era before ending — Because she forgot even her role as a Cremator.

C: 这一天机械时午后三点，侵入性「中等念头」准点步入机械城某位自命不凡的有机体脑内。「中等念头」令他心碎：他发现自己所有天赋的极限都只能触及群体机里的「中等」。但他并不泄气，很快他运用这项珍贵的才能，在无机群体中藏匿爱恨情仇，成为一群机器中最中等的中等者，从此踏上「均衡」的命途。
E: Following the machine era calendar, on this day at three in the afternoon, the invasive "Cognito Averagifier" entered the mind of an arrogant organic individual in the Mechanical City. The "Cognito Averagifier" dealt him heartbreak. He realized that the limit of all his talents could only brush against the most average members of the community. But he did not despair, for soon he learned to master this new and unique skill, concealing his flurry of emotions from the inorganic masses, becoming the most average of all machines, and embarking on the Path of Equilibrium.

C: 在一些被强制开发的边缘星域，承担廉价劳力的土著会误以为，公司使用的货币是某种植物的果实，因此，他们总会留下最光鲜亮丽的一张钞票埋进土里，希冀种出自己的信用点树。好事的假面愚者从误会中采撷灵感，模仿分裂金币的原理制作出信用点树，将它们的种子大肆传播。惧怕通货膨胀的公司紧急封锁了各大边星地区，可当他们急匆匆地赶到果园，却发现，土著们真的只是把信用点当果子吃。
E: In certain brink quadrants that were forced into development, a number of the natives that were responsible for the cheap labor would mistakenly believe that the credit currency used by the IPC was the fruit of a certain plant. So, they would retain the freshest-looking notes and bury them in the ground, with the hopes of growing their very own credit trees. The meddlesome Masked Fools gained inspiration from this misunderstanding and imitated the concept of the Gold Coins of Discord to create a credit tree, spreading the seeds far and wide. Fearing inevitable inflation, the IPC immediately set blockades across large borderland areas and rushed to the fruit fields to investigate. What they found on arrival, however, was that the locals had taken to simply eating the credits as fruits instead.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>整场生效</color>，对白厄施放后，使白厄获得<unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak>点【火种】，且在变身时获得【永续的燃烧】，变身时若【火种】大于<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点，每超出1点，卡厄斯兰那的暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多可提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>。持有【永续的燃烧】时，卡厄斯兰那的暴击率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>，在<u>卡厄斯兰那的额外回合</u>耗尽后不会结束变身、刷新全部<u>卡厄斯兰那的额外回合</u>并获得<unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak>点<u>【毁伤】</u>。<u>额外回合</u>开始时，卡厄斯兰那消耗等同于当前生命值<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的生命值。施放攻击后，造成<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次<u>附加伤害</u>，每次伤害对敌方随机单体造成等同于卡厄斯兰那<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的火属性<u>附加伤害</u>。
