C: 贝洛伯格「大守护者」继承人，年轻干练的银鬃铁卫统领。\n布洛妮娅从小接受着严格的教育，具备一名「继承人」所需的优雅举止与亲和力。\n但在看到下层区的恶劣环境后，未来的最高决策者逐渐生出了疑惑…「我所受的训练，真的能带领人民过上他们想要的生活么？」
E: Heir to the Supreme Guardian of Belobog, she is the young and capable commander of the Silvermane Guards.\nBronya received a rigorous education from an early age, and as such, possesses the grace and affinity as expected of an heir.\nHowever, after witnessing the abysmal conditions in the Underworld, seeds of doubt begin growing in the mind of Belobog's future leader. "Can all the training I've received really help me lead the people to the lives they want?"

C: 在玉阙太卜司中，她度过了自己一生中最快乐的求学岁月。关于宿命与自由意志，关于阵法演算与人择权衡…在一切与卜筮之道相关的问题上，少女记得自己与师傅总是争辩不休。这并非唇枪舌剑的相争，而是亦师亦友的较劲。尽管在大部分的问题上，少女与师傅最终达成了一致的看法，但两人却有一处无论如何绕不开去的死结—— 自向博识尊处求取演算经籍以来，玉阙仙舟太卜司倾数百年全力加以解读实现，营建了联盟中夸称第一的占卜阵法。玉阙的卜者们皆以此为傲。但在符玄看来，这不过是将仙舟人的未来锁死在了阵法划定的道路上。 当人们相信阵法所示必然成真，选择便成了徒有其名的摆设。冥冥之中，卜者成了阵法的囚徒，吉时出行、凶时居停、每日所宜所忌、做什么不做什么，一应遵照占卜所示。 「难不成阵法告诉我明日死期将至，我就得自行了断不成？如此一来，卜与不卜，到底有什么分别？」 「分别在于，我们知道自己行走在昭昭天命之上。这便是开启太卜司制度的玄曜祖师所追求的至上道路。 「在阵法协助下，卜者们只需要虔信相信，顺应启示，做出一个又一个抉择——即便它们匪夷所思、无比艰难。这一切终将让仙舟抵达它孜孜以求的伟业——铲除寿瘟祸祖，令世间无复寿瘟之苦。」男人的神色如同蒙受开示的觉悟者，坦然平静。他看向符玄，「就像我在得知你的命数后，将你收为弟子。」 不是为了我的天资？也不是为了家族人脉？只是为了实现某个预言？这…这太荒谬了！恼怒涌上符玄心头，令她一时间讷讷无言。 「你知道吗，在问卜『十方光映法界』，解读卦象后，我确信我的命运将断绝在你的手中。但我依然将你收为弟子，等候你取代我，成为玉阙仙舟的太卜。因为，这一切都是命中注定。」 命中注定？他的命运，将会断绝在我手里？ 说得眼下仙舟好像仍在三劫时代，说得好像她是个渴望登上太卜之位，打算不择手段弑师的逆徒。这个混蛋师傅！ 「而我…我绝不会让它成真！」 少女尊敬师傅身为卜者的一切：心智、技艺乃至为人。唯独无法接受他身为窥探命运的卜者，却自甘堕入宿命论的渊薮，并将此视为理所当然。 于是不顾家族的劝阻，不顾一切阻挠，符玄以近乎自我放逐的方式逃离了玉阙仙舟。她投身风气更自由的罗浮太卜司，寄情于卜算。她不但要远离玉阙仙舟，更要身体力行地证明这份预言不过是某人的荒谬妄想。
E: She spent the happiest time in her life studying in the Yuque's Divination Commission. She learned about predestination versus free-will, about matrix calculations versus human choices... The girl recalled she was always arguing with her teacher on every issue regarding divination and fortune-telling. Those were not aggressive confrontations with sharp words, but heated discussions between peers. And yet, though the two agreed on many topics, there was one issue they could not come to a consensus — Nous had granted divine volumes outlining the matrix calculations to the Xianzhou centuries ago. The Xianzhou Yuque's Divination Commission had pored over them to interpret and manifest the wisdom within, ultimately constructing the best divination matrix in the entire Alliance. Thought this is a point of pride for Yuque's diviners, Fu Xuan felt it was nothing short of culling the future possibilities of the Xianzhou people within the narrow path set out by the matrix. When people believe that the predictions of the matrix will always come to pass, then "choice" became an empty concept only for show. The diviners have unwillingly become prisoners of the matrix. They head to work when the hour is fortuitous, and stay home when the hour is ominous. What they do, what they avoid doing — everything was in accordance with the divination results. "If the matrix tells me that I will die tomorrow, does that mean I should just hurry up and end myself? At that point, what is the difference between performing a divination and not performing one?" "The difference is that we know we walk on the ordained path set by the heavens. That is the supreme path sought by Grandmaster Xuan Yao, who initiated the Divination Commission system." "All the diviner has to do is to faithfully believe and obediently follow the guidance of the matrix, and make one choice after another in that way — even though those choices may be ludicrous, incomprehensible, or difficult. All such efforts will ultimately lead the Xianzhou to the great work that it has been seeking throughout its existence — that of eradicating the Plagues Author and rid the world of the agony of Abundance." The man's expression was as placid and calm as an enlightened disciple who had received divine revelation. He looked at Fu Xuan and continued, "just like how I chose to take you in as my student after knowing about your predetermined future." It wasn't for my talents? And it wasn't for my well-connected family? It was just to fulfill some prediction? This... this was absurd! Rage took over Fu Xuan, and she was at a loss for words. "Did I ever tell you that after I consulted the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier and interpreted the hexagram, I now firmly believe that my life will end in your hands? However, I still took you in as my student. I'm waiting for you to take over my position and become the Xianzhou Yuque's master diviner, because it has all been predetermined." Predetermined? His life will end in my hands? He was talking as if the Xianzhou was still in the Three Sufferings Era! As if she was a treacherous disciple who craved the seat of the master diviner so much, that she would even kill her teacher for it! Her teacher was a scoundrel! "And I... I will never let that prediction come to pass!" The girl admired everything about her master as a diviner — his intelligence, skills, and integrity. However, she could not accept how he willingly sank into the blinding abyss of fatalism and regarded it as an acceptable way of life, despite being a diviner who could peek into destiny. Therefore, Fu Xuan ran away from the Xianzhou Yuque despite her family's dissuasion and the hurdles she had to cross. She ran away like a self-exiled escapee, plunging into the Luofu's Divination Commission with its more unrestricted culture and devoted herself to calculations. Not only did she want to part from the Xianzhou Yuque, she also wanted to prove with her own hands that her teacher's prediction was nothing but his own ludicrous delusions.

C: 高举雷枪的神明陷入疯狂，在那以「纷争」为名的战役，男人同伙伴给予那疯神最后的解脱。 在那争夺「理性」火种的辩论场，男人与昔日恩师对峙，见证残酷的处刑。 登上「天空」的战场，男人踏上彩虹桥，以烈阳之光穿透阴霾，照亮凶险的前路。 「救世主，带领吾等前进吧。」 听到织者欣慰的话，他心中更多的是苦涩。但在众人面前，他不愿表露担忧。 身受万死的王储踏上归乡的路，将悬锋族人交托于他。 「放心，我会替你照顾。」 分裂千身的先知磨损殆尽，他接过启程前立下的誓言。 「缇宝老师，我会去见证…那星月满天的明日。」 学者为真理奔赴死亡，圣女拥抱孤独的命运。 「下一世，真理定会解明，死生…将有序流转。」 织者安眠于黄金的浴池，捷足的侠盗带着遗憾停下脚步，永驻天空的医师再也无法回到大地。 「以身为薪柴，我会…成为照亮新世界的烈火。」 男人无法流泪，只能凭着心中的剧痛，将回忆刻入脑海。 他背起万众的心愿，朝着朝阳升起的山巅蹒跚前行。 他相信，终有一日，曙光会穿透翁法罗斯的长夜。 「但倘若黎明从一开始就不存在……」 曾经，他千百次问过自己这个问题。 如今，向着那炽热酷烈的终点，男人刻下「白厄」的最后一笔—— 「那就让怒火燃尽此身，化作明日的烈阳！」
E: The god who wielded the Lightning Spear fell into madness. In the battle named Strife, the man and his comrade gave the mad god the final release. In the debate where the Coreflame of Reason was contested, the man faced down his old mentor and witnessed a brutal execution. On the battlefield of the Sky, he crossed the rainbow bridge, piercing the gloom with the burning light of the sun, lighting the perilous road ahead. "Deliverer, lead us forward." Hearing those words of relief from the weaver, he felt only a bitter ache, a worry he refused to show in front of the crowd. The crown prince of Kremnos, scarred by a thousand deaths, entrusted his people to him. "Don't worry. I'll look after them for you." The seer, her body split into countless pieces, faded away, and he took up the oath she had sworn before her journey. "Miss Tribbie, I will live to see that morrow filled with the radiance of stars..." The scholar raced toward death in search of truth. The Holy Maiden embraced her lonely fate. "In the next life, truth will be revealed, and life and death will find their rightful place." The weaver found eternal rest in a golden bath. The fleet-footed rogue stopped in regret. The healer who once roamed the skies would never again return to the earth. "With my body as kindling, I will become the blaze that lights the new world." The man could not shed tears, but used these searing pains to carve such memories into his mind. Bearing the hopes of all people, he staggered toward the mountain peak where the morning sun rises. He believed that, one day, the dawn would break through the endless night of Amphoreus. "But should dawn have never existed..." He had asked himself that question thousands of times. Now, heading toward the blazing, merciless end, he carved the final mark of "Phainon"— "Let the fires of rage burn this body to ashes and transform into the blazing sun of tomorrow!"

C:
看，在永恒之地，展开一卷无名的史诗——
听。风中的歌谣传唱再创世的哀歌，看见金血流过安眠的花丛，火种撑起疮痍的大地。
就像种子即将死去，诗篇无人问津。

因为虚假的结局将故事的扉页铐上枷锁。
数算荧荧的冷光，刺痛祈盼黎明的眼睛。
岁月未曾流淌，太阳将要毁伤——这是故事的高潮，抑或终局？
不，还差…最后一笔。

于是你在每一页留下「开拓」的字迹，向下坠落是向另一端升起。
你们奔行在记忆的泥浆，用亿万颗火种烧蚀冰冷的数列，接住破碎的胚芽。
当一页新生的空白出现，你落下一笔，它也向过去…荡开涟漪。

荧荧的光闪烁在记忆留白的夜空，尚未到来的流星，被寄予永恒的期待。
十三声心跳，在高歌逐火之旅，因为那是他们深爱的土地。
故事的扉页被再次翻开，那里写着有关生命的预言。

听！风中的歌谣如是传唱，记忆的种子在群星处生长，因为
——银河已知晓「翁法罗斯」的姓名。
E:
Look, in The Eternal Land, a nameless epic unfolds.
Listen. The wind's ballad sings the elegy of Era Nova, and witnesses the golden blood flowing through slumbering flowers, as the Coreflames sustain the scarred earth.
Like seeds about to perish, poems fade into obscurity.

For false endings shackle the story's beginning.
Count the cold fluorescent lights, sting the eyes that pray for dawn.
Time has yet to flow, the sun is set to die. Is this the story's climax, or the finale?
No, there's still... one final stroke.

And so you leave traces of "Trailblaze" on every page, where falls turn into ascents on another end.
You race through the mire of memories, using billions of Coreflames to scorch the frigid data sequences, and catching the shattered seed germs.
When a new blank page appears, you make your mark. It, too, will form ripples toward the past.

Glimmering lights twinkle in the night sky of blank memories, where a shooting star yet to come has been entrusted with the anticipation of eternity.
Thirteen heartbeats sing proudly for the Flame-Chase Journey, for that was the land they deeply cherished.
The first page of the story unfolds once more, inscribed with prophecies of life.

Listen! The wind sings a melody, the Seeds of Memory grow among the stars, for
the cosmos now knows the name, "Amphoreus."

C: 砂金：屠场之舞
E: Aventurine: Danse Macabre

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C:
就像是每部电影都会发生的经典桥段再现——电梯无法正常启动。
三月七口中那位「万能的丹恒老师」虽然及时赶到，却也对此束手无策。
但他救助下来的防卫科负责人阿兰，应该知道答案——
果然是万能的丹恒老师。
E:
Just like in all those classic movie scenes — the elevator doesn't work.
Despite March 7th calling him a "walking encyclopedia," even Dan Heng, who somehow made it in time, doesn't know what to do.
However, Arlan, the head of the Security Department rescued by Dan Heng, probably knows the answer...
As expected, Dan Heng saves the day once more.

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，今后，这里就是你的家了。\n新的冒险就要开始了，准备跃迁前往新世界吧！
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express. From now on, this will be your home.\nA new adventure is about to start. Prepare to warp jump to a new world!

C: 坏消息是，你的「好哥们」桑博抛弃了你，留下你独自面对银鬃铁卫戍卫官——杰帕德•朗道；好消息是，面前这位威风凛凛的军人似乎没那么死板。\n你成功说服了杰帕德，令他相信你们来自天外世界。他承诺会护送你前往贝洛伯格的大守护者之所在。\n这一切看起来是那么恰到好处…别怀疑，跟着银鬃铁卫们走就是了。
E: The bad news is that your buddy Sampo has abandoned you and left you to deal with Gepard Landau, the Silvermane Guard Captain, alone. The good news, however, is that the imposing soldier is actually quite flexible.\nYou successfully persuade Gepard by making him believe that you are from a world beyond the sky. He promises to escort you to the Supreme Guardian at Belobog.\nEverything looked perfect... There's no reason for doubt, all you have to do is follow the Silvermane Guards.

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n再看这个世界、这座城市最后一眼吧——或许它没有那么孤独冰冷。
E: The story ended and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nTake one last look at this world and this city — perhaps it is not as cold and alone anymore.

C: 突然之间，你和丹恒又取得了联系。简单寒暄几句后，你迫不及待地询问他的冒险经历…
E: Suddenly, your connection with Dan Heng is restored. After some simple pleasantries, you impatiently ask him about his adventure...

C: 突然之间，你和丹恒又取得了联系。简单寒暄几句后，你迫不及待地询问他的冒险经历…
E: Suddenly, your connection with Dan Heng is restored. After some simple pleasantries, you impatiently ask him about his adventure...

C: 救下自称「十王司判官」的少女后，你们得知仙舟之上正在发生一些不可思议的变故。
E: After saving the girl who calls herself a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, you learn that strange happenings are currently occurring on Xianzhou.

C: 丹鼎司中，遍地狼藉残骸，一场大战刚刚打响。正当你们想要厘清情势，猜测胜负时，远处传来幸存者的呼救。
E: The Alchemy Commission lies in total chaos with a large-scale skirmish just kicking off. Just as you plan to stay away and assess the situation, you hear the sound of survivors calling for help.

C: 在甜美的人声引导中，你的思绪随着房间中蒸腾的烟雾一同氤氲、流淌，超脱现实，来到了由「忆域」构成的梦境。然而眼前的景象说是美梦，倒不如说更像噩梦，不仅如此，这房间竟还有些微妙的既视感。\n你真的顺利来到匹诺康尼了吗？看来你又要想办法弄清现状了。
E: Under the guidance of a sweet voice, your thoughts grow clouded and flowing, transcending reality along with the smoke that fills your room, as you arrive in a Dreamscape created from a "Memory Zone." However, the scene you find before you is not a beautiful dream. It seems more like a nightmare. Not only that, but this room has a faint air of déjà vu about it.\nHave you actually entered Penacony? It seems that you must find a way to make sense of your situation.

C: 得知了伙伴们失散的消息后，黑天鹅带领你在忆域中继续前进。如果大家都能保护好自己，那你们应该能在梦中的酒店大堂再次相见。
E: Having learned of how your companions have become scattered, Black Swan continues to lead you forward in the Memory Zone. If everyone is able to protect themselves, then you should be able to meet up again in the dream hotel lobby.

C: 视角再次来到了匹诺康尼的另一个角落。来看看在你不知道的地方，又有怎样的好戏正在上演吧。
E: The spotlight refocuses on another location in Penacony. Let's check out the happenings in places that you aren't aware of.

C: 瓦尔特指出兹事体大，必须时刻做好最坏的打算。而为了避免那种结局最终出现，他向众人郑重告别，随后以身入局，与天环族兄妹一道前去与「梦主」展开交涉，留下你们继续寻找其他可行的解决办法。为此，加拉赫也终于愿意将全部真相和盘托出——出于对家族天然的不信任，此前他并未完全交代有关「钟表匠」的一切。\n据加拉赫所说，那位「钟表匠」似乎为星穹列车留下了一份宝贵的遗产…而这份遗产或许就是封印星核的关键。
E: Welt points out the severity of the situation and how one must always be prepared for the worst-case scenario. In an effort to avert the unthinkable, he bids a solemn farewell to everyone before throwing himself into the fray by accompanying the Halovian siblings on their journey to open negotiations with the Dreammaster. This leaves you to continue searching for other ways to avert the situation. To this end, Gallagher finally becomes willing to reveal the whole truth... Due to his innate distrust of The Family, he had not previously exposed everything regarding the "Watchmaker."\nGallagher explains that the "Watchmaker" seems to have left behind a precious inheritance for the Astral Express... And that this inheritance could perhaps be the key to sealing the Stellaron.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 出人意料的是，为你们戴上冠军桂冠的并非知更鸟，而是她的哥哥星期日。在这里，他终于表明自己的全部意图，但他似乎并不打算与你们刀剑相向，而是寻求彼此理解的可能性。\n他向你们提出一连串问题，令你感到有些手足无措。但不必担心——如果你对星期日的问题感到迷茫，那就从自己的经历中寻求答案吧。
E: To everyone's surprise, the person present to crown you champion is not Robin at all, but her big brother, Sunday. Here, he finally reveals his true intentions, but he does not seem to want to fight you, instead seeking the possibility of reaching a mutual understanding.\nHe asks you a series of questions that leave you a little lost, but fear not - if you are confounded by Sunday's questions, just look for the answers in your personal experience.

C: 万事俱矣——是时候重返舞台，献上令世界激醒的最后安可了。
E: Everything is in place... It is time to return to the stage for the final encore that will jolt the world awake.

C:
金色的美梦要开始躁动了。
在接下来的长夜里，你恐怕会遭遇许多挫折，见证众多悲剧。最后，目中所见只余黑白二色。
但请相信，在那黑白的世界中会有一点红色稍纵即逝，但在你做出抉择之时——
——它必将再度示现。
而你，要仔细咀嚼其意义，然后回到清醒的世界去。
我们都将在那里找到答案。
E:
The golden dream is about to become restless.
In the long night that will follow, I fear that you may encounter countless setbacks and witness endless tragedies. In the end, only black and white will be left in your vision.
But you must have faith. That black-and-white world will have a fleeting moment of crimson. But, when you make your decision...
...It will reappear once again.
And you, you must carefully ruminate on its meaning, then return to the waking world.
We will find our answer there.

C: 尘埃终于落定，新的「开拓」之旅也即将开始。\n返回星穹列车，整理思绪，做好准备，迎接新的冒险吧。
E: Now that the dust has finally settled, a new trailblazing expedition is about to begin.\nGo back to the Astral Express, collect your thoughts, and prepare yourself — for a new adventure.

C: 叆叇馆主成为了新的宗师…然而她并不像苦茶大师所说的那样恪守忍理，你不明白她的行为，或许…这便是最严酷的试炼吧。\nAK-A-3，你知道这是什么情况，你也知道自己能捏死飞蝇一样捏死眼前的愚人…但你还要继续忍者的游戏，对吗？
E: Umbra Headmistress has assumed the mantle of new grandmaster... However, she doesn't follow the ninja tenets like Master Kucha. Her actions elude your comprehension... Perhaps this serves as the most rigorous trial.\nAK-A-3, you know what is happening here. You know you can easily crush those fools before you like insects... Yet you opt to continue your ninja game, right?

C: 这次的巡猎有还不错的麦芽汁、有搞笑的猴子，还有爽到漏油的派对，真他宝贝的有意思！但总感觉有点太乱来了，很多事想不通，但你上次看的电影说过…该死，那台词怎么说的来着——\n「如果一切都要解释清楚的话，这个世界就少了一丝神秘。」
E: This hunt is a blast, with tasty malt juice, hilarious monkeys, and a fudgin' awesome party! Yeah, it's a bit off the wall, and things don't always add up, but just like they say in the movie you watched last time... Dang, what was that line again...?\n"If everything can be explained, this world would lose its touch of enigma."

C: 告别真是一种奇妙的存在——无论经历多少，仍是无法熟稔。但也无需熟稔，正因离别的存在，人们才会渴盼步入重逢。\n向自己的妹妹告别，慢慢地，极为珍惜地…道别。
E: Farewells are truly a miraculous thing... No matter how much you've experienced it in your life, it's not something you ever get used to. But that is okay. Without farewells, we would never have reunions to look forward to.\nSay farewell to your little sister. Take your time... A long and valuable... farewell.

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝夺取了「门径」的火种，接过雅努斯的神权。现在，她必须逃离这座囚禁了她数十年之久的三相圣地，奔赴自己的命运。
E: Tribios takes the Coreflame of Passage, receiving Janus's divine authority. Now, she must flee this Sanctum of Tripartite Prophecy that has held her captive for decades and pursue her destiny.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝夺取了「门径」的火种，接过雅努斯的神权。现在，她必须逃离这座囚禁了她数十年之久的三相圣地，奔赴自己的命运。
E: Tribios takes the Coreflame of Passage, receiving Janus's divine authority. Now, she must flee this Sanctum of Tripartite Prophecy that has held her captive for decades and pursue her destiny.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 正如有人攥着希望的灯火，踏过自己一生命运的黄昏，直至步入坟茔。\n正如你抱着你的希望，圆满地抵达了时间的终点。\n去吧，再见。庙宇旁便是天造地设的洞府。
E: Just as one clutches the flame of hope, traversing through the twilight of their destined life until they reach their grave.\nJust as you, embracing your hope, have arrived at time's end in fulfillment.\nGo now. Farewell. By the temple lies a heaven-made sanctuary.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n神悟树庭灵水淤积，按「贼灵」的说法解决难题吧。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe spirit water has stagnated in the Grove of Epiphany. Resolve this with the Spirithief's tricks.

C: 昔日存放种种奇物的收容舱段已成立应急安全区。冰冷不瞑的亡影尚未消退，怪物仍在银光闪烁的舱室内巡回，一段提振人心的「复兴宣言」将在此处上演。\n拾柴者啊，请勿踟躇，复兴之火正在等待。
E: The Storage Zone that once held a variety of Curios has been turned into an emergency safe zone. The chilling shadows of death still linger, and the monsters continue to roam free in the silvery cabin. An exhilarating declaration of revival will be taking place here.\nThere's no time to waste! Your efforts are the firewood that will fuel the flames of revival!

C: 关于如何处置拉明娜与「异星水魈」，你已做出了无悔的抉择。将水魈共谋案原委告知艾丝妲后，意外发现站长早已知晓一切，甚至可称幕后导演。\n通过招募你这名合格演员，成功劝诫麾下的迷途科员。
E: You've decided on what to do with Lamina and the Xenohydro. After telling Asta about their conspiracy, you find that the lead researcher already knows everything. More precisely, she seemingly orchestrated it all.\nBy casting you as an actor in her little play, she managed to make the lost researcher see the error of her ways.

C: 奇物「螺中笑声」受到模因病毒的感染，在空间站里大肆传播「毒鸡汤」。艾丝妲请你帮忙调查病毒的源头。\n三位可疑人员，究竟谁会是这场闹剧的起源？
E: The Curio "Crackup Conch" is infected by the memetic virus, spreading anti-motivational quotes in the space station. Asta wants your help to investigate the source of this virus.\nWhich of the three suspects caused this drama?

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 冥火的力量肉眼可见的虚弱下去，这是捕获它的好机会
E: The power of the infernal fire is visibly declining. This is a great chance to capture it.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了解开谜题的报酬——快去收下吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the rewards for solving the puzzle. Collect them now.

C: 擅自把计划泄露给尤利安就算了，还要帮尤利安找东西来封住他的嘴。哎，虎克大人啊……\n从铆钉镇离开的时候，这里的居民有太多的东西没来得及带走了，你在力所能及的范围内，能帮一点是一点吧。
E: Hook gives your plan away to Julian, and now you have to help Julian find his stuff so that he won't tell anybody else about it. Well, thanks Hook... \nWhen the inhabitants of Rivet Town left, they left many things behind. You'll try your best to help them.

C: 小屁孩儿就是小屁孩儿，被批评了两句就跑出了诊所。出于担心的考虑，你还是去找找她吧。\n没想到玩偶的眼睛用了宝石，不知道虎克大人听到了这个消息会不会感到犹豫呢？
E: Hook gets criticized and runs out of the clinic. After all, she is just a child. For her safety, you decide to look for her.\nIt turns out that the eyes of the doll are gems. Will Hook have second thoughts when she hears this?

C: 击败裂界怪物后，你急忙上前查看科鲁泽的伤势，可惜为时已晚。在他遗体附近散落着他的私人物品，你好心地上去收拾，却意外发现了科鲁泽不为人知的秘密……
E: After defeating the Fragmentum monster, you hurry to check on Kluzer, but he is too badly injured to be saved. As you collect his belongings scattered around his body, you accidentally find his secret...

C: 佩拉和玲可对于如何处置神秘生物产生了分歧——为它拍照？还是及时出手将未知的危险扼杀在摇篮里？女孩们需要做出选择。
E: Pela and Lynx have opposing ideas over what to do with this mysterious creature — take a photo of it? Or to sniff out this dangerous element while they can? The two girls need to make a choice.

C: 你已经不记得被这位推销员打断了多少次谈话，但你还是从布洛妮娅处了解到了相关信息可能的存放地点。\n根据布洛妮娅的指示，前往调查克里珀堡那直插云霄的巨大书架吧。
E: You've lost count of how many times this salesperson had interrupted you, but you eventually learn from Bronya where the information might be kept.\nInvestigate the hulking bookcase in Qlipoth Fort as per Bronya's tip.

C: 大毫执事官提到如今的丹鼎司十分可疑，而白露与医护似乎也刻意在躲避，你应该试探一下这位跟踪者的目的。\n既然你接下了保护白露一行的职责，就应当有所作为，现在机会来了。
E: Official Dahao mentioned that the current Alchemy Commission is very suspicious, and Bailu and the nurse are actively avoiding an encounter with them. You should ascertain the stalker's motives.\nSince you have taken on the responsibility of ensuring Bailu's safety, you should do something toward that aim, and now the opportunity presents itself.

C: 被十王司的判官当作是误入迷途的市民了，幸好半夏有魔阴身症状一事没有暴露，该继续前进了。\n半夏要撑不住了，见上爱人最后一面应该还是有机会的。
E: You got misidentified as a lost citizen by the Ten-Lords Commission, fortunately Banxia's Mara-struck symptoms were not exposed. Move on.\nBanxia is on her last straw, but she should still have a chance to see her loved one a final time.

C: 这位叫镜流的大姐被我窥破端倪，索性也不装盲人了。她抵达罗浮，似乎也是为寻找刃的下落而来。更奇的是，言谈间显出她与将军相熟。\n镜流口口声声要我带她找到刃的下落——我堂堂云骑岂能泄密。但这位大姐出言不逊，竟要和我比剑。来得好啊，我可得让她瞧瞧，免得被人小觑了罗浮无人。
E: The lady, Ms. Jingliu, has been exposed by me and stopped pretending to be blind. She seems to have arrived at the Luofu to find Blade. What's more strange is her seeming closeness with the general.\nMs. Jingliu kept wanting me to bring her along to find Blade. As a Cloud Knight myself, how could I reveal restricted information? The lady wanted to compete with me in swordplay. Great timing. I'll have her know not to look down on the talent pool on the Luofu.

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 正论也好、歪理也罢，只要能说服大善人们接受放生机兵，就算全面胜利！
E: Whether it's right or wrong, as long as the Benevolent Ones can be convinced to accept releasing the automatons, it's a win!

C: 黑天鹅的这段梦境实在太过刺激，一上来就把你抛掷到了一个「案发现场」之中。这里有黑天鹅，有猎犬家系的执法人员，还有…桑博！？这家伙怎么会在这里？
E: This dreamscape that Black Swan has prepared is way too exciting, throwing you into a "crime scene" As soon as you enter. Here you see Black Swan, a Bloodhound Family Law Enforcer, and... Sampo!? What is that guy doing here!?

C: 在金人巷，驭空见到了老朋友
E: Yukong encounters an old friend in Aurum Alley

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 另一边，景元、丹恒与灵砂来到正收拾残局的幽囚狱中，试图从步离人的突袭中辨出蛛丝马迹，试图捉住那只隐于幕后搅动风云的黑手。在此过程中，往日旧事种种再度重提……
E: On the other side, Jing Yuan, Dan Heng, and Lingsha arrive at The Shackling Prison, where all are busy picking up the pieces of the breakout. The trio examine the aftermath of the borisin's surprise attack, in search of clues that may help them catch the mastermind stirring up trouble from behind the scenes. Along the way, past events are revisited...

C: 金人巷中，你和貊泽从大战的余波中起身搜寻幸存者……以及椒丘的下落。
E: In Aurum Alley, you and Moze stand above the aftermath of war, searching for survivors... as well as the whereabouts of Jiaoqiu.

C: 带着乔凡娜给的特殊饮品返回柯柯娜身边，试着让她服下。
E: Bring the special drink from Giovanna back to Cocona and try to get her to drink it.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n找到螺丝咕姆的拼图，帮助查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nFind Screwllum's puzzle pieces to facilitate their reunion.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——现在演员倒了，快用你无敌的岁月之力吧！顺便一提，过去也有和你一样的人伸出援手，你只是在记忆里取代了那个人的位置…他是谁？不重要，就当他是命运吧。\n「如果这是你们想要的，我就把你们融合在一起，这样你们两个就变成一个人了。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... The actor has now fallen. Now it's the moment to use your invincible power of time! By the way, there was someone just like you in the past who lent a helping hand in this story, and you have simply taken their place in this memory... Who were they? That doesn't matter. Let's just call them fate.\n"If this is what you desire, then I shall fuse you together and allow you to become one."

C: 哼，这时候想起人家了？
E: Hmph, now you think of me?

C: 亚诺想了解更多「垃圾大王」的事，也许你可以在某些地方找到线索……
E: Amo wants to learn more about the Garbage King. Maybe you can find some clues somewhere...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 尽管有些遗憾，不过还是先回去向帕姆复命吧！
E: It was a shame, but report to Pom-Pom first!

C: 佩佩找到了奇物的线索，你决定跟随佩佩，继续追查下去。
E: Peppy has found clues about the lost Curio. You decide to follow it and continue your search.

C: 小贩口中最坚固的盾牌，究竟是真是假？亲自试试吧！
E: The merchant claims this is the most robust shield. Is that for real? Try smashing it!

C: 想要进一步了解驭空的过去，果然还是应该去司辰宫找找看。陪晴霓到处找找吧，她在这里见证的过去，也许会改变她的人生。
E: To know more about Yukong's past, you would have to go to the Palace of Astrum sooner or later. Look around with Qingni. The past she will witness here may change her life.

C: 你收到了来自卡芙卡的消息，她声称自己遭遇了危机，需要你的帮助。你愿意帮助她吗？…或者，你真的相信她吗？
E: You received a message from Kafka claiming that she is in trouble and requires your help. Do you go to her rescue? ...Or rather, do you believe her?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•蜘蛛」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Spider combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往永冬岭为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Everwinter Hill to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了地火的干部希儿。代她们前往大矿区，了解希儿是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Seele, senior member of Wildfire. Head to the Great Mine in their stead, and see whether Seele is interested in the position.

C: 小秘书显然不希望你因为「社交压力」被迫帮忙，但同时她真的希望你能帮忙。于是她提出，希望你和小伙伴们再商量一下。\n和「赌约受害者」素裳、以及「全程都在吃瓜」白露好好聊聊吧，听听她们的意见。
E: Miss Secretary clearly doesn't want you to feel forced by "social pressures" to assist her, but she very much wants your help at the same time. Hence, she put forward her proposal and hopes you and your companions can talk about it.\nTalk it over with the "Victim of the Wager" Sushang and the "Steadfast Gossiper" Bailu and get their opinions.

C: 听素裳说她抓住了公司代表破坏码头物流的证据，赶紧过去确认一下吧。\n真正的商战往往不是高明的计策，而是简单朴素的小动作。
E: You heard that Sushang has found evidence of the IPC representative damaging the docks' logistic pipeline. Head over and confirm the details for yourself.\nA real trade war isn't just made up of high-end power plays and devious strategies, but simple little dirty tricks.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说霍三哥与商会建立合作关系。但霍三哥此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Mr. Huo to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Mr. Huo has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 与岁阳一番交流之后，你们意识到，那个自称是「房东」的家伙并不单纯。你们应该将房产证交给他，但同时，你们也有些问题要问个清楚。
E: After conversing with the heliobus, you realize that the man calling himself the "landlord" is not as simple as he looked. You should give the deed to him, but he also needs to answer some questions.

C: 桂乃芬好像有什么事情要和捉鬼小队的各位商量……\n不妨听她讲讲，到底发生了什么新鲜事吧。
E: Guinaifen seems to have something she wants to discuss with the ghost-hunting squad...\nListen to her and find out what new incident has gone down.

C: 完成了一日冒险，你与捉鬼小队的成员再度在绥园聚首。如同上班打卡一般，翻翻「罗浮杂俎」瞧瞧有什么足够怪异的事情，再去探查一番，一天便这么过去了。
E: Having completed your adventure, you reunite with your fellow ghost hunters at Fyxestroll Garden. Scanning through the posts on Ghostly Grove and conducting investigations have become routine tasks for you.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了美梦小镇赖以生存的物资。你必须深入梦中，将这些物资一一找回。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away the supplies Dreamville relies upon to survive. You have to enter the dream and recover all of them.

C: 据说某些品类的苏乐达在梦中拥有颠倒重力的能力…当然也可能是梦泡制作组单纯需要一个玩法包装。\n总之，借用它的力量踏上墙壁吧。
E: It's said that certain types of SoulGlad can reverse gravity in the dream... but it could be that the dream bubble producers needed to package their gameplay with some in-game lore.\nAnyway, use its power to walk on walls.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n在途中，你见到了酒吧的怪物们，看看它们究竟在做什么吧。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nOn your way, you meet the lounge's monsters. Find out what they are up to.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 选择上次没有去过的关卡，见证旅途的另一种可能。
E: Select a stage you didn't experience last time and witness another possibility.

C: 那个红毛哥们竟然是…贝洛伯格的卢卡？\n贝洛伯格人突然出现在罗浮，这场景还真有点…魔幻。问问他具体情况吧。
E: That red-head boy is actually... Luka from Belobog?\nFor a Belobogian to appear on the Luofu is really a bit... unbelievable. Ask him about the details.

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 卢卡的幻觉愈发严重，你决定带他去丹鼎司看看医生。\n没想到，你们在这里遇到了丹鼎司的灵砂司鼎，直接看上了司鼎大人的专家门诊。真是幸运。
E: Luka's hallucinations are getting worse. You decide to take him to the Alchemy Commission to see a healer.\nWho'd have thought that you'd run into the Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, Lingsha? You are lucky to have the Cauldron Master do a specialist consultation!

C: 接下来就是与铄金的决战了。\n卢卡坚定地相信，用自己的铁拳可以打碎一切无聊的「盘外招」。\n希望事情能像他预想的那样顺利。
E: The decisive battle against Shuojin is next.\nLuka firmly believes that his iron fist can shatter all pointless "dirty tricks."\nHopefully things will go as smoothly as he anticipates.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 青雀教会了三月七摸鱼秘诀：心情在<unbreak>80</unbreak>以上时，训练获得的属性提高<unbreak>30%</unbreak>
