C: 加油，祝你成功。
E: Good luck, I'm rooting for you.

C: 你才刚上车，她肯定想让你亲身体验一次「开拓」之旅。
E: You're new, I'm sure she wants to get you started with some firsthand trailblazing.

C: 不太关心。公司的悬赏令么，与其说恶名，倒不如说是盛赞。数字越大，赞美越盛。
E: Doesn't concern me. Then again, a Corporation bounty is a compliment, not an insult, don't you think? The higher the figure, the bigger the compliment.

C: 卡芙卡的话不能信。
E: We can't trust what Kafka says.

C: 星核猎手说谎，或者…仙舟「罗浮」上隐藏着更大的威胁……
E: Either the Stellaron Hunters are lying, or... there's an even bigger threat lurking on the Xianzhou Luofu...

C: 事关重大，这次我也要参与行动。
E: This is big. I'm coming with you this time.

C: 你看见空间站的标志，好像一座空间站。
E: You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a space station.

C: 呵，以利亚萨拉斯，可爱的老头儿。他是天才俱乐部#56，俱乐部史上唯二的公选部长。感谢他吧！现代宇宙文明的交流基石——联觉信标和超距遥感都是他的创造。
E: Oh, Elias Salas, such a lovely old fellow. He is Member <unbreak>56</unbreak> of the Genius Society, one of the only two publicly elected Ministers in the Society's history. Be grateful to him! He created the Synesthesia Beacons and over-range remote sensing, the cornerstones of modern cosmic communication.

C: 他是否遇到了阻碍，是否遇到了压力，是否正遭遇更加惨痛的生活……
E: Have they encountered any pitfalls? Are they under stress? Are they experiencing an even more miserable life than me...?

C: 可能你没自己想得那么重要？
E: Maybe you're not as important as you think.

C: …那个孩子也太没威信了，连员工都不知道她名字……
E: ...That girl really needs to step up. I can't believe her own employee doesn't even know her name...

C: 噢…是黑塔女士请你们来支援这里的么？
E: Oh... Did Madam Herta send you to help?

C: 等一下，我只开启了最上层的电梯口，从那里走。
E: Hold on. I only activated the elevator on the highest floor. We'll have to go there to use it.

C: …如果我能早点发现反物质军团……
E: ...If only I'd caught the Antimatter Legion sooner...

C: 你看看，障碍判别终端已经记录了<unbreak>142856</unbreak>次攻击，下个数字将是<unbreak>142857</unbreak>！
E: Look, the obstacle detection terminal has recorded <unbreak>142,856</unbreak> attacks... the next count will be <unbreak>142,857</unbreak>!

C: 否定…肯定…否定的否定即是肯定。
E: Negative... positive... A negative of a negative is a positive.

C: …这咖啡好苦，苦死了。
E: ...That's bitter coffee... *coughing* ...so bitter.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着黑塔：「4分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Herta: "4 points!" it announces.

C: 你不是很理解这个打分的逻辑……
E: You don't quite understand the logic behind this scoring...

C: 它的打分依据会是年龄吗？好像不是……
E: Is it basing things on age? Don't think so...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着砂金：「<unbreak>32</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Aventurine: "<unbreak>32</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 行了行了，刚夸你一句而已就喘上啦。不过嘛，你确实是最大的功臣没错。
E: Alright, alright. I just gave you a compliment, don't let it go to your head. However, you are indeed the hero this time.

C: 你是{NICKNAME}，这里是黑塔空间站。
E: Well, this is the Herta Space Station.

C: 黑塔和艾丝妲都同意了。
E: Herta and Asta both gave me the green light.

C: 做出不让自己后悔的选择…抵达未来……
E: Make a choice I won't regret... reach the future...

C: 星神身上的谜团实在太多了，据说黑塔女士拉上了几位会员，正想办法攻克祂们的未解之谜。
E: A cloud of mystery shrouds the Aeons. I heard Madam Herta recruited a team to try and solve the mysteries about THEM.

C: 相较于星神，派系就要好懂很多了：一群凡人为了共同的目的聚集在一起，践行自身对「星神」和「命途」的理解，即是派系。
E: Compared to the Aeons, the factions are much easier to understand. Mortals with the same objective gather together to practice their understanding of Aeons and the Paths.

C: 温馨的休憩区，与隔壁丹恒的地铺形成了鲜明且残酷的对比。
E: This cozy rest area is in stark contrast to Dan Heng's sparse floor bed next door.

C: 列车长帕姆的玩偶，不知道从哪里弄来的。
E: A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. You have no idea where they've found it.

C: 还好，发型没乱。
E: You look fine.

C: 那位女士好威严啊。
E: She's an impressive figure.

C: 唉，想那么多也没用，机会已经错过了…还是接着排队吧。
E: *sigh* I'm getting ahead of myself, I already missed my chance... back to the queue I guess.

C: 对了，看你们也挺闲的，要不要来帮我修这台机器？就当成手工活动好了，很有趣的。
E: Hey, seeing as there's nothing on your plate just now, wanna help me fix up this machine? Just a bit of manual labor — you might find it interesting.

C: 咱们接着去哪？先找个落脚的地方比较好，但我可不敢再去歌德宾馆了……
E: Where's our next stop? We should find somewhere to put our feet up, as long as it's not Goethe Hotel again...

C: 你这家伙真不讲义气！但我居然有点心动……
E: Where's your sense of loyalty!? Uh, that would be nice though...

C: 他是银鬃铁卫的高阶军官，想接触他恐怕没那么容易。而且…万一他没有被布洛妮娅的手书说动，我们等于是羊入虎口。
E: He's an elite officer of the Silvermane Guards. It wouldn't be easy to get to him. Besides... if he hasn't been persuaded by Bronya's letter, we'd be walking right into the lion's den.

C: 快，快点进来。动作自然点，别被人盯上！
E: Quick, act natural and get inside. Don't get spotted!

C: 除非筑城者公开确凿的证据，证明你们罪有应得——否则我不觉得你们会干坏事。而且以我对筑城者的了解，要有证据他们早就公布了。
E: I don't believe you guys would do anything bad, and the Architects are gonna need conclusive and publicly available evidence for me to think otherwise. Besides, I know the Architects, and if they did have any evidence, they would've released it by now.

C: 贝洛伯格以北几乎被裂界完全吞没了。要前往北部雪原，首先得穿过银鬃铁卫的前线禁区。
E: The area to the north of Belobog has been more or less swallowed up by the Fragmentum. If you want to get to the northern Snow Plains, you'll need to get past the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone on the front lines first.

C: 当然开张啦。不过最近都没什么生意呢，我就一直在陪这位茉莉小姐研究她的传家宝。
E: Of course it's open. But I haven't had much business recently, so I've been helping Miss Molly here with her family heirloom.

C: 啊，佩拉小姐上午出门前好像说了，她要去买新刊……
E: Oh, I believe Miss Pela mentioned that she would get a new magazine just before she left this morning.

C: 咦？你说什么？
E: Huh? What did you say?

C: 可恶！这世道已经没有正义可言了吗？呜……
E: Darn it! Is there no justice in this world? *sobbing*...

C: 总之，两位能平安归来就好，真的非常感谢各位。另外，我也很在意你在那边捡到的东西…快让我看看吧！
E: Anyway, I'm glad to see you two back safely. I very much appreciate your help. Plus, I'm also very interested in what you've found over there... Let me take a look!

C: 你怎么还谦虚上了？听{NICKNAME}说，你以前可不是这样哦。
E: Why are you being so modest now? I heard from {NICKNAME} that you weren't like this before.

C: 走吧，过去跟他打个招呼。
E: Let's go say hi.

C: 我明白。前人如果不是面对毁灭的威胁，也不会冒险使用它。
E: I know. Our ancestors wouldn't have risked using one if they'd had other ways of avoiding calamity.

C: 爸爸——琥珀王在上，我还以为自己这辈子都见不到你了！
E: Dad! — by the Amber Lord, I thought I was never going to see you again!

C: 上一任大守护者…
E: The previous Supreme Guardian...

C: 呃，你是下层区人？
E: Oh, you're from the Underworld?

C: 就知道有诈！我先溜了…
E: Already sounds dangerous — bye!

C: 唉…知道啦知道啦，你让我考虑一下……
E: Ugh... I know, I know. Let me think about it...

C: {NICKNAME}，有空吗？我们一起去克里珀堡门口等她吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, are you busy? Let's go and wait for her in front of Qlipoth Fort.

C: 你…真的要和「开拓者」一起离开贝洛伯格吗？
E: Do you... really want to leave Belobog and go with the Trailblazers?

C: 好吧，我尊重你的选择。
E: Okay, I respect your choice.

C: 邓恩是个能力很强的士官。他为人刚正不阿，是铁卫的模范。
E: He's a very capable sergeant — upright, plainspoken — a model Silvermane Guard.

C: 你接近时，感到温暖仿佛乖巧的宠物轻轻磨蹭你的腿部。
E: As you approach, you feel the warmth gently around your legs, as if an affectionate pet were rubbing up against them.

C: 银鬃铁卫看守着道路。这人一整天都要站在这里，也太无聊了吧！——而且，这对膝盖可不好啊。
E: The Silvermane Guard is keeping watch on the road. They had to stand here all day — must be bored to death! Not to mention, that's really bad for your knees.

C: 呃啊！你怎么…你…你没有听到虎克的自言自语吧！
E: Wha—! When did you... D—Did you hear what Hook was saying?

C: 那就好，你什么也没听见，虎克什么也没说。
E: Good. Hook didn't say anything, and you didn't hear it.

C: 我没有听到虎克说自己好矮。
E: Not a single word about you saying you're too short.

C: 糟了，快走！
E: Argh, darn it! Quick, disperse!

C: 那现在就开始咯！数到五十再睁眼，大姐姐你可不许耍赖！
E: Alright, now we're playing for real! You gotta count to fifty before you open your eyes — no cheating!

C: 跟虎克来吧，我带你们过去。
E: Come with Hook, I'll take you over.

C: 为表诚意，我先引荐各位认识「地火」。如果你们想在地下找什么，问他们就对了！
E: *sigh* Alright! To prove my sincerity, I'll introduce you to Wildfire. If you're looking for something down here, they're the ones to ask!

C: 因为你们有需求啊，这还用问？丹恒小哥说你们在找什么「星核」——这种听着就很厉害的玩意，也就「地火」那儿可能有线索了。
E: Because you are looking for something! Why are you asking? Dan Heng told me you guys were searching for a... what's the word... "Stellaron" — sounded pretty powerful. If anyone has a clue on its whereabouts, it'll be Wildfire.

C: 可、可是，要是就这么撤、撤了，咱们岂不是什么好处都没捞到？
E: But, i—if we evacuate, then haven't we lost out?

C: 兄弟！
E: My old pal!

C: 朋友都是培养出来的。
E: It takes time to make friends.

C: 在返回地上以前，我们暂时休战，联手合作吧。我也想知道你们的真正用意……
E: Until we're back in the Overworld, I propose a temporary truce and cooperation. Your true intentions are of interest to me...

C: 闭嘴！她是我的女儿，她是我唯一的……
E: Silence! She is my daughter, my only...

C: 抱歉，没能说服他…
E: Sorry, I wasn't able to persuade Svarog...

C: …桑博究竟是什么人？！
E: ...Who is this Sampo character!?

C: …这就无关紧要了吧。
E: ...That's not of foremost concern.

C: 奥列格，给我换人！
E: Oleg, give us someone else!

C: 说说你自己。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 那就跟我来吧，布洛妮娅。
E: Then come with me, Bronya.

C: 我、我先跑了！{NICKNAME}，「菌菌」就交给你了！
E: G—Great, seeya soon! {NICKNAME}, I'll leave Junjun with you!

C: 怀念上层区的日子吗？
E: Do you miss the old days in the Overworld?

C: …我很好，没必要特意探望。
E: ...I'm fine, no need to worry.

C: 但是那家伙明显还不服气，清醒过来以后就开始缠着我，让我再给他一次机会……
E: But that guy doesn't seem to know when to quit. Ever since he woke up from his concussion, he has been pestering me nonstop, begging me to give him another chance in the ring.

C: 当然了，这只是我的推论，不一定正确。
E: Of course, this is just my guess. This might not be the case.

C: 真能立刻安排吗？
E: Can it be arranged now?

C: 这个赛季已经圆满结束了，恭喜您成为冠军！您自然应得到丰厚的奖励——史考特老板早就安排好了，请您一定拿好！
E: The season has come to a close, congratulations on your championship! And of course Mr. Scott has arranged for your rich reward. Here you go!

C: 啊，你们！是下层区的救星们！能为你们操作封锁结束后的第一班客运缆车，真是我莫大的荣幸！
E: Ah, it's you! The liberators of the Underworld! You're the first passengers we've had since being sealed off — it'll be my honor to get you to the surface in one piece!

C: …好，下层区的安全就托付给各位了。
E: ...Understood. We'll be counting on you.

C: 唔，说的也是。不管怎样，既然老弟坚持要带我一起下来，那我总得帮上点忙才行——得好好电电那帮怪物！
E: Hmm, that's true. Anyway, since he asked for help, it's time to give those monsters a shock!

C: 希露瓦也贡献很大。
E: Serval helped too!

C: 娜塔莎小姐的提议不错。我们去慰问一下那对姐弟吧。
E: Natasha's right, we should make sure those children are alright.

C: 所谓「搏击」，无非三种功法：拳法、掌法、指法。如果搏击运动对你来说还太沉重，不妨先从剪刀石头布开始练起。
E: When people talk about fighting, they are referring to one of three things: Punching techniques, palm strikes, and finger strikes. If fighting sports are too heavy for you, you can start with rock, paper, scissors.

C: 哇哦。
E: Wow.

C: 错了，但情有可原，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
E: This is the wrong answer, but it is understandable. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

C: 在新的纪元里，星际和平公司将一如既往地致力于银河间的和平共处，贸易繁荣。
E: In this new Era, the Interastral Peace Corporation will continue to wholeheartedly support the peaceful co-existence and commercial prosperity of all residents in the galaxy.

C: 星际和平公司将全程转播本次庆典的盛况，将乐声和美好祝福共同送向寰宇千星。
E: The IPC will broadcast the entire event, sending the sounds of music and good wishes to worlds far and wide.

C: 我知道你，{NICKNAME}对吧？…联盟对星穹列车也很关注呢。
E: I have heard of you, {NICKNAME}... The Alliance is very interested in the Astral Express.

C: 一旦抓住星核猎手，就交给我们。
E: Bring her to us.

C: 关于星核，景元说了谎？
E: Do you think Jing Yuan lied about the Stellaron?

C: 卡芙卡怎么办？
E: What about Kafka?

C: 你好，太卜司那边情况如何？
E: Hello, how's the Divination Commission faring?

C: 我其余的感官倒也不弱于常人，能稍稍弥补所需。
E: My other senses make up for that fact to some extent — they're as strong as anyone else's.

C: 之前幸好有您出手，替「长乐天」的百姓和那位龙女大人解了围。
E: It was only thanks to your help earlier that the dragon lady and those Exalting Sanctum residents got away unscathed.

C: 咳咳，闲话打住，误了病人的诊断可就不妙啦。
E: Ahem, enough of that. I have patients to see.

C: 航路暂时封闭
E: The route is temporarily closed

C: 作为商人，你的武艺不错。
E: You have pretty good fighting skills for a merchant.

C: 对啊，你去过吗？
E: Yep. Have you been there before?

C: 离开流云渡吗？
E: Leave Cloudford now?

C: 恩公说笑了，小女子还盼着一同抓捕星核猎手，立个大功哩～
E: Hee-hee, I like your sense of humor, benefactors. Of course I'm happy to see you! When things settle down, I might even get promoted for catching a Stellaron Hunter.

C: 你捡到了一份来自「廿四协会」邀请函。
E: You picked up an invitation from the Club of the Twenty-Four.

C: 试试就试试吧…
E: It couldn't hurt...

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 景元将军所说的奇兵，就是这个意思么？
E: Is this what General Jing Yuan meant by unexpected guests?

C: 那名丹士的双眼失焦，分别望着不同的方向，仿佛同时看到了一条小径分岔的两端。
E: The alchemist's eyes were unfocused, darting back and forth, as if he were looking at the two diverging ends of a path.

C: 为了追求知识，可以理解…
E: I can understand their desire for knowledge...

C: 短生种不必担心这些。你安心了吗？
E: Short-life species don't need to worry about this. Feel better?

C: （建木重生，与药王秘传作乱有关…上一次听到这些名字，那是什么时候了？）
E: (The Arbor's resurrection is connected to the Disciples' rebellion... I've heard those names before, but when?)

C: （{NICKNAME}他们怎么会卷入这么麻烦的事情里……）
E: (How did {NICKNAME} and the others get drawn into all this...?)

C: 接下来，就要看你的了。
E: What happens next, is in your hands.

C: 万顷波涛之下，古老的建木玄根躁动蔓生，犹如一头伏形千年，大梦初醒的兽。
E: Beneath the endless rolling waves, the ancient roots of the arbor blaze. Long dormant, they stir and come to life, as if a beast were waking from its strife.

C: 你作为「云上五骁」的英雄大放异彩时，我还没出生呢。亲眼见到当年的传奇……
E: I was not born in the heroic and extraordinary era of the High-Cloud Quintet. To have seen those legends with my own eyes...

C: 古海波涛声摇晃，与某人立下的誓言在耳畔呢喃，星空彼端的光芒眨了眨眼，你沉入目眩神醉的温暖爱河里……
E: The ancient sea's waves sway. Someone whispers their vows to you in your ear. The light at the end of the starry sky shimmers, and you sink into the warm and intoxicating river of love...

C: 不知为何，你依稀能看到这些废墟曾经壮丽的模样，就像它从未倒塌一般。
E: You do not know why, yet for some reason you are able to faintly envision the magnificent appearance of these ruins as if they had never fallen.

C: （必须速战速决…）
E: (Gotta make this quick...)

C: 我还能…再战…
E: This... isn't over...

C: 幻胧，虽然你将我们视如蝼蚁…
E: Are we still ants to you, Phantylia?

C: …我怕是习惯不了。
E: ...I don't think I can ever get used to this.

C: 既然如此，请向十王传达我的意思……
E: I see. Please extend my regards to the Ten Lords...

C: 停云小姐听得津津有味，缠着我一个菜接一个菜说…末了听完了还要送我一件礼物，说是「宝剑赠英雄，名厨配好刀」。
E: She was captivated — she pestered me about dish after dish... At the end, she mentioned she wanted to get me a gift: "A sword for a hero, and a knife for a chef" — that's how she put it.

C: 没错。
E: Indeed.

C: 诸位怎么来了？
E: What brings you here?

C: 玉兆？
E: A jade abacus?

C: 你回来了，{NICKNAME}。我和姬子正聊着这次旅行呢。
E: You're back, {NICKNAME}. Himeko and I were just discussing our journey.

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来啦。我听瓦尔特说了你们这一路的经历。真羡慕，能看到「建木」和玄鹿，太卜司法阵，还有壮观的鳞渊境……
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. Welt was telling me about your experiences — I'm more than a little envious! The Ambrosial Arbor, the Ebon Deer, the Divination Commission Matrix, Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 纸鸢本是童玩，不过展翅高飞的意向很能宽慰狐人飞行士们的心，这个传统便被沿用了下来。
E: Paper kites are often gifted to children, but as a symbol of spreading one's wings and soaring high up into the sky, they are also a comfort to foxian pilots. It's an old tradition that's carried on to this day.

C: …我知道哪家好吃，你还是带上我吧。
E: ...Hmph, I know all the best places, — you'll be lost without me.

C: 她…在闭关研究丹药。
E: She's... on sabbatical studying medicinal pellets.

C: 现在黉学先生勒令我们「罗浮三少」从此改称「三少学习互助组」，真是丢死人了！这样以后还有谁能服我们！
E: We've been ordered to change our name from "The Luofu Trio" to "The Luofu Study Club..." It's so embarrassing! Now no-one's gonna respect us anymore...

C: 那个和我共事三十多年，曾经与我一同操持过天舶司事务的停云，怎么可能是某个怪物的伪装？原本的她现在又身在何方？
E: How could someone who spent over thirty years working alongside me at the Sky-Faring Commission... turn out to be nothing more than a monster in disguise? What happened to the real Tingyun?

C: 行李箱装不下你啦！自己走好不好？
E: You won't fit in the suitcase! Can't you walk?

C: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台……
E: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge...

C: 如果我毋须付出代价，我愿意。
E: If I didn't have to pay any price, I would.

C: 诶，你是……
E: Wait, what!? You're...!

C: 还不能下定论，也可能是假面愚者搞的鬼。只看手法，「谜语人」或异问魔也做得到。
E: I can't be certain. It may be a Masked Fool's trap. From the execution itself, the Riddlers or Inquisition Spirits could have done this themselves.

C: 听说家族举办了一场盛会。
E: I hear The Family held a grand event.

C: 我还有事，先走一步。相信我们很快会再见的。
E: Please excuse me, I have some matters to attend to, so I must depart, but I'm sure we'll meet again soon.

C: 好耶——我们现在就出发吧！
E: Alright! Let's move out!

C: <color=#ff3a3e>我也在找自己的客房，听见这边有动静…便来一探究竟。幸好你没关门，不然就危险了——那个男人显然不怀好意。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I'm trying to find my own room too, and I heard a commotion here... so I came to take a look. Luckily your door was open, or it could've gotten dangerous. That man looked like he was up to no good.</color>

C: <color=#ff3a3e>调侃一下，别在意，这的确是你的房间。此前在走廊上，我见那位先生轻手轻脚，不像是回自己房间，就有所提防……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I was just teasing, please forgive me. This is indeed your room. I saw that man snooping about while I was in the hallway, it didn't seem like he was searching for his own room, so it made me wary...</color>

C: （好像听到了熟悉的声音…是在画框里面吗？）
E: (I thought I heard a familiar voice... Is it coming from the painting?)

C: 我该支付多少信用点？
E: How many credits do I have to pay?

C: 你犯下的罪行无可饶恕，但列车长尊重每个人义务劳动的权利……
E: The sins you've committed are beyond pardon, but I respect every individual's right to carry out volunteer work...

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: （好的！正在为您复现……）
E: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 太可惜了——期待您下次光临！
E: What a shame. Please come again!

C: 正好！给我一起拿下！
E: Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!

C: 当然了，星际和平播报前不久才宣传了你们的光辉事迹！
E: You bet! The Interastral Peace Broadcast recently did a whole segment about your glorious achievements!

C: 这人很有名吗？
E: Is he famous?

C: 或许…你可以在那里和它重逢，看看那「好看的」东西究竟是什么。
E: Perhaps... you can meet with it again there. See just what exactly the "nice" thing is.

C: 桑博？！
E: Sampo!?

C: 这下就万事俱备，只欠做梦了。跟我来，各位——是时候让你们领略真正的娱乐了！
E: Now that we've got everything we need, we just need to go into a dream. Just follow me — you're about to experience the real fun!

C: 在那里，我会把我所知的一切…尽可能都告诉你。
E: I'll do my best to tell you everything I know when we get there.

C: …真是麻烦。看来，还得再去会会「家族」啊。
E: ...What a pain in the neck. I guess I'll have to meet with The Family again.

C: 老大这是怎么了？
E: What's wrong with boss?

C: …没关系，谢谢你。
E: ...It's okay. Thanks.

C: 求求你了求求你了…
E: Pretty please...

C: 老样子——你已经很擅长了，对吧？
E: It's the same routine. You've mastered it, right?

C: 出口…在对面吗？这要怎么过去呀……
E: The exit... is on the other side? How're we going to cross over...

C: 这是什么情况？！
E: What's happening!?

C: 恐怕…这就是所谓的既视感……
E: You're... probably just experiencing some déjà vu...

C: 奇怪，你还什么都没做，大门就缓缓打开了——原来如此，这是一道自动感应门，只是感应不了垃圾桶。
E: Strange, you haven't done anything, but the door opens slowly — it turns out that this is an automatic sensor door. It just can't sense trashcans.

C: 我需要「信任的证明」。
E: I need "Proof of Trust."

C: 深海…
E: The deep sea...

C: 是啊，我收到了报告…「死亡」带走了他们中的一些人。或许是受人指使。
E: Yes, I received the report that... "Death" had taken some of them. Perhaps someone was behind it.

C: 家族自有安排。别再用你那诡诈的舌头玷污我亲爱的妹妹，愚者。
E: The Family has a plan, and do not dishonor my dear sister with your deceitful tongue again, Fool.

C: 听凭差遣，不会让各位失望的。
E: I'm at your service. I will not disappoint.

C: 看来即便我亲手拯救了你们的同伴，各位也还是很难信任我呢…当然没问题，只是有点伤害我的感情。
E: It seems that I'll have a hard time gaining your trust even if I personally did rescue your friends... It's no problem, of course, other than the fact that my feelings are a little hurt.

C: 你在吗？我们要出发了。
E: Are you in there? We are about to set off.

C: 嗯，她就是我提到的那位忆者。
E: Yes. She is the Memokeeper I mentioned.

C: 呀…表情像是受伤的小动物呢。你还肯和我谈谈吗？我依旧愿意…当你的心理治疗师。
E: My, my... you look like a small injured animal. Are you still willing to talk to me? Of course... I'm still willing to be your psychotherapist.

C: 但，还记得吗？我也说过…「我相信你们的潜质」，这句话绝无半点虚假。
E: But do you still remember? I said... "I have faith in your potential," and that's not a lie.

C: 但她确实找到了{NICKNAME}，并救了{M#他}{F#她}——眼下只能先听听对方的要求了……
E: But she did find {NICKNAME}, and save {M#him}{F#her} too. The least we could do is to listen to the other party's request...

C: 前提是…真正的「邪恶」。
E: But you're talking about REAL evil.

C: 妈妈…！妈妈…！
E: Mommy...! Mommy...!

C: 你好，我是工业化的渣滓。
E: Hello, I'm industrial scum.

C: 会是「家族」吗？
E: Perhaps he's going for The Family?

C: 因为接下来的对话…会持续很久。
E: Because the conversation coming up... will last forever.

C: 「…火焰的子嗣们██这是你们的成人之礼…」
E: "Children of the flame ██ this marks your rite of passage."

C: 听话，向母神发誓。
E: Listen to me, and swear to Gaiathra Triclops.

C: 可是，姐姐…如果三重眼的地母神真的在注视我们……
E: But Sister... If Gaiathra Triclops was really watching over us...

C: 调查「格列佛拱门」。
E: Investigate Gulliver's Arch.

C: 我们不必遮遮掩掩，来谈谈您的妹妹吧。令妹的才能在演艺界无出其右，可您也知道，回到匹诺康尼后，她的声音就一直不太*谐调*。
E: There's no need for us to be evasive. Let's talk about your sister. Your sister's talent is unrivaled in the world of show business. As you know, her voice has been out of tune since she returned to Penacony. What's more disheartening, she {RUBY_B#Death}can't sing anymore{RUBY_E#}.

C: 「你在入境时，是否将基石交予家族？」
E: "Did you hand over the Cornerstone to The Family when you entered Penacony?"

C: 教授——你怎么还没走——？
E: Doctor... Shake a leg...?

C: 您是指入梦池的记录么？设备会实时监测心率、血氧含量、体温这些生理指标，并列入统计，交由家族筛查其中的异常数据，一旦发现非法行为，就要立即采取措施。
E: Are you referring to the records when you enter the Dreampool? The equipment will monitor physiological indicators such as heart rate, blood oxygen levels, and body temperature in real time. This data will be included in statistics and handed over to The Family for the screening of any data anomalies. Immediate action will be taken once any illegal behavior is detected.

C: 烫金的时刻…据说那里是匹诺康尼的货币中心。
E: Gilded Hour... It's said to be Penacony's Currency Center.

C: 战略投资部的各位一定也非常希望能及时收到你的死讯。别忘了，你再也没法见到他们了，这个任务现在可是落在我的头上。
E: Yeah, and I'm pretty sure the people at the Strategic Investment Department would love to be notified of your death in due time, but let's not forget you won't be seeing them, because I'm the manager of this task.

C: 死亡？这类题材早烂大街了，我还在爱德华医生那儿买到过呢。说是什么…只此一份的高档匿名捐赠品，实际烂极了，都是噱头。
E: Death? Not even remotely innovative. I bought it from Dr. Edward. He claimed it was some exclusive fancy-schmancy stuff... But what a disappointment.

C: 我是在问你…什么叫「成为哑巴」？
E: No, I mean... what did you mean by "becoming one myself"?

C: 不是说梦里什么都能喝嘛？
E: But I thought we could drink anything in dreams?

C: 可是，你前面明明说「钟表匠」是家族的背叛者？你还说自己是他的同伴，所以你也……
E: But didn't you say the Watchmaker betrayed The Family? And you said you were his companion, so that means you...

C: 瓦尔特先生能分辨出脚印的主人是谁吗？
E: Can you identify the people who left these footprints?

C: 怎么回事？
E: Wh—What?

C: 我说对了么？你就是这样的人，谨小慎微又妄自菲薄，赢了这么多，却还是比谁都怕输。
E: Go on. Tell me I'm right. You know who you really are, Mr. Cavalier Gambler: Uptight, overcautious, massive inferiority complex. You've won so much, and you're still SO afraid of losing.

C: 千万不要小看自己。我说过，你拥有足以掀翻整张牌桌的力量……
E: Never underestimate yourself. Like I said, you have the power to turn the tide on the entire game...

C: 匹诺康尼……
E: Penacony...

C: 祂留下命途的织缕，任由人们行走，共同罗织一道巨大的影子…而这影子亦默默地笼罩他们本身。
E: THEY leave woven strands of fate for humans to walk, and together, THEY weave a great shadow... And this shadow silently envelops them.

C: 但你说过，「睡眠是死亡的预演」，生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
E: But you said, "Sleep is the rehearsal of death," so why does life slumber? Because we are not ready for the final rest.

C: 梦境或许不像承诺中那般完美，但没有什么地方比家族治理下的美梦更安全，相信您比我更清楚这点。试问如果这种事故发生在现实，又有多少人能全身而退呢？
E: Perhaps the Dreamscape is not as perfect as promised. But there's no place safer than dreams under The Family's rule. I believe you know this better than I do. If this incident happened in real life, how many people would be able to walk away from it?

C: 啊？对对对对不起！我才转到猎犬家系没几天，还不习惯在街头工作，没注意到是您…非常抱歉！
E: Ah? I—I—I—I'm sorry! I've just been transferred to the Bloodhound Family, and I'm still not too used to working on the streets. I didn't realize it was you... I'm so sorry!

C: 辛苦了。如果还有其他成员感到不安，可以代我转述。守护梦境需要大家共同的努力。
E: Thank you for your hard work. If there are any other members who still feel uneasy, please tell them on my behalf that protecting the Dreamscape requires everyone's help.

C: 舞台筹备固然重要，但举办仪典本就是为了向各位传达神主的谐乐，如有机会能与大家共唱，我自然不应拒绝。
E: Preparation is important, but the ceremony is fundamentally about sharing the Great One's harmony with everyone. If there's a chance to sing with everyone, I will not refuse.

C: 就算你选择性忽视，他们的命运也不会改变。
E: Their destiny won't change just because of your selective ignorance.

C: 有什么担忧，不妨说出来一起讨论讨论。
E: Something on your mind? Let's talk about it.

C: 眠眠是只忆域迷因，长得凶凶的，有许多只大眼睛。但它其实很听话，一直是加拉赫在照顾眠眠。
E: Sleepie is a Memory Zone Meme, looks fierce and has many eyes. But it's actually really well-behaved. Gallagher's been taking care of it.

C: 虽然残酷，但这是无可争辩的事实，这里的「同谐」反而比美梦中传扬更广……
E: I hate to admit it, but the "Harmony" in this place resonates more broadly than within the sweet dream...

C: 仙舟联盟的遭遇我也有所耳闻。但就我所知，不存在外部势力干预家族的情况。也可能是我离乡太久，有太多看不见的地方。
E: I'd heard about what happened to the Xianzhou Alliance. But as far as I'm aware, The Family hasn't faced any such external interventions. Who knows, perhaps I've just been away too long and missed something.

C: 嚯，连你们也看出来了？
E: Oh, is it that obvious?

C: 你们聊得差不多了吧？怎样，愿意告诉我们那颗「星核」在哪儿了么？
E: Are you done talking? So, will you tell us where the Stellaron is?

C: 而利用星核完成这一切的人…恐怕是歌斐木先生，也就是如今的「梦主」。
E: As for the person who employed its power... It is in fact Mr. Gopher Wood, the current Dreammaster.

C: 如果至纯善的灵魂都会犯下过错，谁能给他们予以宽慰？
E: Who can comfort the purest souls when even they get led astray?

C: 真实的模样…呵，知更鸟小姐，希望你永远不会见着。
E: My true appearance... Well, I hope you never have to witness it, Robin.

C: 歪理。要是按这个逻辑推导，未来岂不是变成了英雄们的特权？
E: That's just sophistry. If that were true, then only the powerful would have the right to determine the future.

C: 未来之于人，正如天空之于鸟儿。人们之所以误以为飞翔是鸟类的天性，是因为他们从没见过那些坠亡在地的鸟儿。
E: The future for humanity is like the sky for birds. People mistakenly believe that flight is inherent to birds because they've never witnessed those birds crashing to their death.

C: 如此精妙复杂的乐章，若非神主希佩，又有哪一位神明能够完美调和？
E: Such a delicate and complex symphony, which other God could perfectly harmonize this if not for the Great One, Xipe?

C: 见谅，你就当是我的习惯吧。我有那么几个损友，要是把计划透底了，他们铁定得给我整出点花活来，多少备用都不够。
E: I'm sorry, but it's one of my quirks. I have too many unreliable friends, and if I reveal that I have backup plans, things can... things can go awry. And that would leave all backup plans completely useless.

C: 我请求她带我去一个家族视线之外的地方，联系几个值得信任的人，也就是各位了。
E: I asked her to guide me to a place beyond The Family's reach and to contact a few trustworthy individuals, namely all of you.

C: …将「他」的遗物物归原主。
E: ...To return "his" relics to their rightful owner.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 太好了！我喜欢刺激的生活！
E: Great! I love living on the wild side!

C: 这也太没完没了了…要不然你试试那个吧？就是那个…钟表把戏。
E: Ugh... Is this ever going to end? I know, why don't you try that... clockwork thing you used before.

C: 我已经迫不及待想要看你完成「筑梦拼图」了…呵呵。加油，哈努兄弟。
E: I can't wait to see you finish the Dream Jigsaw... Best of luck, Hanu!

C: 据说「钟表匠」早在童年时代便已构想出了它的原型！那时他还只是一位钟表店的学徒，某天夜里，他梦见那些坏掉的钟表全部长出了手脚……
E: It's said that the Watchmaker dreamed up the idea of Clockie when he was just a boy. Back then, he was merely an apprentice in a clock shop, and one night, he dreamt that all the broken clocks started sprouting arms and legs.

C: 你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
E: Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

C: 是钟表小子啾？快救救我啾，要变成烤全鸟了啾！
E: Is that Clockie, tweet? Please save me, tweet! I'm being roasted alive, tweet!

C: 做出选择。
E: Make the decision.

C: 这个场景有点怀念…
E: This place feels a bit nostalgic...

C: 人终有一死，我也一样。死亡就像剧本，是无法违抗的命运。但也正因如此……
E: People die, and I am no exception. Death is like a script, a fate that cannot be defied. But that's exactly why...

C: 那听起来，就是得让这几个跪拜的家伙全都变得「镇静」，对吧？
E: Looks like we've got to help those guys kneeling down over there calm down a bit, right?

C: 嗯…说来话长。简单来说就是，丹恒在咱们陷入苦战的时候使用了结盟玉兆，带着将军及时解了围。
E: Mm... It's a long story. Simply put, Dan Heng used the jade abacus of allying oath when we were in the middle of a fierce battle, and summoned the general to help us just in time.

C: …我似乎也不记得了。
E: ...I can't seem to remember either.

C: 嗯，拜托你了。{NICKNAME}，你呢？你想跟我和瓦尔特一起去，还是说你也有别的事要做？
E: Thank you. What about you, {NICKNAME}? Will you join Welt and me, or have you got other plans?

C: 你怎么这么喜欢学我说话呀！
E: What's with you and always copying the way I talk!

C: 呵，真为匹诺康尼的逐梦客们感到开心——全宇宙最智慧和最愚钝的头脑现在全都为他们所用了。
E: I am truly happy for the Dreamchasers on Penacony — the cosmos's brightest and, let's admit, dimmer intellects are now at their service.

C: 这都多亏了匹诺康尼的大英雄{NICKNAME}，大家都被你的正直无私打动啦。
E: This is all due to your heroic deeds in Penacony. Everyone's been moved by your integrity and selflessness.

C: 米沙，「钟表匠」
E: Misha, Watchmaker

C: 艾利欧
E: Elio

C: 前往最后的舞台。
E: Let's embark on the final stage.

C: 可是，雨依旧没有停下……
E: But it's still raining...

C: 不出所料。所以「钻石」是打算给我也降个级，还是要把我直接踢出「石心十人」？
E: Just as I expected. So, is Diamond planning to demote me, or kick me out of the Ten Stonehearts?

C: 会有黑眼圈的。
E: You'll have dark circles under your eyes.

C: 我只是有种预感…也许他的心愿已了，不会再回来了。
E: I have a hunch... Perhaps he's already fulfilled his wishes and won't be coming back.

C: 在发现自己的记忆里并未留下她的结局时，我便察觉到了苦涩的事实。
E: When I realized that her "conclusion" was not preserved in memories, I became aware of the bitter truth.

C: 事实上，我正要去见他。知更鸟小姐和他很熟吗？
E: I'm actually on my way to meet him right now. Do you know him well, Miss Robin?

C: 嗯，翡翠女士，回头见。
E: See you later, Miss Jade.

C: 你说过的话，我现在悉数奉还。为了保住你的体面，也为了你能不在正式会谈上成为众矢之的——你最好放弃那个天方夜谭的计划。
E: Now I'm repeating your words exactly. If you don't want to be a laughingstock and have everyone gunning for you at the official conference... you'd better drop your little pie-in-the-sky plan.

C: 如果可以，我更希望你把它当作我个人的行为，既不代表公司，也不代表战略投资部。
E: Consider it more of a personal offer from myself. It doesn't represent the IPC or the Strategic Investment Department.

C: 呀，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛？这才过了多久，我们又见面了。最近如何？
E: Well if it isn't {NICKNAME}? It hasn't been long, and yet here we are again. How are you?

C: 怎么会？「纯美」容不得偏颇，我的发言皆出于公平公正。
E: How could it be? The Beauty holds no bias. My words are fair and just.

C: 离谐乐大典开幕还有些时间，想聊聊吗？
E: There's still some time before Charmony Festival starts. Do you want to chat?

C: 你也可以踏上「开拓」。
E: You're more than welcome to tread on the Path of the Trailblaze.
Five...

C: 还有其他办法吗…
E: Is there another way?

C: 然后，就去翻开它的下一页吧。
E: And then, a new page will be turned.

C: 你呀，大晚上不睡觉都干什么去了？
E: What have you been doing at night instead of sleeping?

C: 说唱？非也，在下咏诵的乃是忍•真言。
E: Rapping? That's not it. What I'm reciting is the mantra of a ninja.

C: 别让这个怪人打断你的幸福时光，快听，小猴们还在发出幸福的邀请——
E: Don't let this weirdo interrupt your happy moments. Listen, the little monkeys are still joyfully inviting you—

C: 你们面前的猴子面露凶相，好像在说——「搞什么鬼」。
E: The monkeys in front of you have a fierce look on their faces, as if saying, "What the heck is going on?"

C: 你鼓起勇气翻越栏杆，进入猴子形状的梦泡之中……
E: You gather your courage and climb over the railing, entering the monkey-shaped dream bubble...

C: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！为与邪忍抗衡，你还需要一个新的名字，属于忍者的名字。
E: An admirable resolution! To contend with the Evil Ninja, you will also need a new name — a name befitting a ninja.

C: 是我啦。这不是听说大学生都爱起昵称，我就让大家直接叫网名了。
E: That's me. I heard college students love nicknames, so I decided to go by my online handle.

C: 你好！我是校友群里的「独爱蕉宝」，各位可以叫我蒙塔娜。
E: Hi there! I'm TreasureNana from the campus group chat. You can call me Montana.

C: 芮克先生！我是你的粉丝啊！
E: Mr. Reca! I am your biggest fan!

C: 哎，我还以为你只会看纪录片呢。
E: Huh? I thought you only watched documentaries.

C: 呱呱呱！
E: Quack, quack!

C: 所以，这些甜品怎么卖？
E: So how much for these desserts?

C: 不，没事…各位同学有空也去其他摊位看看吧，希望你们玩得开心。
E: No, nothing... Feel free to visit the other booths. I hope you have a good time.

C: 现在不会再有人打扰了，说吧。你这一路都在跟踪我们，为什么？
E: No one will bother us anymore. Tell me. Why have you been following us all this time?

C: 所以…波提欧先生，我听过巡海游侠的事迹，也知道那些被他们追猎的存在。
E: So... Mr. Boothill, I'm familiar with the Galaxy Rangers and their exploits, as well as with the entities they pursue.

C: 而且，如果您打算使用一些特别的手段，我还是不在现场为好。
E: Moreover, if you intend to employ... certain means of doing things, it'll be for the better if I'm not around.

C: 就那鬼样，眼熟，但不怎么令人怀念。
E: Same ol' sorry sight. Not that I miss it.

C: 米凯已经和我们说过了，参加家族的谐乐？滚远点儿。
E: Micah already told us about it. Chiming in on The Family's harmonic tunes? You best get the hell out of my face!

C: 大伙儿都憋着股劲呢，能用家族以外的方式破除万难，对于流梦礁这还是第一次。
E: Everyone's got something they want to prove. It's the first time Dreamflux Reef has ever had a way to overcome difficulties on our own, without relying on The Family.

C: 不对，你没无视过垃圾桶。
E: Hang on. You've never ignored a trashcan.

C: 没错。所以现在我并非演员，而是以「导演」的身份临场观摩。
E: I am, that's why I am watching this scene as a director instead of an actor.

C: 城主？说笑了，我只是一介教职员工，校园的主人永远是学生们。
E: Governor? You humor me. I'm merely an educator. Here on our campus, our students are the true masters.

C: 因为小猴长得可爱！
E: Because Slumbernana Monkey is cute!

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴恢复了平静。
E: Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey calms down.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，这只小猴找回了自己的笑容。
E: Under the spell of Clockwork, the little monkey found its smile again.

C: 这不正常。方才的忍•战中在下理应收手了，难道这些邪祟背后另有他人操纵？
E: Something's awry. I believe I should've held back in the ninja battle just now... Perhaps someone is controlling these fiendlings behind the scenes?

C: 百分正确的分析。但依在下愚见，此刻还不是向同谐•幕府求援的时机。
E: Your analysis is accurate. However, in my humble opinion, now may not be the best time to call the Harmony Shogunate for aid.

C: 蕉蕉蕉，高级的作品总是简洁的。
E: Bana tsk, sophisticated masterpieces thrive on simplicity.

C: 说出激怒对方的忍•真言
E: Speak the ninja mantra with a provocative twist

C: 如此循环往复，折纸村的忍徒就会被邪祟同化，成为邪忍的傀儡…真是一场无心、无情、无慈悲的大阴谋！
E: And so all ninja initiates of Paperfold Town will succumb to fiendishness, becoming puppets of the evil ninja... What a dispiteous, degenerate, and dastardly ploy!

C: 在下一颗星一颗星地走过，却找不到任何能开口说话的忍者，全都是邪祟……
E: As I traveled from one planet to the other, a prevalent but unpalatable observation struck me: Not a single ninja could speak, they had all become fiendlings...

C: 这是*蕉育*！暴力也是一种*蕉育*！
E: It's Bananenlightenment! And violence is one way to enforce that!

C: 这气氛…真的是在上营销课么？
E: This atmosphere... is this... really a marketing class?

C: 天守阁对峙的时刻到了，危情刻不容缓，各位请用上自己的忍•脚步吧。
E: A castle showdown looms ahead of us, fellow ninjas. We ought to make haste with ninja speed.

C: 这到底是……
E: What's going on...?

C: 观察样本？
E: Your subject?

C: 「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
E: "Will this make you worse off?"

C: 「即使失去注视万物的能力，你也不会变得更加不幸。」
E: "Even if you lose the ability to see everything, you won't be any less happy."

C: 我不知道，忍徒。名字会承载你的理想，铭刻信念，昭示命运。它是属于你自己的忍号。
E: I don't know, my disciple. Your name will carry your ideals, your convictions, and your destiny. Your ninja name belongs to you alone.

C: 安全系统马上就要恢复了，等着承受原始博士的怒火吧，没有自知之明的薪柴！
E: The security system will be repaired soon. Prepare to feel the full force of Dr. Primitive's wrath, you oblivious kindling!

C: 不过多亏了他，彩梦校庆也能继续重新举办了——这次总能玩个痛快了吧！
E: However, it's all thanks to him that the Dreamlight Anniversary is going ahead once again. I hope that we can finally have some fun this time!

C: 儿子…呵呵，或许我这个当爹的也该更努力一点吧……
E: Son... Heh, as your dad, perhaps I should also try a little harder...

C: 蕉蕉！睡蕉小猴的力量保护了我们！
E: Banahaha! The power of the Slumbernana Monkey is protecting us!

C: 缭乱•忍侠
E: Dazzling Ninja Hero

C: 琉璃•忍者
E: Ninja Ruri

C: 多说无益，我们直接上手吧！
E: Enough with the talking. Let's just get started!

C: 不知道，很难听清……
E: I'm not sure. It's difficult to make out clearly...

C: 这黑潮有那么可怕吗？
E: Is the black tide really that scary?

C: 如果是心魔，战胜不了也正常。
E: It's only normal to be unable to overcome your inner demons.

C: 小心这群吃人的野兽！
E: Watch out for those man-eating beasts!

C: 「我还明白：你们是为那白发战士的魂灵而来。」
E: "And I happen to know that you're here for the soul of that white-haired warrior."

C: 我年纪还小，喝不了这个。
E: I'm not of drinking age yet.

C: 噢，合着是阿格莱雅搬的救兵。
E: Ohh, she's here to help Aglaea recruit us.

C: 既然如此，还请各位也携着<color=#dbc291ff>这柄纺锤</color>一道出发——
E: In that case, do bring <color=#dbc291ff>this spindle</color> along with you.

C: 嗯…不排除这个可能性。
E: Hm... That's possible.

C: 单看这一地狼藉…学者们应该至少挡住了第一波进攻。
E: Looking at this mess... it seems the scholars at least succeeded in fending off the first wave of attacks.

C: 好！缇安遇到危险，一定会来找大家的。当然，如果大家遇到危险，也要记得呼唤缇安——缇安会赶来给大家开门！
E: Okie-dokie! If Trianne gets in trouble, we'll look for all of you. In return, if you get in trouble, remember to call for Trianne, okay? We'll come right over and open the Gate for you!

C: 就用人家才有的，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量，来帮各位好伙伴的忙！
E: I'll use something to help all of my friends that only I have: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power!

C: 第二，别打断我——沉默是金。
E: Rule number two: Never interrupt me. Silence is golden.

C: （抚摸雕像）
E: (Stroke the statue)

C: 看来只凭我们几个是没法灌满它了……
E: It seems like it won't be possible to fill it up with just the few of us...

C: 为了更好地合作，卡吕普索阁下，还是正面回答我的问题为好。
E: Lady Calypso, if you want us to work together more effectively, I advise you to answer my question honestly.

C: …是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}火种的残渣喔。
E: ...A remnant of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.

C: 唔…你的意思是，你把自己的火种藏起来了？
E: Uh... What you mean is that you hid your own Coreflame?

C: 各位，做好准备…想必它就是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}方才所说的，自黑潮中脱胎的猎手了——
E: Everyone, brace yourself... This must be the hunter reborn from the black tide that {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was talking about...

C: 看，很大的树！它——很大！
E: Look, a huge tree! It's... huge!

C: 圣城的小孩子不愿和我们一起玩。知道爸爸妈妈是悬锋人，他们就躲得远远的……
E: The kids in the holy city don't play with us. The moment they find out that our parents are Kremnoans, they shun us...

C: 没有人敢随我来么？你们这些懦夫，那王冠竟让你们变得如此软弱？
E: No one dares stand by my side? Cowards! Has that crown stripped you of your courage!?

C: 失格的王啊，以元老院之名，我勒令你与我角斗！
E: O unworthy king, in the name of the Council of Elders, I demand that you duel me!

C: 母亲怒号。
E: The mother roared in anger.

C: （泡澡放松一下吧，兄弟。）
E: (Why don't you take a bath to recharge, buddy?)

C: 每一次洞开「百界门」，都会深化分裂对缇宝她们的影响。从肉体到心智，一步步向着婴儿退行。
E: Each opening of the Century Gate intensifies the strain on Tribbie and the others. They are gradually regressing towards infancy, both in body and mind.

C: 没办法，逐火之旅注定不会一帆风顺嘛。
E: Well, there's no way around it. We all know that the Flame-Chase Journey won't be a smooth ride.

C: 唔…小小蝶，缇安还是…头疼。
E: Ugh... Little Cas, my head... It still hurts.

C: 缇宝大人为了抗击黑潮踏上旅途，然而自旅途伊始，到走过万千城邦，她们都未曾在黑潮中遭遇如此强敌。说不定是「纷争」陨落，暗中激起了更为骇人的影响……
E: Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...

C: 呵，这不是我第一次做别人的阶下囚了。悉听尊便，「半神」。
E: Hmph, it is not the first time I've been made someone else's prisoner. Do as you please, "demigod."

C: 感谢，不必。你的救命之恩，我要报答。
E: Gratitude, there is no need for. Repayment for saving me, this is.

C: 我想，其中一位战士来自蔺草遍野的美丽村庄，还有一位来自宏伟的王城。他们都有各自的烦恼，但也愿意为小船的远航献出力量。
E: I believe one warrior hails from a lovely village where bulrushes flourish, while another comes from a magnificent royal city. Though each has their own troubles, both are ready to lend their strength for the ship's long voyage.

C: 不是吧，老师，我就随口一说…你真记得这事？
E: No way... Do you really still remember that, professor?

C: 呵…你在想些什么，不如由我来猜猜？
E: Heh... How about you let me guess what's on your mind?

C: 如此说来，倒是有一句话想求你转述。
E: On second thought, there is something that I'd like you to help me convey to them.

C: 莫非你真想就一走了之，都不跟我通个气？
E: Were you seriously just going to sneak off without a word with me?

C: 我倒要找他们确认下，看看悬锋人的字典里是不是真的缺了那么多词语。
E: And while I'm at it, I'm going to find out if the Kremnoan language is really missing that many words.

C: 气色不错啊。
E: You're looking well.

C: 这恐怕由不得我。打踏入圣城的那一刻起，我就已经在她的监牢里了。谁让我的脑袋里住下了一位泰坦呢？
E: That's not up to me, I'm afraid. I've been trapped in her prison the moment I set foot in this holy city. The price of having a Titan living in my head, I suppose.
Hmph...

C: 她好像…真的变成了一只娃娃？我不懂……
E: Why does she look like she really turned into a doll? I... I don't understand...

C: 这就是「开拓」的意义。
E: This is what Trailblazing is.

C: 一会儿见，吾师。
E: See you later, teacher.

C: 阿蝶，其实，*我*当初一眼就认出了它，这确实是雅努萨波利斯的真品。
E: Cas, you know, I recognized it immediately that day. It truly is an authentic piece from Janusopolis.

C: 长大后*我们*才知道，在雅努萨波利斯，如果有人为命运光荣赴死，圣女就要从火山的采石场中撷下一块玻璃，细细打磨，交由死者家属接收。
E: It wasn't until we were older that we learned in Janusopolis, if someone gloriously died for destiny, the Holy Maiden must pick a piece of glass from the volcano's quarry and polish it, then give it to the deceased's family.

C: 不，这时的*我们*尚未获得它的力量。
E: No, we hadn't acquired their power back then.

C: 无论做什么都不会改变过往。真实的历史上，帮助缇里西庇俄丝的另有他人。
E: Regardless of our actions, the past will remain unchanged. It was someone else who helped Tribios in the actual events of history.

C: 等到明天，一切就会好起来吗？
E: That everything will be fine tomorrow?
Ah...

C: 你还能拿什么和元老院抗衡？
E: What else can you use to stand against the Council?

C: 我希望你能趁这次「圣杯战争」的机会，和他加深一些「友谊」。
E: I want you to use this Holy Grail War as a chance to strengthen that trust.

C: 斯科特先生，你该不会只有这两下子吧？
E: Skott, that's all you've got?

C: …不好意思，刚见面就露出了这种窘态。
E: Forgive me. I must seem rather undignified.

C: 哎，别提了，我原本能将两个御主一网打尽。结果，Assassin掩护御主一块跑了，另外一个灰毛召唤出了——
E: Don't even start. I almost got two Masters in one sweep, but then Assassin covered his Master's escape, and the other one... that gray-haired kid summoned—

C: 唉，等和{F#她}{M#他}见面时，得好好澄清一番误会——嗯？你说{F#她}{M#他}的英灵也和你们一样？
E: Ugh... Guess we'll have to clear up that little misunderstanding when we meet — Huh? You said {M#his}{F#her} Heroic Spirit is like you guys?

C: 她们吃饱以后，似乎都冷静了下来。餐桌真是最适合外交的地方了。
E: It seems they've all calmed down after eating. The dinner table really is the best place for diplomacy.

C: 我是橡木家系硕果仅存的主事者，同谐的调弦师，我并没有你想的这么脆弱。同样，事到如今的我，已没有想要托付圣杯的愿望了。
E: I'm the last remaining head of the Oak Family, a Chordmaster of Harmony. I'm not as fragile as you think. And as of now, I no longer have a wish to entrust to the Holy Grail.

C: 不对不对，这压根就不是他写的吧！
E: Wait, wait, this absolutely isn't from him!

C: 哟！是阿尔托利斯啊！你也是来拔剑的吗？
E: Oh! Artorius! Here to draw the sword, aren't you?

C: 我后悔了。
E: Yes, I regret my choice.

C: 人造矿石研讨。
E: Man-Made Ore Symposium.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我以第一划令咒下令，阿斯娜，我代表匹诺康尼归还你的名字。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>With the first Command Spell, I return your name to you on behalf of Penacony, Asna.</color>

C: 一个不管赌上什么也永远赢不了的梦…在那里我成了一个老老实实的侍者，戒掉了所有押注的念头。
E: I had a dream where I could never win... I got to live as an obedient serf and gave up on even the thought of gambling.

C: 圣杯…碎了啊，可惜。
E: The Holy Grail... broke. What a shame.

C: 击溃它，Saber！
E: Crush it, Saber!

C: 谁知道…天天低着头和一群皮皮西谈业务，我的颈椎病都快恶化了！
E: ...But all I've done every day is talk business to a bunch of Pepeshi! It's making my neck crank even worse!

C: 一股冰冷的力量将你们强行拽回了原地，而后，耳畔传来熟悉的声音。
E: A frigid force drags you violently back to where you started. And then, a voice you know all too well murmurs by your ear.

C: 免费听了场演唱会。
E: I watched a free concert.

C: 说实在的，这家伙死咬着你不放的坚韧，就连不列颠最癫狂的猎犬也要自愧不如。御主，你到底对他做了什么？
E: Honestly, the way this guy keeps coming for you? Even the wildest British hounds would call it obsessive. Master, what did you do to him?

C: 在动物们的环绕音叫声里，Archer的太阳穴以微不足道的幅度轻轻跳动，自这场圣杯战争开始以来，这是他受过的最严重的精神攻击。
E: Surrounded by animal echoing cries, a vein throbbed faintly on Archer's temple. It was the worst mental trauma he'd suffered since the Holy Grail War began.

C: 发出肯定的*哼*。
E: Let out a confirming *hmph*.

C: 这样吧，我每问你一个问题，如果回答「是」，你就踢这家伙一脚。如果「不是」，你就踢两脚。
E: Alright, let's do this: Every time I ask you a question, and if the answer's yes, kick him once. If it's no, kick twice.

C: 然后，重组起属于你自己的旋律。
E: Now, rebuild a melody that's truly your own.

C: 一定是恶灵的影响还在作祟，让我替你进行调律——
E: The evil spirit must still be affecting you. Let me tune you properly—

C: 导演！你是不是把我放错了位置？我还在敌人堆里呢！
E: Director! Did you place me in the wrong spot? I'm still among the bad guys!

C: 那我就恭敬不如从命了，砂金先生。
E: Then I'll graciously comply, Mr. Aventurine.

C: 真搞不明白，为什么我非得陪你走一遭。
E: Remind me... Why do I have to make this trip with you again?

C: 那你也该知道，公司不会救你第二遍。要是再落到家族手里，你就彻底完了。
E: Then you should also know that the IPC isn't going to help you a second time. If you fall into The Family's hands again, you're done for.

C: 领带应在正中线上，衬衣不得从马甲中露出，裤线必须笔直且对齐鞋头的朝向…人在出门前就该确保一切井然有序，绝不偏移。
E: The tie should be on the center line, the shirt must not protrude from the vest, trouser creases should be perfectly straight, and always aligned with the tips of your shoes.... We should always ensure that everything is in order before walking out the door.

C: 很相似的说辞。
E: That sounds familiar.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>「体验游乐设施时，请勿使用惊梦剧团售卖的苏乐达瓶盖。」</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Please do not use SoulGlad bottle caps sold by the Dreamjolt Troupe while experiencing the attractions."</color>

C: 下一条，去舞台边看看。
E: Next on the list is the stage. Let's go and check it out.

C: 没吃饱。
E: I still wanted more candies.

C: 他是一位好对手。
E: He was a worthy opponent.

C: 「罗浮」？那里前不久刚遭遇反物质军团的袭击，她有幸逃过一劫吗？
E: The Luofu? Didn't the Antimatter Legion launch an ambush on the Luofu some time ago? Was she one of the few survivors?

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 不用在意。接着睡一会儿吧，等你醒来便会忘记这些细节。
E: Don't worry about it. You should sleep for a little longer. By the time you wake up, you won't remember any of these details.

C: 只是有些事仍难以忘怀，觉得分别前，心里话还是说开了为好。
E: But there are some things I find difficult to forget. I feel it's only right that I tell you what's on my mind before we part ways.

C: 有点危险。
E: A bit dangerous.

C: 那看上去，又像是何许人？
E: So, what did she seem like to you?

C: 连日叨扰，眼看着将要分别，总不能毫无表示。小女子为列位恩公留下一枚梦泡，希望能拿得出手。
E: After troubling you all this time, I couldn't leave without properly expressing my thanks. Here's a dream bubble for you — I hope you enjoy it.

C: 你们回来了？
E: You're back!

C: 如今{RUBY_B#毁灭}烬灭{RUBY_E#}的烙印在我体内维持着微妙的平衡，并且…它们是由幻胧亲手所造。
E: Right now, the marks of {RUBY_B#Destruction}Ruin{RUBY_E#} inside me maintain a delicate balance. Moreover... they were created by Phantylia herself.

C: 「舍其所争、取其所弃，方能交流天下、得我所欲」——八面玲珑这点，我今后也不会改变。
E: "Forsake what others fight for and take what others abandon. That's the way to navigate the world and achieve my goals." I will continue to uphold my principles.

C: 我不去，凭什么？
E: I'm not leaving. No way.

C: 也许儿时的我做出一个微小的改变，就会变得与他别无二致。
E: Maybe if I had made a small change in my childhood, I would have turned out to be exactly like him.

C: 呃…看来也没办法了。
E: Uh... I guess that'll have to do, then.

C: 先别担心，那毕竟是天才的地盘，反物质军团都拿它没办法……
E: It shouldn't be anything to worry about. What could happen on the geniuses' home turf? Even the Antimatter Legion wouldn't stand a chance...

C: 他还挺有松弛感。
E: He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.

C: 果然比起其他选项，翁法罗斯还是多了个非去不可的理由啊……
E: Amphoreus does have something to offer, unlike the other options...

C: 我很期待接下来的旅程。
E: I look forward to the journey ahead.

C: 你思考再三，准备不充分等于充分不准备！索性把行李丢到一边吧……
E: After much deliberation, you realize that insufficient preparation is as good as no preparation! Might as well toss your luggage aside...

C: 噢，懂了。这就叫「有效借鉴」吧？嘿嘿……
E: Ahh, I see. We call this... referencing, and not appropriation, right? Heh...

C: 嗯…有点意思。
E: Hmm... is that so.

C: 哎呀，这么紧急的关头，你能想到的救命说辞就只有这么几句？这可不行。
E: Well, is that all you've got to say while your life is at stake? That's hardly worth anything.

C: …还是算了，镜子，我们先离开这里吧。
E: ...Forget it, mirror. Let's just leave.

C: 虽然眼下的情境与我们设想中大有出入…但无论如何，空间站没事就好。
E: Well, we were worried for a moment there... but it's good to know the space station isn't in any kind of trouble.

C: 三月，我进来了哦？
E: March? I'm coming in, okay?

C: 你内心冒出了「给他来一下」的冲动，没有理由，没有恩怨，有些想法的涌现就是如此突然。
E: You suddenly felt the urge to "slap him" for no reason — There are no grudges. Some thoughts just spontaneously appear like that.

C: …要帮拍些照片的话，现在应该正合适。
E: ...If you want to take some photos, now would be the perfect time.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 我们是来营救并护送他们前往「圣城」奥赫玛的。这也是为什么我要求二位止戈，并反复确认你们并无恶意的原因。如有意外，他们绝无反抗之力。
E: We're here to rescue and escort them to the holy city, Okhema. They're the reason I had to be absolutely sure you were not here with ill intent, and why I wanted you to put away your weapons. If something were to occur, they would have no way of protecting themselves.

C: 我不这么认为，这些眷属和反物质军团的差别挺明显的。
E: I don't think so. These Titankin have obvious differences to the Antimatter Legion.

C: 看吧！没有人会死去，英雄们会守护这座城邦！
E: Watch! No one will die. The heroes will protect the city!

C: 那声战吼曾荡平战场，摧枯拉朽，将我的敌军和战友同时劈倒在地，人们脆弱得就像烈风下的芦苇。
E: That battle cry once crushed all in its path. It knocked down foes and allies alike, leaving people as fragile as reeds in a gale.

C: 可能我将希望放错了地方。但为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
E: If I'm putting my hopes in the wrong place, so be it. But for Amphoreus, I am willing to take the chance.

C: 很好。请见谅，奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
E: I'm glad to hear that. Please understand, Okhema is approaching its end, and I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.

C: 不会破坏经济循环吗？
E: Won't that mess up the economy?

C: 光圈太小，景深太大。
E: A greater aperture and a shallower depth of field would work better.

C: 嘿嘿，两位满意就好。
E: Heh, as long as you're happy with the photos.

C: 当然可以。但味道很苦，也不容易消化。
E: Of course, but it's very bitter and hard to digest.

C: 当着大地兽的面吃掉饲料。
E: Eat the feed in front of the dromas.

C: …好。{NICKNAME}，也拍张大地兽的照片吧。这种神奇的生物别处不多见。
E: ...Alright. {NICKNAME}, take a photo of the dromas as well. It's rare to encounter such an amazing creature.

C: 先前遇见时也是，她似乎很避讳和人产生肢体接触……
E: Even when we came across her previously, she avoided having physical contact with others...

C: …昼与夜的争忿，诞出全知巨人。双足丈量世界，背脊担负晨昏。
E: ...The strife of day and night birthed the all-knowing giant. Their feet measure the earth and their back carries the dawn and dusk.

C: {RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}也无法囚禁你。你会温柔地凿开天空吗？只为把我们带离这黑暗长夜……
E: Even {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} cannot restrain you. Will you gently carve open the sky? If only to lead us out of this long dark night...

C: 吼吼吼！勇士，这我恐怕爱莫能助啊。
E: Roarrr! Brave warriors, I'm afraid that I won't be able to help with that.

C: 好像在什么电影里见过。
E: I feel like I've seen it in a movie before.

C: 就和卡芙卡道别吧。
E: Bid Kafka goodbye.

C: 奇迹…活生生的奇迹！
E: A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven!

C: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles slightly.

C: 如此坚定…更令我好奇，你身体里究竟藏着什么秘密？此步不记。
E: Such determination... It makes me wonder what secrets are hidden within you. A step will not be recorded.

C: 愤怒，威胁…但又带着一丝不确定。你也不了解自己的身体。此步暂且不记。
E: An angry threat... but one laced with uncertainty. You don't understand the power within your body either. A step will not be recorded this time.

C: 两位可以继续留在奥赫玛，公民仍会视你们为贵宾。但你们必须保证，今日的荒谬一幕不会再次上演。
E: Both of you may continue to stay in Okhema, and its citizens will continue to view you as distinguished guests. However, you must promise that today's farce will not occur again.

C: 我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
E: I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.

C: 也许这就是「半神」？立于凡人中间，却又离人们很远。
E: Maybe this is the price of being a demigod? Standing among mortals, yet still so far from them.

C: 当然，此行注定是一场撼天动地的死斗…做好心理准备。
E: Without a doubt, it will be a momentous battle to the death... Prepare yourselves.

C: 声音？又是星核之声吗，还是……
E: A voice? The Voice of the Stellaron again or...

C: 那若是你渴求之物，就拿去吧。我对取代神明毫无兴趣。
E: If that is the object you desire, you can have it. I have no interest in becoming a replacement god.

C: 先走哪条路都行，交给你来定夺吧。
E: Choose any path you like. It's entirely up to you.

C: 留给你们的最后机会，不要也罢。
E: I gave you two this final chance on purpose. If you're not interested, fine.

C: 就如同那可怕的一击，你和我也是离弦的箭矢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能给奥赫玛带来灭顶之灾，反过来，我们也一样。
E: Just like that decisive strike, there is no turning back for us. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} could drive Okhema to the brink of ruin, but we can do the same to them.

C: 它们和悬锋城一样，被那疯狂扭曲了。虽然仍记得如何杀戮，但忘却了杀戮背后的意义。
E: They've been twisted by madness, just like Castrum Kremnos. They remember how to kill, but they've forgotten why.

C: 这便是你我之间的歧异。于我族眼中，荣光和征服亦是正当的理由。
E: That's where we differ. For my tribe, glory and conquest are also valid reasons.

C: 堕落的神，尝尝人的怒火吧！
E: Feel the wrath of humanity, corrupted god!

C: 「不死之身」是怎么回事？
E: What's this indestructible body about?

C: 你在迫使自己冷静，这是成长，白厄。
E: You're willing yourself to stay calm, Phainon. That's commendable progress.

C: 这样没问题吗？以往都是缇安老师……
E: Are you sure? It's always been Trianne doing this...

C: 事态紧迫，各位…出发吧。
E: Time is of the essence, everyone... We should get going.

C: 「停下来吧…在错乱的时空中迷失吧……」
E: "Cease your efforts... and let yourself be swallowed by the confusion of time and space..."

C: 这样就算完成「考验」了吧？
E: Does this mean we've passed the challenge?

C: 我也想到了。
E: I've also got it.

C: 记忆。遗忘，错乱。
E: Memory. Forgotten, chaotic.

C: 到底是怎么回事……
E: Just what is going on...

C: 多利…尼卡？泰坦？
E: Ador... Nik? Titan?

C: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

C: 起舞吧——{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我不知道你在说什么。
E: I don't understand what you're saying.

C: 帮助，伙伴！回忆…找回来！
E: Help, friend! Memory, retrieve!

C: 这哥们，一点版权意识没有。
E: Has that dude never heard of copyright before?

C: （啊…我明白了。别着急，我来帮你。）
E: (Ah... I see. Don't worry, I'll help you find it.)

C: 回归泥土吧，秽物。
E: Return to the dust, wretch.

C: 在吗？
E: Anyone home?

C: {NICKNAME}，遐蝶，格奈乌斯……
E: Castorice, Gnaeus, and {NICKNAME}...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 「以此为证：它在以不屈的意志与那不明源头的灾厄搏斗。」
E: "A testament that their will is unyielding in the fight against the calamity of unknown origin."

C: 他比我更称得上「纷争」这个词的重量。
E: He is more worthy of the title of "Strife" than I am.

C: 哈哈哈，一言为定。
E: Hahaha, that's settled then.

C: 哎——被这么盯着，人家也是会害羞的哦？
E: Eep! I'll get embarrassed if you keep staring at me like that.

C: 它说：「铸造奇迹吧」。
E: Forge miracles, it declared.

C: 就这么办吧，我退出——
E: Alright, that's it. I am out—

C: 就好像她并未离去，依然活着。
E: It was as if she had yet to pass on and was still alive.

C: 对了，比方说…只要这场试炼平安结束，逐火之旅就没有什么好怕的了？
E: Right, perhaps something like: As long as you can successfully complete this trial, the rest of the Flame-Chase Journey will be smooth-sailing?

C: 哈哈，原来你是被石头砸晕的！
E: Haha, so you were knocked unconscious by a rock!

C: 勇敢活下去，我懂…
E: Live on bravely... I understand.

C: 怎么了，阿格莱雅？
E: What's wrong, Aglaea?

C: 那这是哪里？冥界的外围，冥河？你们正顺流而下，向冥界去么？
E: Then where is this? River of Souls? The outskirts of the nether realm? Are you heading downstream toward the nether realm?

C: 有一道声音，将要向我述说——
E: A voice about to recount something.

C: 我清楚凯妮斯的做派，不用刻意强调。
E: I'm well aware of Caenis' methods. There's no need to emphasize that.

C: 那刻夏老师？听说树庭的学者为了抵御黑潮英勇牺牲，想不到您还安然无恙…真是命运垂青！
E: Professor Anaxa? Word has it that the scholars of the Grove valiantly perished resisting the black tide. To find you here safe and sound... Thank the fates!

C: 不出所料，见风使舵的家伙…感谢你坦诚相告，正直的学生。
E: No surprises there, those shifty opportunists... Thank you for your honesty, virtuous student.

C: （真是受够了…第十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}能不能快点来？）
E: (I've had enough of this... Could the <unbreak>15</unbreak>th {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} arrive any faster?)

C: 放心吧，老师。我的姐姐，她……
E: Calm down, teacher. My sister, she...

C: 那刻夏阁下——！
E: Lord Anaxa...!

C: 然而，遗憾的是，支持黄金裔、支持阿格莱雅的思潮依旧水涨船高。我们希冀的和平，以及所热爱的一切，都将化作城市的灰烬、公民的鲜血……
E: However, I regret to say that sentiments in favor of the Chrysos Heirs and Aglaea are only growing in magnitude. The peace that we are aspiring toward, as well as everything that we hold dear, will be destroyed completely. The city will be burned to ashes and the citizens' blood will be shed...

C: 啊呀，汝着实再次令吾刮目相看…不过，汝所求者，莫不是太少了些？
E: Ah, I've got to say that you've managed to really impress me again. But... shouldn't you be going after more?

C: （…现在应该是晚上吧？）
E: (...Uh, it IS night time now, right?)

C: 以前的你…虽然偶尔也会露出微笑，但大家都能感觉到，那笑容里有一层若有若无的阴霾……
E: In the past... When you did smile once in a while, all of us could see that your heart remained troubled even as you smiled.

C: 这不就是刽子手吗？
E: Isn't that just an executioner?

C: 我、我也不是什么腐败的大人吧……
E: I—I'm not some corrupt grown-up...

C: 先把首饰还给我…否则一切免谈。
E: Give me the jewelry piece first... or everything's off the table.

C: 尽管{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}在过去的千年几乎杳无音讯，也从未被信徒寻获。但那引力…或许能将它召唤至此。
E: Even though {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} has been missing for a thousand years and even their followers haven't been able to find them... perhaps that special attraction could summon them here.

C: 你到底敲了遐蝶多少钱？
E: Just how much have you swindled Castorice of?

C: 只是推测，但既然您这样说，看来我猜对了。
E: Oh, I was merely speculating. But it seems I was right.

C: 所以，你便将死亡带给了他？
E: Then, you granted him death?

C: 他似乎在用全部的精神和亡语的诱惑搏斗…为了拒绝在这一刻迎接死亡。
E: It seems like he's completely focused on resisting the temptation of the deads' whispers... He's working hard every minute to deny death.

C: 虽然它现在看上去有些可怕，但其实…我们…只要……
E: They may look scary, but as long... as... we...

C: 去吧，小蝶。你也要记得…别给自己留下遗憾哪。
E: Go on, Cas. Make sure not to leave yourself with any regrets.

C: 慢慢来，我还能撑住…
E: Take your time. I can still hold out...

C: 来，这边这边！
E: Hey, over here!

C: 那里的「预言算碑」…也许能派上用途？
E: Perhaps the Prophecy Tablet over there can help...?

C: 看你的表现…愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: That'll depend on how well you perform... May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: 都给我提起耳朵，听清楚了！现在，我，神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，就这样告诉你们——
E: Now, listen up, and listen well! I, Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, hereby declare:

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 可惜，翁法罗斯已经等不到下一次鲜花绽放了。
E: Yet, sadly, there's no time left for Amphoreus to wait for when the flowers bloom again.

C: 姬子小姐是在怀疑我么？
E: Is Miss Himeko suspicious of me?

C: 因为，我梦寐以求的另一道猜想，也在此时此刻证明完毕——
E: Because another one of my conjectures — one that I have always dreamed of proving — has been proven right this very instant.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 我们已经意识到，自己身处在一个由泰坦编织规则的世界，满眼尽是它们投下的「星空」。与其守望这片虚假的永夜，我为何不能成为操作投影仪器的那个人？
E: We have already realized that we live in a world where Titans make the rules. Even when we look at the sky, we're only seeing what they allow us to see. Rather than gazing at this mockery of a night sky fabricated by them for the rest of my life, why shouldn't I be the one to take control of the projection device instead?

C: 瑟希斯，人们都说我是渎神者。但这不代表我否认神性的存在，只是在我看来——
E: They call me a blasphemer, Cerces, but that doesn't mean I deny the existence of gods. It's just...

C: 好啊，那…就让表演开始吧。
E: I see. In that case... let the show begin.

C: 表面上看，这两个命题毫不相干；然而，它们恰恰逻辑等价，不过是对「灵魂本质」的两种叙述。
E: As unrelated as these two propositions may seem at first glance, they are, in fact, logical equivalents. They are merely two different ways of telling us about what the soul is at its core.

C: 怎么，这个答案让你失望了吗？
E: Does this answer disappoint you?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「盗火者，死灰复燃，警惕。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back."</color>

C: 啊呀，汝卖过的关子还差这一个么？
E: My goodness, is this cliffhanger really necessary?

C: 还真是。不愧是大地上最聪慧的学者。
E: Indeed. As expected of the wisest scholar in the land.

C: 取出我的心脏，点燃「死亡」的火苗——
E: It's time to extract my heart and light the flame of Death...

C: 时至今日，我的回答也未曾改变。
E: Even now, my answer remains the same.

C: 至于「等价交换」的代价…就由我来偿还吧。
E: As for the price of our "equivalent exchange," let me be the one to pay it.

C: 但临行前，我还有一个问题：我们方才所见的一切究竟是…？
E: But before I leave, I have another question: What exactly did we witness just now...?

C: 省去无用的狡辩吧，活在旧世界的废人。「我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠」——
E: Spare us your empty excuses, relic of the old world. "I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!" —

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: 当创世神谕传入众生的耳中，引导黄金裔成为这破碎世界的英雄……
E: When the Prophecy of Genesis reached all beings, calling the Chrysos Heirs to become heroes of this fractured world...

C: 呵…有趣。
E: Ha... interesting.

C: 人类没有她眼中那么不堪。
E: Humans aren't as contemptible as she thinks.

C: 直到她陷入沉默，我们才学会了用自己的感官去认识人类。
E: It wasn't until she fell silent that we learned to perceive humanity through our senses.

C: 看，艾格勒的火种——
E: Look, Aquila's Coreflame —

C: …前提是，我们能逃离这里！
E: ...as long as we can make it out of here!
...Argh!

C: （…<color=#dbc291ff>今后百年？</color>）
E: (...<color=#dbc291ff>the next hundred years</color>?)

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}「全世之座」{RUBY_E#}…火种……
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}... Coreflame...

C: （…话是这么说，可我居然被追上了？这还是头一回……）
E: (...Well, look at that. They actually caught up with me. No one's ever managed that before...)

C: 冷知识！多洛斯的猫儿，不仅跑得很快……
E: Fun fact! Dolos cats aren't just quick on their feet...

C: 「…以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "...To mend the rifts of the world—"

C: 啧，命运真是一场骰子游戏啊，螺丝。谁能想到呢？那玩意儿曾让寰宇生灵涂炭，令博识学会分崩离析，直到我破解了孤波算法，才为它残留的余波划上了休止符。
E: Tsk, fate really is a game of dice, Screwy. Who'd have thought? That thing once sowed chaos across the cosmos, causing the Intelligentsia Guild to splinter and disintegrate. It wasn't until I cracked the solitary waves theory that its lingering effects were put to an end.

C: 天谴之矛曾一度化作狂王，为全世带去无尽的纷争，而后，于你们的奋勇下终结。
E: The Lance of Fury once became the Mad King, plunging the world into ceaseless strife, until your valor brought it to an end.

C: 而继承其位的半神——不死的迈德漠斯，选择独自背负悬锋之名，还乡代冠，将其身化作圣城的最后一道防线。
E: And its demigod successor, the undying Mydeimos, chose to bear the title of Kremnos alone, returning home to be crowned as the last line of defense for the holy city.

C: 捞完这笔，打算去哪潇洒？
E: Gonna go live handsomely somewhere after this?

C: 圈套么…难道这才是你跟随我前来的目的？
E: Is this a trap? Is that why you accompanied me here?

C: 什么大事，医师？冷静下来，复述一下情况！
E: What is it, doctor? Calm yourself and talk us through!

C: 无妨，那我就再费些口舌，戳穿你这半神的面具吧。
E: Fine. I'll gladly use a few more words to shatter that demigod facade of yours.

C: 没错没错，撒腿就跑才符合咱们盗贼的身……
E: Right, right. Fleeing fits our rogue nature...

C: 宝藏！冲冲冲！
E: Treasure! Let's go!

C: 呃…自学成才，纯粹自学成才！
E: Uh... self-taught, all self-taught!

C: 那是…克拉特鲁斯阁下？
E: Is that... Lord Krateros?

C: 滚吧，别再出现在我们面前。转告你们身后的主子，想阻止逐火之旅，她最好集结一支比鼎盛时的悬锋更雄壮的军队。
E: Get out of here. Don't show your face around us again. If your master wants to stop the Flame-Chase Journey, she'd better bring an army that makes Kremnos at its peak look like child's play.

C: 这是你想要的，阿格莱雅？
E: Is that what you want, Aglaea?

C: 小白，不要！请不要和*我们*道歉。
E: Snowy, don't! Please don't apologize to us.

C: …更好的人！
E: ...Better people!

C: 英雄大人们…还请节哀。
E: Heroes... our hearts bleed with yours.

C: …咳，好吧。既然雅辛忒丝如此要求…那就来走一遍流程吧。
E: ...Ahem, fine. Since Hyacinthia insists on this... Let's go through the process.

C: 根据祖训，当天空之子的后裔准备好再次挑战{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}时…她必须先以彩虹匣苏醒先祖的英魂，并获得他们的赐福。
E: Our ancestors dictated that when a descendant of the Skyfolk is ready to challenge {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} again... they must first awaken the spirits of their ancestors with the Chroma Coffer and receive their benediction.

C: 从远处见证风堇收集赐福。
E: Witness Hyacine collect blessings from afar.

C: 我未曾想过，取回艾格勒火种的重担果真会落在你的身上……
E: I never thought the burden of retrieving the Coreflame of Aquila would fall to you...

C: 天空的黄金裔，<color=#dbc291ff>「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝</color>，在黄昏时分，身披羽翼、登临晨昏之眼的禁土。
E: The Chrysos Heir of the Sky, <color=#dbc291ff>Seliose the Daythunder Knight</color>, ascended the forbidden lands of the Eye of Twilight at dusk, clad in wings.

C: 风堇小姐，被选中的天空之女…昏光庭院的骄傲！
E: Miss Hyacine, the chosen daughter of the Sky... the pride of the Twilight Courtyard!

C: 传说，曾经的天空之子分为许多部族。
E: Legend tells of the Skyfolk once divided into many tribes.

C: 既能使人安心，也能驱人疯狂，这就是信仰的两面。
E: Faith is a double-edged sword, capable of calming hearts and corrupting them.

C: 好奇哪边赢了。
E: I'm curious which side won.

C: 索拉比斯…你终于苏醒了。
E: Solabis... You're finally awake.

C: …自信、凌厉，我倒是从你身上看见了几分她的影子。
E: Confidence and fierceness — Yes, I do indeed see a shadow of her in you.

C: 交给我们吧，这是你的权利。
E: Leave it to us. This is your right.

C: 我就知道…融合了世仇的两族血脉的孩子，迟早会亲手毁灭天空之城。
E: I knew it... The child with the blood of two feuding clans will one day destroy the Sky Castrum.

C: 被黑潮侵蚀的眷属…看起来比之前的都要强大。
E: A Titankin that was corroded by the black tide... It seems it's stronger than before.

C: 我曾经的族人啊…如今的我已不再是那只尚未成熟的雏鸟，我找到了自己的羽翼。
E: My kin of old... I am no longer the immature fledgling I once was. I've found my wings.

C: 既然你已下定了决心，那就继续前行吧。
E: Since you've made your decision, keep moving forward.

C: 先打败这些堕落的守卫，然后……
E: Let's deal with these fallen guards first, then...

C: 继续前进，去找另一边的算碑吧。
E: Let's keep going and find the tablet on the other side.

C: 她…已经精神不太正常了。
E: She... looks like she's got a screw loose.

C: 奥赫玛的夜幕降临时…所有的灵水也都随之枯涸了。*我们*猜到你会着急，所以才提前来这里等着。
E: When Okhema's night descended... all the spirit water dried up along with it. We anticipated that you'd be on edge, so we came ahead to wait for you.

C: 大家，可以再跑快些吗？
E: Everyone, can we run faster?

C: 「清洗者」的首领于此陷入永不苏醒的沉眠，她的死相平静得令人愤懑。
E: The leader of the "Cleaners" fell into an eternal slumber, her death so peaceful that it fomented resentment.

C: 找到他了，丹恒阁下！
E: There he is! Lord Dan Heng!

C: 快！我们去支援他！
E: Quick! We must assist him!

C: 我…其实也一样。应当有人留下，和白厄一起完成「再创世」。
E: I... feel the same. Someone should stay and help Phainon complete Era Nova.

C: 很高兴见到熟悉的面孔。
E: It's good to see some familiar faces.

C: 丹恒，你觉得呢？
E: What say you, Dan Heng?

C: 链接█ █受到█ 影响，决定█ █尽快█
E: The connection ███ being ███ interfered with, decide ███ quickly as possible ████

C: 没错：「再创世」仪式并非顷刻就能完成的仪式，而是一场漫长的苦旅。当其他半神的牺牲之旅在此世告结，刻法勒则必须背负诸神火种，背负全世记忆，始终挺立……
E: Precisely: The "Era Nova" ritual is not something that can be completed in an instant. No, but a long and arduous journey. While the sacrificial journeys of other demigods conclude in this world, Kephale must shoulder the gods' Coreflames, bear the memories of all worlds, and stand unwavering...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>何为「生命的第一因」？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What is the "prime mover of life"?</color>

C: 阁下的幽默感一如既往。我的故事并非滑稽之谈，而是他迈向新世界的开篇……
E: Witty as always. But this is more than just a funny story. It's the start of his path...

C: 咳，好吧。{F#她}{M#他}今天是…「星核猎手」。
E: *clearing throat* {M#Uh...}{F#Ah...} today {F#s}he's going with "Stellaron Hunter."

C: …饶了我吧！旧事就别提了。
E: Spare me! Can we not bring this up?

C: 地窖。
E: What about the cellar?

C: 这是…？
E: What's this...?

C: 赛飞儿阁下，你的神力网罗了那么多珍宝，不是也一分都没花出去么？
E: For someone with all those treasures behind your divine power... you've led a pretty cheap life~

C: （偏偏在最需要解释的时候玩失踪吗，来古士……）
E: (Of course Lygus disappears right when I need answers...)

C: 可是，白厄，只靠这些还不够。
E: But... that's not enough, Phainon. Not nearly enough.

C: 那也无妨，我可从没说过，自己能和牌中的「救世主」划等号。
E: Fine by me. I've never claimed to be the Deliverer from the card anyway.

C: 奥赫玛和悬锋孤军实力悬殊，可我方竟无一人阵亡，这恐怕并非巧合吧。
E: The Kremnoans far outmatch Okhema's forces, yet we haven't lost a single soul. That's no accident, is it?

C: 现在，轮到我们献身了——别让大家的牺牲白费。
E: Now it's our turn — we can't let everyone's sacrifices be in vain.

C: 哼，说什么蠢话？
E: Oho, getting ahead of ourselves, are we?

C: 最后一次「再创世」 永劫回归开始前
E: Final "Era Nova," before the Eternal Recurrence begins.

C: 但这一次，你的阴谋要落空了。我已接过刻法勒的火种，等到新世界的黎明升起，火光将烧尽所有的黑暗。
E: But this time, your plot will fail. I've taken Kephale's Coreflame, and when the dawn of the new world arrives, its light will burn away all the darkness.

C: 你可以一直留在这里，时间会为你停滞。
E: You can stay here forever, and time will stand still for you.

C: 想反悔就反悔，孩子们总是幸福的……
E: Kids always get to change their minds. Things are so happy and simple for them...

C: 事已至此，我只想知道，当他们以凡人的身躯在黑潮中消散时……
E: At this point, I just want to know. When they vanished into the black tide with their mortal bodies...

C: 桀桀桀，说得比吟游诗人唱得还好听！说什么「拯救」……
E: Heh, heh, heh, "save"? You sing better than any bard!

C: 这是我经历的第一百三十四次轮回。已为我所承载的火种数量，是……
E: This is the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle I've lived through. And the number of Coreflames I carry is...

C: 假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了「毁灭」的结局……
E: Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain Destruction...

C: 它也出现在每一段旅途里，始终如一。
E: It happens in every journey, always the same.

C: 从未有过。
E: Never.

C: 火焰尚有缺欠。必须…助长火焰。
E: The blaze was still not enough. It had to be fed...

C: 没想到竟会有人出手相助啊。
E: Never thought someone would step in to help.

C: 我、我不知道啊…？
E: I... I don't know?

C: 你…还好吧？
E: Hey... are you alright?

C: 漫长的时光里，我只能眼睁睁看着人们走进记忆之门。那些人看不见我，也听不见我的呼唤。天外之音总会给出安全的承诺，但我从没见过有人平安归来……
E: For ages, I've watched people walk through that door. They couldn't see or hear my calls. The voices beyond always promised safety, but I've never seen anyone return safely...

C: 但你要相信，那才是家的方向。
E: But that path will lead you home.

C: 哀丽秘榭，真安静呀……
E: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet...

C: 白厄没有死，他仍在反抗。
E: Phainon didn't die. He's still fighting.

C: 结论：他正在返回列车的路上。
E: Conclusion: He is on his way back to the Express.

C: 暴君！带着你的刽子手滚出去，这里不欢迎你们！
E: Tyrant! You and your butchers are not welcome here! Get out!

C: 不错。诚如{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}神谕之所见：「『救世主』将自未来天外而来」。
E: As the little {RUBY_B#Tribbie}hostage{RUBY_E#} prophesied: "The Deliverer shall come from the future beyond the sky."

C: 同胞们，你们都看清她的嘴脸了！依照奥赫玛旧律，只有经三分之二多数元老同意，军团才能执行总帅的命令……
E: Comrades, you've all seen her true face now! According to the ancient laws of Okhema, only with the consent of two-thirds of the Elders can the legions carry out the commander's orders...

C: 奥赫玛的气氛…好陌生。不光逐火同盟，全城上下都在议论「天外世界」……
E: The atmosphere in Okhema... is so unfamiliar. It's not just the Flame-Chase Alliance talking about the "world beyond the sky" but the whole city...

C: 为了接下来的征伐，请务必好好休息。鄙人「断锋爵」，凯撒大人的得力干将，愿与「救世主」一同冲锋陷阵。
E: For the upcoming campaign, please make sure to rest well. I am "Dux Fragoris," a trusted officer of the Great Imperator, willing to fight alongside the "Deliverer" in the coming battles.

C: 是你干的？
E: It was you, wasn't it?

C: 试试看吧。
E: Let's give it a try.

C: 不过，凯撒居然会对质疑「天外之界」的人下杀手吗？
E: But would the Imperator actually kill those who question the "world beyond the sky"?

C: 毕竟小凯撒对{NICKNAME}那么关注，我们和天才的悄悄话多半已经传进她的耳朵了。人家都能猜到接下来的发展……
E: After all, if the little Imperator is paying this much attention to {NICKNAME}, she probably already knows all about our whispered conversation with the Geniuses. I can pretty much guess what'll happen next...

C: 相信我！「捷径」已经连通了。
E: The "shortcut" is now open. Trust me!

C: 你集中精神，尝试令心跳的节奏与那簇金焰窜动的频率共振……
E: You focus your mind, trying to sync your heartbeat's rhythm with the frequency of that dancing golden flame...

C: 再一次——你只需要再一次寻回与那位大守护者交战时的心绪，用双手接住那一锤溅出的火花……
E: Once again — you just need to recapture that feeling from your battle with the Supreme Guardian, and catch the sparks from that hammer strike with your own hands...

C: 你怎么知道有谁在等我们？
E: How do you know who's waiting for us?

C: 真没想到，最后的布局要你我联手完成。
E: Never thought we'd be the pair to finish this final setup.

C: 海瑟音…
E: Hysilens...

C: 宴会…歌唱…海列屈拉……
E: Feast... song... Helektra...

C: 幻想时间该结束了。
E: The fantasy ends here.

C: 他的身体逐渐变得僵硬，慈爱的面容仍挂在脸上，如一尊和蔼的石像。
E: His form grows rigid, but his kind smile remains, as if he were a benevolent statue frozen in time.

C: 凯撒…凯撒…你看到了我的英姿吗，凯撒……
E: Imperator... Imperator... did you see my gallant deeds, Imperator...?

C: …那我的忠诚呢，刻律德菈？
E: ...And what about my loyalty, Cerydra?

C: 呵…别得意得太早，我仍有办法束缚你的神魂。
E: Heh... don't get ahead of yourself. I still have ways to chain your divine soul.

C: 这一刻，英雄们已经等待了太久。就让我们以剑明志吧。
E: The heroes have waited for this moment for far too long. Let us use our blades to testify our resolve.

C: 这并非系统紊乱，而是我被植入了「记忆」的模因么？
E: If this was no system malfunction, then was I implanted with a memetic entity of the Remembrance?

C: 让我用歌声为你饯行，灰鱼儿。愿这歌声能穿透岁月…成为新世界的序曲。
E: I shall send you off with my song, gray fry. May this song penetrate time... and become the prelude to the new world.

C: 只谈论外表，凯撒也不遑多让呢……
E: Well, your appearance isn't much older...

C: 而命运开出的价码非常公平。
E: Fate gave me a very fair deal.

C: 你打算…做什么？
E: What... are you planning to do?

C: 是啊，凯撒陨落，帝国必将群龙无首。但，记住了：只要能抓住机会，混乱的盘面就不会成为危局。
E: That is correct. The empire will be without a head when the Imperator falls. But remember, as long as you seize the right opportunities, even a chaotic game will remain winnable.

C: 简直…就像夜空中的星星在熊熊燃烧哪。
E: They look like... the stars in the night sky ablaze.

C: 如此辽阔，如此…纯洁……
E: So vast. So... pure.

C: 先冷静下来吧？想想另一种可能。并非我占据了「三月七」的身体……
E: Why don't you calm down and think about another possibility? I didn't take over "March 7th's" body...

C: 你也是这样，一声不吭就出现了。
E: ...That was when you showed up without even saying anything.

C: 幕后的始作俑者，已经快要找到我们了。
E: The mastermind behind the show is about to find us.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>被「忘却」的浪潮吞没吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Be swallowed by the torrents of "Oblivion."</color>

C: …但我也同样相信「开拓」的伙伴。这绝不会是三月的主观意愿。
E: ...But I also trust in our Trailblazing companions. I know this isn't what March would want.

C: 关于这一点，在黑塔女士的帮助下，我倒是有些新的发现。
E: I made some new discoveries related to that with Madam Herta's help.

C: 两位十分幸运。你们的躯干受到了保护，生命体征尚存，且机能完整。
E: The two of you were very fortunate as there was something protecting your bodies. All vital signs are still present, and your functions are all intact.

C: 但我仍不理解，你将我挟持来这里，究竟是为了什么？
E: But I still don't understand why you've kidnapped me here.

C: 该继续前进了…
E: It's time to keep going...

C: 如果没有新的「空白」，史诗又该如何被续写呢？
E: If there are no new "blank spaces," how can a saga continue?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在封装密钥——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Encapsulating encryption key—</color>

C: 而你自身的「记忆」，也一定无法幸免。
E: That would also include your "memories," by the way.

C: 别听他吓唬人。跟你讲，本姑娘也算半个「开拓」专家——跟着咱走，准没事～
E: Don't listen to him. Listen, I am practically a "Trailblaze" expert. Stick with me, and you'll be just fine~

C: 借一？
E: Ace?

C: 这种场合，怎么可能忍得住嘛！
E: How can I possibly hold back my tears at a time like this!?

C: 她不想告别「开拓」，想一起旅行下去，永远永远……
E: She doesn't want to say goodbye to the Trailblaze. She wants to keep traveling together... forever and ever...

C: 明白。我会完成分内之事……
E: Understood. I'll carry out my part as expected...

C: 是「三月七」？
E: Was it "March 7th"?

C: …不必了。纵使早已分道扬镳，我也不会忘记你。
E: ...That's not necessary. Though we've long parted ways, I won't ever forget you.

C: 荒笛眼里，从来只有自土地中诞生的生命。贪图天外的不可名状之力，我想动机也不外如是。
E: Terravox has only ever cared for life born from this soil. If they covet powers from beyond the sky, I suppose it's out of the same care.

C: 群山也会老去，乃至死亡。
E: Even mountain ranges grow old and eventually die.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The deepest depths in Amphoreus. The great tomb where all the past is buried.</color>

C: 至此，我留下的一切{RUBY_B#化为「不朽」的力量}尽数消散{RUBY_E#}。迈向属于你的「不朽」吧。
E: Everything that I left behind has {RUBY_B#become the power of the Permanence}faded away{RUBY_E#} at this point. Go and march toward your own "Permanence."

C: 不要解释，本大爷不喜欢解释，更喜欢你的直率！说吧，你是想听本大爷的英雄事迹，还是说想听想听本大爷的英雄事迹？
E: Don't explain! I hate long explanations, I much prefer your straightforwardness! So tell me, do you want to hear about my heroic deeds, or would you rather hear about my heroic deeds?

C: o((•'ω´- )o「不急，陪它们耍耍」)∋
E: o((•'ω´- )o "We're in no hurry. Let's toy with them a bit.")∋

C: 这疯狂的气息，简直与魔阴身无异。
E: This madness seems exactly like a mara-struck.

C: 愿它能引领我们找到同伴藏身的海渊。
E: Hopefully, it will lead us to the depths where our companion is hidden.

C: {NICKNAME}，我找到你了。
E: I've found you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 无名客的脚步不会停下……
E: The Nameless will never stop...

C: 还记得么？晨昏之眼的壁画…
E: Remember? The Eye of Twilight's mural...

C: 难以被「智识」触及，也无法被「毁灭」抹消……
E: It cannot be reached by the Erudition, nor can it be erased by the Destruction...

C: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
E: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

C: 「我后悔了…我不想再和翁法罗斯扯上任何关系了！求求你！」
E: "I wish I'd never come here... I don't want anything to do with Amphoreus anymore! Please! I'm begging you!"

C: 灵感回路记录着，你无数次带领我登上这黎明云崖。最近一次就在上一世，嚯，由刻法勒垂手迎接……
E: The Inspiration Circuits recorded that you have led me up Dawncloud countless times, and the last time was right in the previous cycle. Oh! And Kephale even lowered their hand to welcome...

C: 这场决战的记忆，想来一定会壮丽无比吧？
E: The memory of this decisive battle is bound to be absolutely magnificent, isn't it?

C: 解析已经完成，在将您彻底抹消前，不妨由我告知真相，权当对最后一位智者的惺惺相惜……
E: Analysis complete. Before I erase you completely, allow me to reveal the truth to you, if only as a courtesy to the final thinker...

C: 为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧♪
E: Let's write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love♪

C: 即便「死亡」终将分离你我，也请让每一次相拥不留遗憾。
E: Even though "Death" shall eventually separate us, let every embrace we share be without regret.

C: 如此「存护」大业，石心十人必当倾尽全力。
E: The Ten Stonehearts shall spare no effort for such a grand mission for the Preservation.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>致尊敬的后继者们：证毕。来墓碑下找到我。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> To those who follow: All is proven. Find me beneath the tombstone.</color>

C: 那，就去为这个无数愿望汇成的世界，落下「全世之座」的第一笔吧♪
E: Then go, and pen the Throne of Worlds' first stroke... for this world made from countless wishes.

C: 现在，也有人踩到它的影子啦。
E: Someone's finally stepped into its shadow.

C: 他身上，有许多裂缝…在发出…像是有人在呻吟的声音，好可怕。
E: There are cracks all over him... and they're making this sound... like someone's groaning. It's scary.

C: 这是你的忏悔吗，吕枯耳戈斯阁下？
E: Is this your confession, Lord Lycurgus?

C: 小白，让你久等啦。
E: Sorry to keep you waiting, Snowy.

C: 翁法罗斯最不缺少的奇迹，就是「战胜命运」，对吧？
E: The one miracle that Amphoreus was never short on is "defeating destiny," no?

C: 纠正：这并非战争，而是一场思辨。有关「第一因」的论证，才正要开始。
E: Correction: This is not a war, but a debate. The argument about the "prime mover" is only about to begin.

C: 在{NICKNAME}背负起三千万世「记忆」的同时……
E: The moment when {NICKNAME} bore the weight of thirty million cycles of "memories"...

C: 而是星穹列车共同的「开拓」。
E: It's a journey we Trailblaze together, alongside all of the Express.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>被我遗忘了太久，也抗拒了太久的「记忆」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A "memory" that I have forgotten for too long... and have denied for too long.</color>

C: 那无人知晓的、孑然的神明，不应存在的第十三位泰坦……
E: That unknown solitary god, the Thirteenth Titan who should not exist...

C: 「列车上见，孩子。」
E: "See you on the Express, kid."

C: 史诗的尾声，能在「记忆」的角落与「心中的英雄」相遇，还是在这么浪漫的星空下，人家也没有遗憾啦♪
E: To meet "The Hero Within" in a corner of "memories" at the saga's epilogue, and under such a romantic sky... I really don't have any more regrets ♪

C: 但翁法罗斯的光有十三种颜色，我们可不会输给它，对吧？
E: However, Amphoreus's light has thirteen different colors. We won't lose to that darkness, will we?

C: 「我知道，{NICKNAME}一定能找到这里。」
E: "I knew {NICKNAME}'d find this place."

C: 从新生啼哭的黎明，到万物沉寂的黑夜……
E: From the dawn of newborn cries, to the night when all beings fall silent...

C: 我是怎么回来的…？
E: How did I make it back...?

C: 就像无数次轮回中的每个夜晚，金色的麦穗总会在我的梦中摇曳。
E: Like how golden wheat stalks sway in my dreams every night through the countless cycles...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那个曾被「数据」桎梏的世界，便成为了银河中一粒粒静待萌芽的种子。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That world, once shackled by "data," became a seed waiting to sprout in the cosmos.</color>

C: 而它的名字，就叫《如我所书》♪
E: And its name is As I've Written ♪

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「多望望天，多笑一笑；好多缠人的病痛，最怕乐观这剂良药！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Look up at the sky more often and smile more. Many stubborn ailments fear optimism, but it's the best medicine!"</color>

C: ——铭记「弓与箭矢」。
E: Remember the "bow and arrows."

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 我，知道该去哪啦♪
E: I know just the spot ♪

C: <color=#dbc291ff>让它结出了…一颗粉色的「桃子」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And from it grew... a single, pink "peach."</color>

C: 一起玩了这么久，你还没告诉我，你的名字呢！
E: We've been playing for so long, and you still haven't told me your name!

C: 帮助…岁…月！
E: Help... time!

C: 会不会，只是一场太过天真的梦呢？
E: Just an overly naive dream?

C: 昔涟是。女孩。祭司。
E: Cyrene is. A girl. A priest.

C: 后面的记忆，没有了。是看不见，还是消失了？
E: The later memories, disappeared. Invisible? Or disappeared?

C: 好奇怪呀，虽然看不见，但人家有种感觉……
E: So weird. I can't see you, but I get this feeling...
