C: 你看，我写下的故事，每一页都写满温柔，写满幸福。
E: Look at these stories I wrote. Every page is full of tenderness and joy.

C: 原来如此。看来你的「备用计划」需要一柄权杖，和一颗天才的头颅。
E: I see. So your "backup plan" requires a Scepter and the head of a Genius.

C: 各位，这不是一场「讨论」，而是「通知」——虽说俱乐部向来是一盘散沙，但我们至少遵守一项基本礼仪……
E: Folks, this is not a "discussion," but an "announcement." Though the Society has never been united, we still observe at least one basic courtesy...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>绝不插手别人的课题。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>We don't interfere with each other's research topics.</color>

C: 既然人找着了，咱也就不装了。你演得倒挺像，是哪来的哈努兄弟，敢冒充巡海游侠？
E: Since we've found them, let's drop the act. You played it well, but who do you think you are? Brother Hanu? Thinking you can pass as a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 以凡人之身伤及星神，哪怕只有一瞬，此番功绩，已然值得寰宇永铭。
E: To strike an Aeon as a mortal, even for but a fleeting instant... This deed alone deserves to be etched into the stars and remembered forever.

C: 别担心，她去助其他游侠的阵了。星穹列车的意思，我来转达吧。
E: Don't worry, she's gone to help the other rangers. I'll pass on the Astral Express's message to her.
{NICKNAME}█ In this one moment ██ your choice ██ determines the fate of the cosmos ▄▄▄▄█▄▄▄▀█▄▄█▄█▀▄██████████████████████

C: 有第四种可能性，就有希望。
E: A fourth possibility is all the hope we need.

C: 我不知道，但不会停止旅行。
E: I don't know, but I won't stop the journey.

C: 你看见：祂出现了，祂必然会在这一秒出现。
E: You witness: THEY have appeared. THEY will have most definitively appeared at this very second.

C: 把它们通通做掉，就不会有人知道我们来过咯。
E: No one will know we were here if they are all dead.

C: 帮我调查下房间里的终端设备，「奇物」或许就在里边。
E: Help me investigate the terminal in this room, our item might be inside.

C: 黑塔用这么简单的小玩意藏她的宝贝？
E: So Herta hides her collection with something as simple as this?

C: 我和那只会给人添麻烦的恶棍，注定八字不合。背了阿基维利的大运，才会卡在那儿。
E: I never got along with that troublemaker. It's as if we were fated to be at odds with each other... Ah, Akivili must've turned their back on me, that's why I got stuck in there.

C: 你别是被耍了？我就知道，狗改不了吃屎，何塞•拉萨罗也转不了性。
E: Don't be fooled! A tiger never changes its stripes. You can't trust that scoundrel Hosea.

C: 好家伙！等着啊，显影试剂管够——
E: Why you little! Just you wait. There's enough Autoradiograph reagent—

C: 我想拿去换钱。
E: I want to exchange it for money.

C: 我找你打听点事…
E: I came to ask you something...

C: 我是个生意人，生意人有生意人的规矩。你想知道消息，就得付出代价。
E: I'm a businesswoman, and we play by our own rules. If you want the scoop, you have to pay the price.

C: 你！谁给你的权利管起我的吃穿用度来了？
E: You — who gave you the right to tell me what to do with my money?

C: 退出。
E: Exit.

C: 唉，你这一打断倒是提醒我，都写了这么多版了，莱斯莉怎么还不给我回信呢？
E: Oh, your interruption reminds me. How come Lesley still hasn't replied to my letters after all those poems I sent her?

C: 风月私情。
E: Reckless romance.

C: 收容舱段安全区。
E: Storage zone safe zone.

C: 没想到监控还拍到了艾丝妲，以及两个少见的少年科员……
E: I can't believe the surveillance camera captured Asta and two rarely-seen young researchers...

C: 姑且就称它们为红色真相与蓝色谎言吧，由你选择该把哪个转译备份交给他。
E: Let's call these "the red truth" and "the blue lie." It's up to you to decide which one you want to give to him.

C: 我想就是这样。
E: I think so.

C: 真没想到你…
E: That was unexpected...

C: 没想到你这年轻人，还会回来找我这个老头子。
E: I never thought you would visit me again, kid.

C: 请不要拒绝我……
E: Please don't turn down the offer...

C: 你在干嘛呢？
E: What are you doing?

C: 你没受过训练，听不见也正常。这是空间站内界种科员独有的听声辩位技术。
E: You're untrained. It's normal that you can't hear anything. This is a sonar positioning technique that is unique to the space station's Ecology staff.

C: 一二。
E: One, two.

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>「异星水魈」</color>可做不到如此生动…哎，这千头万绪可又断喽。奇物收容作为「复兴宣言」的重中之重，实践起来却是难上加难。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color> can't achieve this level of likeness... Alas, the lead was once again inconclusive. Even if the recollection of Curios is the top priority in the Declaration of Revival, it is proving to be a difficult task in practice.

C: 要我说，这事儿本来也不应该有，处理轴承阻塞一直是两人一组，一人守上面，一人下去，就担心斥力桥出故障，但谁能想到现在年轻人没人愿意干这活。
E: If you ask me, I'd say this shouldn't have happened. There should always be two people dealing with bearing blockages, one up top and one at the bottom, in case of repulsion bridge failures. But who could've guessed that none of the kids these days are willing to do this job now?

C: 录像带：毁灭日
E: Videotape: Doomsday

C: 你这是玩忽职守！
E: You are just being lazy!

C: 反正我是不会走的。
E: I am not going to leave.

C: 由于星轨被「星核」所阻塞，她的航器也搁浅在「反物质军团」的必经之路上。在绝对的恐惧中，她选择向「黑塔」求援。
E: At the time, the star rail was blocked by a Stellaron and her spacecraft was also stranded in the path of the Antimatter Legion. In absolute fear, she chose to call the Herta Space Station for help.

C: 未能检测到有效信标
E: No valid beacon detected

C: 这就是空间站「这位科员真绝了」大赛第一名的含金量啊。
E: Behold, the winner of the "Most Awesome Researcher" contest.

C: 哦，是你啊。好久不见。最近过得还好吗？
E: Oh, it's you! Long time no see. How are you?

C: （录音？阿兰委托卡波特的过程被录下来了…？）
E: (Transcript? They've recorded Arlan's conversation with Capote...?)

C: 不知道。他没说，我没问。
E: No. He didn't say, and I didn't ask.

C: 但是这都不是针对小姐的！我从来没有在和您相处的过程中，感受到压力……
E: But they had nothing to do with you! I've never experienced any pressure with you...

C: 自从怪物跑到这里来之后，阿兰大哥一直很忙，好久没有一起玩了…世玲一直很想你呢。
E: Ever since the monsters came here, big brother Arlan has been so busy that he never came around anymore... Shiling misses you so much.

C: 你好像在隐瞒些什么。
E: You seem to be hiding something.

C: 你露出这么恐怖的表情也没用啊。阿兰大人是防卫科长，和他一起来的是帮助空间站抵御「军团」的英雄……
E: It just won't work, even if you put on a terrifying look like that. Captain Arlan is the head of the Security Department. And he is also with the hero who helped thwart the Legion's invasion of the space station...

C: 这么多赶紧抓回去！
E: There are so many of them. Let's capture them all!

C: {NICKNAME}，你会拍照么？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you know how to take a picture?

C: 哦，说了这么多，还没跟你解释我在这儿做什么——刚才也提到，我正在继续调查这件事。
E: Oh, I haven't properly explained to you what I'm doing here... As I mentioned, I'm investigating this situation.

C: 对吧，我就知道你不会忘记的。
E: Yeah! I knew you wouldn't forget me.

C: 总之，领导都给机会了，我怎能不珍惜？要是能将功补过，好好表现一番，我说不定还有扭转风评的机会。
E: To put it simply, the leaders have given me an opportunity. How could I not cherish it? If I can make up for my mistakes and do a good job, I may have a chance to prove myself.

C: 是不太一样。
E: It's quite unexpected.

C: 断断续续的…
E: It's cutting out...

C: 黑塔，想一想，这个项目，它给了你多少惊喜？再想一想，它给了你多少失望？
E: Herta, think about it. How many surprises has this project given you? And how many disappointments has it given you?

C: 至于模拟宇宙…如果你们是为它而来，或许我可以代劳，进行一些解答。
E: As for the Simulated Universe... If that's the reason you're here, maybe I can help in answering your questions.

C: 哦。检索：密林深处的篝火，孤独的石剑指向繁星——「朋克洛德精神」？那可不是普通的奇物，我的朋友。
E: Hmm. Search: Bonfire in the depths of the woods. A lone stone sword points to the stars... "Punklorde Mentality"? That is no ordinary curio, my friend.

C: 他们总是乘着歌声与号角，行于「巡猎」的命途之上，为偶遇的个体或群体主持正义，献上美酒与诗章。
E: They are directed by the Path of The Hunt and are always accompanied by song and the sound of horns. They pursue justice for the individuals and groups they encounter along the way, and shower them with splendid wines and poems.

C: 「算了算了，是我计算失误，咱们再换个扇区试试。」
E: "Never mind, I miscalculated. Let's try another sector."

C: 她说快到终点了？
E: She said she's almost at the destination?

C: 你说空间站吗，当然没有。职场上那都是表面关系。
E: You mean on the space station? Of course not. Colleagues are not friends.

C: 非常遗憾，我并未有幸见过祂的真容。
E: To my lasting sadness, no...

C: 别怄气。{NICKNAME}，你们不必着急切磋，以后有的是机会。
E: Take it easy. {NICKNAME}, There'll be plenty of time to fight later.

C: 这里怎么有另一个我啊！她在跟我说话……
E: Is that me!? Wh—What's she saying...

C: 比起这个，我更担心列车已被更多真蛰虫渗透…这类生物隐蔽性极强，可能躲在暗处，也可能四处游走。必须阻止它们繁殖，否则……
E: My concern is that numerous Stings may have already infested the Express. Their elusive nature helps them to stay in the shadows, but they may also be roaming freely. We have to prevent them from propagating. If not...

C: 现在看来，要与时间比赛了。
E: This is a race against the clock.

C: 虽然是帕姆用来做清洁的，但现在也没办法了……
E: I mean, I know this isn't what it's meant for... but we have no other choice.

C: 啊、啊啊！什、什么动静？！
E: Ahhhh! Wh—What is that!?

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得是否还有更好的办法
E: {NICKNAME}, do you have any solutions?

C: {NICKNAME}，如果你真已经认定，我相信你的判断。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you're certain, I trust your judgment.

C: 得提高警惕！不知道是不是附近有什么奇怪的磁场，干扰列车行进了…{NICKNAME}乘客，跟帕姆一起去控制室看看吧？
E: Stay vigilant! There might be a magnetic field nearby interfering with the Express' navigation system. {NICKNAME}, let's take a look in the control room.

C: …唔，没有实体，但有生命的奇物？抱歉，我一时没有头绪……
E: ...Hmm, a Curio that's alive but doesn't have a body? Sorry, but nothing comes to mind...

C: 几次啦？这是第几次啦？！老东西我跟你讲你不要蹬鼻子上……
E: Again? How many times has it been!? You're really pushing my buttons...

C: 也行，看着啊，这几天我给你整点刺激的。大的要来了！
E: Sure thing. Anyway, keep your eyes peeled — I'll be bringing you something big soon!

C: 但有爱就对了！爱就要大声说出来——这就是芝士流心大人的信念！
E: Remember, as long as love is your compass, you're on the right track. And in the wise words of the honorable Molten Cheese Tart: Love must be shouted from the rooftops!

C: 我该怎么向你解释呢？我不擅长与人交流……
E: How should I have explained it to you? I'm not good at communicating with others...

C: 你还要继续研究？
E: Are you going to keep researching?

C: （阮•梅把开心与悲伤，全部搓成一团。）
E: (Ruan Mei intertwines joy and sorrow.)

C: 日照时间的长短是影响情绪的重要因素，多晒星光被证明是有效缓解负面情绪的方法。
E: The duration of sunlight exposure is a crucial factor affecting mood. Basking in starlight has been proven to be an effective method to alleviate negative emotions.

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: 哦，我跟他很熟。
E: Oh, I know Wallace very well.

C: 你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？如果是徘徊在此的裂界回响，那些矿工们也见过，但最终也平安无事。那就说明他们并不会伤害人。
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? Those miners saw the echoes that linger around the Fragmentum, and they came back unharmed. Surely that shows that the phantoms are not going to hurt anyone.

C: 待办事项已清空，可以准备返航。
E: All to-do items have been completed. You can prepare for your return when you are ready.

C: 除非你想体验义务劳动半个月的开拓之道。
E: Unless you enjoy trailblazing through two weeks of community service.

C: 不要紧，他的同伙在我们手里，主犯不会离得太远，一定会有所行动。
E: *sigh* No matter, we have his accomplices. He'll be close by, plotting his next move.

C: 呃，不过就是私藏了几件古代遗物而已，没什么大不了的。要怪就怪那帮执行公务的，脑子只有一根筋。
E: Uhh, I was just storing a few relics away from prying eyes, nothing serious. If it weren't for the uncompromising nature of our civil service, there'd be no need for secrecy.

C: 我还是第一次认识星穹列车的朋友，当然得好好珍惜啦。
E: Why, of course I will! Meeting friends from the Astral Express is always a moment worth cherishing!

C: 居然又要拔刀相助了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
E: Again... I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!

C: 再也不乌鸦嘴了…我现在可完全没那个行侠仗义的心情啊！
E: I really did jinx us! I don't think I have it in me to play the hero today!

C: 谢谢你们的邀请，不过我手头还有些事务，一时半会儿脱不开身。你们可以替我向那位「大守护者」姑娘问好。
E: Thanks for the invite, but I'm afraid my hands are full right now. Please send my regards to the Supreme Guardian.

C: 哼…呼噜，哼唧，哼！
E: Oink... Grunt, grunt, oink!

C: 「托帕不在这里」。
E: "Topaz isn't here."

C: 「生命没有意义」。
E: "Life is ultimately meaningless."

C: 布洛妮娅小姐，我怀着真挚的心情写下这封信，为的是向你说明一件事——
E: I am writing to you, Miss Bronya, with the genuine desire to express something important...

C: 是可可利亚的…
E: It's Cocolia's...

C: 长线发展的理念…跨越了时间，也跨越了生命。那位兰德女士真是一位伟人。
E: Remarkable. A vision that would transcend both time and generations of Belobogians. Madam Rand was truly an inspiring leader.

C: 这么重大的抉择，却要在这么短的时间里…冷静，佩拉…冷静地思考。
E: Wait, you're telling me I have to make this huge decision on the spot? At least give me a few seconds to think it over.

C: 还真是…密集的信息。抱歉两位，我知道你们在赶时间，但我需要稍微思考一下。
E: That's a lot of information to take in. Sorry, both of you — I know you're in a hurry, but I need a moment to think.

C: 的确，透过孩子们的眼睛来看，这个世界本该有无限多的可能性。
E: You're right. Children see the world as a place where anything is possible...

C: 克拉拉觉得，如果还有选择的余地的话…未来的路，还是应该由大家自己决定。
E: I think if we have a choice for the future, it should be everyone's decision.

C: 再想想吧，你这一票至关重要…
E: Your vote is extremely important...

C: 结果…怎么样？城里的大家是怎么想的？
E: So... what's the verdict? What do the people think?

C: 准备好了就告诉我，我们一起进入铆钉镇。
E: Ready to enter Rivet Town? We'll go in together when everyone is set.

C: 那是佩拉吧？她又在带小孩子啦？
E: Is that Pela? Looks like she's teaching the kids again.

C: 这也难怪。我坚决反对他们服用所谓的「特效药」，他们肯定也知道我的态度。
E: I'm not surprised. They'll know that I'm completely against them using this "wonder medicine..."

C: 你如果好奇瓦赫那所谓「特效药」的效用，不如去问问诊所里的患者吧——看看他们会给你什么样的答案。
E: If you're curious about Vache's wonder medicine, you should ask some of the patients in the clinic... see what they have to say about the effects.

C: 所以，我想正式委托你帮我回收那些「特效药」。你愿意接下这个任务吗？
E: That's why I want you to help me recover all the wonder medicine. Are you willing to take on this assignment?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我的养母，她一直将我视若己出。瓦赫也把我当亲妹妹一样疼爱…至少儿时如此。
E: My adoptive mother always saw me as her own flesh and blood, and Vache loved me like a sister... that is, while we were still young.

C: 这处罚未免太轻了…
E: Banishment isn't a particularly harsh punishment...

C: {NICKNAME}面对如此凶悍的对手竟毫不示弱，甚至在战斗中得心应手，将「灰背鲸」和它的「轻骑兵」们轻松击溃……
E: {NICKNAME} showed no signs of weakness in the face of such a fierce opponent, and even handled the battle with ease, defeating the Grayback Whale and its Light Cavalry with ease...

C: 先别急着下判断。
E: Don't rush to judgment yet.

C: 就是收容舱段的某处，我们目前找到的两个地方，都满足这样的条件……
E: It's somewhere in the Storage Zone. The two places we've found so far both meet these conditions...

C: 终于抓到你了，「异星水魈」，这次你可别想逃。
E: I finally caught you, Xenohydro. You won't get away this time.

C: 都这时候了你还在想为什么！作为你的对手，我觉得我受到了侮辱，咕噜噜，我要给你点颜色瞧瞧！
E: Jeez, is that really what you're worried about? At a time like this? You know what? As your opponent, I feel insulted. *gurgle* I'm gonna teach you a lesson!

C: 欸，你说这卡波特是不是彻底玩儿完啦？以后，还会有粉丝把他当偶像吗？
E: Hey, do you think Capote is over? Will the fans still idolize him?

C: 这些箱子到底是怎么回事？！
E: What on earth is going on with all these boxes!?

C: 感觉…毫无头绪。我们还是跟着查宝接着找其他线索吧。
E: Ugh... I don't have any ideas. Let's just follow Findie for now and look for other clues.

C: 控制终端——好像坏了——
E: The control terminal... seems to be broken...

C: 那我们就先沿着来时的路开始跟着查宝一起搜索吧。出发！
E: Let's use Findie to search along the way we came. Let's go!

C: 还是一如既往地幽默呢，{NICKNAME}。
E: Hehe, funny as always, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我不明白——你没有把信转交给爸妈吗？
E: I don't understand — did you not show them to my parents?

C: 如果这信里的话属实…那瓦赫一定是在雪原的某处搭建了自己的实验室，甚至还获得了一些成果。但这怎么可能……
E: If what's in here is true, then Vache must have built a lab somewhere in the Snow Plains... and even made progress in his research. But how can that be...

C: 先不提四处游荡的怪物，光是因为这极寒天气殉职的弟兄，每年就不止几个。
E: Aside from the monster-related casualties, we lose men to frostbite every year.

C: 当然，前提是你现在有空。
E: ...if you have time, that is.

C: 这样一来，综合馆就应该准备好对公众开放了。
E: The General Hall is ready to open to the public again.

C: 当然，不着急！等您准备好了再来找我就好。
E: Of course, take your time. Come back when you're ready.
...Huh?

C: 这里怎么一天到晚不太平…
E: Never a quiet day in the Underworld...

C: 你们好呀。你们两个来找史瓦罗先生，是有什么事吗？
E: Hello! What brings you two here today?

C: …嘿，这里只有我们几个，你不必这么拘礼，佩拉。
E: ...Hehe, there's no one else here, Pela — no need for such formality.

C: {NICKNAME}，那就辛苦你继续和我一起搭档调查啦。我们到喷泉广场上碰头吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, guess you're stuck with me again for this assignment. Let's meet up at Fountain Plaza.

C: 我要再次郑重替所有博物馆的工作人员、还有贝洛伯格的市民感谢你，{NICKNAME}！没有你的帮助，恐怕这座馆里的很多展品都要销声匿迹了。
E: I want to thank you again, {NICKNAME}, on behalf of all the museum staff, and all the citizens of Belobog! If it weren't for your help, I'm afraid many of the exhibits in this museum would have been lost.

C: …可是、可是少爷，假扮银鬃铁卫可是大罪一件啊……
E: ...B—But sir, pretending to be a Silvermane Guard is a serious crime...

C: 有福同享，有难…
E: Come hell or high water, we shall forge the bonds of brotherly—

C: 「话说回来，博物馆经营游戏玩的还开心吗？友情提醒你，叔叔在这方面可是一把好手！」
E: "So, how's museum manager life treating you? Just a little reminder — when it comes to working in museums, I'm quite the dab hand..."

C: 问得很好，下次别问了。
E: Nice one, Pela. But don't you think that question is a bit nosy?

C: 连你也…我知道错了啦！
E: Wh—what... Even you don't like that question... Alright, I get it, my bad!
Oh...

C: 恭喜您，娜塔莎小姐——很高兴能与您再度共事！
E: Congratulations, Miss Natasha — it's a pleasure to be able to work with you again!

C: 那是什么哇？
E: What's that?

C: 艾丽斯小姐，给你简历。
E: Miss Eris, here's a resume.

C: 应该…应该不会吧。克拉拉会加油的！
E: It.. it should be fine. I'll give it my all!

C: 这个……
E: Well...

C: 肯定没人比虎克更懂面试啦，你就放一百个心吧！
E: Nobody knows interviews better than me, believe me! So don't you worry!

C: 就这么填吧：「贝洛伯格唯一指定摇滚巨星兼机械天才希露瓦•朗道」——你觉得如何？
E: Write this: "Belobog's one and only rock'n'roll superstar and mechanics genius, Serval Landau." How does that sound?

C: 可是，也许希露瓦小姐您不知道，我们运营博物馆和做生意也是十分相似的…如果因为您能力上的短板导致博物馆经营不善，我们又该怎么办呢？
E: For your information, Miss Serval, we're running the museum like a business... What should we do if your inability leads to the mismanagement of the museum?

C: 那倒没有，只要品德和能力够格，我们一般就予以录用了。
E: It isn't. We'll usually recruit an applicant as long as he or she has good character and is capable.

C: 好嘞，辛苦你了。
E: Thanks a lot.

C: 都搞定了吧——让我看看？
E: I suppose it's done. Can I take a look?

C: 咦，希儿？你怎么在这里？
E: Eh, Seele? What are you doing here?

C: 请再稍等我一会儿。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: …怎么连你也沉默了？
E: ...How come you aren't saying anything as well?

C: 背井离乡也是事与愿违，寄人篱下也是事与愿违…要怪就怪这地下日子过得不容易吧。
E: The problem started with them leaving home and being dependent on charity... If you want something to blame, blame life in the Underworld.

C: 大概是急着去销赃吧。
E: Probably trying to sell off the spoils.

C: 就是虎克的老爹，也是鼹鼠党大家的老爹！费斯曼老爹对每个人都很好，总之就是个大好人！
E: He's Hook's daddy, and he's like a daddy to everyone in The Moles! He's like... a great person!

C: 啊，是你！快，快来帮虎克的忙！
E: Ah, it's you! Come and help Hook!

C: 唔…虎克记住了！
E: Mmm... Hook understands!

C: 嗐，毕竟矿脉是人家发现的，我也怪不得他。只能说，这么干不符合我一直以来对他的印象。
E: Anyway, he found that Geomarrow vein by himself, so I won't blame him for not sharing. But y'know, what he did was not like the old Fersman I knew.

C: 想都别想。
E: That's not gonna happen.

C: 求求你们了，我这辈子连爸妈的零花钱都没偷过，可不要冤枉好人啊……
E: I beg you, I never even stole pocket money from my parents as a kid. Don't wrong an innocent person...

C: {NICKNAME}，不准看虎克哭的样子，快出去！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're not allowed to see Hook cry! Go away!

C: 恰好之前又有客户预约了我那套装备…按理说我本该自己去找的，但这矿区形势错综复杂，有些地方听说还有裂界怪物出没……
E: Coincidentally, not long ago, a customer ordered a set of equipment from me... Well... I'd like to go look for it myself, but the situation in the mining area is complicated. I hear there are Fragmentum monsters in some places...

C: 才不是做梦！不信的话，你狠狠掐自己一把就知道啦。
E: Today they do! And you're not dreaming. If you don't believe us, pinch yourself!

C: 喔、喔！太好了，他俩没事就好…我可以放心撤了。
E: Thank you — all of you. I'm just glad they're okay... I can finally retreat as well.

C: 我已经想尽办法努力忘记先前发生的一切了，可你总能变着法子又回到我的视线中……
E: I try everything to put the past behind me... and yet you always manage to creep up again...

C: 既然话说到这份上……
E: Well, seeing as we've come this far...

C: 非战斗人员请从这里向磐岩镇撤离！
E: Non-combatants, retreat from Boulder Town through here in an orderly fashion!

C: 好大的雪…感觉比北方山脉里见到的还要大。
E: So much snow... Even in the northern mountains, it wasn't like this.

C: 啊？
E: Really?

C: 这也是露营的一环嘛——就让我体验一下吧。
E: Come on, camping is about teamwork! Let me have a try.

C: 不用道歉，谨慎一点是好事。
E: Don't be sorry. It pays to be careful.

C: 嗯，好啦。
E: Okay, all done.

C: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
E: Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!

C: 实话实说不好吗！
E: Say what's on your mind!

C: 软盘——如果科考队的前辈们说的是真的……
E: The floppy disk... If the old research team members were telling the truth...

C: …但是你必须答应我一件事——以后再也不准偷别人的东西了，能做到吗？
E: But... you'll have to promise me one thing: You'll never steal other people's things again. Promise?

C: 没有…没有…空的……
E: No... No... Empty...

C: 这就是所有线索了吗？
E: Is that all the info you have?

C: 我们该回去了。
E: We should go back.

C: 什么东西这么神秘？
E: So what is your mysterious treasure?

C: 真、真的吗？快点，快拿出来看看呀！
E: R—Really? Quick, let me see!

C: （眼下似乎也没有更好的选择，看来只能再跑一趟了……）
E: (Looks like there is no other choice. Guess I'll have to go again...)

C: 唔…游戏才刚开始，就这么结束未免太扫兴了……
E: Aww... but we just started playing. Can't we finish this round first...?

C: 这里不安全。
E: It's not safe here.

C: 我…才、才不是！探险活动的目的地是鼹鼠党的成员一起决定的！
E: I... I did not! The Moles hold a vote on all our expedition destinations!

C: 侦测到新增敌意反应——剿灭开始。
E: Hostility detected. Commence elimination protocols.

C: …克拉拉也不清楚。但我猜，帕斯卡的自我意识之所以会如此混乱，肯定和频频遭受同类攻击有关系。
E: I'm not sure, but I suspect Pascal's tormented sense of self stems from him being constantly attacked by his fellow robots.

C: 下层区也是贝洛伯格的一部分，如果史瓦罗的存在威胁到了这里的居民，我当然站在你们这一边。
E: The Underworld is still a part of Belobog. If Svarog's existence constitutes a threat to the people here, I will of course stand with you.

C: 既然我们统一战线，就没必要再耽搁了。走吧，我安排了向导带你们去找史瓦罗。
E: Seeing as we're all on the same side, there's no reason to delay. Let's go, I've arranged for a guide to take you to Svarog.

C: 帮我们把门撬开。
E: Help us pry the gate open.

C: 什么内燃…什么说唱？这种事我们咋知道啊！
E: Infernal construction what now? How would we know anything about that!

C: 去周围打听打听吧…
E: Let's listen in on some conversations...

C: 大雪纷飞的夜，他闭上了眼，爸妈的声音开始渐行渐远……
E: Now the blizzard descends, eyes start to close, the voices of family lost to the snow...

C: 欸！那家伙跑哪去了，明明刚才还在啊？
E: Ugh! Where did he run off to — he was just here a second ago!

C: 克拉拉——
E: Clara—

C: 你是地下唯一的希望。
E: You're the underground's only hope.

C: 真的是「不小心」吗…
E: Was it really an accident...?

C: 大家，请跟我来吧。
E: Everyone, follow me.

C: …允许歼灭！
E: ...Annihilation permitted!

C: 糟糕，他居然有帮手！
E: Darn it! He's got extra hands!

C: 嗯…很好，就这样吧。
E: Mm... good. That'll do.

C: <unbreak>57614</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。数据展示结束。
E: Cache number <unbreak>57614</unbreak>, transmission complete. Concluding data transmission.

C: …首领？当然知道，「地火」干的那些事儿，一群热血乡巴佬做得来么。
E: ...The chief? Of course I knew. Wildfire are mostly made up of torch and pitchfork types. How could they function without her?

C: 拍卖会如何进行？
E: How will the auction be held?

C: 这件拍品将极为珍贵的黑宝石与…呃，朴素可爱的玩偶结合在一起，设计十分巧妙！起拍价为三百冬城盾。
E: An innovative design! It combines incredibly valuable erebus gemstones with, uh... a good old-fashioned cuddly teddy bear! The opening bid is <unbreak>300</unbreak> shield.

C: 就是就是，你们「地火」怎么回事，还不如鼹鼠党呢！
E: Yeah, why is Wildfire so incompetent? You should have put The Moles in charge!

C: 你知道该怎么做吧，虎克？
E: Do you know what to do, Hook?

C: 等待拍卖会开始。
E: Let's wait for the auction to begin.

C: 你们在说什么？
E: What are you guys talking about?

C: 我们出发吧。
E: Let's get going.

C: 克拉拉，你在烦恼什么？
E: Clara, what's wrong?

C: 是犯罪的气息…我兴奋起来了！
E: Mmm! The smell of crime... How exciting!

C: 如果克拉拉没记错的话…被这个小家伙偷走的零件，原本就是拿来给「机械宠物」升级的。
E: If my memory serves me right, the parts this little fella stole were originally designed for that kind of pet upgrade.

C: 请、请不要再说这种话了，克拉拉也是会生气的……
E: Please, please don't say things like that. You'll upset me...

C: 即将前往第二个目标地点，请坐好、扶稳，系紧安全带。
E: We are on our way to the second destination. Please take a seat, buckle up, and hold tight.

C: …啊，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你回来啦？怎么样，托比带你找到机械外壳了吗？
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}, you're back already? How did it go? Did Toby help you find a shell?

C: 那明天见，克拉拉。
E: See you tomorrow, Clara.

C: 基于当前采集到的数据，得出结论：建议将机械单元帕斯卡格式化后纳入基地网络，以免威胁聚落居民的财产及人身安全。
E: Based on the information gathered, it is recommended that Pascal's data be formatted and integrated into the base network so that he doesn't threaten the property or safety of the camp's residents.

C: 是的，小家伙现在已经活蹦乱跳了。只是…还有些部分没有完全恢复正常。
E: Yes, the little fella is alive and well again. It's just that... some parts aren't completely back to normal yet.

C: 发现什么了吗？
E: What have you discovered?

C: 帕斯卡没去搞破坏吧？
E: Pascal didn't cause any trouble, did he?

C: 没关系，办法由克拉拉和史瓦罗先生一起想就好……
E: It's okay, Mr. Svarog and I can come up with a solution.

C: 帕斯卡，真乖～
E: Good boy, Pascal!

C: 啊…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}难得来一趟，要不要和帕斯卡聊聊天？
E: Would you like to speak with Pascal?

C: 这座栈桥对面就是禁区的前线，那里有望不到边际的裂界，一群疲惫的银鬃铁卫，还有…弥漫着死亡味道的空气。
E: The restricted zone front line is on the other side of the gear bridge. It's an endless Fragmentum with a few exhausted Silvermane Guards... and the stench of death in the air.

C: 有股一言难尽的味道……
E: Something smells weird...

C: 铁卫，列队！捉住他们。裂界怪物随时可能进犯，没有时间浪费在这群人身上！
E: Guards, formation! Arrest these people. We could be inundated with Fragmentum monsters at any moment, we have no time to waste on them!

C: 别马后炮了，希儿姑娘！只要机械栈桥启动，咱们迟早都要暴露的。
E: Shoulda, coulda, woulda, Seele! Activating the gear bridge alone would've been enough to expose us.

C: 没错，「星核」虽然和我素未谋面，但是我却因为它丢了筑城者的铁饭碗，是时候去找它算账了。
E: Let's do this. I may never have come face to face with it, but this Stellaron cost me a nice, stable job. It's time to get even.

C: 不知道啊，这台好像是戍卫队那边新投放的机器人…咱俩就这么把它拆了，队长不会找咱们麻烦吧？
E: I have no idea! It seems to be a new robot from the Garrison... If we dismantle it like this without telling the Captain, will we get into any trouble?

C: 我只是做了热心市民该做的事…
E: I just did what a good citizen would do...

C: 然后？
E: Then?

C: …斯捷潘？不认识，从来没听过这名字。你找他有什么事吗？我能帮上什么忙么？
E: ...Stefan? No, never heard of him. Have you got some business with him? Anything I can help out with?

C: 希露瓦•朗道…你曾是我最珍视的朋友。
E: Serval Landau... you were my most cherished friend.

C: 这些，就要看他们自己的努力了。
E: It will depend on the efforts of the people here.

C: 可可利亚放弃了「存护」。
E: Cocolia abandoned Preservation.

C: 如果我拒绝…
E: If I say no...

C: …你要抛下我吗？将我留在这无边无际的空虚中？
E: ...Are you going to leave me behind? Just leave me here in this endless void?

C: 希莉儿的残响被冰风的呼啸声溶解、吹散。
E: Cyrille's echoes dissipate amidst the howling of the icy wind.

C: 封印着虚卒的冰块表面被皑皑白雪覆盖。尽管看不清被冰封之物的模样，你还是感受到了一股带有敌意的视线。
E: The surface of the ice that sealed the Voidranger is covered in snow. Despite not being able to see the icebound creature, you can still feel a hostile gaze.

C: 这样吧，为了让你理解一下这份工作的麻烦程度，咱们不妨先来一场小小的测试吧。
E: How 'bout this, to give you an idea about how troublesome this job is, let's have a small quiz.

C: 哦，准备好了？你要是准备好了，我们就开始吧。
E: Are you ready? We'll start whenever you are.

C: 听说这里可以调查事故影像…
E: Is this where we can check on the accident footage?

C: 通过一番调查比照，檀檀找到了肇事星槎的资料。
E: After investigation and comparison, Tantan manages to find data on the offending starskiff.

C: 这就是那艘违法改造的星槎，仅从外壳上来看，和一般的星槎没有什么差别。
E: This is the illegally modified starskiff. From its appearance, it's no different from an ordinary starskiff.

C: 这要求高吗？对于学会的研究来说，这些不过是一个助手的基本要求。
E: You think I'm asking for too much? These are just the basic requirements for an assistant when it comes to the Guild's research.

C: 不过新上任的丹士长玉络大人也许能给你答复。
E: However, the new chief alchemist, Lady Yuluo, might be able to help you.

C: 列车长想我没有？
E: Did you miss me, Pom-Pom?

C: 我是一朵孤独的蘑菇，噢，真教人悲伤。
E: I'm a lonely mushroom. Alas, how sad am I.

C: 你就像造主般无情冷漠，打开我纯洁的躯壳，解剖我悲伤的芯……
E: You are as cold and heartless as the Creator, peeling open my untainted shell and dissecting my depressed heart...

C: 差不多得了，也没怎么你…
E: That's enough melodrama out of you. It's not like I destroyed you or anything...

C: 你这打油诗水平，也配考我？
E: How can you test me when you are not competent yourself?

C: …好吧，你念吧。
E: ...Fine. Just read it.

C: 两人时光再美好，总会有不美好的结局。就像卜算一样，凶卦才是常态。
E: No matter how happy a couple is, their relationship is bound to end up badly. Just like divination, woe is the norm.

C: 能请你往旁边挪一挪吗？
E: Could you please scooch over a bit?

C: 我找过温符瑞科员对谈过几次，每每谈到「美丽狐仙」，他的笑容便逐渐不受控制。每当我想进一步了解时，他总是支支吾吾遮遮掩掩的。
E: I've had a few conversations with him. Every time I mentioned the foxian beauty, his grin grows uncontrollably. But when I try to inquire further, he always dodged the questions and evaded the topic.

C: 甚至不需要<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，我们就能搞清楚这里面到底有什么猫腻。看来我没找错人啊~{NICKNAME}。
E: We won't even need the <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color> to find out what the hidden truth is. Looks like I chose the right person after all, {NICKNAME}.

C: 抱歉，我帮不上你，要不你再去问问别人吧。
E: I apologize, I don't think I can help you. Maybe you can try someone else?

C: 我有线索，你有好心肠。我把线索交给你，你把<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>交给我，这样的话很公平吧？
E: I have the clues, you have the heart, so I'll give you the clues, and you'll give me the <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>. Do we have a deal?

C: 我就在这里。能问一下，你们聊了什么吗？
E: I'm here. Can I inquire as to what you talked about?

C: 我明白了，就按你们说的做。
E: I understand, I'll do whatever you think is correct.

C: 对了，他不是美丽狐仙，那这照片上又是谁呀？
E: Speaking of, if he's not a pretty foxian, then who is this in the photo?

C: …要是有机会说出这样的台词就好了！
E: ...If only I had the chance to issue an order like that!

C: 我还以为是谁呢，结果是地衡司的条子。
E: I thought it was someone else, but it turned out to be a spy from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 没错！尽早告诉才是对的，我要是去了仙舟费劲千辛万苦找到他……
E: That's right! It is only right to tell the truth as soon as possible. If I had gone through all the trouble of finding him in Xianzhou...

C: 行了行了，你先回去写外驻申请吧，在那之后我们再做决定。
E: Fine, fine. Go ahead and write me an off-station transfer application, and we'll see.

C: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
E: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

C: 容我解释一下，如果一种光学涂料无腐蚀、无毒害，且只能被学会的装置辨识。我个人更喜欢把这种行为称为「保护遗迹」。
E: Please let me explain. If it is an optical paint that is non-corrosive, harmless, and can only be detected by a device of the Guild, I'd personally call it "protecting history."

C: 在走远路前，先让我吃片镇痛药。
E: Let me take a painkiller first before the long journey.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，帮个忙吧，帮我回去找找我的笔记本吧。
E: {F#M'girl}{M#M'boy}, please do me a favor and help me look for my notebook.

C: 我有个提议：加入学会，我们一起共享这秘密带来的荣誉、财富还有漫长的青春。你可以自由做任何你想做的事情。只要在我们离开罗浮前，守口如瓶。
E: I've got a proposal for you: Join our Guild! We'll split all the glory, the riches, and the extended youth granted by this secret. You'll be free to do whatever you want. Just keep this a secret until we leave the Luofu.

C: 是呀，我寻摸着{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}身手不凡，又帮龙女大人解过围，深得她的信任……
E: Yes, you have extraordinary skills, and you earned her trust when you rescued her...

C: 现在那里没人能进去，也没有人出来，可以说是音信全无。依兄弟愚见，我在其中嗅出了阴谋的味道。
E: Now nobody can get in or out — it's completely cut off. Something very fishy is going on.

C: 上衣内侧，裤兜里放不下的东西适合放在这里。
E: Inside the jacket. Things that cannot be put in the pants' pockets can be placed here.

C: 可我却只能活着，无休无止地活着。
E: But I can only live, and keep living on, endlessly forever.

C: 你就不能把我当个孩子看？让听到了，会有心理阴影的。
E: Can't you just treat me like a kid? If other people hear it, they'll be traumatized.

C: 你要去哪里？我们还得抓紧时间通过那个哨卡呢！
E: Where are you going? We need to get through that sentry post pronto!

C: 怎样，本小姐那逼真的演出是不是很厉害，那可是本小姐哭过无数回练习出来的！
E: How was that? Wasn't my acting amazing? Let me tell you, a performance like that requires a lot of temper-tantrum practice!

C: 再等等。
E: Wait.

C: 你怎么啦？一副为难的样子。
E: What's going on? You look terrible.

C: 明白。这个行动少不了像您这样身手矫健的人，我会等您的。
E: Got it. This operation needs agile people like you. I'll wait for you.

C: 废什么话，让您交货您就交货！
E: Save it! Show us the goods first!

C: 办不到也得办！
E: Even it's beyond our power to help!

C: 罗刹先进了三余书肆，然后去了客栈，不久后空着手离开了。然后他走进了一个黑暗的角落…再之后就拎着大大小小的行李去了码头？
E: So Luocha enters Spare Time Book Shop and then the inn, but leaves moments after empty-handed. Then he turns a corner into a dark alley... and then goes to the dock with all that luggage?

C: 明白了。
E: I think so.

C: （这样比较有意思嘛。）
E: (It's more fun this way...?)

C: 感觉杨叔很能体会这种心情…
E: I feel like you relate to this a lot, Mr. Yang...

C: 不好意思啊，肚子里也是。刚看到我妈招待你们的那什么茶点，味道好不好啊？
E: Hehe, speaking of empty inside... So how were Mom's refreshments? Good?

C: 唔，您的家乡也出产类似的风味饮料吗？
E: Oh? Is there a drink like this where you're from?

C: 什么呀都是…是预示孩子会走上飞行士的道路。
E: What? No... It means they'll become a pilot.

C: 不，我想等一下再回去。在此之前，有件事希望二位恩公能帮我。
E: ...Not yet, I want to go back later. There's something I hope you two can help me with first.

C: 心情不太好？
E: Isn't in a great mood?

C: 唉，到头来，那些了不起的天才都走啦。我唯一能做的也就是回忆回忆，让别人不要那么快忘了她们。
E: In the end, all the ace pilots perished. The only thing I can do is to remember them and ensure they are not forgotten too soon.

C: …找到了。
E: ...Got it.

C: 还是不要打扰她们了。
E: Let's not disturb them.

C: 这…为什么？
E: But... why?

C: 那，我只作最后一次提醒：我尊重你的最终决定，那将是不可逆的：如果你走开，我会想办法救下阿刃，好离开仙舟，但这都会与你无关……
E: In that case, a final warning: I respect your choice, and that choice will be irreversible. If you walk away, I will find a way to save Blade so I can leave the Xianzhou, and you won't be involved in any way...

C: 你们的星神难道是虚无？
E: Are you sure you don't follow the Aeon of Nihility?

C: 阿刃复活后，忘记了很多事情，但还记得徒弟们杀死他的那一晚。因此他在全宇宙寻找凶手。
E: After his revival, Bladie had forgotten nearly everything, but he remembered the night his apprentices killed him. He's been searching the whole universe for those who took his life...

C: 哎…
E: Emm...

C: 魔阴身？可我瞧你也不像啊？最近罗浮遇到了大麻烦，我为不少受魔阴身困扰的患者看过诊。但这些人不是语无伦次、神智失常，就是躯壳变异、样貌可怕。
E: You're... mara-struck? I don't see the symptoms in you at all. What with the incident on the Luofu, I've treated a number of mara-stricken patients recently. They all presented with signs of incoherence, delirium, or frightening physical mutations.

C: 刚才那个持明女孩说得很明白了，怎么，你的尖耳朵不灵了？
E: You didn't hear? That Vidyadhara girl explained it clear as day.

C: 区区一介行商？罗刹先生说笑了。你在哀荣堡所行之事，在面纱星域遗留的种种过往，需要我一一细述吗？
E: Merely a wanderer? You're too modest, Luocha. Do I need to remind you of your actions at the Eternity Fortress and the Shroudveil Starzone...?

C: 将这个男人先带走吧，接下来的事情与他无关。
E: Take this man away. This does not involve him.

C: 三月七却说「它说港口风急，要用气味追踪可不容易。」
E: March 7th said, "He says the wind is too strong here at the port, so it's not easy to follow the scent."

C: 记录作者外出取材了…
E: Writer's block perhaps...

C: 谁料到罗浮现在这么凶险了呢？
E: Who would have imagined the Luofu could become such a dangerous place?

C: 「以此一剑，权作谢礼。因缘匪浅，他日重续。」
E: That move was a token of my appreciation. We were fated to meet this day, and in days to come.

C: 好啊，在所不辞。
E: Sounds good to me.

C: 请各位见谅…随着药王秘传逐渐壮大，也引起了那些妖弓信徒的注意，若不这样小心行事，后果不堪设想啊。
E: Please excuse me... Our expansion has unfortunately attracted the attention of those Devilish Archer followers. If we are not careful, the consequences could be unthinkable.

C: 只要将这册《千手慈怀药王救世品》抄写五百遍，让兄弟姐妹们相信你的诚意，就可以让你成为一名莳者了。
E: All you must do is transcribe this copy of "Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation" <unbreak>500</unbreak> times by hand. This will allow your brothers and sisters to trust your faith... and you to become a disciple.

C: 我是长乐天卫戍区的云骑，见到那个「绿芙蓉」一直鬼鬼祟祟的，还宣传一些离经叛道的思想，这才跟过来，准备卧底。
E: I'm a Cloud Knight from the Exalting Sanctum garrison. That Green Hibiscus has been sneaking around spreading heretical lies for a while now. That's why I'm here — to spy on him!

C: 我抄完了。
E: I've finished it.

C: 为什么啊？
E: Why?

C: 你怎么在这里？
E: What brings you here?

C: ……可怕。
E: ...Heavens above.

C: （原来紫月季就是青镞要找的那位失踪的卧底。这人竟然加入了药王秘传。）
E: (So Mauve Moon was the agent that Qingzu lost contact with... he joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)

C: …通往渡口的路，应该不是这条吧？
E: I don't think this is the way.

C: 老夫就走到这儿吧…
E: This is as far as I go...

C: 脑袋有些晕乎。
E: I'm feeling a little dizzy.

C: 关于过去的东西，准备好了吧？身为无名客，你的旅程里也该有不少足以唤起回忆的纪念品？
E: So, have you acquired something from your past? As a Nameless, surely you must have souvenirs from your journeys that could evoke memories?

C: 你下一句一定会问，「那块冰还留着吗？」
E: ...and before you ask, no, I don't have any of that ice lying around.

C: 三月小姐，欢迎光临桑博宾馆，我是这里的保安杰帕德。
E: Miss March 7th, welcome to the Sampo Hotel. I'm Gepard, the security here.

C: 云璃，不得无礼！快向远道而来的客人道歉！
E: Don't be rude, Yunli! Apologize to our esteemed guests from afar!

C: 不知你有没有听说过一种名为「岁阳」的精怪？这东西酷爱汲取人类的情绪与记忆，热衷操控血肉之躯。
E: I wonder if you've ever heard of a creature called a "heliobus"? It loves to feed on human emotions and memories, and excels at manipulating its hosts.

C: …对了，他们不是计划把剑送去工造司修缮吗？怎么还没人出来…你有什么头绪吗？
E: ...By the way, aren't they supposed to be taking the sword to the Artisanship Commission for repairs? Why haven't they come out yet... Any ideas?

C: 也许司辰宫不止有一个前门…
E: Maybe there are other ways out of the Palace of Astrum...

C: 我认识，是朱明仙舟工造司的。
E: I know her. She's from the Xianzhou Zhuming's Artisanship Commission.

C: 是，详加审查是我的分内职责。云璃小姐话虽说得斩钉截铁，但只凭个人陈词是不能结案的。
E: Yes, it's my duty to thoroughly investigate the case. Even though Yunli is firm in her words, we can't just rely on her testimony.

C: 银枝？那位纯美骑士啊…他和使团成员一道将剑移交给了工造司。
E: Argenti? Oh, that Knight of Beauty... He was with the delegation when they handed over the sword to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 好有道理。
E: Fair enough.

C: 传说故事中常有的桥段。
E: That's a common element in myths and legends.

C: 云璃，前来讨教！
E: Show me what you've got!

C: 我和他坠落在了一颗被步离人占据的星球。只有…我们。
E: We crash-landed on a planet occupied by borisin. Just the two of us.

C: 不妨问问孤云的意见。
E: You might as well ask Guyun's opinion.

C: 亲爱的，何必这么认真呢？你不是玩得很开心吗——至少我很开心呀。
E: My dear, why so serious? Haven't you been having a great time? I have, at least.

C: 虫子。
E: Bugs.

C: 喔，是「密室杀人事件」？我还以为您不打算理会它了呢。
E: Oh, you mean the locked-room murder? I thought you weren't planning on doing that one.

C: 嗯？这证据好像没法证明他是凶手吧……
E: Hmm? This evidence doesn't really prove that he is the murderer...

C: 惨了，这门也打不开，让太卜等得久了，一定觉得「不靠谱的青雀」又把差事办砸了……
E: Great, this gate won't open either. We've kept the master diviner waiting — no doubt she'll blame "unreliable Qingque" for messing up once again...

C: 算法本该无误，究竟是什么在干扰仪器呢……
E: The algorithm is correct. So what's interfering with the instruments...?

C: 能尽情差遣的人来了，高兴吧？
E: Glad to have us as your errand runners, aren't you?

C: 没错。「穷观阵」是太卜司重器，原是用来占算航路，问卜未来。
E: Precisely, the Matrix of Prescience is the Divination Commission's ultimate weapon. It was originally used to calculate navigation routes and predict future events...

C: 这「工造司」的洞天早在星核侵蚀后就停摆啦。这些人怎么不搭乘星槎去安全区呢？
E: The Artisanship Commission delve should have suspended operations after the Stellaron corrosion began. Why haven't these people taken starskiffs to safety?

C: 鹿的脚下有更多根须钻出来了？
E: Look at the deer's feet — there are more roots coming up!

C: 嘿嘿，老夫毕竟是一介工匠，疆场厮杀～非我所长！
E: Hehe, I'm only an artisan, after all. My skills in clash of swords shall find no sake, yet that which clasheth needeth hands to make!

C: 这下好极了，没什么能够阻挡各位了！
E: Excellent! Nothing can stop you now!

C: 老大一包你一包，那我呢？我吃哪包？
E: Hey, what about me? Where's mine?

C: 救命啊！反物质军团来吃小孩了！
E: HELP! The Antimatter Legion is going to eat us!

C: 老什么大！快扶我起来！
E: Argh, stop yelling and help me up already!

C: 哼！今天先放你一马！要是公平对决，我未必不是你的对手！
E: Hmph! I'll let you off the hook this time — next time we fight fair and square!

C: 嚣张的小孩一边说着，一边冲上来打了你一拳。你岿然不动，他却因为反作用力摔倒了。
E: The arrogant kid runs up to you and punches you. You stand strong, unmoving, but the boy falls backward from the reaction force.

C: 不过，谁能时时刻刻守在她身边？在那之前，她必须先像我一样，学会忍受黑暗。
E: ...but that would require someone to be by her side every waking second of every day. In the meantime, she'll have to learn to withstand the darkness — just as I have.

C: 对不起，我不是故意的…
E: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to...

C: 叽里咕噜滚下来！
E: Heads to the east, ends up west!

C: 我的法乌努斯红毛羊，是不是都让你给我抓走了！
E: Did you steal my Faunus Red Sheep?

C: 然后，旁边那位你应该见过，叫做贝娜。是「保育派」的代表，这一派主要放生一些珍稀、濒临灭绝的弱小动物。
E: I think you've met the one next to Tonya. Her name is Benna, and she's the leader of the Nurture Faction. This faction mainly releases rare, fragile, and endangered animals.

C: 没错，他叫做{NICKNAME}，各位可能略有耳闻…就是神策府那位景元将军请来的贵客。
E: Yes, this is {NICKNAME}. Some of you might have heard of that name... This is the distinguished guest invited by General Jing Yuan of the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 还有你，钟珊！什么叫「丰饶孽物」？我说多少遍了，蒙药师恩赐的那叫「孽物」吗？
E: And you, Zhongshan! What do you mean by the "Abominations of Abundance"? How many times do I have to repeat myself? Those that received Yaoshi's blessing are no abominations!

C: 好了，不要吵了！当着外人的面，吵吵嚷嚷的，像什么样子？
E: Alright, stop bickering! It isn't appropriate to fight before outsiders!

C: 哎呀！这想法真不错！三种不同的生物会构成食物链，但是同一种动物总不至于自己捕猎自己吧！
E: That is a brilliant idea! Three species can form a food chain, but the same species won't hunt their own kind, right?

C: 身为主治医师，光有我一个人可不成。
E: As the presiding physician, I can't do all the work by myself.

C: 好养活…
E: It's easy to cultivate...

C: 他们「放生」了放生帮。
E: They unshackled the Unshackled.

C: 嗯，这里气氛骇人。我正好录一些素材，嘿嘿。
E: Whoa, this place feels pure evil... Hee-hee, time to get some footage.

C: 不知道家人之前听说过这绥园闹鬼的传闻吗？
E: Did anyone ever tell you the scary stories about Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 据说在三十年前丰饶民战争中，狐族飞行士精锐尽出，死伤甚众。人们自发到绥园里的狐眠冢处吊唁故人…这让绥园游人稀疏，少有欢声。
E: It's said the elite pilots of the foxians were almost wiped out in the Denizens of Abundance Wars thirty years ago. People went to the Foxsomn Tomb in Fyxestroll Garden to grieve for the departed... Because of this, Fyxestroll Garden rarely saw visitors and was bereft of joy.

C: 这周围的气氛是不是不太对…我好害怕，你离我近一些，我怕你也不见了……
E: Is it me or is this place starting to feel weirder and weirder...? I'm scared... Can you stay close to me? I don't want to lose you, too...

C: 本大爷就是受不了你这怂包样儿，身为十王司判官，怎么总想着向别人求助啊？
E: Ugh, not this again! You're a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission — why are you always begging others for help?

C: 成天只会耀武扬威，一不留神咱们就一块儿掉进别人的陷阱里了…到底是谁没用啊！
E: You talk tough all day long, then let both of us get stuck in a trap... Who's the useless brat now!?

C: 呜哇啊啊啊啊！那边的门自己打开了。
E: Wahhhh! That door just opened on its own!

C: 面对能信手操纵生命的妖物，吾害怕…再也无法与妹妹共事。
E: Faced with a demon that can manipulate life at will, of course I'm afraid... Afraid that I won't ever work with my sister again.

C: 不，这邪物尚在，还劫持了吾麾下的冥差童子。身为星火之精，岁阳不会死灭，十王司缚魔典籍中的记载果然是真的。
E: No. The demon lives on. They even possessed a young spiritfarer under my command. "As Starfire Essences, the heliobi will never die" — the records in the Ten-Lords Commission's evil-binding tomes were all real...

C: …先、先提问，问些与藿藿有关的问题。
E: I—I need to ask you some questions about myself first...

C: 等到任务完成，她的尾巴也要被回收镇压。
E: Her tail will be extracted and suppressed after the job is over.

C: 珠宝，腕表，包袋，高级定制…您可以在这里买到匹诺康尼最高端和最奢侈的商品。
E: Jewelry, wristwatches, handbags, and haute couture... You can find the most high-end and opulent merchandise in Penacony here.

C: 这条长裤的款式由著名设计师…坤德先生首创，尤其值得介绍的是其上的刺绣，它的灵感来自于某位著名画家，由金线穿织而成。
E: These pants are an avant-garde creation by the renowned designer... Mr. Kunde. Special mention has to be made of its embroidery — its inspiration originates from a certain famous painter, and is woven with gold threads.

C: 柯柯娜小姐，您还好吗？
E: Miss Cocona, are you all right?

C: （柯柯娜小姐说的地方应该就在这附近了……）
E: (The place that Miss Cocona mentioned should be around here...)

C: 啊，是您啊。您看，这回我没有忘记…欸，您已经拿到那张唱片了？真好。
E: Ah, it's you. Look, I didn't forget this time... Huh? You've already retrieved the record? Wonderful.

C: …只是上面承载的时光，还让我有些怀念。
E: ...I'm just somewhat nostalgic of the moments it holds.

C: 娜娜那么聪明，无论干什么都会很出色的。好期待以后有一天能摇着荧光棒，为舞台上的你加油呀…我能想象出那时你的样子，一定美极了。
E: You're so smart, and you'll succeed in anything you do. I can't wait for the day I'll be able to wave glowsticks and cheer for you on stage... I bet you'll be so gorgeous when that time comes.

C: 名字来自我最喜欢的诗人——
E: The name is from my favorite poet...

C: （狠心点…柯柯娜，你还背负着很多人的期待呢…这也许就是成人的游戏规则吧。）
E: (Be more strict on yourself... Cocona, you carry the wishes of so many people on your shoulders... Perhaps these are the rules of the game in the adult world.)

C: 外人眼里的匹诺康尼是一个美妙的幻梦——但只有我们知道它的本质，柯柯娜。
E: Penacony is a wondrous dreamy illusion to outsiders' eyes, but only we know its true nature, Cocona.

C: …您还好吗？柯柯娜小姐？
E: ...Are you all right? Miss Cocona?

C: 以那声响动为界，她再也无法逃脱悲伤之网。
E: As if that sound marks the end of a sentence, she is also a prisoner in this web of tragedy.

C: …您是希望把我留下吗？把我留在这个只剩疮痍的世界里，继续承受煎熬？
E: ...Do you wish for me to stay? To stay in this world with nothing but desolation, to continue bearing suffering?

C: 其实不用搞得那么清楚…
E: You don't have to get everything clear...

C: 她有提到过我吗？
E: Did she mention me?

C: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
E: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

C: 你礼貌得不像个明星…
E: You're too polite to be famous...

C: 梦境和现实；真实和虚假——应当分得那么清吗？我宁愿相信当下呈现在您眼前的才是我真实的模样…我不愿相信真实的自己已然变成一副疤痕满身的皮囊。
E: Dreams and reality, truth and falsehoods... Must we separate them so clearly? I am willing to believe that the person you see before you is my true form... I don't wish to believe that in reality. I am nothing but a deformed body, covered in scars.

C: 我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
E: I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.

C: 我想起来了一些画面——都是些让人感到不适的情景。
E: I can remember certain moments... They were truly uncomfortable.

C: 但她怎么会…我从来都没觉得她会有那么深的执念。这里一定有什么隐情。
E: But why would she... I never thought that she would have such a strong obsession. There must be more than meets the eye here...

C: …迪恩先生？
E: ...Mr. Dean?

C: 您就是{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}吧？久仰了，在下是艾弗法先生的秘书，负责本次「晖长石号」的交接事项。
E: You must be {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}? I've heard so much about you. I am Mr. Alfalfa's secretary, and I'm responsible for coordinating the handover of the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「开拓之尾号」</color>，在尾翼上涂上帕姆的模样，跟随着列车长的尾巴，就永远不会迷航。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Trailblaze's Stern</color>. Pom-Pom's image will be painted on the empennage — we'll never get lost in the stars if we follow the conductor's trail.

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「开拓之尾号」</color>，强调列车长帕姆的地位，凸出您无名客的身份。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Trailblaze's Stern</color>, emphasizing the importance of conductor Pom-Pom and highlighting your status as a Nameless.

C: 气氛已经烘托到这儿了，你可不能打退堂鼓……
E: The atmosphere is starting to pop off. You can't back down now...

C: 话说回来，白日梦酒店里有真正意义上的盥洗室吗？反正你没见过。以你消耗苏乐达的速率，你最好提前掌握好一切必要的信息……
E: Anyway. Does The Reverie have a real bathroom in here? Haven't seen one. And at the rate you're consuming SoulGlads, you'd best have all the info you need available to you...

C: 把房卡都给我吧，砂金、托帕。
E: Give me your room cards, Aventurine, Topaz.

C: 反正，呃…反正我就当咱们约定好咯？不许把我在匹诺康尼的事告诉太卜大人！只要你能信守约定，我赢的信用点就分你三分之一！
E: Anyway, uh... anyway, I'll just take that as a deal, then? Don't tell the master diviner about me being in Penacony! And as long as you keep your end of the deal, you can take one-third of the credits I win!

C: 我现在就是大堂经理！
E: I AM the lobby manager!

C: 我没有兄弟姐妹…
E: I don't have any siblings...

C: （管不了那么多了，上去问问看吧。）
E: (Whatever. Let me approach them and ask them directly.)

C: 那两个人此刻或许正在梦境中展开调查…或许他们能来客串下救火队员？
E: Those two might be conducting an investigation in the Dreamscape right now... They can probably help out.

C: 哪有这么好用的迟到理由啊！
E: Well, that's a convenient excuse for bad time-keeping!

C: 嘿嘿嘿，我看它的广告也是这么说的。
E: Hehehe, I saw that advert, too!

C: 符太卜，你怎么回来了？
E: Diviner Fu, what brings you back here?

C: 不过，我倒是提前联系了青雀，让她来星槎海接我…哼，我看了看，她也不在这里，该回太卜司拿青雀是问了。
E: Although, I did contact Qingque in advance and tell her to come and meet me at Starskiff Haven... Hmph, I see she's nowhere to be seen. Looks like it's time to head back to the Divination Commission and see exactly what excuse she has this time.

C: 三月小姐，你真是太客气了，哈哈哈哈！
E: You are too kind, Miss March, hahaha!

C: 我确实也没有那么多感受，不过椒丘大夫说得太好了！说的就是我。
E: I hadn't, and you're right. But you're absolutely right, Master Jiaoqiu. That's exactly how I feel.

C: 既然这样说了，那就走吧，我们去桥上看看星槎。
E: Let's go then. We can go to the bridge and watch from there.

C: 要不，我们再去别处转转？
E: How about we go elsewhere for a walk?

C: 师傅曾经无数次提到自己参与改良的引擎也在这里量产，走进了千家万户。不过，他那引擎，在这一百年间，早就已经被淘汰，变成历史的旧款了。
E: Master Ryan mentioned countless times how he helped optimize an engine here that's been mass-produced here and sold all over the place. However, that engine became obsolete over the past century and has fallen to the annals of history.

C: 废弃的培养舱？
E: A trashed incubator?

C: 现在，记忆里莱恩老师的脸已经模糊不清了。「师傅的梦想」就像是心里面一处好的差不多的伤疤，为了不至于让我忘了疼，我隔一阵就撕挠一下。
E: But now, Master Ryan's face is like a blur to me. And my master's dream, it's like a thick old scar on my heart — an itch that I scratch every now and again, so that I'll never forget his memory.

C: 师徒的传承？
E: The passing down of knowledge?

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你，又让你奔波了一趟。我会把星槎完成的，等我消息。
E: {NICKNAME}, thanks for coming here. I'll tell you when I complete the starskiff.

C: 这不是胡闹吗？
E: Doesn't that sound ridiculous?

C: 自从我按照师傅的设计完成了这艘星槎之后，这星槎就一直出故障，根本就没有达到设计要求…你们要是感兴趣的话，我给你们演示一下？
E: Since I built the starskiff according to my master's design, the starskiff has malfunctioned a lot of times, and its quality isn't up to par... I'll give you a demonstration if you guys are interested.

C: 这玩意儿能坐进星槎驾驶舱？
E: Can it fit in the cockpit of the starskiff?

C: 没有人一开始是大师。
E: No one is born a master.

C: 互帮互助之事，哪里还有盈亏的计较，依本座看，我们是都赚了。
E: You shouldn't think about personal gains or losses when you're helping others. In my view, this is a win-win situation for us.

C: …不过我相信卢卡，同样的错误他不会犯两次的。所以回到刚才的提议，丫头——你就带{NICKNAME}去搏击俱乐部看看吧？
E: ...But I trust Luka not to make the same mistake again. So back to the original suggestion — are you good to take {NICKNAME} to the Fight Club, Seele?

C: 哦，你应该还没见过他吧？简而言之，那小子是下层区一流的格斗家，之前也一直在为「地火」办事，只是不在这个镇上。
E: Oh, you probably haven't met him yet. In short, he's a top-tier fighter in the Underworld. He was also doing work for Wildfire before, just not in this town.

C: 话说回来，你特意把我们揪到外面，是有什么话想说吗？
E: Anyway, now that you've dragged us out here, what did you wanna talk about?

C: 别说傻话，卢卡。不管你是出于什么用心，下次都别再干这种傻事了。
E: Don't be ridiculous, Luka. Still, whatever your motivation was, I hope you can find a different outlet for it.

C: 要是他打一开始就没打算把事挑明白，那为啥还非要拉上咱俩？不行，这也太奇怪了——我得跟着他，看看那家伙到底在打什么主意。
E: If he never intended to explain anything to us, why did he drag us along? No, this is too weird — I'm gonna follow him and see what he's up to.

C: 我正纳闷呢，怎么冠军赛结束这么久他还没来找我——来，快给我讲讲。
E: I was wondering why he didn't come and see me after the championship match ended. Come, tell me about it.

C: 别着急，跟着我就行了。先去找一个叫卡西迪的机械师吧，我之前已经跟他打过招呼了。走，这边！
E: Don't worry, just follow me. We need to find a mechanic called Cassidy first — I've hit him up before. This way!

C: ——没有受到裂界影响，对吧？你没记错，这里的裂口就是最近才被撕开的，昨天奥列格师傅才收到探子的消息。
E: ...Wasn't affected by the Fragmentum, right? You're not wrong. The fissure here only recently opened up. Master Oleg got the intel from our network just yesterday.

C: 这次试炼的最终目标，我几天前就已经定下了。你想啊，下层区还有比史瓦罗大佬更值得挑战的对手吗？
E: I set this as the final goal of my training a few days ago. Think about it — is there any Underworld opponent worth challenging more than Boss Svarog?

C: …虎克知道啦，刚才卢卡哥哥也是这么说的！
E: *sigh* Okayyyy... That's what Luka said too.

C: 我…不知怎的，我总感觉……
E: I... For some reason, I feel like...

C: （工具掉落的声音）
E: (The sound of tools clanking to the ground)

C: 喔，那就是…去不成罗浮啦。
E: Ah, so that means... we're not going to the Luofu.

C: 什么感慨，说来听听？
E: What memories? Care to spill the details?

C: 没办法，这就是无名客的宿命吧。
E: Such is the fate of us Nameless, I suppose.

C: 是是是，冤家宜解不宜结。不过，我打算先不去客栈…我要见见灵砂姐姐。她刚到罗浮，正需要人帮忙安顿呢。
E: Yeah, yeah, it's better to make friends than enemies, but I won't be heading to the inn just yet... I want to visit Lingsha. She just arrived in the Luofu and could use some help settling in.

C: 目送彦卿等人离去后……
E: After watching Yanqing and the others leave...

C: 好啊，谁想动这批货物，我斯科特就和谁拼命！不管我们运的东西是生物还是机械，都和你们没有关系！我要投诉天舶司的处理程序！
E: Oh, really? Fine! If anyone lays a finger on that shipment, they'll have me to deal with! It doesn't matter if it's mechanical or biological, it's none of your business! I'm filing a complaint against the Sky-Faring Commission's ridiculous regulations!

C: 公司和仙舟都是法治社会，得遵守办事流程啊！我身为公司雇员，也必须遵守公司的条令律法。要是破例让你们检查，那真是把天给捅塌了啊。
E: We both need to follow the regulations, because that's how the IPC and the Xianzhou operate, right? As an IPC worker, I have to abide by its regulations. If I make an exception and allow you to inspect the cargo, it'll spell disaster for me.

C: …剑，还你，你可得把你的剑看好了，免得下次又被人夺去。还有，这次没分出胜负，下次我会让你输得心服口服的。
E: ...Here's your sword. Keep it safe, or it might get taken away again. By the way, we haven't settled the score yet. I'll defeat you fair and square next time we fight.

C: 谢谢三月小姐的安慰。演武仪典召开在即，彦卿侥幸有资格能代表云骑军出战。
E: Thanks for the kind words, Miss March. The Wardance is coming up, and I've been chosen to represent the Cloud Knights in the ceremony.

C: 这些年来，你为联盟竭忠尽智。挫败塔拉萨的孽物，解去玉阙仙舟之围，摧毁丰饶民所唤来的妖星…历次大战中的种种，老朽依旧记得。
E: Over the years, you've served the Alliance with loyalty and wisdom. You've taken down abominations in Thalassa, rescued the Xianzhou Yuque from a siege, and destroyed the demonic planet summoned by the Denizens of Abundance... I still remember those battles vividly.

C: 怎么突然把我给牵扯进来了？我也没练过剑啊！零基础啊！学得会吗！不会到最后耻辱地被逐出师门吧！
E: Why am I being dragged into this all of a sudden? I've never practiced swordplay before! I'm a total newbie! You really think I can learn it? You'll probably realize I have no hope and give up on me, and that'd be sooo embarrassing!

C: 这位小朋友的筋骨脉络倒是…颇为别致。你也对剑术有兴趣吗？
E: Your talent is quite... unique. Are you also interested in swordplay?

C: 现在后悔还来得及吗？都怪我一时冲动。
E: Is it too late for regrets? I'm already regretting my impulsive decision.

C: 这人怎么跟小孩子较起劲来了。
E: Why is this guy suddenly getting all serious with kids?

C: 来吧！
E: Bring it on.

C: 唉…我明白，罗浮的孩子真是太苦了。那你有什么想说的，云璃小姐？
E: Hmm... I get it. Looks like all the kids on the Luofu live tough lives. So, how about you, Miss Yunli?

C: 末度大人已经准备妥当，我们的古老血脉能否重振，将在此一举……
E: Lord Mok Tok is ready. The revival of our ancient bloodline all hinges on this operation...

C: 接着，报告提及「药王秘传」魁首丹枢心怀不轨，与绝灭大君勾结，动用星核复苏了建木。
E: Let's move on to the next question. The report suggests that Dan Shu, the Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, colluded with the Lord Ravager and used the power of the Stellaron to resurrect the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 我跟随景元将军一同与幻胧交锋。她汲取了建木的力量，生成了一具难以消灭的肉体。也许打从一开始，她就是为此而来。
E: I was there, fighting Phantylia alongside General Jing Yuan, but she absorbed the power of the Ambrosial Arbor and gained an almost indestructible physical form. Perhaps that was her intention all along.

C: 你相信星核猎手的预言？
E: Do you actually believe in the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy?

C: 等等，幽囚狱也在鳞渊境里？
E: Wait, is The Shackling Prison inside the Scalegorge Waterscape, too?

C: 判官就你们姐妹俩是吧？
E: Are you and your sister the only judges here?

C: 这东西…发起狂来和步离人一样。
E: This thing... is going wild, just like a borisin.

C: 寒鸦小姐发现了什么？
E: What have you found, Miss Hanya?

C: 看不见的入侵者？这是什么意思？到底有多少阴谋掺和到这里来了？
E: Invisible intruders? What does that even mean? How many conspiracies are tangled up in this mess?

C: 真的吗？
E: Is that so?

C: 最好的结果是——
E: And the best-case scenario...

C: 哪边都不下。我在泰科铵看机动球赛时把信用点输了个精光。这次我决定不再寄希望靠概率游戏来完成「暴富」这一任务进程……
E: I'm betting on neither. I lost all my credits betting on Roboball games in Taikiyan. This time, I've decided not to rely on probability games to accomplish my target of "getting rich"...

C: 那些来来往往的游客，他们想要的只是欣赏一场精彩剑斗罢了。这样的比武，谁去都可以，又何必非得是我。
E: Those tourists just want to see some good sword fights. Anyone can participate in this kind of tournament. It doesn't have to be me.

C: 别太心急了。给你一顿饭时间，好好冷静下吧。
E: Take your time. Enjoy the meal and calm yourself.

C: …你是说，有人想要像这台机器所代表的那样，破解呼雷的秘密，学以致用？
E: ...Are you suggesting that there are people trying to understand Hoolay's secrets and use them for their own purposes, just like with this mech?

C: …步离人？在这儿？你认真的吗？
E: ...Borisin? Here? Are you serious?

C: 哦，这个地方视野不错，你是来这里观察竞锋舰的吧？
E: Well, this spot offers a great view. Are you here to keep an eye on the Skysplitter?

C: 难道迴星港被封锁了？
E: Is Stargazer Navalia on lockdown now?

C: 这是步离人最常用的狩猎战术。
E: This is the most common hunting tactic used by borisin.

C: 可你是个狐人？
E: But you're a foxian, right?

C: 可是…一旦呼雷制造的恐慌蔓延开来——
E: But... if Hoolay succeeds in getting this panic to spread—

C: 谁能想到…如此惊人的力量竟然掌握在一个狐人战奴的手里。
E: Who could have imagined... that such astonishing strength would lie in the hands of a foxian war slave...

C: 呼雷…你的「宣战」计划完蛋了。
E: Hoolay... your "declaration of war" is over.

C: 云骑，备战！
E: Cloud Knights, prepare for battle!

C: 呼雷真的是被我们打败的吗？
E: Was it really us who defeated Hoolay?

C: （暂时等候）
E: (Wait for a moment)

C: 事情是这样的……
E: So here's what happened...

C: 蒂索克二世的身影消失了。
E: Tizocic II disappears.

C: 别跑，我…我还能打！
E: Don't run. I... I can still fight!

C: 朕的脑子好得很，没有忘过任何事，也不会遗忘任何事！
E: My memory's pretty good — I've never forgotten anything, nor will I!

C: 请吧，「琳儿玛情报部长」！
E: A toast, Spymaster Lenamar!

C: 你想因愚忠而死吗？还是要鼓起勇气，做一次正确的事？
E: You wish to die for blind loyalty? Or will you muster your courage and do the right thing for once?

C: 朕在匹诺康尼…成为了一个远近闻名的「好人」。
E: In Penacony... I became a renowned "kind soul."

C: 如果留存在这里的善意无人承继，那很快就会消失，被人忽视、被人遗忘、被人践踏。
E: If the remaining kindness here is not inherited, it will soon disappear. It will be neglected, forgotten and trampled on by people.

C: …别这么做，莫伊拉。我喜欢这孩子，你能放过{F#她}{M#他}一回吗？看在我的份上，你知道我最排斥暴力。
E: ...Please, Moira. I like this kid. Could you let {F#her}{M#him} off the hook this time? Please do it for my sake. You know how I detest violence.

C: 对——他以前的确是「天才俱乐部」的一员。
E: Right... He was indeed a member of the Genius Society back then.

C: 能和你一并出行是我的荣幸！
E: It's my honor to travel with you!

C: 螺丝咕姆…他在哪儿？他答应过我…他说过他会帮助……
E: Screwllum... Where's he? He promised... he would help me...

C: …当然了，查。可别低估了技术研发部，我们或许没有你的天才头脑，但绝对不缺「远见」。
E: ...Of course, Chad. Don't ever underestimate the Technology Department. We might not be geniuses like you, but we're plenty "visionary."

C: 看吧，查…这就是你的问题，你总把自己的天赋和才能视作理所应当。你完全不知道还有一种人，像我这样的人——
E: Look, Chad... This is your problem. You always take your gifts and talents for granted, and you have no idea there are people like me...

C: 至于我所要经受的任何事…那都是我应得的。人总要为自己的行为负责，承担代价也是必要的一环……
E: As for whatever I'll be going through, I deserve it. Everyone must be accountable for their actions, and facing the consequences is part and parcel of the process...

C: 眼前的查德威克博士大概已经年过古稀——他的形象与你们初遇时相比已经几无差别。
E: The Dr. Chadwick in front of you is at an advanced age. He looks very similar to how he was when you first met him.

C: 黑…塔……
E: Her... ta...

C: 真让人火大啊…明明只是个只有几十年寿命的普通人，居然能取得这么令人瞠目结舌的成就。
E: It's absolutely infuriating... He was nothing more than an ordinary person with a lifespan of just a few decades, yet he managed to achieve such astonishing feats.

C: 杜德利发出了笑声，没有正面回应。他当然明白，毕竟站在他身边的是一位「天才」。
E: Dudley laughs out loud instead of fielding a response. Of course he knows that: It is a genius who stands before him.

C: 一边设计建筑，一边钻研难搞的忆质，还要被梦里的怪物追着跑…「白日梦酒店」好不容易开工，结果又被这小孩儿耽误进度！
E: Designing a structure, studying how to work with this finicky memoria, and being hunted by in-dream monsters... Work on the Reverie has finally started, only to have this child impeding our progress once again!

C: …为、为什么？我不明白，我不是刚刚犯了错……
E: ...Wh—Why? I don't understand. I did something wrong...

C: 谢谢你，无名客。
E: Thank you, Nameless.

C: …费歇尔果然没骗我，他真的将这里变成了一首诗。
E: ...Fischer didn't lie to me. He really turned this place into a poem.

C: …不管怎么说，能再见他们一次，还是挺好的。
E: ...No matter what, it was great to be able to see them again.

C: 放弃抵抗！否则我们就不客气了！
E: Do not resist! Or you'll be sorry!

C: （流梦礁…这里就是奥尔拉最后建起的，最坚固的「庇护所」。）
E: (Dreamflux Reef... This is the safe haven that Orla raised — the last, and the sturdiest.)

C: （原来折纸小鸟的原型就是隐夜鸫…湛蓝爵士也曾是「家族」的筑梦师吗？）
E: (So the origami bird's original form is a nightingale... Was Dr. Blues also once The Family's Dreamweaver?)

C: 胡说！我、我只是轻轻摸了一把…谁知道你们这儿的大地兽胆子这么小啊。
E: Slander! I—I only petted it lightly... Who knew your dromas would be so timid?

C: 外邦人？
E: Outlander?

C: 作为大地兽的庇护主，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}最为人知的特性是什么？
E: As the guardian of these dromases, what is the most commonly known characteristic of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}?

C: 嗯，这也是很多普通人的真实看法，而城邦的命运就是掌握在这些人手上的。
E: Yes, this is how most ordinary people truly feel, and the fate of the city lies in the hands of those who think like that.

C: 是你啊，帕拉滕。我要先听好消息。
E: Oh, it's you, Palaten. I will have the good news first.

C: 唉…真是人间惨剧啊。
E: *sigh* ...Such is the tragedy of life.

C: 不是说要请{F#她}{M#他}吃饭来着吗？别忘了算我一个。
E: Didn't you say you were going to treat {F#her}{M#him} to a meal? Don't forget my share.

C: 说不定什么时候，强与弱的身份就会发生转换，我们也会需要他们的帮助…而且，刻法勒的伟大之处，不正是在于替众人背负世界吗。
E: Who knows when the roles of the strong and weak will be reversed? When we will also need their help? Besides, isn't Kephale's majesty in bearing the burdens of the world for the people?

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 我要了。
E: I'll take it.

C: 傻孩子，这里比烤苹果派好吃的东西有许多，何必惦记那玩意。
E: Silly child, there's plenty of food more delicious than baked apple pie in here. Why fuss over a pie?

C: 有没有想过药是哪来的？
E: You ever thought about how the medicine got there?

C: 现在你有何打算？
E: What're you going to do now?

C: 所以，外邦人其实并不存在——外邦是哪个邦？摆在我们面前的，只有要不要帮助一群需要帮助的人而已。
E: Which is why, in reality, outlanders don't exist — which city do they hail from? The question posed before us is merely about whether we want to help a group of people who need it.

C: 要我说，就应该直接处死苏克提瑞斯，这样才能威慑潜在的犯罪分子。
E: If it were up to me, I would have Soctires executed. That'll set an example for other potential criminals.

C: 不要搞错了敌人的身份。
E: Do not mistake the enemy's identity.

C: 如果不考虑眼前的问题，圣城根本走不到未来。你只是在用童话般的描述画饼罢了。
E: If we do not consider the issues at hand, the holy city will not see a future. You're just painting a pretty picture no different from a fairy tale.

C: 不知不觉间，你已经代替了拉莱德的控方代表之位，但并没有获得多数人的支持。
E: Before you realize it, you've replaced Liluder as the prosecutor, but failed to gather the support of the majority.

C: 这里有许多食品店，价钱和质量都有区别。该选哪个呢……
E: There are many food stalls here, varying in price and quality. Which one to choose...

C: 对对对，我是帕里斯。
E: That's right. I'm Paris!

C: 阿卡迪亚？客人，你真是位阅历不浅的读者，这可是古老年代的冒险故事最爱引用的设定——<color=#dbc291ff>墨涅塔庇护的黄金之乡</color>！
E: Arcadia? Dear customer, I see you must be a most experienced reader. Arcadia is a common setting people love to use in ancient adventure stories... It's <color=#dbc291ff>the Golden Land under the protection of Mnestia</color>!

C: 她能吃消耗品吗？
E: Can she take consumables?

C: 别推辞了，梅塔涅拉婆婆平时可抠门得很。
E: You must not refuse her generosity. Granny Metanella is normally extremely stingy.

C: 帕里斯，你先给我等等！
E: Paris, you wait right there.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 这是你的义务。
E: This is your duty.

C: 我希望能与她一同离开，哪怕我们死在路上，也能用浪漫的翅膀逃离塞纳托斯的手掌，化作一对相伴的飞蝶飞向那个地方。
E: I want to leave with her. Even if we die on our path, we can fly into the hands of Thanatos together on the wings of romance. We can become butterflies and fly to that place together.

C: 与其守株待兔，不如主动出击。去问问周围的市民，有没有帕西提亚的线索吧。
E: Rather than waiting around, why not catch the early worm? Ask around for Pasithea's sightings.

C: 这位外邦的朋友，看你在那儿等了许久，想必也是来向传谕梦母寻求谕示的吧？
E: Outlander friend, I see you've been waiting long. You must be seeking a prophecy from the Oracle Dreammother?

C: 我自以为，靠着梦里的谕示，不会有任何人找到这里，可还是漏掉了命运之外的访客。
E: I've always thought that no one will find this place due to the guidance from my dream's prophecy, but it seems like it overlooked the visitor beyond destiny.

C: 那个幽灵——{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属。
E: That spirit... That {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin.

C: 只要把圣女牢牢地掌控在手里，像笼子里的小鸟，命运泰坦究竟谕示了什么，还不都归我们来解释？
E: As long as we have the Holy Maiden in the palm of our hand like a bird in a cage, whatever the Fate Titans have truly foretold is left for us to interpret, isn't it?

C: …自然，命运会庇佑我们。
E: ...Naturally, destiny will protect us.

C: 现在你说，我们做的一切全都是徒劳？
E: Now you're telling me that everything we did was for naught?

C: 我知道这个要求很任性，在那么危险的地方，还要你带着我这么一个累赘。但…我必须要亲自面对它。
E: I understand this is a selfish request — to carry a burden like me through such perilous ground. But... I must witness it myself.

C: 你小心搀扶着帕西提亚，走走停停，终于到了天外之音启示的地点。
E: You carefully support Pasithea, stopping and starting along the way, until finally reaching the location revealed by the voice from beyond the sky.

C: 写得真不错。这样一来，我就是你第一本独家签售的拥有者了。
E: Well written indeed. This makes me the first owner of your exclusively signed copy.

C: 翁法罗斯没有消失！
E: Amphoreus hasn't disappeared!

C: 然后，我们可以和翁法罗斯签一份和仙舟一样的…贸易决定！
E: Then, we can sign a trade... adornment with the Amphoreans, just like we did with Xianzhou!

C: 今日我们不说那哀地里亚的渡冥仙子，且说那「背芒灵官迈德漠斯」。这迈德漠斯，诨名万敌。万敌二字，乃万众难敌之万敌，万人不敌之万敌！
E: Yet today we shall not speak of the Psychopomp of Aidonia, but of "Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden," and bears the byname Mydei. The name Mydei that signifies "a foe that no multitude could withstand," as well as "a foe whom none among ten thousand could overcome!"

C: 那场对抗「毁灭」的征程，还有它背后的事迹，应当被更多人知晓。
E: The journey against the Destruction, and the stories behind it, should be known by more people.

C: 就算结果不如预期，我也可以让各位英雄在创世涡心跳一段踢踏舞，同样能收获巨大的成功。
E: Even if the results aren't what we expected, I can still have the heroes tap dance in the Vortex of Genesis. That'll be just as big a success.

C: 哦，说来听听？
E: Oh? Tell me about it.

C: 嗯，听起来有模有样。然后呢？
E: Hmm, sounds decent. Then?

C: 你平时都做些什么？
E: What do you usually get up to around here?

C: {M#老哥}{F#姐妹}，咱就是说，最近银河热议的那个新闻看了没有？就那个说拍到罕见生物的。
E: AYO {M#GigaChad}{F#GigaChadette}, have you checked out that trending news everyone in the cosmos has been going on about? Something about rare creature photos and whatnot.

C: 哇，你吓我一跳！干嘛偷听人家讲话啦！
E: Wow, you scared the heck outta me! What are you doing, eavesdropping on us?

C: 我埃美丽说话就是这个习惯，没人能改得了！
E: I'm Emily. This is the way I talk, and nobody is gonna change that!

C: 我想不到更好的了。
E: I can't think of anything better.

C: 错误编号<unbreak>00019</unbreak>，固件无法识别，远程连接已断开，请稍后重试。
E: Error code <unbreak>00019</unbreak>. Unable to recognize firmware. Remote connection cannot be established. Please try again later.

C: 没有更多想了解的。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 不行不行，实验结果还没出来呢，这怎么睡得着？
E: No no no. The experiment isn't done yet. How can I possibly sleep?

C: 你看，在空间站的灯光下，蓝色好像有点死板，棕色又显得有点沉闷。
E: Look, the lights in the space station make blue look rigid, and make brown look dull.

C: 以我自身的气质和镜头感，摄影师应该不需要太高的造诣就能捕捉到颇具风采的画面。
E: With my charisma and photogenic face, the photo will come out great even if the photographer is not an expert.

C: 罗希不想和你做朋友…
E: Rossy doesn't want to be your friend...

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: 摄影需要故事方能吸引人的眼球，而站在你眼前的恰巧是一个有故事的男人——你要做的就是把我散发魅力的瞬间捕捉下来。
E: A photo needs a story to attract attention, and you're looking at a man full of stories. All you have to do is capture the moment when I exude charm.

C: 这些纸团够了吗？
E: Are these enough?

C: 别扯闲天啦，时间不等人，万一把任务搞砸了可就没法交差咯。
E: Enough chitchat. We're losing the daylight. We can't mess this up.

C: 歌蒂，你的快递。
E: Gertie, your package.

C: 呼…呼噜…呼噜……
E: *snore*

C: 哎哟喂…我的头好晕……
E: Oh my, my head is so dizzy...

C: 这么做确实太儿戏了。
E: True... It doesn't sound very appropriate.

C: 有了，我想到一个好办法！
E: Yes, I have a good idea!

C: 还、还有这么凑巧的好事？年、年轻人，走，我们快去看看情况吧！
E: Wh—what a great opportunity! {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, let's go and take a look!

C: 他的家人有那么势利眼吗？
E: Is his family that judgmental?

C: 他啊，性格一直都是这么别扭，总是会找理由跟自己过不去。他在信上写的那些事迹肯定不是他的亲身经历，这点我还是能分辨出来的。
E: He's always been quite stubborn and too hard on himself. I can tell that the things he wrote about in the letter aren't really what he has done.

C: 当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
E: Sure! One moment, please.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 有点难度，得加钱。
E: It's tough. Gotta spend more.

C: 你没说还要答题…
E: You never said there was a question to answer...

C: 「一样多」，答案是「一样多」！早知道你这么没常识，我就……
E: "The same"! They're the same! If I knew you lacked such basic knowledge from the start, why I'd...

C: 我可没参与这论文…
E: Don't drag me into this. I had nothing to do with your paper.

C: 还是别抱太大希望吧。
E: I wouldn't pin my hopes on it.

C: 既然做好准备了，那就开始答题吧。
E: If you're ready, then let's begin.

C: 因为这样才能尽可能多地让车辆瘫痪。犯人是不满他们豪车列队上街的暴发户行为……
E: Because that's the best way to cripple as many vehicles as possible. These crooks are angry about all the nouveau riche prancing around in their fancy lux cars...

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，看来你也只能到此为止了啊！
E: Hahaha! Looks like this is as far as you come, then!

C: 第三十一天。
E: Day thirty-one.

C: 别忘了——要找的人是罗希，他平时闲得没事就爱在宾馆大堂转悠…你应该可以轻松找到他。
E: Don't forget — You are looking for Rossy, who likes to wander around in the hotel lobby whenever he has time... You should be able to find him easily.

C: 哎呦喂，谢天谢地！可算是有个自己人了……
E: Oh, thank goodness! Finally, someone on my side...

C: 「正当权益会社——会员 艾格尼斯 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
E: "Agnes, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Agnes if you are interested in offering your help!"

C: 没错，这和「会社」的价值观是不冲突的——「正当权益会社」还是做了它该做的事，没毛病吧？
E: There is no conflict between my job and the mission of the Society. The Rightful Rights Society is still doing its thing.

C: 我在广场上经常一站就是一天，有时候到很晚才回去。结果，我家女儿就不乐意了，非说我不愿意陪她玩；其他家人也怀疑我在外面做些不三不四的事……
E: Sometimes I stay out in the Plaza all day and only get home late at night. My daughter got upset and said I don't want to play with her, and my family also thinks I'm doing some shady business out here...

C: 哟，你可算是到了。没想到我比你还快呢。
E: Ahh, you're finally here. Didn't realize I'd be even faster than you.

C: 在相册中出现的内容无一例外，全都是一对恩爱的年轻夫妻与惹人怜爱的幼童，只是照片的构图与人物姿势有些微妙的差距。
E: All the images in the album show a loving young couple and an adorable child. The only differences between the images are composition and people's pose.

C: 过去的贝洛伯格？意思是…你是从未来来的？不，不对……
E: This is the Belobog of the past? You mean, you're from the future? No, that's not right...

C: 那我为啥还能和你说话呢？难不成你也……
E: Then how come I can still talk to you? Are you also...

C: 怎么了，你想让我吃这个？这炒饭看着有点不妙啊，你看这颜色…呃，你非要我吃了这个不成——
E: What, you want me to eat this? This fried rice looks a bit nasty... Just look at this color. Um, you really want me to eat it...?

C: 难道是我舌头不灵了？咋回事，我不明白啊……
E: Did something happen to my tongue? What's going on? I don't get it...

C: 哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
E: Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?

C: 听说你找我帮忙巡逻。
E: I hear you needed me for a patrol?

C: 如果说波月古海上真的存在落难者，那落难者肯定是在躲着搜查队…所以，根据我的经验来看，应该这是有人在整蛊。
E: If there really is a castaway in the Lunarescent Depths, then they must be actively hiding from the search teams... My experience tells me that this is someone playing a trick.

C: 听说你找我帮忙巡逻。
E: I hear you needed me for a patrol?

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: 怎么样？好喝吗？感觉如何？
E: How does it taste? Do you like it?

C: 对于奥赫玛来说，现实更接近于哪一种呢？
E: Which one is closer to Okhema's reality?

C: 或许在泰坦的眼中，我们这些在浴场里来来往往的身影，和那些大地兽也没什么不同。
E: Perhaps in the Titans' eyes, our shuffling figures in the baths are no different from those frolicking dromases.

C: 远处的巨石像
E: Distant Stone Statue

C: 铸魂区
E: Soul-Forging Zone

C: 庄严的寂静中再无一语，火山的心脏自此也再未跳动。
E: No words ever break the solemn silence, and the volcano's heart beats no more.

C: 那你恐怕要失望了，英雄。这不是靠锻炼——
E: I fear you will be disappointed, hero. This is not due to my training...

C: 你记住了「集市商贩的吆喝声与矛盾的最强对决」
E: You remembered "The City Merchants' Clamoring and a Duel Between the Strongest Spear and Shield"

C: 静立的石像仿佛披着一层薄纱，周围点缀着发光的昆虫与幽蓝色的花朵。这景象莫名让人想起墨涅塔化蝶的传说。
E: The silent statue seems shrouded in a delicate veil, surrounded by glowing insects and bluish flowers. The scene inexplicably brings to mind Mnestia's legend of transforming into butterflies.

C: …奇幻点的更好？
E: ...Maybe a tad more fantasy?

C: …我明白你的意思，莫忒丝。但是命运三相殿的神谕绝不能传递绝望。你知道，这是为了雅努萨波利斯。
E: ...I understand what you are saying, Mortis. However, the Temple of the Three Fates cannot spread despair. You know that I must act for the sake of Janusopolis.

C: 黄金裔。
E: The Chrysos Heir.

C: 那似乎是一座高塔，上面有几位身穿黑袍的占星师在此驻足。他们脚边摆放着沙漏与星盘，低声交谈着什么。
E: It appears to be a towering structure, where several black-robed astrologers are gathered. Hourglasses and star charts lie at their feet as they converse in hushed voices.

C: 忽然之间，某道灵光予以你启迪，你看见那些纹路竟然组合出——{NICKNAME}。
E: Suddenly, a spark of revelation strikes — you see the patterns rearrange into the name {NICKNAME}.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 忽然之间，周遭的一切都安静了下来，世界很近，却又好像离你很远。
E: Suddenly, everything around you goes silent. The world feels so close, yet it's as if it's miles away.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Enter the horse's stomach)

C: 刚刚有个叔叔你认识吗？
E: Did you know that man here just now?

C: 木马安安静静地伫立在这里。或许，你错过了「早些时候」与它的交流，以及一个「约定」。
E: The wooden horse stands there, silent. Maybe you missed your chance to speak to it "earlier"... and the "promise" that came with it.

C: 望着涡心闪烁的群星，你想起那位正支撑着天穹的医者。
E: Looking at the stars shining in the center of the vortex, you think of the healer who is currently supporting the sky dome.

C: 无论在哪个世界，总有人秉持着守护的志愿，憧憬即将到来的明天。
E: No matter the world, there are always those who uphold a will to protect others, dreaming of the tomorrow that's yet to come.

C: 你弯下腰，在门上敲了两下——另一头也传来两下敲击声，似乎是为了表达抗议。
E: You crouch down and knock twice. Two knocks echo back from the other side, like someone's protesting against what you do.

C: 钻进木马的肚子里去！
E: Enter the horse's stomach!

C: 还有别的要求吗？
E: Anything else you'd like?

C: 别停下你的脚步，我不记得我曾教予你「软弱」。
E: Don't stop moving forward. I don't remember ever teaching you to be "weak."

C: …母亲。可我们…都未曾见过一面……
E: ...Mother... but we... never met...

C: …海瑟音，你可还记得我们初遇时的场景？
E: ...Hysilens, do you remember how we first met?

C: 在我离去后，这冰冷而昏暗的海便仅余你一人了。在那之后，或许又是千年的孤独守望…海瑟音，你会怎么做呢？
E: After my departure, you will be the only one left in this cold and dark sea. What comes after might be another thousand years of solitude and vigil... What will you do, Hysilens?

C: 你猜猜？「无漏净子」的无漏，说不定也是算无遗漏的无漏？
E: What do you think? The "Anāsrava" in "Pure Child of Anāsrava" might actually mean "without omission"?

C: 你的旅程异常顺利。毕竟，逐火之旅的众人因一道<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯</color>的神谕相信了「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯……
E: Your journey has been exceptionally smooth. After all, the people of the Flame-Chase Journey believed in a prophecy of <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx</color>, and were convinced a "Deliverer from beyond the sky" would descend upon Amphoreus...

C: 你突然感到，从未如此迫切地想念{RUBY_B#星穹列车}家{RUBY_E#}，还有三月七的声音。
E: Suddenly, you feel an aching longing for your {RUBY_B#Astral Express}home{RUBY_E#}, and for March 7th's voice.

C: 想要成为人类…
E: I want to be a human...

C: 好想到那里去…
E: I really want to go there...

C: 也许是时候了…
E: Maybe it's time...

C: 温暖的…气息…
E: A warm... presence...

C: 你靠近镜子，看见镜中一道身影慢慢显现——却一点也不像你。镜子里是一个戴着兜帽的女孩，脸部被古怪的面罩遮挡，看不清她的样子。
E: You approach the mirror and see a figure slowly emerging in it — but it doesn't look like you at all. In the mirror is a girl in a hood, her face hidden by a strange mask, making it impossible to make out her appearance.

C: 这是专为保存你的记忆而创造的「忘却之庭」。我们希望你能够定期来到这里，重新唤起失落的回忆。忆庭将从中取走想要的，然后给予你回报——以物质和光锥的形式。
E: This is the Forgotten Hall created specially to store your memories. We hope that you can visit this place regularly to rekindle your lost memories. The Garden of Recollection will extract the memories they want and give you something in return — in the form of matter and Light Cones.

C: 没有肉身，没有肾上腺素、后叶催产素、多巴胺和其他让人喜怒哀乐的东西。这也给了我一种更中立的角度去审视人类的思想和欲求。可以说，我离自由意志更近一步了。
E: Without a material body, I don't have adrenaline, oxytocin, dopamine, or anything that causes different emotions in people. This allows me to judge human thought and desire with an even more neutral position. You can say that I'm another step closer to having free will.

C: 只要本「副官」一声令下，随时可以开始。
E: As long as I give the order, it can start at any time.

C: 我要去找少校制定训练计划了。我的下一个目标是当上队长。
E: I'm off to make a training plan with the major. My next goal is to make it to captain.

C: 没、没问题，您慢慢来。前路艰险，可得做好万全准备再出发。
E: N—No problem, take your time. It's dangerous ahead. Make sure you're completely prepared before you set out.

C: （同步模式就是让你连接我的思维信号，我们通过信标交流，快试试。）
E: (You can connect to my thought signal with sync mode. We can communicate via the beacon. Give it a try.)

C: 熟悉的场景……
E: Feeling déjà vu...

C: （你这家伙撒谎成性，我们今天就要来会会你！）
E: (Lying is second nature to this guy. Today we're going to show him who's boss!)

C: 呃？这和我说的话有什么相干吗？
E: Huh? What does this have to do with what I said?

C: 汇报大家的表现？阮•梅又没给你们下达命令，需要汇报什么？一眼假！
E: Report everyone's performance? Ruan Mei never gave anyone orders. What is there to report? Lies!

C: （滑铲？我…我做不到啊……）
E: (Sliding tackle? I... I can't do it...)

C: 真的吗？那等下讲故事的时候，人家可是会听得很认真的！
E: Really? Then when it's time for the story, I'll listen super seriously!

C: 你知道吗？奥赫玛到处都是迈德漠斯的传闻，这个人身上充满了故事…「王子」都是这样的吗？
E: Did you know that Okhema is full of stories about Mydeimos? He's just bursting with tales... are all "princes" like that?

C: 人家也很好奇！不死之身实在是很难解释呢，要是他的手臂不小心掉了下来…难道会变成「不死的手臂」吗？
E: Me too! It's really hard to imagine what an undying body is like. If his arm accidentally fell off... would it become an "immortal arm"?

C: 休息日万岁！
E: Praise be to days of rest!

C: 这么说来，{NICKNAME}会在意回忆的真实性吗？你想哦，一段记忆被反复回想，肯定会逐渐朦胧，或是被美化…总之，变得很不一样。
E: So, {NICKNAME}, do you care about how true a memory is? Think about it — when you recall something over and over again, over time, it's bound to become blurry or get idealized... Basically, it changes.

C: 毛茸茸？
E: Fluffy?

C: 这样呀，辛苦了呢。人家都说，摸摸毛茸茸的东西就会变轻松，来试试看吧！
E: I see, it's been a rough day. If you pet something fluffy, it'll help you feel lighter. That's what people say. Want to give it a try?

C: 不多聊了，我回去忙我的工作了。你要小心啊！
E: Alright, enough chit-chat. I'm going back to my work. You take care!

C: 接收指令: 第<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>步，向前
E: Order Received: Step <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, Forward

C: 发现障碍！
E: Obstacle detected!

C: …光临！
E: Thank you for stopping by!

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do this!

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 很好，接下来还有一个阵法要算，走吧。
E: Great, there's another matrix to operate. Let's get moving.

C: 下次可以不用问，直接开始。
E: You don't need to ask next time. Just start.

C: 你知道吗？其实我也很棒棒。
E: You know what? I'm pretty awesome too.

C: 等我处理完，我会给你准备一份惊喜的，到时候记得来找我喔，好心人！
E: Once I've finished, I'll have a surprise for you. Be sure to come and see me, kind one!

C: 我想，除了你也没有人会玩新的一轮谜题了。所以，请你一定要把测试版的内容玩完啊！
E: Thus, I doubt anyone besides yourself will be playing the new round of puzzles. So, please make sure you complete the beta!

C: 嗯…有位织者无畏亦或无知，竟主动向黑潮发起了挑战。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>残留着黑潮影响的桥上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver, undaunted and unwitting, has issued a challenge to the black tide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located <color=#dbc291ff>on a bridge mired in black tide remnants</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 奇怪……
E: This is odd...

C: 嗯…有位织者懂得许多隐秘故事。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>掘石场的平台边缘</color>，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who knows many hidden stories. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the Excavation Ground</color>. Go there to seek them.

C: 错了！——答案就摆在荣耀的平台之上喀。
E: Wrong! The answer lies above the stage of glory, crrk.
Nine flames.

C: 我怎么知道？
E: How would I know?

C: 桀桀桀桀，看您的反应，可比偷宝箱有趣一万倍！宝箱就当您和我演这出戏的谢礼吧，回头见！
E: Hehehehe! That reaction of yours is a million times more thrilling than stealing some chest! Take it as a thank you for taking part in this little performance with me. See ya!

C: 你…你！你这个冷酷无情的人！这种滥用权能的行径，着实让人不齿！
E: You... You! You are heartless and cruel! Such abuse of power is truly revolting!

C: 桀桀桀，财物只是最庸俗的目标。可偷的东西还很多…记忆、智慧、乃至身份。
E: Crrkrrkk... material wealth is a most trite goal. There are many things to steal... Memories, wisdom, even status.

C: 不过这倒也好…这样的你，也许反而是个合格的玩伴？
E: Although... perhaps that spark of yours makes you worth keeping around.

C: 过奖过奖……
E: You flatter me...

C: 啧啧，你这老伙计可真无趣。
E: Tsk, you're no fun at all, old buddy.

C: 咳咳，是你啊。巴特鲁斯说过，你是它的好朋友…原来如此。
E: Ahem, it's you. Bartholos has spoken of you as its good friend... Now I understand.

C: 我是巴特鲁斯吗？我不是巴特鲁斯吗？我也会和你玩诡计游戏，所以我是巴特鲁斯。但巴特鲁斯现在很忙，实在没有时间玩游戏，所以我不是巴特鲁斯。
E: Am I Bartholos? Or am I not? I play tricks like Bartholos, so I am Bartholos. But Bartholos is too busy for games right now, so I am not Bartholos.

C: 这我可不知道，我还想问你呢。那家伙平常总愿意亲力亲为，像这样分出我来替它做游戏还真的少见。
E: I wish I knew — I was going to ask you the same thing. It normally likes doing things itself, so making me to play games in its stead is pretty rare.

C: 可那「策划」不似泰坦，不行保境安民、乐善好施之举，反倒一味安排吾等刁难客人、将善缘恶戏……
E: But unlike Titans, these "Developers" don't safeguard realms or perform good deeds — they merely orchestrate our harassment of guests and corrupt good intentions into cruel jokes...

C: 哎呀，救世的大盗，你可要加油啊…我和这盆里的醉鬼，都已经是前世的亡灵，帮不到你什么忙……
E: Ah, great thief of Deliverance, best of luck out there... Me and the drunkard in this basin are but spirits of the previous era. We can't help much now...

C: 那事不宜迟…
E: Then let's not waste any time...

C: 嗯？所以到底什么是真金？那当然是巴特鲁斯也没法从你心里偷走的「真正的记忆」啦！
