E: What gems, you ask? Those "authentic memories" that even I, Bartholos, can't possibly steal from your heart!

C: 好了…在这里嘀嘀咕咕太久难免引人生疑——我们下次还是在传信石版上接头吧！溜了溜了，在刻法勒广场上见面的时候，可别说我们聊过这个神秘话题啊！
E: Anyway, people might start suspecting us if we stay here any longer. Let's talk on teleslate next time! Don't mention this conversation when I see you in Kephale Plaza!

C: 辅祭，把这石板拿去交给委托人吧，她就在楼下。
E: Acolyte, take this slate to the client. She's just downstairs.

C: 迷津已经展露。去溯寻吧，辅祭，我会记录下推演的结果。
E: The Maze has been revealed. Go trace it, acolyte. I'll record the results of the divination.

C: 迷津隆隆作响，但……
E: The Maze groans deeply, but...

C: 事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
E: No time to waste! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket!

C: 对不起，阿普列尤斯老师…我太害怕了。害怕面对黑潮，害怕直面死亡…可现在，就像你们一样，这一天还是来到了我的头上。
E: I'm sorry, Mr. Apuleius... I was scared. Scared of the black tide. Scared of death. But now, just like you... my time has come.

C: 吕枯耳戈斯元老把秘术锁传授给元老院后，他们也会用火种匣寄存些不便透露给外界的私人物品，这大概也是其中之一。
E: After Elder Lycurgus taught the art of arcane seals to the Council of Elders, they also began storing personal belongings in the Coreflame Caskets — items they preferred to keep hidden from the outside world. This is likely one of them.

C: 时间已经不多了…属于我的时间。
E: Because... my time is almost up.

C: 哈哈。那就…借您吉言。
E: Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.

C: 在下略懂医术，不妨让我试试能否医治姑娘的伤势。
E: I happen to have some medical knowledge — perhaps I can treat the young lady's injuries.

C: 我把那两个小朋友预加载进来了，{NICKNAME}，不用孤军作战啦。我人不错吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, I pre-loaded those two kids so you don't have to fight alone. How very kind of me, no?

C: 你的肚脐眼被钩子拽了一下，整个人翻了个跟头：睁开眼睛时，你已经身处黑塔的办公室中。第一次「模拟宇宙」的体验到此结束。
E: It feels like a hook pulled at your belly button and your entire body tumbled in a circle. When you open your eyes, you're already back in Herta's office. Your first experience of the Simulated Universe had ended.

C: 要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。
E: You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.

C: 呃，这个嘛……我的信用点多到花不完，你真的想要也行，但说实话，那玩意不过是公司随手打的一串数字而已。
E: Oh, well... If you want, I am sure I can arrange something. I have more credits than I know what to do with. But honestly, it's just a bunch of numbers the IPC typed up.

C: 祂身边发出巨大的轰鸣——祂真的在<color=#dbc291ff>警告</color>你，接着，祂就在你眼前消失了。
E: There is a huge roar around THEM – this is a <color=#dbc291ff>warning</color> for you. Then, THEY disappear before your eyes.

C: 真的好痛啊。
E: It really hurts.

C: 「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」黑塔叹气。
E: "Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun." Herta sighs.

C: 你什么时候商量的？
E: When did you chat with them?

C: 你常挂在嘴边的斯蒂芬是谁？
E: Who's this Stephen you keep going on about?

C: 说什么呢，我们的目标是不会变的。现在快去准备。
E: What are you talking about? Our goals haven't changed. Now run off and get ready.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「只是个说法，不用在意。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"It's just a manner of speech. Don't think about it too much."</color>

C: 「忘了告诉你，<color=#dbc291ff>岚在这时还没出现</color>。」黑塔开始拨自己头上的花，一片一片地扯，「『繁育』陨落是很久以前的事，远早于岚的诞生。」
E: "I've forgotten to tell you that <color=#dbc291ff>Lan hadn't emerged at this period</color>." Herta starts plucking out the flowers on her head one by one as she continues, "The fall of the Propagation took place a long time ago. It was way earlier than Lan's birth."

C: 出于爱心，你把它狠狠地埋了起来。
E: Out of love, you harden your heart and bury it.

C: 「真的吗？」黑塔的嘴角忍不住抽搐了几下，你分不清她在憋笑还是表达惊诧，「你还真是……」
E: "Really?" Herta's lips curl into a mysterious expression, leaving you uncertain whether she was suppressing a laugh or expressing surprise. "Well, this is really..."

C: 「至于模拟的机器头么，不知道祂……」
E: "As for the simulated Droidhead, I wonder if THEY..."

C: 倏忽间，祂到来——祂意欲将「时刻」的概念分解，七彩的光辉像跃动的星屑，切割你的感官——可你知道，一切已然确定：这是祂的第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
E: All of a sudden, THEY arrive, intending to shatter the concept of "Instants." The iridescent radiance is gnawing at your senses like dancing stardust, but you understand that everything is certain — this is THEIR third "Instant," and #27 Rubert is dead.

C: 接着，你感受到祂——祂古老的*威严*拨乱反正，不多不少、不偏不倚——只影响了一点点手术刀刺入机械胸膛的*角度*——你很清楚：这是祂的第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
E: Next, you sense THEIR presence. With THEIR ancient dominance, THEY make things right with utmost precision and no deviation, only slightly affecting the angle at which the robot's chest is incised with a scalpel. You understand that this is THEIR third moment, and #27 Rubert is dead.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 原本，「技术部」的德•维恩比起法恩莎和柯拉帕乌，可以说毫无竞争力。但很快，他发财了——没有人知道为什么。是*战争财*？
E: Initially, De Wayne from the Technology Division was considered no match for Farnsha and Korapao. But soon, he made a fortune, and no one knew how. Could he have *earned his riches from the war*?

C: 「天啊，快走开。」他突然放下刀叉，「我不可能是台机器！」
E: "Oh, please. Just leave me alone." Suddenly, he puts down his cutlery and announces, "I can't possibly be a machine!"

C: 你感到喜悦。
E: You feel happy.

C: 我最好的朋友们！
E: My dearest friends!

C: 死亡是什么？
E: What is death?

C: 我不要就这样结束！
E: I don't want things to end up like this!

C: 你戴上手套，双手相互揉搓，熟练地将掉包的水晶瓶塞变到自己手里。
E: You put on your gloves, rub your hands together, and switch the substituted crystal stopper into your hand with familiar ease.

C: 你看见漆黑的云层。
E: You see a black cloud.

C: 这架巨帆曾有一百八十六个兄弟，在过去的几年内，他们先后迎来了一样的命运——「永动工程」宣告失败。
E: This sail had <unbreak>186</unbreak> siblings that all met the same fate over the past few years... the Perpetual Motion Project was declared a failure.

C: 「我确实做过不少和你相关的研究，但，让我们暂时先放下学术成就的攀比心吧…你可以是比较重要的成就，之一。」
E: "I've indeed done quite a bit of research related to you. But for now, let's set aside the need to compare academic achievements... You can be considered a more important achievement, or at least one of them."

C: 「是否存在一种中间形式，同时囊括了有机和无机的优势，克服其缺陷，从而成为最适合智慧发育的培养基。」克劳奇•欧姆诺从托克尔克学士手中继承来<color=#dbc291ff>完美进化学派</color>，他向「权杖」发问。
E: "Does a hybrid form exist that possesses advantages of both the organic and inorganic? To be able to overcome both their inadequacies, thus becoming the growth culture most suited for cultivating intelligence?" Crouch Omno inherited the <color=#dbc291ff>School of Evolutionary Perfection</color> from Scholar Torkirk, and he asks the Scepters thus.

C: 站在「权杖」的核心面前。惊恐、亢奋，肾上腺素和多巴胺刺激情绪，令思想短暂地定格。帕提维娅没来由地感到愤怒，被无知遮住双眼的愤怒，她失去所有的欲望，只剩下求知的冲动。
E: Standing before the core of the Scepter, fear, excitement, adrenaline, and dopamine send her emotions racing and stop her from thinking clearly. Patavia becomes clouded in an irrational rage, a rage that blinds her with ignorance. She loses all desire, and all that remains is an urge for knowledge.

C: 「凭我的智慧…真能『自我加冕』吗？」毕竟，她是庸人，而非天才。
E: "Can I really 'crown myself' with my mere level of intelligence...?" She is only a Mundanite after all. She is no genius.

C: 博识尊向思维的窥探者投下视线，祂沉默不语，一如往常。遍布帝皇疆域的「权杖」逐级瘫痪，知识自诸多疑问中流出，流向它们唯一的终点。
E: Nous looks down upon the one who pried upon THEIR thoughts, remaining silent as ever. The Scepters throughout the Emperor's domain become paralyzed level by level as the knowledge of countless questions leaks out, flowing towards their singular destination.

C: 病榻上的老人有种预感，她从未与眼前的少女相会，此后她们也将不再相逢。在那之前，她想要问问面前这位向她展示造物之美的天才，「且不论那个变化的常数…年轻人，在你看来，宇宙的未来会是确定的，还是混沌的？」
E: The frail old lady on her deathbed has a vague premonition that, not only had she never met the girl in front of her before, but she will never meet with her again. Before this meeting ended, she wants to ask this genius that showed her the beauty of creation... "Putting aside the changing constant... Youngster, in your opinion, is the future of the universe predetermined, or chaotic?"

C: 那道孤波，同样的研究对象，两位天才却得出了两种同样正确，却水火不容的理论——其中一位说，宇宙不是发条玩具，未来永远悬而未定。而另一位却说……
E: With that same solitary wave as the research topic, two geniuses obtained equally correct but completely divergent theories — One of them said the universe isn't a clockwork toy, that the future is forever in an unknown pendency. And the other one said...

C: 你会后悔的。
E: You will regret this.

C: 我产生了新的困惑…
E: I have some new points of confusion...

C: 你骰运很棒！
E: You're quite good with the dice!

C: 你继续前进，遇到了一个像素问号，你把帽子挂在它上面，显然这是存档点——下次再继续玩。
E: You proceed and see a pixel question mark on which you hang your hat. Obviously, this is a save point. You can continue the game later.

C: 你走进庇尔波因特星球最可爱的奇力罗鱼鲜食馆——由一个巨大鱼眼气泡构成。你隔着弧形玻璃能看到亚空障壁。你享受午后惬意阳光，只属于你的时刻。
E: You walk into the most adorable Kiliro Fish Restaurant on Pier Point — a place made of a giant bubble in the shape of a fish eye. Through the curved glass, you can see the subspace barrier. You have a good time in the pleasant afternoon sunshine.

C: 你睁开眼，巨大的灯鱼从你手边游过，眼前埃勒庇努群岛水底最美的珊瑚正抖动它的礁角，星芒碎片四处流溢，你伸手去接……
E: You open your eyes to see a gigantic lightfish swimming past you. There are magnificent corals under the water of Alepine Islands, and their reefs are swaying. You reach your hand toward the starlight fragments drifting in your surroundings...

C: 你看着眼前的图景：黑森林在下雨，每片叶子上都挂着露水。这雨令你感到哀伤。
E: You look at the scene before you: It is raining in the Black Forest, and there are dew drops on every leaf. The rain saddens you.

C: 你小心翼翼。
E: You are careful with it.

C: <unbreak>22</unbreak>％的金属纯度，适合送给义体化程度低的朋友。
E: This is <unbreak>22</unbreak> percent pure metal, a great gift for a friend with a lower level of prosthesis.

C: 他在提问前做出回答，又在画布上轻点几笔，勾勒出你的身影。「在历史被蛀蚀之前，总要有人把它们临摹下来。」
E: He answers your question before you even have time to ask and traces a few gentle strokes onto the canvas to outline your figure. "History must be traced via painting before they are completedly eroded away."

C: 验证成功，请选择您需要提取的时间类型。
E: Verification successful. Please select the time type that you would like to withdraw.

C: 洞窟里有无数的东西在震颤，空气，碎石，还有你的心脏。
E: Countless entities are shaking in this cave — the air, the rocks, and your heart.

C: 好吧，你认识的学士加起来两只手都能数清，实在没有为它消费的必要。
E: All right. You can count on two hands the number of scholars you know — there is simply no need to spend any cash on it.

C: 也即，物质不存在意义。
E: In other words, matter has no meaning.

C: 当你重新睁开眼，自己已经与舰船的残骸一起，搁浅在数据海洋的边缘。
E: Upon opening your eyes again, you find yourself stranded on the edge of the data ocean alongside the wreckage of the ship.

C: 它哀悼一位悬锋国王的坠亡，英勇却傲慢的战士，被敌人的战车卷入轮底。
E: It mourns the fall of a Kremnoan king, a heroic and prideful warrior, caught and dragged beneath the wheels of an enemy chariot.

C: 所以，哪怕是它的信徒，也只会在走投无路时向它祈祷，又在时来运转时忽视它的馈赠。
E: Hence, even their disciples only turn to them in dire straits, disregarding their boons when luck favors them.

C: 没人真心尊敬它。
E: No one truly respects them.

C: 在瑟希斯沉睡的时日里，花朵凋谢，化为泥土，而它们又在泰坦归来后滋养嫩绿的新叶，恰如灵魂的流转，时节的更迭。
E: As Cerces slept, flowers wilted and returned to the earth, nourishing tender new leaves upon the Titan's return — reflecting the cycle of souls and the turning of seasons.

C: 但无论如何，你终会嗅到花的芬芳，在西风尽头，沐浴灵魂的雨滴，直到作为婴孩睁开双眼，发出啼哭。
E: One way or another, you will catch the scent of flowers carried on the end of the west wind, feel the soul's rain cascade upon you, and finally, as a newborn, open your eyes and let out your first cry.

C: 艾格勒收集来一百道寒风，它们被法吉娜封装进瓶子，带着冰晶和世间的喷嚏声，就连晨昏之眼也要因它打起哆嗦。天空陷入酣眠，雪花如迷梦般落下。
E: Aquila gathers a hundred cold breezes, which Phagousa bottles with frost and the echoes of mortal sneezes. Even the Eye of Twilight shivers at its chill. The sky falls into a deep slumber, and snowflakes drift down like fleeting dreams.

C: 于是，蝴蝶自茧中重生，圣树为恋人开花，自此相伴相依，永不分离。
E: Thus, the butterfly is reborn from the cocoon, the sacred tree blooms for their lover, and from that moment, they remain inseparable.

C: 它为逃离婚约的少女披上隐形的轻纱，引领她在海边寻到真正的爱恋。它蒙上傲慢的少年的眼睛，等到所有的爱慕者都因盲眼的他而逃之夭夭，仍有一个吻仍触上他的嘴角。
E: It drapes an invisible veil over a girl fleeing an arranged marriage, leading her to true love by the sea. It blinds the eyes of a prideful young man, and as all his admirers flee from his sightless gaze, yet one kiss still finds its way to the corner of his lips.

C: 唯有众神与天空祭司们的城邦，方有资格与他俯瞰同一片大地。
E: Only the gods and the cities of the sky priests are worthy to share his view of the world.

C: 「我能感受到权力已经汇聚在天平的一侧，待天平归正之时，我会再次找到你。」修士微微一笑，转身离开。
E: "I can already sense power gathering at one end of the scale. When the balance is restored, I will return to you." With a faint smile, the friar turns and walks away.

C: 面试官的问题像连珠炮一样砸向你，你刚答第一个字，他的眉头就皱得能夹死一只苍蝇。
E: The interviewer fires a relentless barrage of questions, each one hitting like a precision strike. You barely manage to utter the first syllable of your answer before his brow furrows so deeply it could crush a fly.

C: 只有预言选中的人，才能从这万古吹拂的西风中，听到一声声呜咽。
E: Only those chosen by the prophecy can hear whimpers of sound from the ancient west wind that has blown for millennia.

C: 这到底是什么原理？
E: What principles are at work here?

C: 从赢下所有到一无所有。
E: From winning everything to having nothing.

C: 于是在造物世，地上成为了瑟希斯的花园。
E: Thus, in Era Creatura, the land became Cerces's garden.

C: 所谓兼听则明。
E: As they say, heed the needs of the people.

C: 生命是有机物。
E: Life is organic.

C: 「不记得了吗？」她笑了起来，「没关系，我会一五一十地讲给你听，那段我们一起写下的故事。」
E: "Don't you remember?" she laughed, "That's okay, I'll tell you everything, every last detail of the story we wrote together."

C: 你再次将废纸扔进垃圾桶中。突然，耳边传来阵阵掌声……
E: You toss the paper scrap once more into the trashcan. Suddenly, you hear bursts of applause...

C: 既然是同好，那就给你开一下箱子解解馋吧…不过这里面是我的私人衣物，这可不能给你。
E: Seeing as you're a fellow hunter of treasure chests, I'll sate your cravings... But these are just my personal clothes, so I can't give them to you.

C: 您好，您的套餐已发放，请勿重复领取。
E: Hello, your meal has been delivered. Please do not attempt a repeat pick-up.

C: 正在识别用户信息…识别成功，已为您解除备用装置的光学迷彩。
E: Identifying user information... identified. Backup device decloaking successful.

C: 这都已经是「第<unbreak>12</unbreak>版」的方案了……
E: We're already at "Version <unbreak>12</unbreak>" of the plan...

C: 喂！你明显听到我说话了！别装！
E: Hey! You clearly heard me! Quit pretending!

C: 啊——嗝！舒服！痛快！好久没喝得这么爽啦！
E: Ah... *hiccup*! Ahhh~ Now that's good! I haven't had such a good drink for a very long time!

C: 你转告了远在家乡的母亲，通讯器那头的她听起来很是激动：你似乎听到了她黏质的身体发出咕嘟咕嘟的声音——这是你们巴维鲁人喜悦时特有的生理反应。
E: You share the news with your mother living in your faraway hometown, and her voice sounds excited on the other end of the communication device. You seem to hear her slimy body making a bubbling sound — a special physiological reaction of your Baviru race in moments of happiness.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 你认为达尔薇博士多半是疯了。你瞥了瞥那佝偻、衰弱、干瘪的年迈身躯——她正透过那对厚到可怕的镜片无言地盯着你。
E: You're pretty sure Dr. Darvill has gone crazy. You glance at her hunched, frail, and shrunken husk of a body. She silently stares at you through her terrifyingly thick lenses.

C: 哈，又是一笔丰厚的利润…你不禁为这想法击节叫好，露出了满意的笑容。但博士似乎误会了什么——她似乎将之视为你赞同她的提案，便又继续喋喋不休起来。
E: Ah, that gear would generate serious revenue... you can't help but feel pleased at this idea as a smile crosses your face. The doctor, however, seems to misread that smile. She seems to view it as you agreeing with her proposal, and starts to talk again.

C: 「听说他们已经在一号坞口登陆了。」阿德显得有点紧张，不停搓着他怀里的毛球。他管那生物叫「毛绒绒」。不得不说，这是个很土的名字。
E: "I heard they already arrived at Dock No. 1." Ader seems on edge as he incessantly rubs his hands against the fluff ball in his arms. He had named the creature "Fluffies." To be honest, it isn't the most creative name.

C: 时过境迁，悬锋暴君的塑像已成陈迹，苔藓将用它青绿的手抚去过往的一切辉煌和悲欢。
E: As time marches on, the statue of the tyrant of Kremnos has become a relic as green mossy fingers smother all the glory and tragedy of the past.

C: 据说这是军纪严明的悬锋城人最爱的游戏之一喀，当阵列变化，五面同样颜色的盾牌排成一列，就会发生奇妙的事情！
E: Apparently this game is a favorite of Castrum Kremnos' locals, who maintain strict military rigor. When a formation changes and five identical colors of shield line up, miraculous things can happen!

C: 哈哈，这下有好戏看了！
E: Haha. We've got a good show coming up!

C: 房间的采光还算凑合。至少你现在还能看清这张纸上写的是什么字。
E: The lighting in the room is not too shabby. At the very least, you're able to read what's written on this paper clearly.

C: 是吗？那太好了！没想到你这样的大忙人还有空顾及这些，真是太感谢了。
E: Really? That's great! I didn't expect a busy bee like you to have the time. Thanks a lot, really.

C: 大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 那个，这是我的一点心意…还请铁卫{M#大哥}{F#大姐}笑纳！
E: Umm. This is just a small token... Please kindly accept it, {M#Sir}{F#Miss}!

C: 感谢你如此认真地回答。答案是——我也不知道，因为我根本没有能记数的手指头喀！
E: Thank you for your earnest guess. The correct answer is: I don't know either, because I don't have any fingers to count on!

C: 多么巧妙的结构…
E: What a wondrous structure...

C: 吾主啊，您何时才能归来、让大地焕发生机…喀？
E: My master, when will you make your return and bring life into the earth... Crrk?

C: <size=28>啊呀！</size>
E: <size=28>Eek!</size>

C: 那之前到底发生了什么？
E: What was going on before, then?

C: 是的，你很确定他向你露出了一个夸张无比、甚至可以说是惊悚的笑容。但当你终于抬头想要问清他「后巷」究竟是什么时，却发现这名怪异的男性竟在眨眼间消失了。
E: Yes, you're absolutely positive that he just flashed you an exaggerated, unnerving grin. But when you look up to ask him what exactly is going on with this "back alley," this eccentric man has already vanished.

C: 你迅速作出决定。所谓「大隐隐于市」，这才是经验最老到的捉迷藏玩家会选择的藏身处…至少你是这么想的。
E: You make a snap decision. The most experienced of hide-and-seek players will choose to hide in plain sight... Well, that's what you imagine, anyway.

C: 我可以伪装成一名商人…
E: I can pretend to be a merchant...

C: <size=36>无语了！</size>
E: <size=36>Too shocked to talk!</size>

C: 你抬头看着那片雄伟的矿脉…橙色的面容缓和慈祥，但你还是觉察到了它藏在表面之下的嘲弄：
E: You look up and see the magnificent vein... Its surface gives off a warm, kind orange glow, but you still notice the mockery beneath its surface.

C: 呼——今天的锻炼就到这里，剩下的明天继续嗡~
E: Whew — today's training ends here. The rest will wait for tomorrow, buzz~

C: 无礼！你竟不遵守骑士礼仪，还未正式发起决斗就贸然出手，偷袭了我心爱的坐骑！
E: How rude! You disregarded the knight's code of conduct, attacking without formally issuing a duel and ambushing my beloved steed!

C: 没事了，玩儿去吧你。
E: Alright then. Go play somewhere else.

C: 「他的头颅仍在呢喃」。这应该就是谜题的答案？
E: "His head continued to murmur." Is this the puzzle's answer?

C: 什么好处？
E: What benefit?

C: 天舶司已经扣押了，这不好吧…
E: The Sky-Faring Commission has already seized them. That's not good...

C: 请问这是什么画册？
E: What is this photo book?

C: 在真正的美感面前，就算是你是一块废铁，你也该开窍了…不过现在不是长篇大论的时候，走吧，走吧，我们赶紧开溜。
E: In the face of true beauty, even a hunk of scrap iron like you must be enlightened... But this isn't the time for pontificating. Let's go, let's go. We better scram.

C: 这实在太可怕了，你绷紧了神经，想到恶龙也许会说出这样的台词威胁你。
E: This is terrifying, and you tense your nerves at the thought of all these menacing lines the dragon could spew at you.

C: （趁恶龙苏醒之前赶紧离开）
E: (Leave before the dragon wakes up)

C: 这里还是交给我吧，小事一桩。
E: Leave this up to me. It's a piece of cake.

C: 只有知道了能够变强的理由，我就能继续变强。而真正的强大，又需要什么呢？我想，这答案也许就在我的起点——鹤运物流之中。
E: I can only keep getting stronger if I understand a reasoning to get stronger. And what does real power need? I believe, the answer to this can be found at my starting point — Heron Express.

C: {F#她}{M#他}不会是编了一个奇怪的名字骗我们吧。
E: Could {F#she}{M#he} have made that odd name up just to fool us?

C: 你还要回来啊？
E: Will you ever come back?

C: 只是不知此处的隐情，又是否在诸位预料之中呢……
E: But tell me, did you expect the secrets hidden here...?

C: 家人们，这景色太美了！
E: This is just soooo breathtaking!

C: 当然，要想参加比赛，您必须得预先抵押一定信用点。不过不用担心，只要您能在比赛中获胜，这笔押金便会全数返还给您！
E: Naturally, to compete you'll have to pay a deposit first. But don't worry — as long as you win, your deposit will be refunded to you in full!

C: 这个其实就是真正的「吃包子比拼」环节啦。很好理解吧？
E: Actually, this is the regular part of the bun-eating contest. Easy enough to understand, right?

C: 完成了，开始正式比赛吧。
E: Done. Let's get on with the real event.

C: 既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
E: Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...

C: 艾格勒不来帮你？
E: Aren't you waiting for Aquila to help you?

C: 这只若虫趴在沧桑的雕像表面，散发出无言的悲伤。
E: This nymph rests on the worn statue's surface, exuding a silent sorrow.

C: 这只若虫端详着面前的罗盘，似乎是想参透其中的秘密。
E: This nymph inspects the compass in front of it, seemingly trying to decipher its secrets.

C: 单手叉腰一下。
E: One hand on hip.

C: 都怪我操之过急。
E: It's my fault for being too hasty.

C: 很酷，以及…
E: They're cool, and...

C: 感觉还是缺点什么，没法表达出我那堪比中子炸弹爆炸余波的复杂情感。
E: I still feel like something is missing. I've got so many emotions boiling up that it feels like the aftermath of a neutron bomb. I just can't express it properly.

C: 那里究竟会有什么呢？
E: What will even be there?

C: 那大概只是隧道的风声而已，你反复告诉自己。
E: It's probably just the wind from the tunnel — you repeat to yourself.

C: 无论刀剑如何继续交锋，「同谐」的微光依旧愿为熟睡的稚子撑起银色的罗帐。他的梦太长太长，就连列车的汽笛声都再也无法令他惊醒。
E: Disregarding the clash of mettle, the Harmony's faint light continues to uphold the silver curtain that shades the sleeping child. His dream is long. So long, not even the train's whistle could rouse him from his slumber.

C: 扑满的鼻子扬了扬，你怀疑它发现了你。这是怎么做到的？你有点搞不懂，正如你搞不懂扑满是如何跨越次元的一样。
E: The Trotter raises their nose. You suspect that they have noticed you... But how? You don't understand, just like how you don't understand how Trotters can cross dimensions.

C: 因为就在刚才，在看到镜子边挂着的帕姆衣服的时候，你萌生了一种跃跃欲试的想法。
E: Why? Because you saw Pom-Pom's outfit hanging by the mirror just now, and you were dying to try it out.

C: 害…害怕…
E: S—Scared...

C: 我也会成为英雄！
E: I will become a hero too!

C: 客人似乎比往常多了？
E: ...more guests in the grand baths lately.

C: 献给你和你的同伴。
E: A gift for you and your friends.

C: 不，这是我的决定。
E: No, I chose this path myself.

C: 我要是信你我是那个…
E: If I believe you, I'll be...

C: 完了完了黑潮黑完了…
E: Oh no oh no oh no. The black tide has consumed everything...

C: 至少这次我没错过。
E: At least I didn't miss it this time.

C: 别扔了！很危险！
E: Stop that. It's dangerous!

C: 哎呀，真可惜。差点就能命中目标了。女人看着你，似乎对你的能力产生了怀疑。
E: Shoot, what a shame. You almost hit the bullseye. The girl gives you a look that says she doesn't really trust in your abilities.

C: 我跑不动了…
E: I can't run anymore...

C: 作为成长的奖励，我给你准备了一些小小的礼物。别客气，尽管收下帕。
E: Pom-Pom's got some small rewards for your growth. Skip the formalities, take it all.

C: 毕竟外面的世界…并非每个星球都和列车里一样安全可靠…不不不，没有哪里比列车上更安全帕！
E: After all, out there it's... Not every planet can be as safe as we are here on the Express... No, no — I mean, nowhere is safer than we are, here on this train!

C: 我保证不会多想！
E: I promise not to think too much!

C: 帕姆在找东西，但是没找到，好烦哇！
E: Pom-Pom's looking for something, but Pom-Pom can't find it. What a hassle!

C: 嘿嘿，不知道会是什么样的衣服呢？好期待哦——
E: Teehee, Pom-Pom wonders what clothes they'll be? Can't wait —

C: …不对，帕姆重新思索了下，就算帕姆设下了「禁止携带宠物上车」的行为准则。
E: ...No, Pom-Pom has thought long and hard on this, and even if Pom-Pom makes a No Pets on Board clause...

C: 嗯…说得对说得对，作为列车长，帕姆应该以列车和乘客的安危为第一优先级！
E: Mmmm... You're right. You're right. As conductor, Pom-Pom should be putting the safety of the Express and all its passengers first!

C: 别看三月乘客成天吵吵闹闹的，就算没人跟她讲话，她自己和自己就能聊起来。
E: Don't think that March is running around and chatting all day long just because she has company. Even when she's alone, she'll strike up a conversation with herself.

C: 像卫生间这种东西当然存在啦，不过通常在大家过量饮用餐车饮料后，就会要排队。
E: Of course the Express has things like bathrooms, but when all the passengers overindulge on drinks from the food truck, they have to wait in line to use them.

C: 参加本次练兵的铁卫都经过了特训。如果不小心触发了警戒状态，战斗会变得相当棘手。
E: The Silvermane Guards in this drill have all undergone special training. Combat against them can get pretty tricky if you trigger the alarm.

C: 再次祝贺你完成了演练，{NICKNAME}教官！跟「副官」聊聊吧，它应该已经把报酬给你准备好了！
E: Congrats once more for completing the drill, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Chat with the aide, and it should have a prize for you!

C: 只要<color=#dbc291ff>把热能核心和底座组合起来</color>，照雪灯炉就能发挥出效果了。
E: As long as <color=#dbc291ff>the thermic core is slotted into its base</color>, the Snowshine Lamps will fire up.

C: （要追上去的话，只能解决眼前的怪物了……）
E: (I've got to deal with the monsters before I can catch that Trotter...)

C: 英雄，你真的是英雄啊，英雄啊！
E: You truly are a hero! A living, breathing hero!

C: 你将自己的需求和盘托出。你很清楚，自己波澜壮阔的一生无疑打动了电话那边的接线员，因为你分明听到那人隐隐的抽泣声。
E: You've explained your needs in detail. It's clear your awesome story touched whoever took the call, as indicated by the faint sobbing.

C: 「黑暗拳斗大赛」是什么？
E: What is the Dark Fist Tournament?

C: 我真的知错了！我再也不敢了。
E: Please stop! I won't do it again!

C: 呃…我……
E: Uh, I...

C: 在你眼前的宽阔的办公桌属于这个星球的最高统治者——贝洛伯格的大守护者。它看起来尊贵、典雅，被打理得井井有条，与它的主人如出一辙。
E: The wide desk before you belongs to the majestic ruler of this planet — the Supreme Guardian of Belobog. It looks distinguished, elegant, and well-kept — just like its owner.

C: 今天的事，我就睁一只眼闭一只眼…但希望你下次不要这样了。
E: I'll turn a blind eye today... but I hope that you won't do this next time.

C: 不得不说，这喷泉里真是什么都有，和远古帝王的宝藏相比也毫不逊色！看！你居然从喷泉里找到了——吉姆•罗杰汽水？真是暴殄天物！
E: It begs to say that this fountain really does have everything in it, just like the ancient treasure tombs of emperors in the past! Look! You somehow find amidst those ripples — Jim Roger bread soda!? What a waste!

C: 你就不好奇它是怎么丢的吗？
E: So, you aren't even slightly curious about how it got lost?

C: 你凭啥在我的刀上刻字？
E: Why have you engraved a character on my sword?

C: 「『他终于肯低头认错了？』『小姐，不好了，少爷藏在流云渡的货运船舱里逃了！』『哼，我太卜司自有办法推衍，我倒要看看他能去哪儿。』她追，他逃，他插翅难逃！」
E: "'Does he finally acknowledge his wrongs?''Miss! Bad news! The young master ran away by hiding inside a cargo container in Cloudford!''Hmph, we have methods of deduction at the Divination Commission. I wonder where he can possibly go.' She chases, he flees, and he can't escape!"

C: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
E: The Immortal falls silent.

C: 那就没问题了。
E: All's good then.

C: 之后…应该还会有类似的事情需要拜托您，到时还要再请您出手相助了。
E: In the future...there may be similar things that need your help. I'll have to ask for your assistance again.

C: 既然你都这么说了…
E: Since you've said so...

C: 不必多说，带路吧。
E: Say no more. Show me the way.

C: 但是如果我告诉你，它远不止这点儿潜力呢。
E: But let me tell you: It's far more useful than just that.

C: 这样吧，我给你一些提示。
E: What about this — I'll give you a few hints.

C: 为什么会放在书店里呢？
E: And why'd you leave it behind at a bookstore?

C: …你是？
E: ...And you are?

C: 这是我们的规章制度，不好意思啊。
E: I'm sorry, but that's in our rules and regulations.

C: 有机会走出家乡、探索星空的人，要么是亿中挑一的幸运儿，要么付出了常人难以想象的代价——我就是后者之一。
E: Anyone with the chance to leave their homeworld behind and explore the universe has either one-in-a-billion luck, or has paid a price unfathomable to ordinary people. I am one of the latter.

C: 毕竟，我打小就没接触过这些东西，作为玩伴来说肯定不够格吧……
E: After all, I haven't touched those things since I was little. I'm not sure if I'm good enough to be your playmate...

C: 亲情、友情、爱情，这些我统统没有。生活像个大泥潭，时刻也不忘将我拖进深处。
E: Family, friends, and lovers — I don't have any of those. Life is like living in quicksand, always being dragged down into those depths.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 但「梦」放大了一切、美化了一切！在这里，我可以更加清晰地「看到」、「听到」、「感知到」，更加轻易地去塑造、去引导那些…迷途的心灵。
E: But "dreams" magnify and embellish everything! I can more clearly "see," "hear," and "perceive" in here. I can more easily shape and guide those... lost souls.

C: …抱、抱歉……
E: ...I—I'm sorry...

C: 没错，就是从那时起，「万界之癌」开始侵害诸界。
E: That's right. It was from that moment forth that the Cancer of All Worlds started its invasion across all worlds.

C: 输了什么？
E: What did you lose?

C: （小声）大哥，这家伙看上去来头不小，说不定是来度假的大人物。
E: (Whispering) Boss, this one looks like they might be somebody important. They might even be some bigwig here on vacation.

C: 咳咳…星际和平公司向来提倡以和为贵。经过短暂的组内探讨，我们俩一致决定让这件事翻篇。
E: *coughs* ...The IPC has always stood for keeping peace. After a short discussion among us, we have both decided to unanimously let this matter go.

C: 倘若努力最后什么都得不到，人们前赴后继地探索还有什么意义呢？
E: What's the point of continuous exploration if you know you're not going to get anything in the end?

C: …很有无名客风格的回答。你身上依旧保留着理想，我不讨厌。
E: ...That's a very Nameless answer from you. You still retain your ideals; that's okay.

C: 如果你嘴馋，可以去餐馆里点上一份牛排，享受肉用牲畜给你带来的快感。
E: If you're a glutton, go to a restaurant and order a steak if you'd like to enjoy the meaty pleasures of livestock.

C: 唉，天堂的希冀，地狱的威胁，唯有一事是真——此生飞逝啊。
E: *sigh* The hopes of heaven, the threats of hell, but only one thing can be certain: Life is truly fleeting.

C: 混乱摧毁了天幕塔的能源核心。天空被撕开一个大洞，强辐射的阳光倾泻而入……
E: Chaos destroyed the energy core of the Canopy Tower. With a gigantic hole torn in the sky, the intensely radioactive sunlight poured in...

C: …你确定这是他们真实的想法吗，伙计？你没给他们灌输什么主观意见吧？
E: ...Are you sure the scores come from the bottom of their hearts? You didn't say anything that swayed their opinions, did you?

C: 还有这个，给您——我相信您的人品，所以也放心将我宝贵的企划书暂时交给您。希望您能将它用在需要的地方。
E: Also, this is for you. I have enough trust in you to let you keep my precious proposal for a while. I hope you will put it to good use.

C: …诈骗？这和波奇有什么关系？
E: ...Fraud? How are the cases related to Bocchi?

C: 一则新闻报道，内容大致为某诈骗犯落网。虽然不知道此事和波奇有什么关系，总之先记下吧。
E: A news article about a swindler being caught. I'm writing this down, although I don't know how Bocchi can be related to the case.

C: 耶！真棒！哇哦！
E: Yay! Awesome! Wow!

C: 艾默里奇小手一挥，将「长效专利捍卫一纸通」贴在了身边的墙上……
E: Emmrich waves his hand and sticks the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier on the wall beside him...

C: 你完全搞不懂这所谓的「电电枪」是干嘛用的…听上去多少沾些不正经。
E: You have no idea what this "Zappy Gun" is supposed to do... although it does sound a bit questionable.

C: 「啪」——你将「长效专利捍卫一纸通」贴到了广告牌上。广告牌应声倒下…但你确信自己根本没用那么大的力气。
E: With a "slap," you stick the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier onto the sales billboard. The billboard topples over, but you swear you didn't exert much force.

C: 啊，科蒂……
E: Ah, Coty...

C: 等等，你的气质不错啊！考虑过进军娱乐圈吗？
E: Wait, you seem promising! Have you ever thought about getting into the entertainment industry?

C: 行啊，我很乐意跟有潜力的年轻人交流。
E: Sure thing. I'm glad to chat with young people with great potential.

C: 再见，祝你也能早日成名。
E: Farewell. May you become famous soon, too.

C: 明星？怎么可能，我只是当过一段时间的小演员而已。
E: A star? No way. I was just a small-time actor for a while.

C: 真是没用的东西，浪费的时间从你绩效里扣！
E: What a useless piece of crap! I must deduct your salary to compensate for my wasted time!

C: 人名…如果把它比喻为一个人，那一定是位仙姿玉貌的女神，但它其实是声乐之星的名字。
E: Someone's name... Well, if you compare it to "someone," then she must be a goddess of immortal beauty. It's actually the name of the planet of canticles.

C: 回头见。
E: See you later.

C: 不，如果您真的光临了我的音乐会，其实是听不到这首歌的。
E: No, if you attend my concert, you won't actually hear this song.

C: 这…真的是拉洛丝的声音吗？
E: Is this... truly Larose's voice?

C: 神秘的女孩消失在了烟雾中，没有留下半点痕迹。
E: The mysterious girl vanishes into the mist, leaving no trace.

C: 那孩子已经原谅了你。
E: That girl has forgiven you.

C: 你是来为我送行的吗，朋友？那么你是否也有着和我同样的感受——
E: Are you here to see me off, my friend? Do you feel the same way as I do...

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 相信我——你不会后悔选择为我办事的！
E: Believe me, you won't regret it!

C: 辛苦你了，我看看……
E: Thanks for your hard work. Let me see...

C: 大家都说「筑梦边境」是荒凉的半成品。但我觉得，这里是我见过最美的地方。
E: Everyone sees the Dream's Edge as a dreary piece of unfinished work, but I think it's the most beautiful place I've ever seen.

C: 宇宙中绝大多数星球没有良好的环境。它们荒凉、残破，如同划痕遍布表面的石块。
E: Most planets in the universe are in an atrocious state. They are desolate and inhospitable, like rocks with scratches all over their surfaces.

C: 帮人忙我最擅长。
E: I'm the best there is at helping people out.

C: （糟了，准备迎战！）
E: (Rats. Time to get ready for a fight!)

C: （奇怪，照片上…多出来了一个人？）
E: (That's weird. Is that... another person in the photo now?)

C: 回想起来，我下手时竟然没有太多迟疑。或许是因为除了悲痛，我更多地是感到了愤怒和羞辱吧？
E: Looking back, I barely resisted when it came time to act. Maybe it's because of the anger and the humiliation that I felt, besides all the grief?

C: 是需要帮忙吗？
E: Need a hand with something?

C: 和你说话真费劲。
E: Talking to you is such a chore.

C: 即使在最寒冷的冬夜，人们依旧可以围着它跳舞唱歌。
E: Even on the coldest winter nights, people could sing and dance around it.

C: 这只垃圾桶实在过于庞大，你搬不动。
E: This trashcan is far too huge for you to move it.

C: 都过去了。
E: That's all in the past, now.

C: 什么坐骑？
E: What mount?

C: …我感觉好恶心。
E: ...I feel sick.

C: 在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
E: With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.

C: 哦！你就是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}？
E: Oh! You're the famous {NICKNAME}?

C: 别忘了，「公司」说过会与我们分享技术。他们的机兵肯定早就解决了这个问题。
E: Don't forget that the IPC said that they will share their technology with us. Their automatons must have solved this issue a long time ago.

C: 舞会嘛...民众的娱乐需求的确重要，但我们真有场地需要这么大的灯来照亮？
E: Parties, huh... Though the recreational needs of the people are important, do we really have a venue that would require a giant light like that?

C: 不要小看这个提案。我听过一个说法：爱是宇宙中最强大的力量，能超越时间和空间......
E: Don't underestimate this suggestion. I've heard a saying before: "Love is the greatest power in the universe. It can transcend time and space..."

C: 你掀开箱盖，成堆的零件和钢板映入眼帘。
E: You open the crate to find a pile of parts and steel plates.

C: 一个男人悄悄走到你身边。
E: A man quietly walks up to your side.

C: 我要让大树的小鸟们一起帮你对付石头老板了，我们一定要把他赶出小镇啾！
E: I want to rally all the birdies of the Great Tree and help you defeat Boss Stone! We will chase him out of town, tweet!

C: 太好了，没想到哈努兄弟愿意陪我啾！我们走啾！
E: That's great. It delights me that Brother Hanu would be willing to accompany me! Let's go, tweet!

C: 多谢客人你出手相助啾，我要回去跟黄金公子分享心得了啾。
E: Thank you for helping out, tweet. I have to return to Young Master Gold to share my findings, tweet.

C: 啾~客官是来找人家的吗？虽然人家还在担心外面的小鸟，但也可以陪客官聊聊天啾~
E: Tweet~ Are you here to see me? I might still be worried about the little birds out there, but I can still chat a little with you, tweet~

C: 人家是猫头鹰老师的学生，负责建造美梦小镇中一切美好的事物啾。迷人的蓝调街、浪漫的大花园、还有这间舒适的宾馆都是人家的手笔啾~
E: I'm a student of Professor Owl's, and I'm responsible for building all the beautiful objects in Dreamville. The charm of Blues Street, the romance of the grand garden, and the comfort of this hotel — it's all wing-crafted by me, tweet~

C: 嘿呀，竟然发现了啾！
E: Oh dang, just my good luck to get found, tweet!

C: 恐龙先生怎么了？
E: What happened to Mr. Dinosaur?

C: 这是专门为下午茶会准备的果子啾。
E: This fruit is specially catered for the afternoon tea party, tweet.

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 钟表小子的朋友，能麻烦您去找找它们吗？啾啾？
E: Clockie's friend, can I trouble you to help us find them? Tweet tweet?

C: 啾啾——钟表小子的朋友，您好！筑巢区相关的事也都可以问我啾！
E: Hello, Clockie's friend, tweet! You can approach me regarding any questions about the nesting zone too!

C: 没错啾！提到美梦小镇的建筑，最有名的便是{F#小姐}{M#先生}您眼前的金叶广场啾~
E: That's right, tweet! When we mention Dreamville's architecture, the most famous one will be the Goldleaf Plaza in front of you, {F#lady}{M#gentleman}, tweet.

C: 请先把刚刚说的那个助手叫回来吧~
E: Please get that helper we just mentioned to come back first!

C: 折纸小鸟住进纸板小屋，明明很合理嘛！
E: An origami bird living in an origami house, that makes a lot of sense, don't you think!

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个胆子特别小的孩子，一与别的小鸟对视就走不动路…麻烦您去<color=#dbc291ff>房间的角落处</color>找找吧，说不定它现在正身处危急之中呢！
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet... Oh yeah! There's one child that is terrified of everything. As soon as they lock eyes with another birdie, they become paralyzed with fear... Try looking in the <color=#dbc291ff>corners of the room</color>, they might be having a crisis!

C: 你～好，在剧场见到一只小～鸟，它歌声异常优美动～人，啾！
E: Hello! I saw a bird at the theater, and its voice was sooo mesmerizing, tweet!

C: 滴答～折纸小鸟为你报时啾。
E: Tick-tock! Origami bird's here to tell you the time, tweet.

C: 妃色夫人说，懂得一门乐器的小鸟能更受欢迎，可我什么都不会啾。
E: Lady Vermilion said that birdies who can play an instrument are much more popular, but I just can't seem to be able to pick any up, tweet.

C: 啾啾啾…
E: Tweet tweet tweet...

C: 人偶是最好的代步工具啾。
E: Puppets are the best mode of transportation, tweet.

C: 听不见，听不见啾……
E: Can't hear you, can't hear you...

C: 啾，筑梦师小鸟也是这么说的！
E: Tweet, that's what the Dreamweaver bird said!

C: 可恶...如果当初我多下点功夫做机甲格斗训练……..
E: Dang it... If I'd only worked harder at mecha battle training...

C: 你刚才在看我吧？
E: You were just watching me, weren't you?

C: <size=36>嘿嘿嘿......</size>
E: <size=36>Hehehe...</size>

C: 哎，我看你的以太灵练度好像都很高，有没有什么诀窍能传授一下？
E: Oh! I see your Aether Spirits are all really highly trained. Do you have any tips you can give me?

C: 实验田里有奇怪的呼噜声，这令你想起在空间站的某处角落，生长着会说话的植物的奇妙经历。
E: A strange snoring is coming from inside the experimental plant nurseries, which reminds you of a wondrous encounter with a talking plant elsewhere in the space station.

C: 报告里我说了是你提供的线报，想来你的任务也算完成，回去也是指日可待的事了。
E: In my report, I stated that it was you who provided the tip-offs. I suppose that means your mission is complete, and you'll be back in the Cloud Knights in no time.

C: 更重要的是，我需要你的帮助，因此我认为开诚布公是我应尽的义务。如果说不清楚，这对你来说也不方便是吧？
E: Since I need your help, it's my duty to tell you everything I know about this issue, otherwise it'd be a hassle, right?

C: 太好了，青镞大人听说了丹鼎司的困境之后，建议将这个事情委托给你，我当时还有些半信半疑的，现在想来，青镞大人果然是没有看错人。
E: Awesome! I wasn't sure if you'd help me when Madam Qingzu recommended you, but now I can see that she was right to have faith in you!

C: 你为什么能见到丹枢？
E: Why can you still see Dan Shu?

C: 而《无言之卷》总是会挑选那些「专注聆听」的人，借助他们独有听觉世界构建形象，混淆他们对现实世界的认知。
E: The Manuscript of Silence always chooses those who listen carefully as its target and uses their unusually sharp auditory sense to create a virtual world and confuse their sensations.

C: 我也觉得日子没法过了…
E: I understand. I can't take it anymore, either...

C: 「你的东西」？
E: "Something of yours"?

C: 但是您放心，我想您可以不必空手而归。
E: But don't worry. I'm thinking you won't have to leave here empty-handed.

C: 仅仅数年时间，这曲古琴作品被编到了教科书中。经过数百年解析和研究，这首难度极高的古琴曲也变成了新手练习曲，有着数不清的版本。
E: In just a few short years, this guqin song began appearing in textbooks. After hundreds of years of analysis and study, this fiendishly difficult guqin piece has become a practice drill for beginners, spawning countless different versions.

C: 拍好了。
E: All done.

C: 且为郎君点红妆……
E: In devotion, my heart does yearn...

C: 难听！
E: It's terrible!

C: 这算是我小小岁阳的请求，我能问问你为什么不喜欢吗？
E: I'm just a tiny heliobus, and that's all I want. May I ask, why do you hate this entrance?

C: 多亏你的开导，我可以尽情享受匹诺康尼的乐趣了——求之不得啊！
E: Thanks to your guidance, I can enjoy Penacony to its fullest. What more could I ask for!

C: 从来没人识破过我的拟态，你是怎么做到的？
E: No one has ever seen through my mimicry before. How did you do that?

C: 你还好吧？
E: Are you all good?

C: 苛刻什么啊？能在匹诺康尼开这种车的都非富即贵，钱对他们来说就是数字而已。
E: What's so harsh about that? If you can afford to drive that kind of car in Penacony, then money is just a number to you.

C: 你，你胡说八道！我用我刚买的车撞一个素不相识的铁皮脑袋？就算我真要撞，肯定也开便宜点的车啊！
E: N—Nonsense! Would I use a brand-new car to crash into an iron skull I've even seen before? Even if I wanted to, I'd at least drive a cheaper car!

C: 哎，你们听说了吗？上次那件事出结果了。
E: Hey, did you hear? They reached a verdict on that accident.

C: …没啥，爸爸。我只是在想，妈妈她…她真的就在这里的某个地方吗？这么多年，一直都在？
E: ...It's nothing. I was just thinking, mother... Is she really here somewhere? Is this where she has been for all these years?

C: 我爱你，韦，胜过一切——除了绘画。你是我的生活，但艺术，艺术是我的生命。
E: I love you, Wes, more than anything — except art. You are my life, but art, art is my existence.

C: 妈妈——你不正常…你缺少了一颗人的心。
E: Mom... You are not normal... You don't have a heart.

C: 咱们负担得起吗，爸？
E: Can we afford this, dad?

C: 下次要小心点…
E: Be more careful next time.

C: 确切而真实的只有一种感觉——<color=#eb4d3dff>你更加愤怒了</color>。你感到某种存在于你感官之外的存在正潜伏于四周，贪婪、粘稠、蠢蠢欲动。
E: One thing is certain, a single emotion... <color=#eb4d3dff>You are even more enraged</color>. You feel a presence that you cannot sense lurking all around you... Greedy, thick, and ready to strike.

C: 明智的选择！显然对于一位老练的开拓者而言，这种程度的影响也不过尔尔。
E: A wise decision! Clearly, a small influence like this is no match for an experienced Trailblazer!

C: 那群猎犬还算是有点人情味，没下死手…要不然躺在这的就是坨废铁咯。
E: I guess those Bloodhounds still have some humanity about them, at least they didn't kill me outright... Otherwise, I'd be just another pile of scrap metal lying about...

C: 用来作弊的那根手指被拿走后，你就没辙了？没想到我会在开局前检查你的部件吧？哼，别以为是智械就可以瞒天过海！
E: Lost your edge now that cheating hand of yours has been taken? Did you not think we'd check your parts before we started the bet? Hah! Don't go thinking you can fool everyone just because you're an Intellitron!

C: 再来一个就好。
E: Just one more...

C: 老大，加油啊…
E: Boss, you can do it...

C: 只想寻个消遣也无妨。您是自由身，行动念想可都不必受限于人。
E: If you are merely passing the time, that is no problem. You are a free soul, your will need not be limited by anyone.

C: 我没法接受他们的残躯散落各处，为此用尽了全部积蓄，直至负债累累。
E: I could not accept their bodies being scattered all over, so I spent all of my savings and racked up massive debt.

C: 感觉还行？这可是我们最近新推出的沉浸式服务——真实场景，自由选择，丰富互动，还有超高智能的实力演员，包您能完美代入！
E: How was it? This is our newly launched immersive experience — featuring realistic scenes, freedom of choice, rich interaction, and intelligent and skilled actors. Your perfect immersion is guaranteed!

C: 老爷的功绩有目共睹！
E: Boss' incredible achievements are on full display for everyone to witness!

C: 原来如此，您是这么认为的……
E: I see...

C: 我要站在它背后，一直守护它…一直到…最后……
E: I'll have its back and protect it... until... the very last...

C: 我听说过那些怪物！好像是叫什么惊梦剧团，是家族的重点整治对象。落单的我们绝对没法幸存，搞不好还会被困在梦里、没法醒来……
E: I've heard of those monsters! They're called the Dreamjolt Troupe or something, and they have long been on The Family's radar. There's no way we can survive on our own. Even worse, we might be trapped in the dream and never wake up...

C: 我想起来了！这个是克劳克影业推出的游乐设施。「黄金的时刻」街头也有，记得吗？
E: I've got it! This is a Clock Studios amusement ride. It can also be found on the streets in the Golden Hour. Ring any bell?

C: 怎么回事？
E: What happened?

C: 反正都醉了，能拿瓶苏乐达来糊弄它吗？算了，还是不要跟只鸟一般见识为好。
E: It's already drunk. Couldn't you just fool it with a bottle of SoulGlad? Ah, best not. You don't want to stoop down to a bird's level.

C: 你有注意到那些带子吗？它们被故意缠在一起。如果犯人偷偷从里面剪去一段，也很难被发现。
E: Did you notice those tapes? It looks like they've been deliberately tangled up. If the culprit had secretly taken a cutting, it would not be easy to tell.

C: 啊，能在这儿站一会什么也不做真是太好了，而且还是离因果殿这么远的地方，一想到要回去继续工作我就忍不住希望这一刻能永远永远永远持续下去……
E: It's so good to stand here and do nothing. And this is so far away from the Hall of Karma. The mere thought of having to return to mountains of criminal reports makes me wish I could stand here for ever and ever and ever...

C: 我们向来秉承公平打劫的原则，绝不区别对待任何的过路人。
E: We uphold the principle of fair robbery and never give any passerby special treatment.

C: 现在是耍帅的时候吗？
E: Is this really the time to try to be cool?

C: 我们…是三个人？
E: There are... three of us?

C: 尽管时至今日，你都很难把丹恒与他的秘密身份联系到一起……
E: Even to this day, you still have a hard time thinking of Dan Heng and his secret identity as the same person...

C: 得出什么结论了吗？
E: Reached any conclusions?

C: 当然可以，对话结束之后，请善用相机功能。
E: Of course. After the talk, you may make use of the Camera function.

C: 我还有职务在身，得继续去巡逻了。如果你对《魔阴身考》为何被关在监狱里感兴趣的话，请一定要找司狱赤衣大人问清楚！
E: I've got duties to attend to and need to get back on patrol. If you are curious about why the A Study into the Mara-Struck book is locked up in prison, you can seek out Jailer Chiyi for further information.

C: 会不会是犯人留下的？
E: Perhaps it was left behind by a prisoner?

C: 实不相瞒，在下想离开这深海监牢，只是想为一位老友送行。仙舟人不设棺椁和灵位，就这样继续在监牢中待下去，我只担心出狱后，朋友无处可寻。
E: Truth be told, the reason I wish to leave this abyssal prison is simply to send an old friend off. Xianzhou natives bear no coffins or tablets. If I continue to stay on in this prison, I fear that I'll find my friend nowhere when I get out.

C: 不过这里是幽囚狱，倒也不奇怪。
E: Still, given the sort of place the Shackling Prison is, I won't be surprised if they turned out to be true.

C: 因为路就在那里。
E: Because that's where the path lies.

C: 记住，你现在是*一件行李*。
E: Remember, you're now a piece of luggage.

C: 这附近应该有一个纸板箱，带着它过来，你就能成为*一件行李*。
E: There should be a cardboard box nearby. Bring it over, and you'll be well on your way to becoming a piece of luggage.

C: 等你看到那锣鼓喧天、舰炮齐鸣、旌旗招展、人山人海的场面，就能理解什么叫做「礼炮精神」了！这炮，你一定要放，非放不可，不放就后悔去吧！
E: Once you see them lighting up the skies, hear the cannons roaring and catch sight of the waves of people under the waving flags, you will understand what "cannon spirit" means! You have to set them off. You must! You'll regret it if you don't!

C: 别开枪，是老白让我来的。
E: Don't shoot! Old Bai told me to come!

C: 快点说吧，得加钱。
E: Make it quick. I'm charging you separately.

C: 他…他在发光…这琥珀色的光芒…难道！
E: He... he's glowing...! That amber glow... could it be!?

C: 你不由惊恐万分：你被发现了？难道真的有智械能读取别人的思维！
E: You are utterly taken aback: Were you noticed? Do Intellitrons really possess the power to read thoughts!?

C: 嗨，行为艺术这玩意光烧钱不赚钱，咱是正经做生意的。「财富学院服务套餐」了解一下？
E: Bah, performance art is something that just costs you money. This is legitimate business. Care to learn more about the Fortune Academy Service Package?

C: 你见猎心喜，压低嗓门表达了你对钟表小子原作以及眼前同人漫画的喜爱。沉默的智械听罢不再沉默，欢快地同你小声交流起来。
E: Delighted by what you see, you express your love for the original Clockie works and the artist's comic before you in a hushed voice. The silent Intellitron is no longer silent at your gushing, and happily converses with you in a similarly low whisper.

C: 收到！请各位演员站到指定位置，我们的拍摄马上就要开始了。
E: Got it! Actors at your designated spots please. We're going to start rolling.

C: 璀璨的光球复位成功，表面金黄色的液体缓缓流动下，形成奇妙的光晕。
E: The spheroid has successfully returned to its original position. As the golden fluid on its surface flows slowly, it forms a wondrous halo.

C: 你看你…不许撅嘴，走走走，回家写检讨去，不能对泰坦不敬！
E: Alright... No pouting. Let's go home and write a report about this. We must not be disrespectful to the Titans!

C: 这里…是怎么回事？
E: What... happened here?

C: 没有一件是我的风格吧！
E: None of them are my style!

C: 太困了！我要睡到宇宙热寂！
E: I'm so sleepy! I'm going to sleep until the heat death of the universe!

C: 要充分考虑利衡币和信用点之间的汇率涨跌，一个月内货币的流通速度和贬值率，大地兽商人利用资金差可能获得的投资收益，还有……
E: You must fully consider the fluctuation of exchange rates between Balance Coins and credits, the circulation and depreciation rates of currencies within the month, the potential yields when the dromas merchant invests his assets, and...

C: 沐浴香皂。
E: Bath soap.

C: 「歪曲的逻辑」…这个回答真的足够幽默吗？再问问其他人的看法吧。
E: Twisted logic... Is this answer humorous enough? Let's get a second opinion.

C: …好冷，好冷，冷得我的鬃毛都要一根根竖起来了！
E: ...It's so, so bad, it's making the hair stand on their ends!

C: 谜底就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 试想一下，你走进一个房间，一头小小的大地兽过来迎接你，场面一定十分温馨吼！但要是它长得和房间差不多大，打开门就看见它巨大的鼻孔正对着你吹气——
E: Think about it: You enter a room, and are greeted by a small dromas — a cozy scene indeed! But when it grows to about the size of the room, and you open the door, only to be accosted by its giant nostrils breathing into your face...

C: 我给一生中最珍视的朋友们留下了十封邮件，请你用邮箱替我转——
E: I've left ten emails for the most cherished friends in my life. Please forward them for me —

C: 但开拓者的直觉告诉你，现实情况似乎并非如此。
E: However, your Trailblazer instincts tell you that this is not the case...

C: 现在似乎「冷却」得刚刚好。帮他拿出来吧，免得实验失败。
E: It looks like it's reached the perfect "cooling" point. Why not take it out for him? You don't want his experiment to fail.

C: 呼呼…快逃，快逃……
E: *crackle* Run... Run away now...

C: 呼呼。好想回到山里去啊。
E: *crackle* I want to return to the mountains.

C: 什么东西能隔绝污秽，镇压不祥气息；又坚固无比，足以承受最猛烈的风吹雨打？
E: What repels impurities, subdues filth, and is sturdy enough to endure the harshest winds and rain?

C: 垃圾桶盖。
E: A trashcan's lid.

C: 我。
E: Me.

C: 你是一个废桶。
E: You are a basket case.

C: 等于<unbreak>14</unbreak>。
E: It equals <unbreak>14</unbreak>.

C: 别怕，弟弟，让{M#他}{F#她}见识我们热血沸腾的组合技！
E: Never fear, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

C: （交钱拿货）。
E: (Give over the money and take the goods).

C: …可怜的家伙，你已被命运的大手攥握，注定要面临无妄之灾——不是每个闯入禁地的人都能活着离开。
E: ...Poor thing. You've been gripped by the hand of destiny, fated to face this unforeseen calamity... Not every trespasser will make it out alive.

C: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
E: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

C: 伟大的「秩序」。
E: The great Order.

C: 我去，这简直是我！
E: What the... This sounds exactly like me!

C: 哈哈，师傅你说话还真实诚！
E: Haha, you really are frank, Master!

C: 谐乐学院谈灵感，一切务实靠边站。筑梦学院爱摆烂，遇到问题叉手看。财富学院是傻蛋，设下诡计自个绊。垃圾学院千千万，一旦选错就业难！
E: When Charmony Academy talks of a muse, all pragmatism they refuse. Dreamweaver Academy loves to slack. When problems arise, they turn their back. Fortune Academy is full of clowns, setting traps that trip themselves down. Trashcan Academy? They're a dime a dozen! Pick the wrong one, and you'll find your path frozen!

C: 什么？这里可是教室，禁止校外人员扰乱课堂秩序！
E: What? This is a classroom — outsiders are forbidden from disrupting lessons!

C: （说起来你可能不信，我不久以前还被当作收藏品，关在一个空间站里……）
E: (You probably won't believe this, but not long ago, I was treated like a collection and locked away in a space station...)

C: 我有些更险象环生的故事…
E: I've got even wilder stories to share...

C: （说起难忘的冒险，那就不得不提起旅途的第一站了……）
E: (If we're talking unforgettable adventures, then I've got to start with my very first stop on the road...)

C: （修理不是一件困难的事。磋磨、雕琢、切割，和练习挥剑一样，由无数个简单至极的瞬间组成……）
E: (Fixing things isn't hard. Sanding, carving, shaping... it's a lot like practicing swordplay where it's composed of countless extremely simple moments...)

C: 迷…风铃到底为什么不响了呢？
E: Me... why won't the wind chime ring anymore?

C: 不过——偷偷告诉你，我好久没有回信的好朋友，最近终于回信了迷！
E: But — just between us, my friend who hadn't written in so long, finally sent me a letter, memi!

C: 风铃发出了悦耳的声音。除此之外，什么都没发生——昔涟留在风铃上的魔法用完了？
E: The wind chime sings a lovely tune. Nothing happens other than that. Looks like Cyrene's magic has finally run dry?

C: 呵，从这个角度看，翁法罗斯或许是个安全匣呢。毕竟，三股令使级别甚至更高的命途之力，一旦擦枪走火，可比查德威克那家伙的炸药带劲多了。
E: Hmph, when you look at it that way, Amphoreus might be a safety box. After all, three forces at the Emanator level or even higher — if they were to come to blows, it would be far more explosive than Chadwick's bombs.

C: 有些兴趣。
E: Kinda.

C: 有，人家说的。是不是很有道理？
E: It is. I just said it. Makes sense, doesn't it?

C: 风车转呀转，转得好慢好慢，仿佛连时间也停下来了呢……
E: Round and round the windmill spins, so slow, oh so slow, so slow that it's like even time itself has stopped...

C: 你知道吗？在哀丽秘榭的古语中，人们会将「初见」，念作「寻获」，又或者……「重逢」。
E: Do you know that in the ancient language of Aedes Elysiae, "first encounter" is read as "searching" or... "reunion."

C: 等等，我刚才是乱说的！
E: Wait! I was lying!

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: There is no doubt about it. The giant wooden prop before you is one you recognize from an old story. Its head raised high in the sky and room in its stomach for several people — it has all the familiar characteristics you expect.

C: （什么都不做）
E: (Do nothing)

C: 那些跳跃的火苗已经熄灭，其中小小的灵智，恐怕也随着永昼的终结逝去了。
E: Those flickering flames have already been extinguished, and the tiny sparks of sentience within them have likely perished along with the end of the Eternal Day.

C: 无处可去的人们循着火光而来……
E: Those with nowhere to go follow the glow of the flames...

C: …汪汪？汪汪汪！汪！
E: ...Woof woof? Woof woof woof! Woof!

C: 这三个人，分别是…算了，你只是个普通人，跟你说了你也不懂。
E: And these three people respectively are... Aw, forget it. You're just a random stranger, so you wouldn't understand even if I told you.

C: 阿德勒
E: Adler

C: 你能听懂珍稀物种说话吗？
E: Can you understand their language?

C: 我只是法政科的一位向导而已，具体的方针策略，还得等创始人古恩老师决定。
E: I'm just a guide. Specific policies and strategies will be decided by the founder, Mr. Gunn.

C: 那边的年轻人，你有什么推荐的菜品吗？
E: Youngster, do you have any recommendations?

C: 哦，你听见了？不用在意，只是无聊的自言自语。
E: Oh, did you hear that? Don't mind me. I was just mumbling nonsense to myself.

C: 你有权限赠送奇物？
E: Do you have the right to give Curios as a gift?

C: 你手里拿着的是？
E: What are you holding?

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你看上去很年轻啊。
E: You look very young.

C: 之后或许我还需要联络一些密卷科的老同事，一起想办法转录一些材料。只有存放在大脑里的东西，或许才是最长久的吧。
E: I may have to contact some ex-colleagues to transcribe some of the files. Things stored in our heads last the longest.

C: 空间站里还有别的匿名群吗？
E: Are there other anonymous group chats on the station?

C: 我听呜呜伯说，照顾它的什么「界子科」科员是个叫「温得了」的小孩。他们科室的其他人，无论老少，也都姓温，这好像是一种科室传统。
E: I heard from the Wubbaboo that the Department of Ecolurgy researcher who took care of it was a kid named Wen Deliao or something. Many people in that department, old or young, have Wen as their last name. It seems to be a tradition of that department.

C: 是阮•梅女士派你来找我吗？她终于想起我了？！
E: Did Miss Ruan Mei send you here? Did she finally think of me!?

C: 所以我和其他造物，还有那些勤劳的小机器人一直在努力修复这个区域。等我们把舱段修复好了，她回来的时候起码有个干净舒适的地方可以休息……
E: So, the other creations and I, as well as those diligent little robots, have been working hard to fix this zone. With that, Miss Ruan Mei will at least have a clean and comfortable place to stay when she returns...

C: 我就知道，没有人会想和我聊天的。
E: I knew it, nobody would want to chat with me.

C: 约瑟夫突然压低了声音，靠近你的耳朵——噢它踮起了不知道藏在哪儿的脚——但又失败了，你不得不弯下腰，他这才放心地开口。
E: Joseph suddenly lowers his voice and edges closer toward your ear. It tries to stand on tiptoes with its previously hidden feet, but fails. You have to bend over to make him feel comfortable enough to speak.

C: 还有那些小铁皮罐子——就是你们叫「小机器人」的玩意，有时候也得沟通沟通，就是挺费劲，得动手按它们的按钮才能沟通。
E: It's also important to reach out to those tin cans — what you people call "little robots" — from time to time. That's quite a hassle, as I need to press their buttons first to talk to them.

C: 这是大家给我起的绰号，不是我的本名，我的本名只有阮•梅女士知道，也只有阮•梅女士才能喊。
E: It's the nickname everyone gave me, not my real name, which is only known to Miss Ruan Mei. Only she can call me by that.

C: 你怎么就当别人模特了？
E: How did you end up becoming someone else's model?

C: 下来玩呜，约瑟夫喊的呜呜…呜呜答应了。
E: Joseph said, woo, get down and play, boo... and I said yes.

C: 你哪位？
E: Who are you?

C: 嗯…得到这个问题的答案，就是你拨来通讯的原因吗？
E: Hmm... Did you make this call to get the answer to this question?

C: 押注「最强之矛」。
E: Bet on the Strongest Lance.

C: 你要不再找吉奥里亚进点货吧。
E: How about you ring up Georios for more inventory?

C: 这次打算卖些什么？
E: What are you intending to sell this time?

C: 说到这个，还真得问问您的意见。
E: Speaking of that, we should really ask your opinion.

C: 符合条件的仲裁人可不好找，您就别费这个心了，我给您个优惠价！
E: It's hard to find a qualified arbitrator, but don't worry, I will give you a discount!

C: ——不打算试试吗？
E: ...Will you try it?

C: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
E: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

C: 既然这位智者愿意加入讨论，我们就来选个直观而深奥的论题。阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我先退让一步，将确定论题的权力交付你。
E: As this wise one has seen fit to join us in debate, let us select a topic that is both intuitive and profound. Parmenides of Icatus, I shall step back and pass the rights of topic selection to you.

C: …啊…是这样吗……
E: ...Ah... I see...

C: 让婶婶自己静一静吧…我也需要再冷静一下。
E: Let Aunty Demetria cool off for a while... I personally need to cool off, too.

C: 这里太大了，很难找到她的去向。还是先调查下过去的记忆，寻找线索吧
E: It's too big here and impossible to find where she's gone. Let's go over some past memories and try to pull out some more clues.

C: 宁芙……
E: Nympha...

C: 再去问问古玩店的西塔罗斯吧，看看能否从交易中获取些线索。
E: Lastly, try asking Theodoros in the ancient artifacts store. Maybe there will be a clue or two in their recent transactions.

C: 嗯…比方说好多好多钱。有了钱才能买装备、买物资，最好再租几头大地兽，雇一群仆人。
E: Hmm... like lots and lots of money. You'll need money to buy equipment and supplies, and you should probably hire a few dromases plus a group of attendants.

C: 好吧，我试试看。
E: Alright, I'll give it a shot.

C: 看来，不是只有我觉得他的行动包含疑点。
E: It seems I'm not alone in finding his actions dubious.

C: 如果没有其他事情，还是早些回奥赫玛吧。
E: If there's nothing else, you'd better return to Okhema soon.

C: 辛苦你了……
E: Thank you for all this...

C: 不瞒您说，以我照顾大地兽这么多年的经验，我猜测啊…<color=#dbc291ff>这头大地兽准是失恋了。</color>
E: To tell you the truth, with my years of experience caring for dromases, I suspect... <color=#dbc291ff>this dromas must've had its heart broken.</color>

C: …嗡嗡！
E: ...Grumph!

C: 求你了，来吃吧——
E: Come on, eat this, please —

C: 你知道的，万敌是我兄弟。
E: You know, Mydei is a brother to me.

C: 这样么。第二次命令，我也没有继续违抗的道理了。到此为止吧。
E: So that's it. The second command — I have no reason to disobey further. It ends here.

C: 我是阿基维利祝福的无名客。
E: I am one of the Nameless blessed by Akivili.

C: 帮我个忙，我想带个人进去。
E: Do me a favor: I want to bring someone in.

C: 以大欺小，真不害臊。
E: Bullying someone so much younger... have you no shame?

C: 希瑞雅抽噎着跑开了。
E: Serena sobs and runs off.

C: 兄弟，演戏天赋不错。
E: Gotta hand it to you, buddy — your acting skills are top-notch.

C: 是的，又是战斗环节。好在你身边有一位超越了人类极限的可靠伙伴，或许你可以向他请求帮助。
E: Yes, it's another battle phase. Fortunately, you have a reliable companion by your side, someone who has surpassed human limits. Perhaps you can ask for their help.

C: 等他们回来的这段时间里，我们也不能闲着。
E: We can't just sit around doing nothing while we wait for them to come back.

C: 我、我实在打不动了……
E: I just... can't go on fighting anymore...

C: 难度是不是有点大啊？
E: Are you sure you can do this?

C: 当最后一个黑潮造物被消灭，壁垒也完成了。
E: The last of the Black Tide Creatures is vanquished just as the barricade is completed.

C: 等等，你是…？
E: Wait... you are...?

C: 希瑞雅，长大了啊。
E: Serena, you've grown up.

C: 顽石对微风的轻拂无动于衷，只因它心系世界的命运……
E: The stubborn boulder remains unmoved by the gentle breeze, for its heart is bound to the world's destiny...

C: 曳石爵…是你复原的，对吗？
E: Dux Helkolithist... you restored him, didn't you?

C: 实在是感激不尽，后续您要是有朋友来到这里，欢迎来酿造区体验！这场欢宴欢迎每一个热爱蜜酿的人！
E: We cannot thank you enough. If you ever return with friends, do stop by our harvest zone! Our revelry has room for anyone who enjoys honey brew!

C: 只有极少数人能品出，这樽蜜酿有多么价值不菲。铭为「致大地兽」，光历<unbreak>4500</unbreak>年制。
E: Only a rare few can tell just how valuable this honey brew is. Labeled "To Dromas," crafted in Light Calendar <unbreak>4500</unbreak>.

C: 唔，我倒不认为它是个奇物。
E: Oh, I don't think that's a curio.

C: 或许它有自己的一套选择机制，只有被这个奇物认可的人才被允许坐在上面。
E: Perhaps it has its own set of authorization mechanisms, and only those it recognizes are permitted to sit on it.

C: 我去把三月七的相机拿来！
E: I'll go get March's camera!

C: 说好了，下次来机械屋找我，姐姐给你免费！
E: It's a deal then. Next time you need something done in the workshop, I'll do it for free!

C: 姬子小姐专门给我看了看她的杰作…那可真是太——酷啦！看得我实在手痒痒，可惜我也不好意思和人说能不能拆开看看……
E: Himeko showed me her masterpiece. I gotta say: Soooo cool! It was hard to resist the urge to open it up and see what was inside, but I managed to control myself...

C: 可以用来调度士兵。
E: You could use it to deploy troops.

C: 这里可以增加一些虹膜识别设备，防止外来人员潜入列车……
E: This place could do with some iris scanners... wouldn't want unregistered visitors sneaking aboard.

C: 外…外来人员！？
E: U—Unregistered visitors!?

C: 参观的话，应该从哪里开始呢…好不容易放松紧绷的神经，竟然还有点不习惯了。
E: Sightseeing on the Express... Where should I begin? It's weird that when I finally have the chance to take a break, I don't know how.

C: 那就改造呗！
E: So? Modify it!

C: 中了！
E: Got it!

C: 小时候，我在画册上见到渊兽，便和家里人吵着要去看，他们却说，渊兽几千年前就已经灭绝了。
E: I remember seeing a picture of a depth crawler in my childhood — I insisted to my parents that we had to go and see them... My parents told me how they had been extinct for thousands of years.

C: 可以和它聊聊别的。
E: Chats don't require gifts.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone.

C: 我不是一个喜欢为自己贴金揽功的人，希望你能明白这一点。
E: I'm not someone who likes to reap benefits for myself, and I hope you understand that.

C: 退休之后就不能说自己在忙什么了，一般都说是：最近在玩儿着什么呢。
E: I'm retired, so that might not be an accurate question. We normally just say what we've been playing with.

C: 嗯，你说得对。
E: Yeah, you're right.

C: 为什么是姬子？
E: Why Himeko?

C: 嘿，是{NICKNAME}呀？又见面啦~
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}? We meet again!

C: {NICKNAME}，列车上有吃的吗？账账好像有点饿了。
E: {NICKNAME}, is there any food on the Express? I think Numby's hungry.

C: 还是去问问列车长吧。
E: I should ask the conductor.

C: 车厢里真是温暖啊。
E: This car is so warm.

C: 哪怕徒劳，也要反抗。
E: We must take a stand, even if it's futile.

C: 欣赏它的浩瀚美丽吧。
E: Enjoy its grandeur and beauty.

C: 的确，美得惊人…但也有些让人脊背发凉。
E: You're right, it's breathtaking... but it also sends a bit of a chill down my spine.

C: 呜呜呜啊啊啊啊啊——！
E: Ahhhhhhhh!

C: …有时我会想，一切如果都是巧合与意外的话，我是不是…没有判官的资格呢？
E: ...Sometimes I wonder: If everything that's happened to me is just a coincidence or an accident, then... am I really qualified to be a judge?

C: 挺意外的…
E: Kinda surprising...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here!

C: 谢谢！等爷爷回来之后，米沙也许就能一起启程前往远方了！
E: Thank you! Once Grandpa returns, perhaps I'll get the chance to join you on adventures to far-off worlds!

C: 嗯，虽然暂时还不能与你们同行，米沙会默默为你们祝福！
E: Although I can't come along with you all, I'll be here, wishing you the best!

C: 是啊，尤其是那种特别的苦味，火辣辣的，让喉咙发麻。
E: That's right. Especially that bitter taste, the spiciness, and the way it makes your throat numb.

C: 这个角度…刚好能看见一片璀璨的群星，真美啊……
E: From this angle... I can see a brilliant river of stars. It's mesmerizing...

C: 既然你答应了，我信了！
E: Since you agreed, I'll take you at your word!

C: 可惜，曾经包裹住她的「六相冰」虽然承载着一些不为人知的过往，加之三月小姐对自己的过去没有任何印象…
E: It's unfortunate — the Six-Phased Ice that once enveloped her carries its own mysteries, and Miss March has amnesia about her own past...

C: 与此同时，「记忆」的祝福也会在那一刻降临，加之给诸位，敬请期待这份惊喜吧。
E: At the same time, the blessing of Remembrance will fall upon everyone. Please look forward to this surprise.

C: {NICKNAME}，你是否在观察我手中的绒球？我正打算把它作为肩甲上的装饰。
E: {NICKNAME}, are you looking at the fluff ball in my hand? I was thinking of using it to adorn the armor on my shoulder.

C: 「纯美」无处不在，我会终其一生追逐祂的行迹。
E: The Beauty is everywhere, and I will spend my life following THEIR trail.

C: 这类竞速对于刚入门的新手来说，的确有些难以掌握。
E: Such races can be quite difficult for beginners to get a handle on.

C: 期待未来有一天，我们能有机会同场竞技。
E: I hope that one day, we will have the chance to meet on the racetrack.

C: 可惜那会儿我正急着赶去工造司，当时正逢剑器冷却的关键阶段，容不得丝毫闪失。待剑器彻底冷却，我回头再去寻那香甜的气息，却早已散去了。
E: Unfortunately, at the time, I was hurrying to the Artisanship Commission. My sword was at a crucial point of cooling off, and I couldn't afford to make any mistakes. When the sword had completely cooled, I went back to find the sweet scent, but it had already disappeared.

C: 我去写计划表了。不会让你们因压力倒地不起的！
E: I'm going to write out the schedule. I promise I won't make you collapse under the pressure!

C: 虽然新的尝试可能伴随着酸涩，但总归也是看见天地广阔的必要一步呀。
E: Though these new experiences may turn sour, they are still necessary steps in my journey to witness this vast world.

C: 如今回到车厢一瞧，感觉戴上帽子的列车长也变得更可爱了。还有三月姑娘的照相机，姬子小姐的发饰也十分精妙。
E: Now that I'm back here, I feel the conductor looks even cuter with their hat on. Miss March's camera and Miss Himeko's hair accessories are all very intricate, too.

C: 喜欢假装自己很穷的那个
E: That guy that likes pretending he's poor?

C: 年轻人，以前没见过你啊。
E: Young {F#lady}{M#man}, I've never seen you before.

C: 说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 真想知道结晶宝石蜥蜴、食髓洞螈、葬礼虫之类的生物，究竟是怎么进食、怎么繁衍的呢……
E: I really want to know more about these crystalline lizards, geomarrow olms, funeral worms... I want to know what they eat, how they reproduce... everything.

C: 嗯？说来听听。
E: Hmm? Please elaborate.

C: 反正你只要知道光是粒子就行了，什么波理论啊二相性啊，这些高级术语跟你说了也白搭。重点是：粒子会携带信息，对吧？
E: All you need to know is that light is a particle. Terms like wave theory or duality might be too complicated for you. My point is: Particles carry information. Are you with me?

C: 呃…也不完全是。我在写的是达米尔和阿尔乔姆在「熔岩之国」探险的故事——有点像《奇谭》粉丝们自发进行的二次创作，只是质量更加低劣……
E: Eh... Not exactly. The story I'm writing is about Dalmir and Artem as they go on an adventure in the Lava Kingdom. It's a little like the fanfictions of the Tales series that the readers produce, but the quality is even worse...

C: 不过我听说市政厅准备开发城郊，还派了人去勘探城郊区域了，那么这套小说也没有再禁的必要了吧……
E: I've heard that the Town Hall is getting ready to develop the outskirts of the city. They've apparently dispatched people to explore that area. If that's true, then there's no need to ban that series...

C: 还有就是…啊呀呀，说起来有点难为情——但塔米拉小姐最近公开批评歌词立意很差这种事，总令小女子觉得不太舒服呢～
E: Also... *sigh* I shouldn't say this but I don't feel comfortable with Tamila's recent public criticism of the lyrics.

C: 要是因为这点挫折就离开的话，别人会怎么看我啊？
E: What will people think of me if I leave because of this little setback?

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 你所热爱的才是你的生活…
E: Whatever you're passionate about is what your life really is...

C: 话不用说得这么绝对吧？
E: You don't have to make it sound so extreme.

C: …不说话我就先走了。
E: Was there... anything else? If not, I'm gonna go.

C: 你就自己在这里指点江山吧。
E: You can stay here and keep lecturing.

C: 再说了，究竟是被我虐待了，还是这个拳手自己内心承受力太弱啊？不知道从自己身上找原因，这就是弱者的心态！
E: Maybe they're just too fragile. Instead of reflecting on their own decisions, they accuse me of abuse! The typical mentality of the weak!

C: 大概是吧。
E: I guess so.

C: 哎，你一打岔，我又得从头捋一遍了。完了完了……
E: Bah, now I have to go through my thoughts again. Oh no...

C: 没…没什么。就是，听说你们是从外、外边来的…是真的吗？
E: I heard that you are from the o—outside... Is that true?

C: 「语言逻辑中枢」？
E: A language module?

C: 您好，欢迎光临歌德宾馆！
E: Hello! Welcome to the Goethe Hotel!

C: 尽管问吧！有问必答也是待客之道。
E: Sure! Answering the guests' questions is a way to show your hospitality.

C: 总之，本「矿灯」巴列维即日起停止一切鉴定服务——说来话长，我这有份公告，你拿去自己看吧。
E: Anyway, effective from today, I, "Miner's Lamp" Balaway will stop all appraisal services. It's a long story. You can have a look at this notice.

C: 抓洞螈？
E: Catch olms?

C: 不怎么样，不过已经有些好转的征兆了。
E: Not good — but there're some signs of improvement.

C: 看看这装潢——想必你也能猜到了吧？这里当然是维修机械的店铺啦。
E: Just look at the decor — you can probably guess, right? It's a mechanical repairs shop, of course.

C: ——记住！「存护」无所不在，你迈出的每一小步都在祂的注视之下！
E: ...Remember! Preservation is everywhere around us. Every little step you take is under THEIR watch!

C: 看来你还是很在意自己姐姐的嘛～
E: It looks like you really care for your big sis!

C: …「机械聚落」就这样发展壮大啦。
E: ...and that's how the Robot Settlement developed into such a bastion.

C: 总之，克拉拉会尽力把小家伙修好……
E: Anyway, I will do my best to fix it up...

C: 我知道，托帕姐姐已经跟我说过了！而且，她还将「源代码」交给了克拉拉。
E: I know. Miss Topaz already told me! And, she gave me the Source Code!

C: 识别结果为「外来者」{NICKNAME}——敌意等级：无。
E: Identification result: Outsider {NICKNAME} — Hostility level: None.

C: 之前巴列维过来找到我，说要买下我的「地髓矿脉探针」。
E: Balaway came to me and said he wanted to buy my Geomarrow Probe.

C: 这次她又摆弄起了什么「便携式通讯装置」，还把里面会动的照片给我看...年轻人接受新事物就是快啊......
E: Recently, she's been tinkering with a "portable communicator" or something, and she has even showed me the moving pictures inside... Young people are always quick to embrace new stuff...

C: 哎哟，这话不能乱讲！我前面说的可是句句属实…而且就算是简单的系统升级，在这么个偏远星球也算得上独家技术了。
E: Hey, that's hardly the case at all! I swear I was telling you the truth... And to be honest, even a simple system upgrade can be an exclusive gimmick on a remote planet like this.

C: 这有什么可机密的？
E: What's so secretive about it?

C: 哼，哼哼？
E: Oink, oink oink?

C: 咕喔…咕…呜！
E: Groo... Hoo... Arf!

C: 塔米拉好像要休养一阵…
E: Tamila seems to be taking some time off...

C: 你品品这蜂蜜燕麦慕斯……
E: Have a taste of this Honey and Oats Mousse...

C: 给妈妈买什么好呢？
E: What should I buy for my mom?

C: 咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……
E: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 没办法，咱再找点活干吧。
E: Uh oh, we'll have to find some more work for us to do, then.

C: 真气派~大灰熊~
E: Big gray bear~ So impressive~

C: 嘿，吃了没？
E: Hey, how's it going?

C: 有的垃圾能够得到走进橱窗的机会，而有的垃圾却只能被埋没在漆黑深邃的垃圾桶中，永不见天日……
E: Some trash has a chance to be displayed behind a cabinet glass, but some others can only be buried beneath the sunless depths of a trashcan...

C: 幽囚狱环境错综复杂，所收押犯人也是三教九流，若{NICKNAME}大人在这里遇到任何问题，都可以随时找我。{NICKNAME}大人如果没有别的问题，现在我就接着忙去了。
E: The Shackling Prison has a convoluted layout, and we detain prisoners of various factions here. Feel free to come to me anytime if you need help with something. If you have no other questions, I'll leave you to it, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我听人说你这里算得不准？
E: I've heard that your divinations aren't accurate?

C: 咱们尚滋味就在附近，您要是感兴趣就到店里坐坐。咱们尚滋味的立命之本就是「亲民」，保准道道菜都便宜又好吃！
E: Spices Supreme isn't far from here. Please visit us if you're interested. Our motto is to "cook for the people." We guarantee our food is inexpensive and tasty!

C: 现在今非昔比啦！金人巷到处都是化外民，他们对仙舟那些成百上千年历史的「旧物」可感兴趣了。
E: But everything has changed, now! The Aurum Alley is full of outworlders and they love the ancient "artifacts" of Xianzhou.

C: 客人付了钱，把感兴趣的「书签」取下，靠近玉兆，就能下载阅读了。
E: You pay, then pick out the "bookmark" you like, hold them close to your jade abacus, and download them to read later.
*sigh*

C: 好啊，反正我也没什么灵感…你想找我打听什么，工造技术之类的吗？
E: Alright. It's not like I have any inspiration... What are you after? Is it about artifex technology?

C: 打起来！打起来！
E: Fight! Fight!

C: 之前越狱事件发生时，我不但自己没参与越狱，还号召集团的两位董事不参与越狱…十王慈怀！判官们说这算3件「小功」，多温暖人心啊！
E: During the previous prison break incident, not only did I not participate in it, I even convinced our group's two directors to not participate as well... Oh, merciful Ten Lords! The judges said that it would be considered 3 "Small Merits." It really warmed my heart!

C: 没事没事，又不收钱。我保证很快就讲完的！
E: No worries, it's free anyway. I promise I'll make this really quick!

C: 为了让学员们坚持下去，拳馆才精心设计这样的收费模式。你想，你要是花了钱，却不来锻炼身体，你就会觉得自己很亏，你就会想来锻炼身体。
E: Our business model is designed to help gym-goers stick to the plan. Think about it — if you spend money without exercising, you'll feel like you're getting ripped off. And you'll come to the gym for training.

C: 更何况，如此一来，我也不用再额外费心力思考大大小小的生活琐事了。
E: What's more, this way I don't even have to think about all those trivial mundane things that happen in life.

C: 行雪。
E: Xingxue.

C: 那你怎么骗到我头上了？
E: Then why did you try and trick me?

C: {NICKNAME}，一直久闻大名也没机会好好聊聊。请问你今天来神策府有何贵干？
E: {NICKNAME}, I've heard so much about you but never had the chance to chat with you. May I ask, how can we help you today at the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 有的。有一个机密事宜，在神策府知道的人都寥寥可数，我说与你听……
E: Yes. This is confidential information that few know in the Seat of Divine Foresight. So, look...

C: 很久以后老夫才理解，为什么那位化外民会那么惊讶。因为他们…或者说你们，和我们对物件的「实用性」有着不同的定义。
E: It took me an age to realize why that Outworlder was so surprised. Because they all — I mean, you all have a different definition of what "practicality" means.

C: 档案放一起，不怕被一锅端么？
E: All these files together... are you not worried about them being wiped out in an accident?

C: 罗浮航行时，我们计算罗浮的航线，避开凶危的路径。罗浮停泊时，我们计算周遭星体的动向。
E: We calculate the Luofu's trajectory as it sails and help it avoid any dangerous routes. When moored, we calculate and track the movements of the celestial bodies around us.

C: 找你的话应该是什么事情？
E: What issues would you be handling normally?

C: 「地衡司内最聪明的头脑派」当然是做一些需要头脑的工作了。
E: As the Realm-Keeping Commission's Most Intelligent, naturally I engage in cerebral activity.

C: 你这话说的太严重了。我曾经也是一个很有责任心的执事，就是责任心太重，反倒是遭遇了打击…现在，我再也不敢承担责任了。
E: That's such a serious accusation. I used to be a very responsible officer too. In fact, it's because I was too responsible that I paid a heavy price... Now, I don't dare take on any more responsibility.

C: 我是天舶司翔水商会派驻在流云渡的专员，负责接洽来到罗浮进行商业贸易的域外行商。
E: I'm a representative of the Aquaglider Guild sent to Cloudford by the Sky-Faring Commission to handle all Outworld traveling merchants who come and trade on the Luofu.

C: 天舶司的态度是挺好的，怪就怪我遇上了建木生发，关闭玉界门，暂停商团批文，天舶司早就忙得焦头烂额了，我也能理解他们有多辛苦。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission has been reasonable. I can only blame the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, the closing of the Jade Gate, and the cessation of trade permits. They have been burned out for a while over at the Sky-Faring Commission and I can understand how hard they've been working.

C: 有机会下次再聊吧。
E: Catch you again next time.

C: 别看判官们逮捕凶犯时雷厉风行，其实背后都要走一套严谨的行政流程。就算是遇到紧急情况，现场做出了「处置」，事后也得补一个行政手续，我就是专门做这事的。
E: Though you've seen the majesty of judges arresting people left and right, hitting culprits with the full force of the law as they please. In actual fact, they have to follow a strict set of administrative procedures behind the scenes. Even if there is an emergency, and they have to deliver some on-site "judgment," there are still processes that have to be retroactively filed. This is what I specialize in.

C: 天生的。当我父母发现我这项天赋之后，我就成了我们家的摇钱树。出演各种节目、代言各种广告、客串各种幻戏…我一度是「罗浮」最有名的小孩。
E: I was born with it. After my parents discovered my talent, I became my family's breadwinner. I joined talent shows, participated in advertisements, made guest appearances on all kinds of immersias... I was once a pretty famous kid on the Luofu.

C: 你说的没错，我现在已经能熟练掌握这项技能了。
E: You're not wrong. I've come to master this trick.

C: 阴险狡诈，难以靠近。
E: She's sneaky, cunning, and unreliable.

C: 无非就是那些家长里短啊爱恨情仇的，无聊，别再来问了，我什么也不知道！
E: I bet it's just those boring familial news and romance. Boring! Stop asking me. I know nothing!

C: 看见大人如此意气风发的样子，不禁想到自家的孩子…这话题不谈也罢，我还得站岗放哨呢，就不与大人闲谈了。还有别的事吗？
E: Seeing as you are in such high spirits, I can't help but think of my own child... But let's not go there. I've got my post to uphold, so I can't chitchat. Is there anything else on your mind?

C: 总之，这样的状态不会一直持续下去，我向你保证。
E: All in all, this situation won't last forever. I can promise you that.

C: 好了，要是没事，容我先坐下喝口茶——
E: Alright. If it's okay with you, then I'll just take a seat and have a sip of tea...

C: 我的店铺开在这儿，外面有什么风吹草动的，我看两眼很正常。
E: This is my shop, so it's normal for me to keep both eyes peeled for any troubles that might arise.

C: 在下是十王司的冥差。平日里接引大限将至的仙舟住民入因果殿、归于寂灭。
E: I'm a humble spiritfarer for the Ten-Lords Commission. I receive everyday Xianzhou citizens into the Hall of Karma as they approach the end of their life and wait for their time to come.

C: 你在鳞渊境做什么？
E: What are you doing in Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 哼，先是与丰饶民的血战，随后「饮月之乱」几乎动摇了「建木」根柢…如今「药王秘传」的小丑妖人又将这里搅成了一锅粥！
E: Hmph, first there was the bloody conflict against the Denizens of Abundance. Then the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae almost shook the Ambrosial Arbor to its core... And now those clowns from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have turned everything into a steaming hot mess!

C: 蜕生陪伴服务恢复运营！「百般冗物，一抛成空；旧缘宿怨，舍手烟消。」
E: Normal resumption of hatching rebirth assistance services! "Dispose of all your troubles, leave old grudges in the dust."

C: 看您也不像是来买药的。不知道客官对这些持明蜕生留下的东西感兴趣吗？便宜的很！咱就收一个仓储费用。
E: I don't think you're here to buy any medicine. I wonder if you're interested in some of the stuff left behind by these hatching rebirth Vidyadhara? I'll cut you a deal! Just one low storage fee.

C: 欢迎客官您下次再来。
E: I warmly invite you to visit again next time.

C: 您这问得我都不敢答了…怎么说呢，毕竟确实很多信徒都是丹鼎司人士，和其中一些…我还挺熟的……
E: I don't dare to answer such a question... After all, many of the disciples also worked at the Alchemy Commission. So, I'm quite close with some of them...

C: 结果过了二百多年，我都做了医士了，这丹鼎司还是涛声依旧，看上去没什么衰败的苗头。
E: Two hundred years later, I became a healer, and the Alchemy Commission was still busy as ever, showing no signs of going downhill.

C: 最后我终于混够了资历，发够了论文，回到丹鼎司总部等着升迁。结果还没过几个月呢…您猜怎么着？丹鼎司造反啦！都加入那什么「药王秘传」啦！
E: After I had finally gained enough experience and published enough articles, I came back to headquarters, waiting to be promoted. Guess what happened just months after my return? The Alchemy Commission revolted and joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 那也比我强，我才回罗浮不久，别说罗浮的近况了，就连丹鼎司上下的事，我也是一头雾水。
E: That's better than me. Since I've just gotten back, I know little about the Alchemy Commission's affairs, let alone the latest happenings on the Luofu.

C: 收到消息之后，这会我都开不下去了，赶紧收拾行李回来交接，结果一回来，就连安排交接的人都见不着。
E: I left the conference halfway and quickly packed my bags. When I got back, not a single soul was there to arrange the handover.

C: 你对谁都是这个态度吗？
E: Are you like this to everyone?

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我觉得这些东西挺值钱的。
E: But I think this stuff is worth quite a lot of money.

C: 可惜啊，我俩是带着任务来到这里的，干掉他我也没有办法交差。
E: Too bad that we've got work to do. My higher-ups won't have anything nice to say if I got rid of Kiryu.

C: 这里就是尚滋味吗？
E: Is this Spices Supreme?

C: 别怪我多嘴，咱们这里的茶和不夜侯的茶有些差别，以防万一，容我说明一下——烈焰浓茶就是可以燃烧的茶。
E: Please allow me to remind you that my tea is different from that made by the Sleepless Earl. In case you didn't catch it the first time, I want to emphasize this again — my Flaming Potent Tea is combustible.

C: 我在店里总是无可避免地听到客人们的故事，不过请你放心，该说的、不该说的，我心中自然有数。
E: It is inevitable that I hear my customers' deep and intimate secrets. But rest assured, I know well what I'm not supposed to bandy about.

C: 我也告诉您一个相近价值的秘密。
E: Then I'll tell you a secret of similar value.

C: 我也告诉您一个可爱的秘密。
E: In this case, I'll share a cute secret with you, too.

C: 易得无价宝，难得有缘人呐。我这店里的东西，您要是都不满意，那说明我们缘分未到嘛。
E: Only their fated owner can realize their priceless value. If none of my stuff catches your eye, perhaps they are simply not destined to be yours.

C: 你完全不用机巧鸟送货的吗？
E: Don't you use cycranes for deliveries at all?

C: 噢，我前不久看上了长乐天某座浮岛上的一套房子…唉，虽然价格不菲，但我也不缺钱，就想寻个位居要津、往来热闹的地方置业。
E: I've recently got my eyes on a property on a floating island in Exalting Sanctum. It's expensive, but I'm not short on money. I just want to be at a place with a lot of traffic and surrounded by amenities.

C: 好，我也有事要忙，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}咱们有空再聊。
E: Sure, I have my business to attend to. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}. Let's talk again next time.

C: 嗯嗯，辛苦啦，我这边也有别的事要处理。有什么问题，可以随时来找我。
E: Yeah, sure, I've got some work to do, too. Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

C: 店里的文玩都是以我的审美标准精挑细选出来的，我挂出来卖，自然也有几分求知音的意思。
E: All the fandangles here were carefully selected and arranged by myself. So naturally, I hope they will find their destined owners.

C: 好在各部门的反应还算迅速，联通外界的出入口被及时封锁，关押恶逆的「无间区」与更深处的「黑绳区」也未受波及。
E: Thankfully, the various commissions took swift action to seal the portals connecting this prison to the outside world before anything worse could happen. This prevented the Avici Gaol, where evildoers are confined, and the Kalasutra Gaol located deeper within the prison from being thrown into chaos.

C: 你别看这小妮子是个短生种，业务水平可不比我们任何一个长生种要差。有时候做的那些狠活啊…姐看着都觉得害怕。
E: She might be a short-life species, but she's as excellent an acrobat as any long-life ones! Sometimes her stunts are so thrilling that... they even send chills down my spine.

C: 好嘞。那有空来看姐的演出啊～
E: Sure thing. Don't forget to come over and enjoy my performance when you have time!

C: 平时呢，我就帮着阿合马研发一些新产品…我自己也卖些药品，你要是感兴趣的话，可以找我购买～
E: I'm usually busy developing new products for Arma, but I also sell medicines in a personal capacity. If you're ever in need of medicine, don't hesitate to come to me!

C: 你想聊啥？我也是才到「罗浮」不久，要是问路的话，只有宣夜大道这一块还算熟悉。如果你要是问仙舟文化什么，我就更不擅长了。
E: What would you like to talk about? I've only been here for a short while. If you want to ask for directions, I'm only familiar with places around Starwatcher Avenue. If you want to know about the Xianzhou culture and whatnot, you've come to the wrong person.

C: 不过呢，还是要感谢我们小桂子。经此一劫，我李素裳的战斗能力可是越来越厉害了呀！搞不好以后还真能战胜彦卿大人，成为联盟第一剑神呢～
E: Still, I have to thank our Little Gui. After this ordeal, my fighting skills have improved by leaps and bounds! Who knows, I might just end up defeating Yanqing and becoming the top sword master in the entire alliance!

C: 是啊…以前是做过飞行士。不过已经有个几十年没再进过星槎驾驶舱了。
E: Yes... I used to be a pilot. However, it's been decades since I last stepped foot in the cockpit of a starskiff.

C: 为什么要摧毁我们？
E: Why do you want to destroy us?

C: 不过，她以前只和吾谈论工作中遇到的故事，现在却总会提起几位与工作无关「友人」。
E: That said, she used to only relate encounters she had at work to me, but she now tells me stories about her friends outside of work too.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」还顺利吗？
E: How's it going with Ghostly Grove?

C: 十王司还没有处理完岁阳吗？
E: Have the Ten Lords not finished taking care of the heliobi yet?

C: 嗯，我这里还有些要处理的事情，请一路小心。
E: Yeah, I've still got some things to take care of here. Take care!

C: 十王司还会留在绥园里吗？
E: Will the Ten-Lords Commission remain in Fyxestroll Garden?

C: 确实，就算身体是偃偶打造的，但总归是会疲惫的。
E: It's true. Even if she has the body of a puppet, she will still get fatigued.

C: 亲亲这么说就见外了，我对化外民的科技也是略知一二的。
E: That's such an Outworlder thing to say, honey. I understand a thing or two about your tech.

C: 哈哈哈哈，这样吧，你在仙舟的视频门户网站上搜索「玲珑斋说玉」，那上面有我上传的「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」的评测视频，视频里说得比较详细。
E: Haha, alright — search "The Iridescent Parlor Talks Jade" on Xianzhou's video portal and you'll find some very detailed videos I've uploaded that review the Auspicious XV.

C: 再说了，这也算是给自家店面打广告了。观众喜欢我的视频，也会信任我的产品，随后就会到我这里来买玉兆…这就是视频经济。
E: Besides, these are adverts for my store. People like my videos, trust my products, and then come into the store to buy a jade abacus... that's how the video economy works.

C: 哈哈哈哈，那位客人也不是什么财主，只是好面子而已。
E: Hahaha, he is no wealthy man, just a prideful one.

C: 二则，如此营生能来一时快钱，但天长日久难免遭拆穿，无异饮鸩止渴。
E: Secondly, it may bring in a quick short-term profit, but this scheme would be thwarted by other locals in the long run, and I'd be left with nothing.

C: 有位猎人打扮的化外民游客在我这儿典当了一把样式古旧的猎枪。
E: A hunter dressed like an outworld traveler pawned an old hunting rifle here once.

C: 确实，我做得很好吃。
E: Naturally. My dishes taste great.

C: 不过你放心，星槎海这里的食物不能代表仙舟美食，在仙舟上仍然能找到对美食有所追求的餐厅。
E: But don't worry. Starskiff Haven's food does not represent Xianzhou's culinary landscape. You can still find restaurants dedicated to the craft here.

C: 也许我确实爱过吧！不过那个「我」和现在的「我」根本就是两个人嘛，我才不要去扮演前世去满足别人，假装恩恩爱爱。我要寻找今生今世的最爱！
