E: Maybe I really did find love! But that version of me is completely different from who I currently am. I don't want to pretend that I'm still that person and to fake my love for others. I'm looking for my true love in this life that I'm living right now!

C: 我们有缘再见。
E: We'll meet again if destiny permits it.

C: 唔，村子里的人把我给捡了回去。当时联觉信标因为和神经突触间的结合松脱了，在休养了好一阵后，我才搞懂当地的语言。
E: Mmm, the villagers brought me back to their village. The Synesthesia Beacon had been dislodged from my synapses, so it wasn't until a long time after my recovery that I could finally understand their language.

C: 当时，那个村子附近的小镇上，有一个有钱人。我喊他叫老周。老周有钱，但是人很善良，乐善好施。
E: Once, there was a wealthy man in a small town near the village. I called him Old Zhou. He had money, yet he was also kind and helped others in need.

C: 你不怕药坏了人？
E: You weren't worried about any side effects?

C: 你给我买杯茶去呗？星芋啵啵就行。虽然难喝，但离乡太久，难喝的东西也变得有滋有味嘞。
E: How about buying a cup of tea for me? Startaro bubble tea works. It tastes terrible, but I've left home for so long that I appreciate even the most terrible drinks here.

C: 嗨，昨天风不是很大吗？那星槎也被吹走了，这石狮子搭上星槎就来了这里。
E: Gah, there were gale-force winds yesterday, yes? That starskiff was also blown away, and this stone lion was carried here by the skiff.

C: 肌肉不会因为短短一天的努力就出现，能挡住炮弹轰炸的胸大肌，背后一定是久经磨炼的肉体。
E: Muscles can't grow overnight. To build strong pecs capable of withstanding cannonball attacks, long-term regular training is essential.

C: 她那箭矢可以自动制导索敌，开弦不过是为了满足某种古代射术的仪式感。
E: Her arrows are actually self-guided auto-aim ones, and drawing the bow is just used to give a sense of antiquity.

C: 「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…仙舟真的有这等好东西？
E: "Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates." ...is there really such incredible tech aboard Xianzhou?

C: 呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲讲神仙姐姐其他的故事吧！
E: Phew... Storytelling is tiring. If you want to keep listening, I'll tell you more stories about her next time!

C: 真是仙缘不浅…
E: Your life is truly intertwined with the celestials...

C: 嘿嘿，是吧。娘也说，冬生脑门子大，福气旺！
E: Heehee, isn't that right? My Ma even said that fortune favors me because I have a giant forehead!

C: 你在这里怎么照顾自己？
E: How do you take care of yourself here?

C: 仙舟人不研究历史吗？
E: Don't the Xianzhou natives research history?

C: 而就在昨天，星槎海的繁华区上空飞过了…我看一下数据…七万架次——昨天还是工作日。而这只是短短一百五十年间发生的变化。
E: But just yesterday, there were... let me see... over <unbreak>70,000</unbreak> deployments over Starskiff Haven! And that's on a work day! Such a huge change in just <unbreak>150</unbreak> years.

C: 看你的样子，应该不是等闲之辈。哈哈，我这种「危险」在你听来大概真的不算什么吧。
E: Judging by your appearance, you're no ordinary citizen. Haha, I bet my sense of "danger" doesn't really sound like much to you.

C: 嗯嗯！等春分把持明时调练得更好听了，再给{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}唱一曲吧！
E: Yeah! Wait until I've practiced my Vidyadhara elegies some more, and I'll sing it even better for {F#miss}{M#sir} next time!

C: 你在忙什么？
E: What are you busy with?

C: 没别的事了，下次再见。
E: I don't have anything else to ask. See you next time.

C: 趁着没人看到，赶紧放下吧。哎，现在的孩子真是没规没矩的。
E: Good thing no one saw. Hurry up and put it down. *sigh* Kids these days... unruly.

C: 难！难！难！
E: Nope, nope, nope!

C: 如果你善于表演，我会配合你的演出声泪俱下，让检票员于心不忍。
E: If you're a good performer, I'll put on a tear-jerking performance with you to tug at the heartstrings of the ticket inspector.

C: 你问我，我肯定说正经，问其他人的话…不一定。
E: If you ask me, I'll definitely say it's legit. But if you ask others, their opinions... might differ.

C: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
E: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.

C: 啊，好像有问题…
E: Hm, I think there's a problem...

C: 贸易就是人来人往…
E: Trading is nothing more than people coming and going...

C: 希望不影响贸易线路…
E: I hope it doesn't impact any trade routes...

C: 哦，步离人也不知道自己为什么要登上竞锋舰。
E: Oh, they don't know what made them do it either.

C: 如果没有抓眼球的标题，阅读量就低，数据就差，没人会给数据差的文章推送。接着就是栏目就会被裁撤，你的饭碗也就保不住。
E: If you don't compose an attention-grabbing headline, your readership drops, the statistics fall, and the algorithms stop pushing articles with low click numbers to users. Next thing you know, your column is axed, and you're out of a job.

C: 以前这里叫作什么啊？
E: What was this called?

C: 懂了吗？「乞讨」是一种高尚的生活方式～我是在满足客户们「乐善好施」的情绪价值。
E: You got it now? Begging is a noble way of life! I am fulfilling my clients' emotional value in "performing an act of kindness."

C: 可是我不喜欢小屁孩儿。
E: But I just don't like kids.

C: 那竞锋舰什么时候开放登舰？
E: Then when will the Skysplitter be open for boarding?

C: 不看名门正道我看什么？
E: What should I be watching, if not prestigious sword duels?

C: 既然话都说到这里了，我也不再遮遮掩掩了。你看我体格瘦弱，实不相瞒，我从小就受到了其他小孩的欺辱，于是那个时候的我想要投身武术。
E: Since I've already said so much, I won't beat around the bush. You see, I'm kinda scrawny. Honestly, I've been bullied since childhood. Since then, I've been wanting to get into martial arts.

C: 我代表十王司来审问你…
E: I am here on behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission to interrogate you...

C: 我问你，{NICKNAME}，我的选择是正确的吗？
E: Let me ask you something, {NICKNAME} — did I make the right choice?

C: 你这么矫情，我有点不习惯。
E: I'm not used to you being so sentimental.

C: 不聊了，再见。
E: Enough talk. Bye.

C: 妾身原本就有异于常人的好嗅觉，再加上拜师朱明的炎庭君，在闻香识香用香之事上又有些心得体会。看来，你需要一些小建议？
E: I have always had a sense of smell that far surpasses others'. In addition to my experience of using, smelling, and learning about fragrances during my time with the Zhuming's Ardens Regia, I would say I know my stuff. Do you need some suggestions?

C: 今日运势无咎，放心去做想做的事吧。
E: You have nothing to watch out for today. Be free to do whatever you desire.

C: 辛苦你们协助巡防了…
E: Thanks for helping out on patrol...

C: 嗯，都是为了仙舟！
E: Well, it's all for Xianzhou!

C: 你知道为什么吗？
E: And do you know why?

C: 呕…如有冒犯就是冒犯，这玩意儿就是泔水。
E: Yuck... Sorry if it's offensive, but this stuff tastes like sewer water.

C: 你们两个都说错啦！
E: Both of you are wrong!

C: 不用签什么旅游合同！
E: There's no need to sign any tour contract!

C: 当然装进箱子里更合理！
E: It's better to store goods in crates, of course!

C: 我闭上眼就能看到他……
E: I can see him every time I close my eyes...

C: 就是…有个医士给人开了个丹丸，结果那家伙没看完医嘱，直接把丹丸吞下去了。
E: Here's the story... A healer prescribed a pellet to a patient. As it turned out, the patient swallowed the entire pellet without reading the prescription in full.

C: 我也想知道…我公务都还没办完呢，这儿就被封锁了。现在为什么突然来了一大队人马要疏散我们？
E: Wish I knew... I haven't even finished my work yet but this place has been blocked off. And why are all these people rushing to evacuate us now?

C: 拿着它吧。「贤者之石」——人们曾称它为炼金术至高的冠冕，获得它便能得到此世的一切智慧。但与整个宇宙的知识相比，那不过是冰山一角。
E: Take this. This is the "Philosopher's Stone." Once hailed as the supreme crown of alchemy, possessing it meant gaining all wisdom of this world. But compared to the knowledge of the entire universe, it's merely the tip of an iceberg.

C: 这枚物件，你一定很熟悉了——那位聋哑女孩送我的髀石护身符，我希望能将它转交给你。
E: You must be familiar with this item. It's the talisman made of femoral stone that the non-hearing, non-speaking girl gave me. I'd like to pass it on to you.

C: 让我都有些想起在裁缝女的裁缝铺打零工那段时光了……
E: It reminds me of that time when I worked part-time at the tailor's shop...

C: 我的年纪比你小，让我先！
E: I'm younger than you, let me go first!

C: 呃…我只是喝了个水饱。都怪这里的蜜酿太稀了！
E: Ugh... I just drank too much water. It's all because the honey brew here is too watery!

C: 你肚子里为什么全是水？
E: Why is your stomach full of water?

C: 其实那个时候，我也可以帮你…
E: Actually, I could have also helped you back then...

C: 这也是幸福的烦恼。
E: That's a good problem to have.

C: 还是更喜欢百界门！
E: I still prefer Century Gate!

C: 那有什么乐观的？
E: What's the bright side?

C: 自从听说彦卿宝宝这次守擂，我可是花了大价钱买了前排。
E: I spent lots of money to buy a front-row seat after I heard little Yanqing is defending his title.

C: 威罚罪囚，靖平域内。见此门者，当…
E: Punish the criminals and pacify the territory. One who sees this door...

C: 这不会是真的吧？
E: This can't be real, can it?

C: 很可惜，竞锋舰在天空中被炸成了肮脏的烟火。
E: Unfortunately, the Skysplitter is blasted into dirty fireworks in the sky.

C: 枘凿六合滚出竞锋舰！
E: Get Hexanexus out of the Skysplitter!

C: 事了拂衣去，深藏身与名。谢谢你，体操{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Away like a whisk of wind, leaving nary a name but a face. Thank you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} Exercise.

C: 贝洛伯格加油！！！
E: We stan Belobog!

C: 真是个好苗子啊…
E: What a promising talent...

C: 卢卡选手太棒了！
E: Luka is the best!

C: 真正的硬碰硬！
E: A true clash in strength!

C: 罗浮上似乎还有名为「并蒂姻缘」的同类型公司，仙舟的婚恋交友市场竞争想必十分激烈吧。
E: There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Made in Heaven." The competition among dating agencies in Xianzhou must be stiff.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 公司」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation."

C: 「『市场开拓部』，主管：奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，董事会理事候补。资历较浅，『存护』狂热分子，扩张主义者。对联盟潜在危害：高。」
E: "Head of Marketing Development: Oswaldo Schneider, a board member candidate. He is inexperienced, a Preservation zealot, and an expansionist. Potential threat level to the alliance: High."

C: 「昔年旧物，岁月重塑。」
E: "Restoration of the things in the past."

C: 你合上信，耳边的清风此刻竟仿佛也带上了感叹号，显得如此喧闹。然而，寄件人得到的答复，却只有那猩红色的「退件」。
E: You fold up the letter, and it seems like the breeze has an exclamation mark too, as it starts gaining intensity. Sadly, what the writer receives in reply is the bright red "RETURNED" stamp.

C: 这副广告上画着一只物流机巧鸟为美食点赞，说真的，这只机巧鸟的味觉是可信的吗？
E: This ad has a courier cycrane recommending a dish. Am I really supposed to trust a cycrane's taste buds?

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Ah, forget it.

C: 也许标志有误，拆箱看看吧。
E: Maybe the sign is wrong. Have a look inside the boxes.

C: 你小时候？
E: When you were young?

C: 那咱俩这配套了啊！
E: We've got a dinner set!

C: 千万别跟着我…
E: Don't follow me around, whatever you do...

C: 真的？能典当爱情吗？我最近附身在一个情种上，天天腻歪得我压根消化不了，还不如趁早卖掉算了。
E: Really? Can I pawn off love? Recently, I've been on a hopeless romantic's body, and I'm getting sick of all the lovey-dovey emotions. I would rather trade it off.

C: 原有的表面被新篆的碑文所覆盖，内容倒是清晰可见：「她本该有更好的人生。」
E: A new inscription is written over the original surface, and the content is clearly visible: "She could have a better life."

C: 紧闭的门并不会断绝探索的可能——它们终将开启，只要你耐心等待。
E: A firmly closed door does not mean that exploration is impossible... They have to open sometimes, you just need to be patient.

C: 金黄色的饮料如火山般喷发——苏乐达似乎非常喜欢这个宣传设计，就连它们的工厂也是这幅造型。
E: The golden drink erupts like a volcano. SoulGlad seems to love this advertising design, and even their factory is designed this way.

C: 曾几何时，「绯鱼先生」柠檬挞里真的有过鲱鱼。
E: Once upon a time, Mr. Herring's lemon tarts really did contain herrings.

C: 精心划定的一小块空间，具有让人静下心来阅读的魔力。
E: A small space that has been delicately delineated — it has some alluring charm that calms you down when reading.

C: 集成式能源站，为整个筑梦边境的灯光提供支持。等地图正式开放后，这种建筑的数量会翻上几番。
E: An integrated power station that supports all the lights of the entire Dream's Edge. When the map goes public, such structures will surely exponentially grow in number.

C: 先前的嘈杂情绪渐渐消失了，取而代之的是一抹平静，仿佛没有流星划过的、现实的夜空。
E: The previously mixed emotions have gradually disappeared, replaced by a palette of serenity, a night sky of reality unstreaked by shooting stars.

C: 皮革沙发。光滑、柔软，香橙果冻一般Q弹。
E: A leather sofa — glossy and sleek, soft, and bouncy like orange jelly.

C: 当你望向这些屏幕的时候，它们背后或许有什么也在回望着你。
E: When you gaze at these screens, perhaps something behind them is gazing back at you.

C: 你看起来很有悟性。或许有朝一日，你能学会如何像我一样「观察」梦境。
E: You seem perceptive. Perhaps, you will master the way to "observe" the Dreamscape someday like I do.

C: 我？我只是个品味和名声成反比的小小评论家——要是你有兴趣，倒是可以上我的个人网站逛逛。
E: Me? I'm just a small-time critic whose reputation doesn't reflect my taste. If you're interested, you can check out my personal website.

C: 对了，这东西我一时半会儿也用不上，送给你好了。记得有空来找我哦？
E: By the way, I'm not going to use this thing any time soon, so you can have it. Remember to drop by when you're free!

C: 曾几何时，「盛会之星」这个名字给我的印象一直是浮夸轻佻、流于表面……
E: Once upon a time, the name "Planet of Festivities" struck me as pompous, frivolous, and superficial...

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 少套近乎，你谁啊
E: Stop pretending you know me. Who are you?

C: 喂，旁边的，站这么近，是想偷听我成功的秘诀吗？告诉你也无妨，反正你做不到。
E: Hey, you there, you're standing too close. Trying to learn the secrets to my success? Lemme tell you then. It doesn't matter, because you won't be able to replicate it.

C: 你还没走？哦，我终于明白你要的是什么了。拿去，今天我开心！
E: You're still here? Oh, I've finally realized what you wanted. Here, take this. I'm in a good mood today!

C: 好朋友。给你。别担心，这瓶是有气的。
E: Good friend, here. Don't worry. This one's not flat.

C: 毕竟，谁也不希望在享受梦境的时候惹上麻烦…您说对吧？
E: I mean, no one wants to get into trouble while they're enjoying their dreams... Don't you think?

C: 技术的发展不等人啊。
E: The advancement of technology waits for no one.

C: 产品更新迭代得飞快，关键的向下兼容却一点都不做，过几年就没法用了，非逼着我们不断去换零件。嘴里说着为科技献身，实际就是挤牙膏！想多卖几个钱！
E: Product updates iterate lightning-quick, but they do nothing about backwards compatibility — older parts become obsolete after a few years, and we're forced to keep changing parts. All that talk about sacrificing their all for science — it's all nothing but squeezing out a few more coins from consumer wallets!

C: 不知为何，斐迪南德的眼神开始迷离。他的神情安详，似是在回味某个美好而悠长的梦。
E: For some reason, Ferdinand's eyes start glazing over. His expression is serene, as if he is reminiscing on some sweet, distant dream.

C: 虽然之前也时不时从博识学会的人手里收购些稀罕的消息作为写作素材，但那群学究死板得很，与您聊天就有意思多了。
E: While I occasionally get some rare bits of detail from the Intelligentsia Guild to use as material, those stuffy researchers really do bore me. It's much more fun to talk to you.

C: 别瞎起哄！继续捣乱的话，我就要联系猎犬家系了。
E: Stop trying to stir up drama! If you keep doing this, I'll have to call the Bloodhound Family over.

C: 从刚才的推论来看…是的，但…很少…几乎不会有特殊情况……
E: Taking this to its logical conclusion, then... Yes, but... very few... almost no special circumstances...

C: <size=28>——这样总行了吧！！！没其他事就赶快走！</size>
E: <size=28>...Is that good enough!? If you've got nothing else to say, please go!</size>

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 我最瞧不起那些搞区别对待的人！帝皇战争之后，我们智械经过了多少纪的斗争，才赢得和有机生命对等的地位？
E: I hate people who discriminate the most! Do you know how many eras of struggle it took for us Intellitrons to be emancipated and granted equal status with living species after the Emperor's War?

C: 是美梦，就要避免让里面的人被各种丧气事烦恼——你瞧，新闻在这里更像是一种「服务」，它的用处是增加大家的安全感和幸福感。
E: So in a sweet dream, people shouldn't be depressed by all kinds of troublesome things — just look, the news here is more like a kind of service with the express purpose of increasing everyone's sense of security and happiness.

C: 「惊梦电视台」和怪物的下落…
E: Dreamjolt TV and the monster's whereabouts...

C: 完全没问题！等我下去以后再训练训练，未来就能推出「双人共舞」节目了！
E: No problem! I will give it more training so that it can do a dance duet next time!

C: 真难吃！
E: Horrible!

C: 最开始，我是为了追逐梦想才来到这里的。结果现在呢？我连一开始的梦想是什么都记不起来了。
E: In the beginning, I was here to pursue my dream. But now? I don't even remember what was my dream.

C: 嘿，钱也赚了，活也干了，这主意还真不错。果然我一冷静下来，金点子就接二连三地往外涌啊~
E: Hey, that way, I can get both my money and my work done. What a great idea. I just need to stay calm and great money-making ideas just keep flowing~

C: …我是这里的看店伙计，负责盯着那些搞小动作的客人。除此以外，我也帮不上什么忙。
E: ...I'm here to look after the store and look out for customers with sticky fingers. Besides that, there's nothing I can do.

C: …再见。
E: ...Bye.

C: 不行，再这么下去，我就要在这鬼地方看一辈子店了！
E: No way. If this goes on, I'll have to take care of this shop forever!

C: 不介意的话，我想继续画画了。
E: If you don't mind, I wish to continue painting.

C: 广告牌不说话了。一张传单从它身上掉下来。
E: The billboard has stopped talking. A leaflet falls from its body to the ground.

C: 那你算问对人了——服务来宾是每一名家族成员的责任。我会尽力回答你的。
E: You've asked the right person then. Servicing guests is one of the duties of every Family member. I will answer as best as I can.

C: 哭不出来的。
E: The one who can't cry.

C: 有些猎犬成员长得是有点凶，但一见我们就跑是不是有点太夸张了——我们又不吃小孩！
E: Some Bloodhound members may look pretty fierce, but people don't have to flee at the sight of us... It's not like we eat children!

C: 已经没有这样的人了。不知为何，这些家伙最近都变得有些…真性情。
E: There's no one like that anymore. For some reason, these fellows have all become somewhat... true to their nature recently.

C: 怎么还有相声？
E: There are crosstalk performances too?

C: 那些年轻人…
E: These young people...

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 冷静点！
E: Calm down!

C: 可就是这一点点被牺牲的安全性，最终导致了近两万名师生…唉…我说不下去了，你自己查吧，「赫尔辛格大礼堂坍塌事故」。有不少关于这个的纪录片。
E: But just a little sacrifice in safety led to nearly twenty thousand students and teachers... Ah... I can't bring myself to talk about it. You can look it up for yourself: "The disaster of the Herzinger Auditorium collapse." There are a number of documentaries detailing it.

C: 我是隶属「猎犬」的奥希洛特，负责这片区域的安保工作。
E: I am Auslotte of the Bloodhound Family. I am responsible for security in this area.

C: 不过作为酒店的调饮师，还请容我向您推荐一款最入门、但也最值得细细品味的饮品——原味苏乐达。
E: However, as the bartender, I would like to recommend the most popular yet enjoyable option, the Classic SoulGlad.

C: 要我说啊，苏乐达真该把对面的<unbreak>23</unbreak>号给买过去，花再大价钱也值得——他那群队友都是什么玩意！关键时候就该把球塞给关键球员，结果呢？那群边角料，连支援都打不好！
E: You know what? SoulGlad seriously should have snagged No. <unbreak>23</unbreak> from the other team! His teammates were incompetent nincompoops and didn't even know to pass him the ball when it really mattered! Those tender feet can't even play support decently!

C: 你有什么高见？
E: What do you think about it?

C: 嗯嗯…走吧走吧，我也得去忙了……
E: Alright... time to get busy myself...

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：布洛妮娅•兰德的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Bronya Rand's dream.

C: …真是漂亮的一击！不愧是本届大赛的一号种子，银狼选手的霸主以太灵轻松横扫了对手，她又一次轻描淡写地拿下了胜利！
E: ...What an impressive strike! As expected of the top seed, Silver Wolf's Overlord Aether Spirit effortlessly overcame her opponent, securing another easy victory!

C: 那还等什么？现在就去最近的潮玩店了解详情吧！这东西最近都卖到断货啊！
E: What are you waiting for? Visit your nearest designer shop to learn more about this product! It's been selling like hotcakes lately!

C: 嗨，说实话，我自己都不知道这功能有什么用。想试试的话就随你吧。
E: To be honest, I don't even know what this feature does myself. If you want to try it out, go right ahead.

C: 好好好！坐稳，我带你过去！
E: Okay, okay! Sit tight, I'll take you there right now!

C: 好不容易遇到一个能看得见我的朋友，我得好好给你科普一下美梦小镇的奥妙才行！
E: I rarely run into people who can see me, so I must make use of this opportunity to tell you all the wonders about Dreamville!

C: 今晚吃什么好呢…
E: What should I have for dinner tonight...

C: 只有一个人站岗，能和我聊天的人实在太少了！
E: I'm working here alone. There's barely anyone to talk to!

C: （想办法蒙混过关吧……）
E: (Better think of a way to fool my way through...)

C: 我控制不住自己的双手，经常攻击路边的各种容器，将它们残忍地打碎……
E: I can't control my own hands, regularly attacking all kinds of containers and vessels along my path, smashing them to smithereens...

C: 原本我最大的娱乐就是看大屏幕上轮播的钟表小子动画——没想到现在就连这点消遣都被剥夺了！对它的破坏简直是对美梦的亵渎！
E: Initially, my greatest joy was to watch Clockie's cartoon reruns on the big screen. Now even this small slice of happiness has been ripped away from me! Its destruction is a desecration of a beautiful dream!

C: 要聊聊吗？
E: Do you need to talk?

C: 现在想来，过去的我是多么愚蠢…艺术的背后永远都少不了钱与权的影子，谁又能只靠一腔热情生存下去？
E: Now that I think of it, I was so dumb in the past... The shadows of finance and power are always pulling the strings behind the glamor of the art world. Who would be able to survive with just passion?

C: 哦，美梦，任何家人都不会否认它存在的必要。不过它并不是我们生活的全部。
E: Oh, dreams. No one in The Family would deny its importance, but it isn't the only thing that matters in my life.

C: 美梦…唉，美梦中本不该存在悲伤，但有时我就是抑制不住悲观的心态。
E: Dreams... One shouldn't feel sad in a dream, but I just can't help feeling pessimistic sometimes.

C: 但梦的扩张已经逼近极限，所有能享的福都终有穷尽。如今的匹诺康尼就像一个肥皂泡，再想变大就只能迎来破碎。
E: Nevertheless, the expansion of dreams is approaching its limits, and all the nice things will eventually come to exhaustion. Penacony is akin to a bubble that is bound to burst if it continues to grow bigger.

C: 不过战斗并不是战甲唯一的功能——我经常开着它带家人们出去兜风，大伙都赞不绝口呢。
E: Combat isn't the only function of the armor though. I often take my kin out for a ride in it. Everyone loves it.

C: 一股粉色的气息从他身上涌出，弥散到周遭的空气中。那是肉眼可见的热情。
E: He radiates a pink glow that permeates the air around him — it visibly represents his enthusiasm.

C: 嗨——这可比电影里演的精彩多了！那你一定去过很多地方吧？一定有过不少惊险刺激的经历吧？
E: Hey... That sounds even more amazing than a movie! Then you must have been to many places? You must have had all sorts of dangerous and thrilling experiences.

C: 其实我可羡慕你这样的人了，自由自在、无拘无束，想去哪就去哪，既没有负担也没有顾虑……
E: Honestly, I really envy people like you. Completely free, no restraints, going wherever the wind takes you, no burdens or worries...

C: 你不能外出吗？
E: Can you not leave?

C: 抱歉…我知道这样非常不负责，但现在，我只想透一口气……
E: Sorry... I know this is extremely unprofessional but... I just need... to breathe for a moment...

C: 同谐的梦中，殊途者异梦。
E: In a dream of the Harmony, those of different paths follow different dreams.

C: 巨大的同心圆雕像，据说可以为祈祷者带来精神力量。
E: A giant statue of concentric shapes, it is said to be able to bring vigor and vitality to those who pray to it.

C: 我好像没安排过这件事吧？
E: I don't remember planning this?

C: 挺好的地方，不吵闹，没有那些凭身高显摆的傻蛋。喏，这个大块头不会去欺负那两个小型怪物，它们的关系好像还不错，这就很难得了。
E: I like this place. It is not too loud and there aren't too many of those tall idiots bragging about their height. Tsk, this big brute won't bully those two little monsters. They look like they get on well — This is a rare sight.

C: 唉，那就勉为其难的…和你共演吧，不准欺负我啊。
E: Ah, then I guess I have to try... I'll perform with you, but you're not allowed to bully me!

C: …在这样的氛围里，提出这样的问题，您的想法还真是出乎意料呢。
E: ...Quite the unexpected question to propose in a place with such an atmosphere.

C: 情绪是种很奇妙的存在，它没有实体，无法被清晰观测到。它是活着的某种状态，同样可以是错觉。情绪能被有意识地制造，也能被强行改变或消除。
E: Emotions are fascinating. They have no tangible form and can't be clearly observed. They are certain states of being alive, and they can be both real and illusory. They can be consciously created, altered, or even eliminated.

C: 我做不了主，得问问列车长。
E: I can't call the shots. You'll have to ask the conductor.

C: 更多的嘛…我就不能说了。刚才这段小故事可是特殊服务，别外传。
E: Anything beyond that... I can't tell you. That little story was an exclusive service. Don't tell anyone else.

C: 我们正在加紧排练呢——选拔在即，可不能辜负了你们的好意！
E: We're knee-deep in rehearsals — auditions are coming up, and there's no way we're going to let you down!

C: 让他们看看新时代*交响摇滚*的厉害，让他们好好感受感受《廉价救赎》的含金量！都给我摇起来，燥起来！
E: Let's show them the power of modern orchestral rock and prove the worth of Cheap Salvation! Let's get rock and rollin'!

C: 我也一直知道，但凡涉及到流量和利益相关，某些人的手段能有多下作…啊，抱歉，我现在思路有些混乱，我只是想说——
E: And I've always known just how low some people can go when it comes to numbers and profits... er, sorry — I'm a little muddle-headed right now. I just think that...

C: 不烦你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you.

C: 经历了这么多之后，我的故事已经不足为奇了。不过既然你想听，我还是乐意讲讲的。
E: After all I've been through, I realize my stories are no longer remarkable. But, since you want to hear one, I'd be happy to tell you.

C: 再见啦。说不定有朝一日，你也能成为船长呢，哈哈。
E: See you! Who knows, maybe one day I can become a captain, too! Haha.

C: 在现实中，我因为车祸失去了行动的能力，但在梦中，我却能够跨越遥远的距离与孩子们相遇。
E: In the real world, I lost the ability to move because of a traffic accident. But, in the dream, I am able to traverse vast distances to meet with these children.

C: 总之，欢迎来到流梦礁参观！这里是钟表小子的摇篮，一段沧桑的往昔之梦，一个辉煌时代的落幕之地。
E: Anyway, welcome to the Dreamflux Reef as a guest! This is the birthplace of Clockie! It is a forlorn dream of bygone days, a place where a glorious era saw its curtain fall.

C: 最近忆域迷因的活动变得有些频繁了，所幸没有发生什么恶性事件。
E: The activities of the Memory Zone Memes are becoming increasingly frequent, but fortunately, nothing bad happened.

C: 他们做到了，可他们到哪儿去了呢？变成了哈努兄弟、折纸小鸟、镜子公主和左轮队长，除此便什么也不剩下。
E: And they did it, but where did they go? They became Brother Hanu, Origami Bird, Mirror Princess, Captain Revolver, and nothing else.

C: 以我去过的一颗小行星为例，数个琥珀纪以来，那里的居民一直流传着关于「长尾黑面鲎」的传说。
E: Taking one of the asteroids I've visited as an example. For several Amber Eras, the inhabitants there have been passing down a legend about the "long-tailed, black-faced horseshoe crabs."

C: 不惜磨灭了这么多人的存在，堵上了这么多张嘴巴，只为给家族镀上一副救世主的金身，也不怕吃撑了！
E: Going to great lengths to eliminate the existence of countless individuals and silence myriad voices, all to adorn The Family with the illustrious title of savior. Are they not wary of being suffocated by their greed!?

C: 但那些曲子却不再鲜活生动。它们缺了灵魂，就像梦里少了她的影子……
E: But those songs, they no longer felt alive. They lacked a soul, just like I lacked her shadow inside my dreams...

C: 它的音色因忆质侵蚀变得有些浑浊，但这并非问题所在。它很…自卑。即便大家都在努力安慰它、照料它，但它似乎依旧缺乏安全感。
E: His timbre has been corroded by memoria, but that's not the real problem. He's... got an inferiority complex. He seems to be really insecure even though everyone constantly reassures and looks after him.

C: 我叫「湛蓝爵士」，是帮助钟表小子修建清醒村的折纸小鸟啾。
E: I am Dr. Blues, an origami bird that's helping Clockie build Rouseville, tweet.

C: 关于汽水赛场…
E: About the Soda Racetrack...

C: 哼哼，记忆涌上来了啾……
E: Hehe, my memories are returning, tweet...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个稳重的小家伙，帮了哈努兄弟不少的忙，你大概可以在<color=#dbc291ff>哈努兄弟的办公室</color>找到它啾。
E: Heya! Let's see, there's a reliable little fella that's helped Brother Hanu out plenty. You can probably find it <color=#dbc291ff>in Brother Hanu's office</color>, tweet.

C: 这里让我想起了故乡，那是一个蛮荒的星球，有着无尽的黄沙、丰沃的绿洲与不熄的火焰。
E: This place reminds me of my home. It is a barren planet with boundless golden sand, vibrant oases and flames that don't extinguish.

C: 好的，那么请自便吧。
E: Okay, you do you then.

C: 我如此坚信着…却不知道自己选择的道路是否正确。但幸运的是，如今我获得了一个自证的契机——
E: My belief is resolute... but I don't know if my path is correct. Luckily though, I've been given a chance to prove myself...

C: 说来话长，我曾是星际和平公司的产品销售，听说匹诺康尼处处是机遇，我便咬紧牙关辞掉了这份人人都羡慕的工作，准备在逐梦时代的浪潮中搏一回。
E: That's a long story. I was once an IPC product salesman. Upon hearing that Penacony was flooded with opportunity, I gritted my teeth and resigned from a cushy job that most would die for, ready to bet big in the tide of the Age of Dreaming.

C: 哦~亲爱的顾客，要记得再来哦~
E: Ohh my dear customer, please come back again!

C: 不管别人怎么说，我还会继续制造更加激烈的玩具，让更多人能自由宣泄自己的情感，这就是玩具的意义呀~
E: No matter what others say, I will continue to craft even intenser toys that will let even more people bare their emotions. This is the essence of toys!

C: 哈努努，来自纳肖巴的哈贝克族星际通缉犯，于琥珀历<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪一手策办了蒙托尔星系的大动乱，被星际和平公司判处终身监禁，于阿斯德纳边陲监狱服刑。
E: Hanunue was a wanted interstellar criminal hailing from the Harbeck clan on Nashoba. In <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, he single-handedly masterminded the tumult in the Montour System. He was finally apprehended and sentenced by the IPC, and served his time in Asdana's frontier prison.

C: 那就来聊点让我感觉悲伤的话题吧——曾经和哈努努并肩作战的人，已经所剩无几了，那千年前的故事还有几位亲历者呢？
E: Let's talk about something that makes me sad, then — there aren't many left out of those who once fought beside Hanunue. How many eyewitnesses do we have left for even older stories, then? For stories that happened thousands of years ago?

C: 这里不缺机会，但他们来来去去，我总说自己还得准备，而且也这么告诉别人——
E: While this place affords a lot of opportunities, as people come and go, I keep telling them that I'm still preparing to depart...

C: 她似乎把你的玩笑当真了。一串模糊的杂音如鲠在喉，她低下头去不再答话。
E: Your joke doesn't land well with her. A jumble of muffled sounds catches in her throat. She lowers her gaze and becomes quiet.

C: 朋友，你得跟我一样淡定，才能适应各种压力。
E: My friend, you need to stay as calm as I am to handle all kinds of pressures out there.

C: 真是个乖狗狗，像它这样心思澄澈的好孩子已经不多见了。
E: What a good dog. Well-behaved beings with pure minds are a dying breed.

C: 没啥好说的，乐队没有人气，作品也卖不出去。队友都是穷哥们，吃饭都是有一顿没一顿的。
E: There's nothing much to talk about, really. Our band isn't popular, nor does our music sell. Everyone in the band's so strapped for cash that they had to stretch out their meals.

C: 向我汇报下你的工作计划。
E: Give me a report of your work plan.

C: 我想给空艇更名并换涂装。
E: I want to rename the airship and change her livery.

C: …船员都是你家的人？
E: ...You're family with the entire crew?

C: 被组委会拒绝后，我又去找了他们一次。这次我带了份「小礼物」。
E: After being turned down by the committee, I went back for another try — this time with "a small present."

C: 什么派对，我刚才谈论的是艺术，是灵魂的碰撞和精神的升华！哈哈哈。
E: What parties? I was talking about art — the clash of souls and the ascension of spirits! Hahaha!

C: 皮皮西他，皮皮西她，皮皮西所有人！！！
E: Pepeshi this, Pepeshi that, Pepeshi everything!!!

C: 对，往胸口踢！想到那花里胡哨的领带我就来气！
E: Yeah, right in the chest! Just thinking about him and his fancy ties drives me mad!

C: 懂了。
E: I get it.

C: 拜拜！记得有空来递交入团申请啊！
E: Bye! Don't forget to hand in your club application when you get a moment!

C: 那你后续有什么打算？
E: So what's next for you?

C: 我…我还是先完成答辩论文吧，要是没法毕业就麻烦了。
E: I... I'd better finish my dissertation first. It'll be troublesome if I can't graduate.

C: 顺利的话，离开学校后，我想组建一只新的乐队——以我为核心的乐队。
E: If everything goes well, after I graduate, I plan to form a new band — one where I'm the lead.

C: 但那两位学院代表将我叫到了办公室，那里连通着某个小型梦境。我被关在空无一人的梦境里，责令反思自己的过错，直至乱破同学来到。
E: But those two academy representatives summoned me into their office, which was connected to some mini dreamscape. I was imprisoned in a deserted dreamscape to reflect on my wrongdoings until Rappa came along.

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: …你知道吗，学员中流传着一份名为「我最讨厌的老师」的共享文档。
E: ...Do you know that there is a shared file named "Teachers I Hate Most" that's making its rounds among students?

C: 啊哈哈，真是荣幸！之后也请大佬多多关照我的生意呀！
E: Ahaha, how fortuitous! Please patronize my business more too in the future!

C: 以前啊，我总觉得学习特别无聊，匹诺康尼处处都是乱飞的苜蓿币，我整天想的都是怎么搞钱，然后幻想自己暴富之后怎么花天酒地。
E: Back then, I used to feel that studying was so boring. Alfalfa credits are flying all over Penacony, and my mind was just obsessed with earning money. I was just dreaming about how to make it big and indulge in a lavish lifestyle.

C: 不是改名啦…这是我的本名。乱破同学说忍者的「忍号」应当多加斟酌，所以我就先用真名出演了！
E: It's not a name change... This is my real name. Rappa said that a ninja's name should be carefully considered. So I went with my real name!

C: 一天到晚追着我骂，我又没在视频号里发正片内容，他对着花絮骂我「关系户」「走后门」的到底是多大仇啊？！
E: He just berates me day and night. I've never posted any official content on the account before, yet he keeps accusing me of being a "nepo baby." What grief have I caused him?!

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: 您是否熟悉「天才俱乐部」？不如听一个关于他们的笑话吧。这是我的天才之作。
E: Are you familiar with the "Genius Society"? How about a joke about them? This is one of my most ingenious creations.

C: 列车上的忆者…
E: The Memokeeper on the Express...

C: 你听见一阵拍打翅膀的震颤声。
E: You hear the sounds of wings flapping.

C: 球体表面淡蓝色的灯光开始闪烁，你感觉眼前的一切开始扭曲，你感到头晕目眩，但好在几秒之后你就适应了这一切。
E: The faint blue glow on the surface of the sphere flickers, and you feel everything before your eyes becoming distorted. You are overcome by a wave of dizziness, but manage to adapt and recover after several seconds.

C: 在你的控制下，摄像头缓缓转动，这一次，隐藏在云层之外的城市映入你的眼帘。
E: Under your control, the camera rotates slowly. This time, the city hidden beyond the clouds is revealed before your eyes.

C: 为了大家的人身安全着想，请不要再乱来了！没看到旁边很多小孩在走动吗？我要是不严抓，以后还不知道会出什么事呢！
E: For the safety of all the guests, please stop acting recklessly! Don't you see that there are many children walking around? If I don't clamp down on this, who knows if anything untoward will happen in the future!

C: 很抱歉，方才跟您说话口气太重了点，我在此向船长您诚挚地致歉，希望您别往心里去。
E: My apologies! I was a bit too rude when speaking to you just now. I sincerely apologize for my mistake. I hope that you don't take it to heart.

C: 在一一应付过去之后，你只觉得疲惫，准备深藏功与名赶紧抽身离开。
E: After dealing with all the requests, you are left with a sense of exhaustion. You prepare to hide your achievements and fame as you try to leave as quickly as possible.

C: 你是不是以为我在胡说八道？很遗憾，在翁法罗斯发现「光线通过胶体的散射现象」的树庭学者，就叫达利原。
E: You think I'm talking nonsense? Well, hate to break it to you, but the Grove scholar who discovered "light scattering through colloids" in Amphoreus was literally named Dall.

C: 波形击打着立足处，仿佛某种——从不见底的深处，传来的心跳声。
E: The waves pulse against your footing, like a heartbeat climbing from lightless depths.

C: 梦里的景点太多……
E: There's too much to see in the dream...

C: 优势在我！
E: I have the high ground!

C: 你坐过来一点吧。
E: You can shuffle over a tad.

C: 不要。
E: No thanks.

C: 前面还没建好呢。
E: The area ahead hasn't been built yet.

C: 她说我们现在的梦境都太单调了，应该加点宇宙大战、爱恨情仇之类的戏码…这是她写的策划案。
E: She said that our current dreamscapes are too mundane, and we should include dramas like a galactic battle or some lovers-to-enemies soap opera... Here's her proposal document.

C: …您对球笼竞速感兴趣吗？
E: ...Are you interested in Spheroid Race?

C: 你给我闭嘴！
E: Oh, shut up!

C: 汪！
E: Woof!
...Huh?

C: 应该快到我们了……
E: It must be our turn soon...

C: 也不知道在梦里多吃脑花管不管用……
E: I don't even know if eating brains helps with memory in a dream...

C: 我相信狗仔队没那么闲。
E: I don't think the paparazzi are that bored...

C: 居然输给那种对手。
E: I can't believe I lost to that.

C: 关于您在海选前发表的诸多豪言壮语，有什么想对观众和粉丝说的吗？
E: Regarding your impressive speech made before the audition, do you have anything to say to the audience and your fans?

C: 我第一次见猎犬弄这么大阵仗，还是对付家族自己，弄得我都疑神疑鬼的。
E: This is the first time I've seen the Hounds come out in such force, and against The Family too. This is making me all paranoid.

C: 找人来修修吧。
E: Better find someone to fix it.

C: 我就是随口一说……
E: I was just being glib...

C: 公司果真藏龙卧虎…
E: There really are some powerful characters lurking within the IPC...

C: …实在是太可惜了！
E: ...That's such a pity!

C: 怎么感觉之前在做梦？
E: Why does it feel like I was dreaming before?

C: 我、我迷路了…
E: I... I'm lost...

C: 好的，老大！
E: Got it, boss!

C: 我也就当初年少无知，不小心喝过一口，那味道…实在惊悚，给我留下了不可磨灭的心理阴影。
E: I was young and naïve back then and accidentally took a sip. The taste was... truly horrifying and left me with actual trauma.

C: 眼前这人似乎是某位在演艺界享有显赫地位的前辈，但你叫不上姓名，她们拍这种照片时穿得都一样。
E: This person before you seems to be some veteran who enjoys storied repute in the entertainment world, but you can't recall her name — they all dress the same in photos like this.

C: 格拉克斯教授，隐夜鸫家系前家主，十二梦境的规划人，折纸大学的建立者——也是唯一的正式校长。他是折纸大学的精神领袖，但他身在何处却无人知晓。
E: Professor Glaux, former family head of the Nightingale Family, the planner of the Twelve Dreamscapes, founder of Paperfold University — and the one and only official dean. He is the spiritual leader of Paperfold University, but his whereabouts are unknown.

C: 推理社、机动球社、话剧社…望着塞满视野的茫茫多摊位，你忽地心生冲动——既然所有人都有资格提出申请，为什么学校里不能有属于你的社团？
E: The Deduction Club, the Roboball Club, the Drama Club... looking out at the sea of stalls as far as the eye can see, an urge wells up within you — If anyone can submit a request, why can't there be a club for you in this school?

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 可不敢当。
E: Well, I'm nothing special.

C: 你写的书哪里买？
E: How can I buy the books you've written?

C: 哇，客人可真有眼光——你现在看的这匹丝绸由阿格莱雅大人亲手纺织，是本店的镇店之宝哦。
E: You've got a keen eye! This silk you're looking at is spun by Lady Aglaea herself! It's a gem of this humble shop!

C: 停停停！我是来吃饭的，不是来上历史课的！你个开餐厅的就好好做饭不行吗？这么喜欢教育人，怎么不去云石天宫外面讲课啊？
E: Wait a sec! I came here to eat, not for a history lesson! This is a restaurant — Can you just focus on serving food!? If you're all about giving lectures, why not do that outside the Marmoreal Palace?

C: 传说黄金世代的奥赫玛在饮食方面极为精细讲究，甚至可谓铺张奢靡。后来随着黑潮的不断侵蚀，资源愈发匮乏，人们的饮食习惯也渐渐变得朴素起来。
E: Legend has it that during the Era Chrysea, Okhema's cuisine was meticulous and even extravagant. But as resources dwindled due to the black tide's unceasing invasion, simplicity took over in terms of culinary habits.

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: 幸好，你的变形记只维持了几句嗷呜的时间。究竟是{NICKNAME}梦了奇美拉，还是奇美拉梦了{NICKNAME}，就不得而知了。
E: Fortunately, your transformation only lasted for a few "awoos." Whether {NICKNAME} dreamed of a chimera or the chimera dreamed of {NICKNAME}... it's hard to say.

C: 天秤左右摇晃半晌，最终石榴所在的那侧稍稍翘起。
E: The scale teeters for a moment before tipping slightly in favor of the pomegranate.

C: 奥赫玛的菜色，普通，但是诚实。想起以前见过，信仰扎格列斯的人，卖粥。
E: Okhema's food is simple but honest. I remember meeting a believer of Zagreus who sold congee.

C: 但为何…在众多箩筐之中，只有它吸引到了你的注意？
E: However, among all the baskets... why does this particular one capture your attention?

C: 你可能也知道，天文学在奥赫玛属于禁忌，只有树庭的少数学者可以秘密研究。很不幸，最近逃难来的人实在有点多，他们那里也是僧多粥少，只好把我推荐来浴场工作。
E: As you might be aware, astronomy research is prohibited in Okhema, and only a few scholars in the Grove secretly manage to sneak a peek. With a flood of recent refugees, they don't have enough work for specialists like me and had to recommend me to work here in this bath.

C: 老奶奶，能和你打听点事吗？
E: May I ask you something, granny?

C: 「墨涅塔的信徒甘在少女石榴裙下俯首，塞纳托斯的使者阴影般于她身侧常伴。」
E: "Mnestia's disciple bowed to the maiden's grace. While Thanatos' messenger lingered beside her, a solemn hem."

C: 说得*我们*都不好意思啦。但其实，心灵感应也有不方便的时候哦。
E: Stop it, we are blushing. Actually, telepathy doesn't always come in handy.

C: 悬锋人历来将恐惧视作踏向荣耀的道路。尼卡多利之所以令悬锋人誓死相随，正是因为它能将无边恐惧与无上荣耀锻作一炉。
E: To the Kremnoans, fear is the path to glory. The reason that Kremnoans vow to follow Nikador to their death is so that Nikador can forge limitless fear into endless glory.

C: 一定是那个马尔库斯，每次我做祷告，他就在那儿嚷嚷，肯定是他惊扰到塞纳托斯了。
E: It must be that Marcus. Every time I go to pray, he makes noises. He must have disturbed Thanatos...

C: 我常常在想，那些被带走的人，是不是已经在塞纳托斯的国度里找到安宁了？
E: I keep thinking... Those people that were taken... Have they already found peace in the kingdom of Thanatos?

C: 你之前提到的家事……
E: That family stuff you mentioned earlier...

C: 更多技巧就不一一列举了。你只需要记住一个要点：生存的关键在于细节。
E: I will not list all of my techniques one by one. You just need to remember one crucial point — the key to survival is in the details.

C: 出场词？
E: Your opener?

C: 宁战死，毋荣归！我的长矛今天也在寻找敌寇。
E: Valorous death before glorious return! My lance seeks the enemy, even today.

C: 只要能杀死一头那样的怪物，你就算是合格的悬锋战士了，但难点在于如何找到活着的钢爪兽…它们都快被杀光了。
E: If you can slay such a monster, you'd be more than qualified to be a Kremnos Warrior. Alas, the problem lies in finding a live Steelclaw Beast... They've almost all been killed off.

C: 他自诩是新兵的教官，却连半点荣耀都不教，整天说什么「宁失荣耀，勿失性命」——这是战士该有的信条吗？
E: He fancies himself an instructor of new recruits, but his teachings contain nary a shred of glory. Instead, he harps all day about how "you can forsake glory, but never your life" — is that how a warrior should live his creed?

C: （默默远离…）
E: (Quietly sidle away...)

C: 我要…要去大鱼嘴里的宴会…在…大海！对，在大海！大海装在醉客的杯子里，宴会上的暴君被珊瑚灌醉了，舞女在和礁石拥吻！
E: I want... I want to go to the banquet in the giant fish's mouth... in... the sea! Yes, the sea! The sea in the drunkard's glass, the tyrant at the banquet inebriated by corals, the dancers embraced in locked kisses with rocky reefs!

C: 嘻嘻…哈哈…哈哈哈哈哈…我要秘酿…把酒杯斟得更满些吧……
E: Heehee... Haha... Hahahaha... I want ambrosia... Fill up the wine glass to its brim...

C: 认真的泰坦，吉奥里亚。作为它的造物，山之民，一丝不苟…一脉相承。
E: The earnest Titan, Georios. Its creations, the mountain dwellers are. Meticulous... a lineage unbroken.

C: 你已踏入「满溢之杯」法吉娜的地盘。在享乐之神的浴场，唯有豪饮与纵情被视为对它的尊敬，而这份虔诚你不一定承受得住。
E: You have entered the domain of Phagousa, the Chalice of Plenty. While you bask in their divine bath, only indulgence and revelry are considered acts of respect to them, and you may be unable to bear the weight of this devotion.
Sigh...

C: 怎会如此，几时暴露的！
E: Wuh, I've been made!?

C: 听起来和缇宝的工作好像！
E: Sounds just like Tribbie's job!

C: 你不知为何有些鼻酸……
E: You don't know why this stings your nose with subtle sorrow...

C: 你现在还会避着她们吗？
E: Are you still avoiding them now?

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯，与现今被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯，是否为同一物？
E: Are the Icatus that existed before its destruction and the Icatus that has now been devoured by the black tide the same thing?

C: 要不你们先做个自我介绍？
E: How about you introduce yourselves first?

C: 即便退一步，认可「阿卡索斯」确实是知识，它也绝非数学那样的必然知识。帕门弥德，这个例证你可用得太不恰当了。
E: Even if we take a step back and accept that we do in fact have knowledge of "Icatus," how can we say that this knowledge is similar to the absolute knowledge of mathematics? Parmenides, this example is not a fitting comparison.

C: 要是它在时空外存在，那么我实在想不出能以什么方式来认识它。观察依赖光线，发声需要时间，文字借助形状，时空外存在的事物，是如何被你知晓的？
E: If it exists outside of space-time, then I truly cannot think of what method I can use to gain knowledge of it. Observation relies on light, sound requires time, and words make use of shape... How can that which exists outside of space-time ever be known?

C: 虽然不能做到像万敌哥哥那样刀枪不入，但我会证明，只要修炼得当，奥赫玛人也能拥有不输给悬锋人的勇武！
E: Although I can't achieve the invincibility of great Mydei, I will prove that with proper training, we Okhemans can possess courage and strength rivaling that of the Kremnoans!

C: 孩子，转身的时候千万轻一些！别把墙撞出个洞来！
E: Kid, be careful when you turn around! Don't crash into the wall and make a hole!

C: 假面…愚者？那是什么，听起来很有趣啊，你可以待会仔细给我讲讲吗？
E: The Masked... Fool? What's that? Sounds intriguing — could you tell me about it in detail later?

C: 算了，跟你说这些也没用。果然还是独自吃饭的时间最快乐了……
E: Forget it. There's no point explaining this to you. After all, the happiest time is when I eat alone...

C: 我还有事，先不聊了。
E: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 钥匙与门天然成对，想得到门后的内容，就必须拿相应的物件来适配。
E: Keys and gates are paired up, and if you want what's behind a gate, you'll have to match it with the corresponding object.

C: 就是那个…从时空的溪流中采撷而来的「记忆」，你有吗？
E: It's the... "Memory" plucked out of the stream of time. Do you have it?

C: 你舒舒服服地在浴池里享受了片刻的安宁。
E: You enjoy a wonderful moment of peace and quiet in the baths.

C: 「我制造了一台…不不不，一个…一只？呃，总之就是我制造了我的复制体，老头子和站长同意了，她留有我的记忆数据，其他人察觉不到她的变化。」
E: "I made a... no, more like a... a clone? Yeah, that's it. I got the green light from the senior and the Lead Researcher, she has my memory data, and she's indistinguishable to anyone else."

C: 相册里更新了新照片，是你上次在贝洛伯格时，和塔米拉、塞琳小姐的合影。我给你提一嘴，我的抓拍技术不太好，希望你别在意。
E: New photos have been added to the album, from your last visit to Belobog with Tamila and Miss Celine. Just a heads-up, my photography skills aren't great, hope you don't mind.

C: 雅努萨波利斯，不愧是翁法罗斯的中心。能来到这里，老夫的人生也算是圆满了呐。
E: Janusopolis... It's really what you'd expect from the heart of Amphoreus. Being able to make it here, I feel like my life has been worth something.

C: 正因为有雅努斯为世界开辟道路，支柱泰坦才能创造出天空、大地与海洋。
E: It was because Janus created a path for the world that the Pillar Titans were able to create the sky, earth, and sea.

C: 塔拉萨波利斯？从未听说过的城邦。你也是来求取神谕的吗？
E: Thalassopolis? I've never heard of this city. Are you here for a prophecy, too?

C: 有缘再见，塔拉萨波利斯的贵客。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
E: May we meet again, esteemed guest from Thalassopolis. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

C: 所以在闲暇时候，我们一家还会过来做些义务劳作，像是清理杂草啊、擦灰什么的。
E: So, my family volunteer here in our spare time, tackling chores like pulling weeds and dusting.

C: 你的家教真好。
E: You were raised well.

C: 当然可以呀，我自幼在这附近长大，这里的屋檐、石柱，甚至墙角的每一寸青苔我都再熟悉不过了。
E: Absolutely! I've grown up here and know every part of this place — the eaves, the columns, and even the moss on the walls.

C: 是你呀，我记得…你不是本地人对吧？找我有什么事，是需要向导吗？
E: I remember now — you're not from around here, are you? What brings you to me? Do you need a guide?

C: 说到他的趣事…啊，这还是安德烈告诉我的。有次尼科马库斯和一个「智种学派」的学者公开辩论，谈到泰坦的权能是否至高无上时，他竟然这样提供论据——
E: As for an amusing tale about him — this one comes from Andre. Once, Nicomachus was in a public debate with a Nousporist scholar about whether the Titans' powers are absolute. Nicomachus offered this kind of argument —

C: 啊…我忘了您来自异邦，和雅努萨波利斯这边的习俗不同。
E: Ah... I forgot you're from a foreign city. Customs here in Janusopolis must be unfamiliar to you.

C: 不过，我们绝不能掉以轻心。在他卷土重来以前，我一定会想办法磨砺剑锋，保护伙伴们…至少，决不让缇安老师那样的悲剧在我眼前再度发生。
E: Still, we can't let our guard down. Before it returns, I'll sharpen my blade to protect my companions... At the very least, I won't let tragedies like what happened to Trianne happen before my eyes again.

C: 啊？不是，我还没说什么…
E: Uh? No, I didn't even say anything...

C: …你可以签在我的衣服上。
E: ...You can sign my clothes.

C: 「我还想再活五百年…」
E: "I want to live five hundred more years..."

C: 临终前，有君主被问到谁会是继任者，他只说了「最强者」。
E: Someone asked another ruler, on his deathbed, who his successor would be. He only said "The strongest."

C: 还有一位诗人在演出的过程中死去，他最后一句唱诗是「{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}许诺了我更好的世界。」
E: Another poet died during his performance. His final line was, "{RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} promised me a better world."

C: 重获新生？
E: Reborn?

C: 解答民众的疑惑也是贵族的义务，请问吧。
E: It is also my duty as a noble to answer the people's queries. Please ask away.

C: 其他地方应该还有没收集的若虫，去帮助我的衣匠同伴们吧。
E: There should be more nymphs elsewhere. Go help my fellow garmentmakers.

C: 对了，这座古城中有只奇怪的若虫，叫声和其他飞萤们都有所不同…它似乎知道些内幕，贵客可以去找它问问。
E: By the way, there's a strange nymph in this ancient city. Its call is different from the other fyreflies... It seems to know some inside information. You might want to go ask it.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 永夜既至，创世不远！
E: The eternal night has arrived, and creation is near!

C: …从重渊离开时，我对黄金裔与救世预言尚存疑虑。而现在，我只自责于自己的愚昧。
E: ...When I left the Abyss, I still doubted the Chrysos Heirs and the prophecy of deliverance. Now, I only blame myself for my ignorance.

C: （不过，有一只紫色的精灵抱着宝箱路过，在那些人离开前，它好像一直在暗中想保护我。所以，我没事的。）
E: (But a purple sprite holding a chest passed by, and it seemed like it was trying to protect me in secret while those people were here. So, I'm fine.)

C: 嗯…有位织者胸怀大志。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>与负日者遥相眺望</color>，准备迎接浪潮的来临呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has lofty ambitions. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>gazing remotely at the Sunbearer</color>, preparing to welcome the coming waves.

C: 现在，我们能做的只有等待。
E: For now, all we can do is wait.

C: 还是继续躺着迷！
E: Might as well just keep lying around, memi!

C: 过阵子就腻了迷！
E: You'll get bored in no time, memi!

C: 是不是就长得更快迷？
E: And they'll grow faster that way, memi?

C: 我都安排好了。
E: Everything's ready now.

C: 为什么天空会下雨，为什么山泉会往下流，又为什么要把水洒进田地？
E: Why does the sky rain? Why do springs flow downhill? And why do we pour water into the fields?

C: 你是怎么出去的？
E: How did you ever leave that place?

C: 都别过来…
E: All of you, stay back...

C: 某种程度上，你说得没错。因你活跃的思想，我才得以在此出现。
E: In a way, you're right. I exist here thanks to your active imagination.

C: 嗯…有位织者向往更高的天际。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院二楼的窗台外面</color>，俯瞰麦田的景色呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of soaring to greater heights. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>outside a window on the second floor of the Sacrament Courtyard</color>, admiring the wheat fields from above.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 别心急，我们还有好多好多时间。慢慢来，时光会为我们停下脚步。
E: No rush, we've still got all the time in the world. Just take it slow. Time will stop for us.

C: 没问题！闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely! And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 聊聊你的过去吧。
E: Let's talk about your past.

C: 如若不信，就看看我为逐火做出的贡献吧——我已经用刀刃，斩断了前人的罪孽。
E: Do you doubt me? Observe the marks I've carved for the Flame-Chase. My blade has severed the sins of those who came before me.

C: 来聊聊吧…凯妮斯？
E: Let's talk about... Caenis?

C: 哈…自我从死去的老师手上接过这个名号，众人便理所应当地认为，我同样延续了她的传承。但我与她不同，我决定带领清洗者走上另一条道路——
E: Since inheriting this title from my deceased mentor, all reasonably assume I follow her legacy. But I chose a new path, and led the Cleaners down this route as well...

C: 随便说点小知识吧。
E: Share some fun facts with me.

C: 真卷啊，贵客。那么现在，我也该完成自己的工作了……
E: So diligent, honored guest. In that case, it's time I fulfill my part of the deal.

C: 自从餐馆开张，果蔬谷物都供不应求了迷。绿球菜的价格，也迷地一下升高了不少！
E: Ever since the restaurant opened, demand for fruits, veggies, and grains has been sky-high, mem. Even the price of greenie cabbage has shot up like crazy!

C: 你更喜欢他们哪一位呢？
E: Which one do you prefer?

C: 在餐馆庆祝真开心，真想每天都能过生日迷！
E: It feels so great to celebrate at the restaurant. I wish every day could be my birthday, mem!

C: 呵呵，被认出来了吗？果然像我这样的美食家，在哪里都不能保持低调迷。
E: Hehe, have I been found out? As expected, someone like me, a true gourmet, can never go unnoticed, mem.

C: 你说得轻巧，误了订单，战士们少了装备，那可是要命！
E: Easier said than done. If orders are delayed, the soldiers will have to fight unarmed. Lives would be truly on the line!

C: …我确实没有告诉她是今天。我再等等姐姐，谢谢你，欧弥利亚婶婶。
E: ...You're right. I didn't tell her today was the day. I will wait for her. Thank you, Auntie Aumilia.

C: 我做饭，也很厉害。要尝尝吗？
E: My cooking, also very good. Want to have a taste?

C: …真是赐福过的？可我听说，圣女好久都没从房间里出来过了呀。
E: ...Were they really blessed? I heard that the Holy Maiden hasn't come out of her room for a long time.

C: 就是猪的意思！
E: Basically, a FLYING PIG!

C: 没关系，老鸟再敲打敲打这生锈的脑袋咕。
E: No worries. This old bird will try to jog his memory by rattling this rusty brain, hoot.

C: 比空间站的有些大人，要好多了……
E: They are so much better than the grown-ups in the space station...

C: 你是什么科室的研究员。
E: Which department are you from?

C: 我问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 相信未来，我们一定可以改变这个冰冷的现状！
E: Have some faith in the future. I'm sure we can change this cold-blooded status quo!

C: 不过我还是要警告你：不要对莱斯莉有什么多余的想法。
E: But I have to warn you. Don't you try to take advantage of her.

C: 哈欠——困死了。啊…又是你，这次又是什么事？
E: *Yawn* I'm so sleepy. You again? What's up?

C: 有没有什么难以忘怀的故事？
E: Any unforgettable stories?

C: 什么古恩那家伙年轻的时候风风火火的样子，还有伯纳德刚来的时候那身板才叫一个结实……
E: How energetic Gunn used to be... And how strong Bernard was when he first joined us...

C: 你支持他们在一起吗？
E: Will you support them being together?

C: 每天收拾打扮得称心如意，是我保持活力与开心的秘诀，偷偷分享给你吧。
E: Dressing up every day is my secret to staying energetic and happy. This is my secret.

C: 你来了，陪我说说话吧……
E: You're here. Let's chat for a bit...

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 嗯…有位织者追求美丽。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>献身拱心的树干上</color>，试图与神识之蝶对话呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver seeking beauty. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on the <color=#dbc291ff>trunk of the Dome of Devotion</color>, trying to converse with the Butterfly of Divine Mind.

C: 你们俩个，坏得很啊。
E: You two are up to no good.

C: 年轻人活泼点好。看看我家波瑟芬妮，整天把自己关在房间里做研究，我还巴不得她多活动活动呢。
E: It's good for young people to be lively. Look at my Possephone, cooped up in her room doing research all day. I actually wish she'd get out and about more!

C: …我这身铠甲乃为杀戮而生，倘若损伤到那些参赛者……
E: My armor was made for battle. If I accidentally harm someone participating...

C: 主持公道，我义不容辞！
E: Justice must be served, and I'm ready to help!

C: 好。
E: Yes.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 原来你的图书馆是邀请制。
E: So your library is invite-only.

C: 缇宝老师，我想学做火箭。
E: Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to build rockets.

C: 一点零星的合作？
E: A bit of occasional collaboration?

C: …遐蝶？你也是来参加活动的？
E: ...Castorice? Are you here for the event too?

C: 猜猜谁不会被邀请？
E: Guess who's not getting an invite?

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 列车的力量…
E: About the Express' source of power...

C: 现在，我的伙伴就是这架列车和大家——还有你。
E: Now, my friends are the Express, the Crew... and you, of course.

C: 关于命途…
E: About the Paths...

C: 就在列车跃迁结束后，我们收到了某个不明信号。信号的来源是一座巨大的星舰残骸。
E: Just as the Express finished its warp jump, we picked up an unknown signal. It was coming from the wreckage of a huge starship.

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》有各种各样的大冒险，原始丛林的冒险、历史遗迹的冒险，还有外太空的冒险……
E: The Adventurous Moles has all kinds of great adventures. The Moles would often go into primitive jungles, lost cities, and even outer space...

C: （到底是什么意思呢？）
E: (What exactly does that mean?)

C: …咦？你这不是还有一页后记没收集到吗？
E: ... Hey? Isn't there a page of postscript you haven't found yet?

C: 幼稚的大人总是在这种地方假装成熟，我决定还是不毕业了。
E: Childish adults always pretend to be mature. I've decided not to graduate.

C: （露天咖啡馆里，只有一处的椅子与众不同…在哪里呢？）
E: (In the open-air café, there is only one chair that stands out... Where is it?)

C: 助教？
E: Assistant instructor?

C: 嚯…我知道了，你就是那个什么「助教」是吧？
E: Oh... I see. You must be that "assistant instructor," right?

C: 我只是个助教…
E: I'm only an instructor assistant...

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 那可不！我跟着这矿队走南闯北好多年咯。这片矿区开辟出来也就不到小二十年的事，不过具体啥时候发现的我是记不得了。
E: That's right! I've been with this mining team for many years. I can't remember exactly how long, but this mine has been operating for nearly twenty years now.

C: 请允许我收回之前的话。我、我要和你们一起建设美梦小镇呀！
E: Please allow me to take back my words. I—I want to build Dreamville with you all!

C: 滴、答，傻冒儿——别瞎看了， 我说的就是你。
E: Tick, tock, fool — Stop looking around, I'm talking about you.

C: 虽然直觉告诉我好像有哪里不对劲，但这可是和星核猎手交锋的机会诶…于是我鼓起勇气，沿着这条线索追踪了下去……
E: Even though my intuition tells me something is fishy, I couldn't pass up an opportunity to lock horns with the Stellaron Hunters... So I plucked up my courage and kept pulling on this clue I'd found...

C: 彻底完蛋了，哈哈。
E: Completely over, haha.

C: 这游戏一般是搭载在那种老式星际驳船的破显示器上的。呃…感觉只有闲得要命的醉酒矿工才会玩。
E: It's from the old display screens on those antique interstellar skiffs. Ugh... The type of game only an idle drunk miner could love.

C: 「那你把得分的屏幕拍张照片吧，然后想办法寄到朋克洛德，如果运气好，没准能拿到一个刺绣徽章，那儿的人都爱这套。」
E: "Snap a screenshot, and find a way to send it to Punklorde. If you're lucky, you might get an embroidered badge. They love that kind of stuff."

C: 你的目的是什么？
E: What is your objective?

C: 「这之后的事，你应该能猜到了。放心，我早说过，只是玩个游戏而已。」
E: "You oughta be able to guess what happens next. Don't worry. I told you it's just a game, nothing more."

C: 让我看看，现在还缺哪些画……
E: Let me check which paintings are still missing...

C: 我就想要买你的画。
E: What I want to buy is one of your paintings.

C: 太贵了，便宜点！
E: That's too much. I want it cheaper!

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。接下来这个任务，我想一定很适合你。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. I have absolute confidence that you're the right person for this next job.

C: 一幅油画作品，描绘了查拉图斯特拉萨帕……
E: An oil painting depicting Mt. Zarathustrazapa...

C: 「彼时的人们为『暴君』的消逝欢呼雀跃，百年后，则有更多人将她的故事写作时代的挽歌。」
E: "Then, the people cheered for the fall of the tyrant. A century later, many more wrote her story as an elegy of the ages."

C: 虚卒的命运通常是在自我毁灭中彻底遭人遗忘。但现它作为展品享受着众人惊奇的目光，或许也算是一种幸运。
E: The fate of a Voidranger is to be forgotten during their destruction. This particular one was immortalized as an exhibit, taking in surprised looks of the public, and that might be a form of fortune for its meager existence.

C: 呜呜啊啊……
E: Woaaahhh...

C: 有没有可能，是晴霓小姐被附身了？
E: Is it possible that Miss Qingni is the one actually being possessed?

C: 等等，你刚刚在拍什么？
E: Hang on, what were you just filming then?

C: 我想拍三个黑塔的合照。
E: I'd like to take a picture of three of you, Herta.

C: 啧啧…啧啧啧……
E: Tsk...

C: 不好意思，打听一下…
E: I'm wondering what's good to eat around here...

C: 这多不好意思啊。
E: Alright, if you say so!

C: （抡起胳膊，准备干架）

E: I want to play Hanu's Prison Break!

E: Brother Hanu retrieves the secret passkey for the prison system, but there's only one key — You'll need all four keys to activate the prison computer.

C: …{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我想，我们这回真的找到了宝贵的线索。

C: 我…{F#小姐}{M#先生}…我想我已经到极限了……
E: I... {F#miss}{M#mister}... I think I'm at my limit...

C: 镜头在娇小怯弱的垃圾与通体金黄的垃圾之间不断切换——好吧，你承认它曼妙的表皮对你的确很有吸引力，但你还是努力克制住自己升腾的欲望。
E: The camera keeps switching back and forth between a small bag of timid trash and another bag that is golden in color. You can't help being drawn to its dazzling appearance, but you make a conscious effort to control the emerging temptation.

C: 给它一棒！

E: Fifteen days of training is short, Miss March. Whether you pass or fail this test, I hope you'll continue with the basics, because that's your best shot at winning.

C: 逆天。

E: Okay, without further ado, I'm going to apologize to the owner. Thanks, you've given me a lot to think about... As for this lousy job at the IPC, well, it's time for some serious contemplation.

C: 你算是问到点子上了。

C: 这可真是误会了，我只是想看看三月小姐会做出怎样可爱的反应。

C: 嗐，这不说明它的危险名声在外，都传得神之又神了。

E: The Blade Demon made one mistake and his life was split in two. In the first half, he was a nobody, but he lived happily; but in the second half, he had mastered earth-shattering skill, yet was racked with anxiety and miserableness.

C: 可惜我只是个读者，不是作者。
E: Unfortunately I'm just the reader, not the author.

C: 作者已死，这是读者的权利！

C: 在被人们遗弃的空间中寻索人们曾经存在过的证据——我觉得世界上没有比这更能满足人类好奇心的事情了。

C: 好吧，我在这等你。

C: （拒绝）
E: (Refuse)

C: 你娓娓道来，那是与三月七在雅利洛VI号出生入死的一场冒险……

C: 佩拉小姐的话，一定没问题的！检验佩拉小姐「友谊凭证」的时间到了，少女应该怎么做呢——
