E: Oh and, meals... I'm really not used to the food on the Xianzhou. Yesterday, I ate a bowl of chili oil beef offal stew for dinner, and today... I've been blowing up the toilet with my flaming rockets...

C: 这位是咱们接下来的对手，卢卡选手。
E: This is our next opponent, Luka.

C: 你怎么了？还好吗？
E: What's wrong? Are you okay?

C: 那几个云骑竟然说自己是普通士兵。这些棘手的敌人，竟然只是罗浮最普通的战士……
E: Those Cloud Knights said they were just ordinary soldiers... They were tough as heck, and yet they are just the Luofu's most ordinary fighters...

C: 看病要紧，先去丹鼎司吧。
E: It's more important to see a doctor. Let's go to the Alchemy Commission first.

C: 唉，就陪她玩一局吧。我估摸着她不会放过这个在圈子里吹牛的机会。
E: Just play a round with her — I doubt she'll let go of this chance to boast about it.

C: 站好不要动…三、二、一……
E: Hold still and don't move... Three, two, one...

C: 杰帕德先生，我一直都很期待与你交手。整个上层区，应该没有人比你更值得我挑战了。
E: Mr. Gepard, I've always been hoping to fight you. There's no one in the Overworld more worth challenging than you.

C: 很荣幸。我也一直很想看看，传说中的「铁臂卢卡」到底有多厉害。
E: I'm honored. I've also been raring to witness the strength of the legendary Luka "Strongarm."

C: 我不参赛，怕失手打死你。
E: I'm not fighting. I might accidentally kill you.

C: 我准备出去逛逛，看能不能找到什么能让卢卡选手重新振作起来的方法。
E: I'm gonna go shop around and see if there's anything that can cheer Luka up.

C: 后来我的确变强了，成了打遍下层区的拳王。那时我觉得，只要挥动拳头，没有谁是我的对手。我可以成为下层区所有孩子们的榜样！
E: I did get stronger later on, and became the boxing champion who trounced the entire Underworld. At that time, I believed that as long as I swung my fists, no one could defeat me. I could be a role model for all the kids in the Underworld.

C: 说不定青雀其实认识伊戈尔，只是忘记了。
E: Maybe Qingque actually knew Igor, but forgot about him.

C: 啊？将军这么忙，还亲自来看我这种小人物的比赛啊……
E: Huh? The general is such a busy man. I can't believe he's coming to watch a nobody like me in action...

C: 见过二位施主。贫僧名唤奢摩，是「丹轮寺」受戒僧众之一，前来参加演武仪典。
E: Greetings to you, patrons. My humble name is Samatha. I am one of the ordained monks of Claretwheel Temple, here to participate in the Wardance.

C: 善逝……
E: Sugata...

C: 仙舟刚刚经历了步离人的渗透突袭，我无法在如此敏感的时刻允许奢摩重获资格，登台参赛。
E: The Xianzhou were just victimized by a borisin raid. I cannot restore Samatha's contestant qualifications and allow a rematch during such sensitive times.

C: …那是什么新闻网？
E: ...What news network again?

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 我们是「萨姆-量产型」。我是「初号机」。
E: We are the SAM Mass Production Models. I am Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>.

C: 怎么？吓得不敢说话了？
E: What? Are you scared speechless?

C: 这不是魔阴身吗！
E: Isn't this a mara-struck?

C: …朋友，赛前稍微寒暄两句嘛。就算是对手，也没必要把气氛搞得那么僵硬吧？
E: ...Hey, it's just friendly banter before the match. Even if we're opponents, you don't have to be this wound up, do you?

C: 涉及机密部分我会拒绝回答。
E: I'll have to refrain from revealing any classified information.

C: 七步之外枪快，七步之内枪又准又快。
E: The gun may be quicker outside of seven strides, but it's also quick AND precise within seven...

C: {NICKNAME}教练的理解果然很独特。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding is certainly unique.

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 对手来势汹汹！不要输啊卢卡选手！
E: The opponent is coming in hot! Hang in there, Luka!

C: 你这广告词真不错。
E: This tagline's not bad.

C: 哦，是的。原计划是请太卜司的人做引导员，我们甚至都找好人选了。人见人爱的青雀小姐，你认识吧？
E: Oh, it is. The original plan was to have someone from the Divination Commission be a guide. We even had just the right person in mind — the delightful Miss Qingque, beloved by all. Do you know her?

C: 不过嘛，虽然她不肯授权引导员的形象，但大衍万象这个玩法的版权不在她手里！所以，嘿嘿，咱们还是可以尽情地玩！
E: But, even if she's unwilling to provide an image for our guides, she doesn't own the gameplay rights for Mutare Magnus! Heh-heh, we can still play to our hearts' content!

C: 真难为你玩这个烂游戏了。
E: It must be hard for you, playing this bad game.

C: 哈哈哈…其实无所谓啦，反正玩家也只有你们两个。估计以后也不会有第三个玩家了。
E: Hahaha... It's fine. You two are the only players anyway. I don't think there will be a third in the future.

C: 你们社长，是不是粉色头发…
E: Does your chief have pink hair...

C: 因此，我强烈建议由财富学院的学生担任乐队核心，进而把控派对的整体效果。
E: Which is why, I strongly recommend the Fortune Academy's student undertake the task of being the band leader, to control the overall impact of the party.

C: 相信各位代表在此反复磋商，都是为了折纸大学的整体利益考虑，希望将此次音乐派对打造得尽善尽美。既然如此，我有个全新的提议——
E: I believe the reasons put forth by every rep are all for the sake of Paperfold University's overall benefit. I hope this music party will run like a perfectly well-oiled machine. In that case, I have a new proposal...

C: 要不…丢个骰子试试？
E: How about... deciding with a die roll?

C: 同学，给个面子。
E: Come on, cut me some slack.

C: 缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破，参见诸位！
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero AKA Rappa, humbly presents herself before you all!

C: 没看出来，你也是个怪人。
E: How surprising — you're a weirdo too.

C: 念出名号时，嗓音务必响亮！气势要足以震慑对手心神！
E: When you say your name, your voice must be resounding! Your aura must send tremors through your opponent's spirit!

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 有趣的小姐。充满迷人的魅力，我从未见过如此特别的学生。
E: A very interested young lady filled with charm. I've never met such a special student.

C: 讨论都结束了，乱破却突然出现，对不起没能阻止她…你一定很生气吧？
E: The discussion was already over, and Rappa suddenly appeared. I'm sorry I couldn't stop her... You must be very upset?

C: 学院代表会说什么…「音乐派对是对外展示折纸大学活力与创造性的窗口」，但学生们才不在乎这个，只要活动办得有意思就好。
E: What did the academy's representative say... "The music party is a showcase of the energy and creativity of Paperfold University." But the students don't care about this. They only want the event to be interesting.

C: （邀请艾丝妲来观看演出）
E: (Invite Asta to watch the performance)

C: 哈哈哈，那是当然！玩乐队的人身上都有股独特的气息，我一眼就能看出来。
E: Hahaha, of course! There's a unique aura on people who play in a band. I can tell in a glance.

C: 但很开心啊！「机械热潮」就是要让这座城市燥起来——我们当然也包括在内！
E: But they were fun! The Mechanical fever is all about dialing this city up to eleven, and it's got to include us, obviously!

C: （达凡绮到底想表达什么…是我的哪句话说错了吗？）
E: (What's Dafanchy trying to say... Did I say something wrong?)

C: 呜呜…我好悲伤喵。
E: Ohh... I'm feeling so sad, meow.

C: 直接说吧。
E: Just say it.

C: 当然，去留皆由阁下决定，在下绝不阻拦。
E: Naturally, to stay or to go is your own decision, and I will not try to stop you.

C: 事实很清晰：学员选拔的负责人未能及时确认你的身份，致使这场闹剧发生。
E: The truth is clear to see: The student selection representative failed to confirm your identity in time and allowed this whole charade to play out.

C: 哈哈哈，因为「缭乱」根本就没有主唱！
E: Hahaha, because the Dazzling Ninja has no lead vocalist!

C: 没问题！要是找不到排练的地方，可以来我家的地下室，都是顶级设备！
E: No problem! If we can't find a place to practice, you can all use my house's basement — it's all top-notch equipment!

C: 啊？我都准备退休了。
E: Eh? I'm ready to retire though.

C: 「缭乱」并非是因缘•聚散的团体，更应是我等的信念传承。音律终会停止，但音律•忍者的狩猎不会结束。往后的道路，只能由诸位自己决定。
E: The Dazzling Ninja is not a group bound or scattered by fate — it is a legacy of our beliefs. The music will inevitably cease, but the sound ninja's hunt will never end. It is up to everyone to decide the path forward.

C: 说到这里，猫头鹰老师的声音突然变了，他的声音变得沧桑、厚重，还有一丝…哀伤。
E: At this point, Professor Owl's voice suddenly changes — it becomes raspy, dignified, with a sliver of... sorrow.

C: 即便不能…我也希望他们有能力在风暴过后的废墟中保护自己，有能力在一个荒芜的时代追逐自己的梦想。
E: Even if they could not... I still hoped that their abilities would allow them to protect themselves in the aftermath of the storm — the capability to pursue their own dreams in a barren era.

C: 要选哪个？
E: Which one will you pick?

C: 现在，我们要向你发起挑战！苏乐达海选的复活赛，正式开始——
E: Now, we are issuing you a challenge! The SoulGlad auditions' repechage round has officially started!

C: 喔！喷出来了！但怎么都是相同的高度？
E: Ohhh! It sprayed out! But why are they all at similar heights?

C: 咦咦，那边的毛绒玩具好像在动！
E: Hey, hey, that stuffed toy over there seems to be moving!

C: （差不多玩够了吧）
E: (Pretty much done playing)

C: （询问它是否懂音乐）
E: (Ask if it knows music)

C: 众所周知，每个人的行为都要符合身份，而你心里很清楚，无论如何，你都不想被人当成是垃圾桶的朋友。
E: Everyone knows that a person's actions must befit their status, and you should be well aware that you never want to be mistaken for a friend of trashcans, no matter what.

C: 啊，所以…乐队解散的消息是真的吗？
E: Ah, so... news of the band disbanding is true?

C: 琉璃•忍者
E: Ninja Ruri

C: 后来有位成员选择退出，乐队就这么解散了。兜兜转转，我到了这里，做起了游戏，有了正经的收入，也再没碰过乐器了。
E: A member later left the band, and then it just disbanded like that. After many twists and turns, I ended up here, starting making games and earning proper revenue. Haven't touched an instrument since.

C: 这东西的来源您就别问了，生意人都有点秘密。雅利洛-VI重回银轨后，老桑博认识了几个天外的朋友，才知道这玩意大有市场。
E: Thou shalt not inquire of the merchant the mysteries of their craft. After Jarilo-VI returned to the silver rail, I got to know several friends beyond the sky — that was when I was clued in on how big the market for this stuff was.

C: 怎么还这么说，差评我可是都给退货了啊。
E: Why would you do that? I refunded all the customers who left poor reviews.

C: 哈哈，都认识多久了。这就是多年行商为咱积攒下的智慧。
E: Haha, we've known each other a long time. This is the accumulated wisdom of many years of being a traveling merchant.

C: 什么赌约？我咋没印象了？
E: What bet? Why don't I remember this?

C: 顺着网线来打我呀～
E: Hah, let's see you fight me on the internet!

C: 抱歉，我突发奇想，想用云吟术清理地面灰尘。但…有些没掌握好力度。给各位添麻烦了。
E: Sorry, I suddenly had the bright idea to use cloudhymn magic to clean the dust. But... I didn't quite get the potency right. Apologies for the trouble.

C: 点击取消键。
E: Tap the Cancel button.

C: 哇！感谢你们…嗯？不对，这和我的那个似乎不是一个型号？
E: Wahh! Thank you all... Hmm? Wait, this is a different model from mine?

C: 试试生物防治法吧。我刚读了一篇论文，说可以在锡毗露蛞蝓泛滥成灾的区域投放一种真菌，叫做「米格麦角菌」。
E: Let's try a biological treatment. I just read a thesis that said we can release a fungus called the Migg Ergot Fungus in areas with Tinplate Slugs infestations.

C: 丹恒，不要太得意哦！我早晚会赢回来的！
E: Dan Heng, don't get ahead of yourself! I'll win one back sooner or later!

C: 我们要见站长！
E: We want to see the Lead Researcher!

C: 情况我已经了解了…真不好意思，给各位添麻烦了。
E: I'm well aware of the issue... I'm really sorry for causing everyone trouble.

C: 真不敢相信…「铁砧队」竟然偷偷植入了信号干扰芯片！用这种战术来击败对手，有点卑鄙！不行，脱粉了，还是「盾构机队」比较光明磊落。
E: I can't believe it... The Anvil Team secretly implanted a signal disruption chip! Defeating your opponents with such a tactic is simply despicable! They just lost a fan in me. At least the Shield Foundation Fleet doesn't play dirty.

C: 你竟然骂人！可恶，既然你如此嚣张，就别怪本姑娘下狠手了！
E: You're mocking me! The arrogance! Dang it, don't blame me for destroying you!

C: 它说的绝对不是这个！
E: That's definitely not what it said!

C: 你看，它同意了！
E: Look, it agreed!

C: 记得这边有个苏乐达喷泉，就拍它试试吧。
E: I remember there was a SoulGlad fountain here. Let's try taking some shots of it.

C: 为什么会出现在这里？
E: What's it doing here?

C: 嗬嗬，有趣有趣……
E: Ho-ho, very interesting...

C: 有些过于现代了…
E: This is a little too modern...

C: 岁阳的空闲生活，还真是丰富呀。
E: A heliobus' idyllic life sure is fulfilling.

C: 噫！此生再无憾矣。
E: Aye! No more regrets in this life.

C: 好POSE！快，{NICKNAME}，抓住机会拍一张！
E: Nice pose! Quick, {NICKNAME}, capture this moment!

C: 严格说来，单一课题的终止和你关系不大。结题之后，俱乐部的几位也总会给你找新的事情做。
E: Strictly speaking, the conclusion of a singular research topic would not have much to do with you. The members of the Society will surely give you something new to do after the wrap-up.

C: 我帮你！无任何隐藏费用！
E: I'll help you! No hidden fees involved!

C: 神的眼目总是孤独的，我们在岁月的洪流中不过一粒尘埃，随着欧洛尼斯呼出的流风而飘扬。
E: The gods' eyes are ever lonely. Our years in the flux of time are but a speck of dust, floating about in Oronyx's billows.

C: 这叫能者多劳，黄金裔是救世主，理应帮我们这样的公民排忧解难。
E: The more capable often have to do more. Chrysos Heirs are saviors, so they naturally should help us common folk lighten our burdens.

C: …可以跑路了嗷呜？
E: ...We are switching squads now?

C: 好，就由我来当这个管理员。
E: All right, I'll be the administrator then.

C: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
E: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

C: 虽然早就听说灰宝的趣味有些…独特，但这个队名还是给了我不小的震撼呢。
E: I've heard that Grayie's tastes are a little... peculiar, but this squad name still got me a little startled.

C: 复盘的事就留到后面再说，现在是庆功时间！按照惯例，大家一起去集市逛逛，然后开开心心地泡个澡~走吧走吧！
E: We'll leave the postmortem for later. It's time to celebrate! According to tradition, everyone will head to the market together for a nice, relaxing bath. Let's go, let's go!

C: 想要单方面解除管理权限，请随我来这边，并支付相应的罚金。走吧。
E: If you wish to unilaterally revoke management privileges, please come with me and pay the respective fine. Let's go.

C: 嗷呜……
E: Awoo...

C: 不好好工作，在这偷懒是吧？
E: Not working hard, but hardly working here?

C: 正是。从接手那只队伍开始，我就始终在观察你们。
E: Precisely. I've been watching you ever since you took over that squad.

C: 只有坚持奇美拉自治，充分发挥成员的自主性，做到自我激励、自我约束，贯彻自由与自律理念的团队，才能适应这个竞争愈发激烈的时代。
E: Only when we persist in chimera autonomy, fully leverage on our members' initiative, achieve self-motivation and self-discipline, and instill the ideals of freedom and self-restraint, can a squad adapt to this age of increasing competition.

C: 有小孩子不能看的吗？
E: Got anything in here that's adult-only?

C: 预言以梦境示现…
E: The prophecies manifest as dreams...

C: （两位半神找我？什么情况…）
E: (The two demigods are looking for me? What's happening...)

C: 还有最后3分钟，没有买到的宝宝赶紧下单、赶紧下单，时间到了我们就下架了。
E: Only 3 minutes left! If you haven't bought it yet, hurry up and place your order! Once time's up, the soap will be gone!

C: 咳咳…我太喜欢「豹豹碰碰大作战」了，咳咳…我愿意为了竞技，献上我的生、命……
E: *cough* I just like Seal Slammers too much... *cough* I am willing to give up my life, just to be able to participate...

C: 咳咳…可惜，还活着。
E: *Coughs* Still alive... what a shame.

C: …对不起！是{NICKNAME}选手和臭名昭著的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯选手。
E: ...Oh, pardon me! Let me rephrase that: we have {NICKNAME} going up against the notorious Spirithief Bartholos!

C: 真是毫无感情的惊讶。
E: That might be the flattest "shocked" face in history.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜？你…是认真的？
E: Awoo-awoo? Do you... really mean that?

C: …{NICKNAME}别看我，我没什么可说的。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, stop looking at me like that. I got nothing to say.

C: 我只是凑个热闹。
E: I'm just here for the fun of it.

C: 我看，没有奖杯你们不也玩得很开心嘛。
E: Without the trophy, you're still having a blast, aren't you?

C: 不公平不公平，赛飞儿大姐头输了是有原因的——
E: Not fair, not fair! Cipher lost for a reason —

C: 「铭记命运吧，尽管健忘的神偶尔也会忘记它，以此来捉弄世人…」
E: "Remember fate, though even the gods occasionally forget it to play tricks on the world..."

C: 哼哼，{NICKNAME}嘛，算是个有趣的{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
E: Heheh, {NICKNAME} is quite an interesting {F#girl}{M#guy}.

C: （努力回想最近的梦）
E: (Struggles to recall a recent dream)

C: 名字叫作…<color=#dbc291ff>「豹豹碰碰大作战」</color>。
E: It's called... <color=#dbc291ff>"Seal Slammers."</color>

C: 那金色奖杯早已是黑厄势力的囊中之物，「预言之子」你什么也无法改变——！
E: That golden trophy already belongs to Pie-non's Legion. You're too late, Child of Prophecy!

C: 这不是怕你没有目标感和紧迫感嘛。
E: Having an objective and some pressure never hurts.

C: 看不到奖杯，我就不比赛了。
E: If I can't see the trophy, I'm going to quit the competition.

C: 大地兽席地而坐。如同沉默的大地一般，它一言不发。
E: The dromas sits motionless, as silent as the earth itself, saying nothing.

C: …对不起，我还是不能讲出来。
E: ...Sorry, but I still can't share it.

C: 被谎言梦欺骗，信赖的伙伴又离开了自己，{NICKNAME}，你还好吗？
E: You were deceived by a dream of lies, and your trusted partner left you — {NICKNAME}, are you alright?

C: 抱歉，我能感受到你的失落。
E: I'm sorry. I can sense how let down you feel.

C: 我承认，现在的话，是公司比较强…但之后我会走出自己的路！
E: Sure, IPC might be ahead now... but I'll find my own path eventually!

C: 或许你有听说，由于测试结果相当令人满意，玩家对后续作品的呼声很高。经过制作团队紧张的开发，游戏的正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面——
E: You might have heard that, thanks to excellent beta test results, players have been eagerly awaiting the next installment. After much hard work from the dev team, the official version was finally launched for the public —

C: 所以我该叫你同学，还是教授？
E: So, are you a classmate, or a professor?

C: 倘若你不介意，可否允许我占用你几分钟，来介绍一下鄙人在匹诺康尼赞助的游戏项目——<color=#dbc291ff>《银河球棒侠传说》</color>？
E: If you don't mind, can I take up a few minutes of your time? Allow me to introduce the game project I sponsor in Penacony — Legend of the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 我现在就要玩下一作！
E: I want to play the next game now!

C: 乖乖被我碾成灰吧！
E: Stand still and let me grind you into dust!

C: 感觉这比赛也没那么…火爆吧？
E: This race doesn't seem... that popular, does it?

C: 是根据您的个人风格定做的！{NICKNAME}专属球笼赛车！
E: It's customized to your personal style! Your very own Spheroid racer!

C: 您的对手是一支特殊的参赛组合，他们通过公司审核和名单公示才获准参赛。很有钱，花重金找公司定制球笼赛车。
E: Your opponents are a special team. They passed the IPC's screening and were announced on the roster. They're very wealthy and spent a lot to have their Spheroid racer custom-made.

C: 可以给我签个名吗？
E: Can I please have your autograph?

C: 那么，我们准备开业了……
E: Alright. We're going to open for business...

C: 它这么爱玩，我正好缺个店员…
E: It's clearly obsessed with gaming, and I just so happen to be short on staff now...

C: 这样的也就八十多个。
E: There are only about eighty or so of them, I think.

C: 不打不相识那种。
E: Sometimes fights lead to friendship.

C: 哇，这是——是软趴趴的扑满！从毛色就能看出来，它很健康呢~
E: Wow, it's... it's a fluffy Trotter! Just look at that glossy coat~

C: 大力地开！
E: Crack it open!

C: 滴答，滴答，滴答……
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock, tick-tock...

C: 什么？！怎么把这事忘了，还剩多少时间？
E: Shoot! I totally forgot about that! How much time have I got?

C: 不好了不好了！家里的扑满坐上扫地机器人出逃了！
E: Code Red! Your Trotter hijacked a robot vacuum and escaped home!

C: 小朋友不能喝。
E: This isn't for kids.

C: （趁黑塔修理黑塔人偶的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
E: (While Herta's busy fixing her puppet, might as well name the drink.)

C: 「突然的自我」。
E: "Sudden Self-Awareness."

C: 准备好了吗，小灰毛——
E: Are you ready, Little Gray?

C: 哈哈，当将军真威风啊。
E: Haha, being a general feels so amazing.

C: 如果我是花火，也好。
E: If I were Sparkle... that wouldn't be so bad.

C: 尽管总觉得时间匆匆，但走过的地方多了，就难免留下些回忆。
E: Though time always feels fleeting, the more places you wander, the more memories you gather.

C: 能让你参加实验，本来就给了你一个锻炼的机会，你应该感激才对。不要太急功近利，时机到了，论文自然会让你署名。
E: Allowing you to join the experiment itself gave you a growth opportunity. You should be grateful. Don't rush for quick success. When the time comes, you'll naturally be listed as co-author.

C: 别担心，我暂时还会继续陪着你。在「货币战争」运行期间，我会一直在这里观察测试数据。如果有任何不懂的问题，你也可以随时找我。
E: Don't worry, I'll stick around with you for now. I'll be here monitoring the test data while Currency Wars is running. If you have any questions, feel free to ask me anytime.

C: 哎哟，这话也太伤人了，我可是拼了命地在找宝贝啊。
E: Dang, that's hurtful! I've been scrambling to find treasure over here.

C: 呃…出钱的人可是那位「深蓝帅哥」，那哥们儿是我认识最靠谱的购货商了，他不可能坑咱们！
E: Ahem... The buyer is that guy called Tall, Blue, and Handsome. He's the most reliable trader I know, and he'd never swindle us!

C: 关于结束探宝的感想。
E: Thoughts after the treasure hunting is over.

C: 这还要我解释？你可以用它存档你已有的祝福。不过嘛，测试好功能后，我会用它去收集你的脑内神经电波，封存你脑中的部分数据。
E: Do I have to explain that? You can use it to store your Blessing. Just so you know, I'll use it to collect your brainwave and seal off some data in your brain after the test.

C: 这个东西，干咱们这行的称之为「主角模板」。据说是某位幻戏社的编剧发明的编剧工业化神器。
E: This thing is what we in the industry call a Protagonist Model. Legend has it that some Immersia troupe has invented this magical tool for industrial-scale screenwriting.

C: 您有所不知，重复的行为容易焕发人们的仪式感。因此同样重要的事情一定要让人们多做几遍。
E: Little do you know, repetitive behavior instills a sense of ritual in people. That's why important details have to be repeated a few times over and over.

C: 「若是寻常人，恐怕只会当这是自身的错觉，但{NICKNAME}何许人物？立刻察觉到了其中的凶险。」
E: "Were it any ordinary person, it would merely be discarded as a mistake of the senses. But what kind of hero is {NICKNAME}? The treacherous danger was instantly detected."

C: 这司鼎高低不是个好人。
E: I don't think this Cauldron Master is graceful at all.

C: 对喽，就是这么回事！呃，不对……
E: Yeah, but... I mean, uh, no...?

C: 等您准备好了，就来这里找我吧。
E: Come find me when you're ready.

C: 谁在说话？
E: Who's speaking?

C: 我的好大儿啊！
E: Wow, its size is huge!

C: 之前不是都和您说了吗，武打戏是最好写的。只消在您的「主角模板」上再添几笔就行啦！
E: Didn't I mention? Martial arts scenes are the easiest of all to write. Just a couple of strokes on your Protagonist Model is all it takes!

C: 身形非常巨大…
E: It's humongous... monstrously huge...

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小弟弟}说话真不客气啊。哎，还真让你说对了。
E: {F#Lil' lady}{M#Lil' dude}, that's not very polite, is it? But hey, you're not wrong.

C: 迴星港哪儿来的建木？
E: Where can I find Arbor wood at Stargazer Navalia?

C: 这应该就是丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝要找的生长促进剂了。拿回去找他吧。
E: This should be the growth booster Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe was looking for. Let's take it back to him.

C: 先加入无根纯水，再放入柄材。
E: Put the Bona Aqua in first, and then the hilt-wood.

C: 哎呀，就是一点点下集预告的小噱头罢了…在下才不舍得真给您写死呢。呼…感谢您二位的协助！在下这个台本啊，总算是写完了。
E: Come on, it's just a little gimmick for the next scene's preview... I'm not really going to kill you off. ...Whew, finally finished it. Thank you both for your help! This script of mine is pretty much done now.

C: 办事不牢！等等，打住打住，咱俩可都没尾巴，合着这属于是见人先来个大马趴，当给观众老爷的见面礼了！
E: And you'll be broke! Wait, wait, we're not making terrible jokes. We're straying from the point, so let's get back to the folks!

C: 明曦姑娘来找过我说过商会的事，我大体上是支持的，能把生意做大是好事，但也得谨慎行事。所以我就去做了个市场调研，收集潜在顾客的口味喜好。
E: Mingxi shared her thoughts on the merchant guild with me, and I am in agreement with most of her ideas. It's always a good thing to make the pie bigger, right? So I decided to do some market research to get a better sense of what my potential customers are into.

C: 真的吗，那就好。
E: Really? Good to know.

C: 干脆结业，回家继承家产去。
E: Why don't you just close your shop and inherit your family fortune?

C: 还好，明曦姑娘听闻我这差点砸了招牌，过来帮了我个大忙——她带我去借来了谛听，靠这玩意侦测文玩的年限，我正好也练练眼力。
E: Thankfully, Mingxi heard about my predicament and helped me. She lent me a Diting that allows me to figure out the origin year of my fandangles.

C: 至于现在，在我的赞助下，公司和以太战线竞技协会将这里改造成了大赛的比赛场地——换句话说，这现在是属于我的「竞技场」了。
E: But now, under my sponsorship, the IPC and the Aetherium Wars Gaming Association have transformed this place into the competition venue for the tournament — in other words, this place is now my "arena."

C: 我没有任何意见——「交换」、「养成」，这都是《以太战线》游戏的一环。你们就好好利用这枚硬币吧。
E: I have no objections. After all, "trading" and "training" are all part of Aetherium Wars. I say why not put the coin to good use?

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 欸，这个不错！我也挺喜欢的。
E: Ooh, that's a good one, I like it!

C: 以太战线玩家终端
E: Aetherium Wars Player Terminal

C: 嗯…不愧是大名鼎鼎的开拓者，只是这样简单体验过后就能上手——你们可真是天生的玩家。
E: Impressive! I see you're both living up to your renowned Trailblazer reputations! It would seem you two have a natural talent for gaming.

C: 就是就是，有本事你们就跟我们打一场，赢了再说！
E: Yeah! If you think you've got what it takes, then bring it on!

C: 嘿嘿，我也是。
E: Hah, me too.

C: 所以，你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？我们出发吧～
E: So, ready to head out, {NICKNAME}?

C: 辛苦了，乔瓦尼先生。
E: You must be pretty tired, Mr. Giovanni.

C: 说到这个，公输师傅——您对它的异常有什么看法吗？您毕竟是工造司的第一巧手…也许能看出什么端倪？
E: Speaking of which, Master Gongshu — what do you make of them? You're the best artisan in the whole commission, maybe you can pick up on something?

C: 我们到啦，空间站的月台！从这里出发就可以到达<color=#dbc291ff>「空间站『黑塔』的决胜乐园」</color>了…不过，这里的气氛和平时比好像没什么变化？
E: We made it! From here, we can head to the <color=#dbc291ff>space station's Victory Zone</color>. Hmm... the atmosphere doesn't seem to have changed much — doesn't have that tournament vibe.
Oink...

C: 可恶的假面愚者…
E: Classic Masked Fool move...

C: 结果，问题就这么出现了：你们应该也发现了，这只以太灵十分不同寻常——它有自己的脾性，跟其它制式化的数据完全不同。
E: And that's pretty much the whole story. I'm sure you've noticed too — this Aether Spirit is unlike the others... They have their own unique personality — a mind of their own, you could say — which makes them very distinctive.

C: 那枚硬币掉在了这贝洛伯格，被下层区的那个小男孩捡到；「后援团」成员随后也找到了这条线索……
E: The coin wound up in Belobog and was found by a young boy from the Underworld. This clue was then subsequently uncovered by the members of the support squad...

C: 行啦行啦，你们几个，别在这里闹笑话了。
E: Yikes, enough already. Don't make a spectacle.

C: 为了和我们见一面，居然不惜费这么大的工夫…这到底是何方神圣！
E: Who could it be...? Going to all this effort just to meet us?

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}！让我们一起去挑战这座决胜乐园的<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军候补」</color>！
E: {NICKNAME}, it's time to show those "<color=#dbc291ff>contenders</color>" who the real bosses are!

C: 上场战斗的数据看上去有些问题……
E: Something doesn't look right about the data from that last battle...

C: 来进行「超链接对决」吧！
E: Let's have a "Hyperlink Match"!

C: 没问题，若您想要入场，随时告诉我即可。
E: No problem. Just let me know when you're ready.

C: 老实说，在游戏领域，已经很久没人能把我逼到这个份上了…你们是过去几年里头一个。
E: I gotta be honest, I haven't been pushed that hard in ages...

C: 没什么特别的感觉…那可真是太可惜了。
E: Oh, really? I'm sorry to hear that.
...Okay!

C: 只有强者才配拥有「冠军」的头衔！我们永远追随强者的步伐！
E: Only the strongest are worthy of the title "champion!" And we always follow the strongest!

C: 不用搞得这么郑重啦。
E: No need to make it sound so serious!

C: 谢谢你，艾丝妲小姐。可我…我恐怕没有勇气……
E: Thanks, Miss Asta. But I... I'm not sure I should...

C: …我明白了，你是嫌我帮不上忙，只会给你们添乱是吧？
E: ...I get it. You don't think I have any special skills, so I'll just get in the way?

C: 别得意，如果我拥有燎原的所有力量…怎么会败给你们！
E: Hmph, don't get complacent — if I had all of Ignamar's power, I'd never have lost to the likes of you!

C: 若是依附了好斗的战士，性格便渐渐好勇斗狠了起来；而要是遇上了玩心甚重的孩童，也就成了童心未泯的游灵。
E: If a heliobus possesses a great warrior, they might gradually take on a braver, fiercer persona... and if their host is a playful child, they may adopt a childlike spirit.

C: 还没放弃挣扎吗？
E: Still haven't given up?

C: 唉…这龙女大人怎么动不动就跑…我能不能申请个「恶劣环境作业补贴」啊。
E: *sigh* Why does the Dragon Lady always have to run off... I swear they should be paying us extra for this...

C: 大人们总说：「现在不要贪玩，等长大后再玩。」
E: Grown-ups are always saying "study now and have fun later..."

C: 看来只有咱俩还算精神…
E: Looks like we're the only ones in good spirits today...

C: …真、真的吗？
E: ...R—Really?

C: 不，我…我不可能赢过他们…
E: No, I... I had no path to victory...

C: 我明白了…青雀，你还真是个有趣的孩子。
E: Hehe, I see what you're thinking, Qingque... you're an interesting one.

C: 像太卜这样的人，又怎么会为命中注定的困惑而无端自寻烦恼呢？
E: Why would someone as talented as the Master Diviner go through the trouble of making endless choices if the end result is predetermined?

C: 毫无反应，应是被岁阳劫持了心识。
E: She's unresponsive. It looks like a heliobus has taken control of her mind.

C: 这是幻觉吗？妈妈，你怎么在这儿呀，我好想你。
E: Is this an illusion? Mom, what are you doing here? I've missed you so much.

C: 已经死了？老子过得也不轻松呀，被炸成了无数小碎片，老费力地又融在一起了…老子跟着你倒了这么多年的霉，总该得有些好运气吧！
E: ...Dead? Well, I haven't exactly had a picnic — exploding into countless shards, being your shadow for all those rotten years — it's about time I had some good luck!

C: 把这家伙带回藿藿身边好了。
E: Let's bring this one back.

C: 啊…我是说这个看样子应该就是岁阳作祟。
E: Ah... I mean, this looks like the work of a heliobus.

C: 呵，这个化外民倒是还有点胆识…不像你，明明是个仙舟剑客，却那么畏首畏尾！
E: Hah! This outworlder has some guts... Unlike you... You're clearly a Xianzhou swordsman and yet you run off with your tail between your legs!

C: 好胆识！
E: I like your courage!

C: 住口住口住口住口！可恶啊！我要！让你们！付出代价！
E: Shut it, shut it, shut your mouth! Damnation! I WILL make you PAY!

C: 如果你要去见这位文远的话，把这个带给他吧。虽然狐人不至陷入魔阴身，但如果服下这药，他会好受很多。
E: If you're going to see this Wenyuan, then take this to him. Foxians might not immediately reach the stage of being mara-struck, but this will still help him feel better if he uses it.

C: （收入「藏月瓠」）
E: (Pull them inside the Lunaumbra Gourd)

C: 太卜司里日复一日干上几百年，这样的「成功」底层逻辑是什么？顶层设计在哪？比起短生种的亮点在哪？优势在哪？没有！
E: I have worked the same day over and over in the Divination Commission for hundreds of years. Where is the logic in terms of "success"? Where is the pinnacle? Where are the highlights in our lives compared with short-life species? Where are the benefits? There are none!

C: 青总对你做了什么…
E: What has President Qing done to you...

C: 青雀小姐，你被岁阳附体，陷入了不正常的幻觉中。我们是来帮你摆脱的。
E: Miss Qingque, you have been possessed by a heliobus and fallen into an abnormal illusion. We're here to help you escape.

C: 来，再试试看！
E: Here, give it a try!

C: 感觉没有想象中那么吓人…
E: This isn't as scary as I imagined...
Entered: 1 / 4 / 7...

C: 似乎不太对，还得再次尝试…
E: That doesn't seem right. You'll have to try again...

C: 是雷诺的鬼魂！
E: Renault's ghost!

C: 哎，我懂了，你是打算让我试试。那…我试试就试试嘛。
E: Ah, I get it, you want me to have a try! Alright... let's give it a shot!

C: 你还记得对方说的地址吗？
E: Do you remember what address they said?

C: 没有没有，唔，别、别夸我啦……
E: No, no. Hmm, do—don't praise me like that.

C: 您真是好眼力——没错，快递箱里还放着藏月瓠！
E: That's very observant of you. The Lunaumbra Gourd is in the courier package!

C: 来点作用吧，肉棺材——
E: Come on, make yourself useful, flesh-coffin —

C: …很快乐？
E: ...Very happy?

C: 时候不早了。谢谢你，三月。我，该回笼子里了。
E: It's getting late. Thank you, March. I... should return to the cage now.

C: {NICKNAME}，你可算来了！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're finally back!

C: 同喜同喜！
E: Same to you!

C: 桂乃芬似乎已经按下了录制按钮……
E: Guinaifen seems to have already pressed the Record button...

C: 我明白，不过，我有些话想跟你说。
E: I understand, but I have something to tell you.

C: 真是拿你没办法。
E: Whatever shall I do with you.

C: 那个人…我也发现了，但我没感受到岁阳的气息，她应该只是个普通人。
E: That girl... I've noticed her too, but it doesn't feel like a heliobus inside. She should just be a normal person.

C: 我让她们去找其他人打听事情去了。
E: I sent them ahead to go find some other people and ask around about it.

C: 谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，多亏你全程在配合我，要不然……
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. We're lucky to have you helping out the whole way, otherwise...

C: 很简单，我想你来参加专项测试。
E: Easy: I'd like you to take the special gland test.

C: 这样一来，它们是玩尽兴了，可其他造物就很难受了。
E: They have plenty of fun like this, but other creations will suffer.

C: 你比我见过的大部分人类更直率，我很欣赏你这一点。
E: You're more straightforward than most humans I've ever met. I really appreciate that.

C: 你不是第一个这么说的。
E: You're not the first one to say that.

C: 当然不是。
E: Of course, I didn't.

C: 你闭嘴，一个骗子还这么招摇，以后不许这么对我的朋友讲话。
E: Shut up, you're such a scammer, acting all high and mighty. Don't ever talk to my friend like that again.

C: {NICKNAME}，感谢你连日来的辛勤贡献。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for all your hard work over the past few days.

C: 如果可以，那自然最好。不过我想，以她的性子，大抵是不会回来了。
E: If she could, that would be best. But knowing her temperament, I don't think she'll be coming back.

C: 我亲眼看见的，那个虫子将她吞了进去！一个瘦弱的小妹妹…就这么被虫子活活吞进去了，天啊……
E: I saw it with my own eyes, that beetle swallowed her! A frail little girl... swallowed by a beetle alive!

C: {NICKNAME}，你要听我讲故事吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?

C: 我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
E: I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.

C: 当时在现场，能够证明布洛妮娅所言非虚的证人有抵抗组织的干部和外星的通缉犯。此外还有两位虽不在现场但算是亲历者的人，是被可可利亚剥夺权力的落马官员和她的弟弟。
E: On the scene at the time, those who could testify that what Bronya said was true included cadres from the resistance movement and some aliens with outstanding warrants. Besides those, there were two people absent who were also witnesses, however: The fallen official stripped of power by Cocolia, and her little brother.

C: 中间是黑色？
E: Is the middle layer black?

C: 生气的舒翁好恐怖哇……
E: Siobhan looks so scary when she's angry...

C: …不是，我可是家族邀请的贵宾，你敢这么对我说话？！
E: ...Wait, I'm a guest of honor invited by The Family. How dare you talk to me like this!?

C: 没有。至少我不允许。

C: 汪！我们的酒吧建好了哇！好漂亮，好气派！！
E: Woof! Our lounge is all set and ready to roll! It looks so awesome and grand!!!

C: 别大惊小怪的，快去吧。
E: Don't make a fuss. Go.

C: （是个傲慢不讲礼貌的怪物，个头倒确实挺大的。）
E: (Quite the rude and arrogant monster. It is quite big though.)

C: 你是那只狗狗的朋友？
E: Are you that dog's friend?

C: 咳咳。跟您说这些，人家都害羞得有点面红耳燥了，请替我调杯饮料吧。

E: Oh, you don't know? A bunch of guys in black suits are guarding the front gate, and we can't step out of this place.

C: 您真是个完美的调饮师！技艺如此高超，又如此地懂得人家的心。体验实在是太棒了。
E: You're a perfect drinksmith, so skilled and caring! This was a great experience.

C: 唔，哪有这么简单……
E: Hmm, but it's not that simple...

C: 但又是胆怯，又是难为情的，很多话到嘴边，好几次都硬生生咽回去了。唉。
E: But then again, I'm too timid, and those words get stuck in my throat, and swallowed back. *sigh*

C: 怎么还要分层，累死了。
E: Why do you want layers? That's so much work.

C: …你恢复得怎么样了？
E: ...How's your recovery going?

C: （淑女喜欢的是……）
E: (Lady likes...)

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …可以帮我整理吧台吗？
E: ...Can you help me clean the tables?

E: Woof! I still have a question, woof! Umm... With so many fun places out there, why did you come here to be a drinksmith?

C: 汪！看看你说的话，你自己相信吗？说谎话是不对的哇！
E: Woof! Just listen to yourself. Do you even believe in what you just said? It's no good to lie!

C: …你是真的有情绪问题。
E: ...You really have emotional problems.

C: （快点把它送走吧！）
E: (Please, get it out of here!)

E: I was on vacation in Penacony, and little did I know I'd miss meeting a big shot like you there.

C: 我没有难过，我只是有点唏嘘，毕竟是多少年前的回忆了。
E: I'm not feeling down, just getting a bit sentimental, you know? It's all those memories from way back when.

C: 在困难难度的音乐挑战中，<color=#f29e38ff>判定线将会消失</color>。

C: 准备开始正式躲避吧！

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎！这饮料的颜色就很适合我，你看，我多深沉啊，沉得都飞起来了！
E: Woah woah woah! The color of the drink suits me so well. Look at how deep and profound I am. So deep that I'm flying!

C: 那些贪生怕死的家伙，一听到可能要和迷因打交道，我话都没说完就没影了。
E: Before I could even finish my words, those cowards just ran away as soon as they heard they might run into memes.

C: 应该翻得差不多了，再找下去我估计得把墙皮都撕下来一层。
E: I think we're almost done. If we have to keep digging, then I guess we'll have to tear down the walls.

E: You place the Robird on the arcade machine

C: 看那边的NPC——就是那些聚在一起的广告牌，那边肯定有东西。

E: Anyway, you're not allowed to go yet, {NICKNAME}. Miss Tinah just told me about a new game mode for the arcade machines, so you've got to try it out with me!

C: 可最违心的恶意，\n却最能逼人相信。
E: But it is the false-hearted malice\nThat most powerfully forces belief.

C: 这是身躯为心灵建造的坟墓。\n你不会枯萎，\n也不再拥有未来。
E: This is a tomb crafted by the body to trap the soul.\nYou will neither wither,\nnor hold a future anymore.

C: 是怎样宏伟的行者，\n才能将泰坦囚作倒影？
E: Just what manner of magnificent pathstrider,\nCould imprison the Titans as mere reflections?

C: 它亘古的视线，\n已经透过了逐火的终点……
E: Its timeless sight,\nHad already seen past the Flame-Chase's final plight...

C: 而<color=#9e5738>「大地」</color>将成为<color=#9e5738>「岁月」</color>的盟友，\n唯它能守望……\n直到世界尽头。
E: And <color=#9e5738>Earth</color> shall become <color=#9e5738>Time's</color> ally,\nFor it alone can keep watch...\nUntil the end of the world.

C: 「等待…讨厌，等待…」
E: "Waiting... Hate, waiting..."

C: 这便是第一位，\n也是<color=#9e5738>唯一一位凯撒</color>。
E: This was the first,\nAnd also <color=#9e5738>the only Imperator</color>.

C: 请你如实记录我的一生吧，著者。\n不必尽用溢美与庄严之辞。
E: Please record the truth of my life, dear author.\nNo need for words of praise or solemnity.

C: 「公主，来与我们共飨盛宴吧！」\n庆功的人们向她举杯致意，\n她却微笑着摆手拒绝。
E: "Princess, come enjoy the feast with us!"\nThe triumphant people raised their glasses,\nYet she declined with a smile and a wave.

C: 「即便如此…」
E: "Even so..."

C: 红发孩童笑盈盈牵住少女， 「好久不见，风堇！」 「是来奥赫玛做客，还是找*我们*帮忙？」 少女道出所需， 「我想要一些能发光的东西， 即便是废品也好。」
E: The red-head child takes the girl's hands. "Long time no see, Hyacine!" "Are you here in Okhema for a visit, or do you need help from us?" The girl recounts her needs. "I want some shining things, Even if they are considered junk."

C: 学者们默然以对，\n但智种学派的贤人，\n果断将她揽为助手。
E: While the sages faced her words in silence,\nThe Nousporist Sage alone,\nDecided to hire her as assistant post-haste.

C: 「可只要我笑口常开，\n奥赫玛就还有阳光的少年人。」
E: "But as long as I keep smiling,\nOkhema will always have an upbeat, shining young man."

C: 他从未爱过自己，\n又何以爱这世界？
E: He had never loved himself,\nWhy would he love this world?

C: 象牙雕刻的柔荑，挽起曳地裙摆。\n似乎吹口气，\n便复苏成活生生的少女。
E: Slender hands sculpted of ivory pull up the dress's train,\nAs if with one breath alone,\nThe maiden will be revived.

C: 「可什么都能看到，等于什么都看不到。」 诸般嘈杂的幻象， 围拥在她身旁， 令她陷入另一种昏盲。
E: "But being able to see everything is the same as seeing nothing." Countless mirages and cacophony, Surround her with stimuli plenty, Casting her into another kind of blindness overwhelming.

C: 「我想停下来，休息一段时间。」海妖的公主隔着手套抚摸琴弦。「我打算写一本书，已经积累了不少的乐句了。」
E: "I want to take a break for a while." The sea siren princess stroked the strings through her gloves. "I'm planning to write a book. I've already collected quite a few musical phrases."

C: 缇里西庇俄丝有时是快乐的缇缇。她学着母亲莫忒丝教给她的歌谣，为三个孩童唱一首乘着船一直航行到月亮上的变奏曲。
E: Sometimes Tribios was the happy Trity. She imitated the rhyme her mother Mortis taught her, singing for the three children a variation about sailing all the way to the moon.

C: 其余金牌厨师都默契地无视了白厄与灰发{F#少女}{M#少年}互冒星星眼的相遇，风堇则及时反应过来，将星穹餐车的诸位带入店中。
E: The other master chefs tactfully ignored the starry-eyed exchange between Phainon and the gray-haired {F#girl}{M#boy}. Hyacine quickly stepped in, leading the Astral Food Express delegation inside.

C:
路径：负世。原动力：憎恨。
注释：自我认知为空，仅对破坏性刺激产生应答。
其恨意引来了纳努克对这一个体的瞥视，证明他已成为最完美的毁灭因子。
但他拒绝完成再创世，通过重置实验，并将记忆和火种传递给新的自我，制造永劫回归，以保证铁墓无法从翁法罗斯中破壳。
在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环末尾，意图通过「毁灭」破坏自身，令「负世」路径出现逻辑漏洞。
现已被铁墓合并。因权杖内核层受到冲击，模拟世界的黑潮现象大幅衰退。
E:
Track: Worldbearer. Primum Mobile: Hatred.
Note: Intra-Cognition is null. Responds only to destructive stimuli.
Its hatred drew the gaze of Nanook upon its individual being, proving it as having already become the most perfect factor of Destruction.
However, it refused to complete the Era Nova. Through resetting the experiment, it transferred its memories and Coreflames to its next self, thus creating the eternal recurrence to ensure Irontomb would never hatch from Amphoreus.
At the end of the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive loop, it attempted to destroy itself through "Destruction" to create a logical vulnerability in the "Worldbearing" track.
It has now been merged by Irontomb. Due to an impact on the Scepter's core layer, the black tide phenomenon in the simulated world has greatly receded.

C: 在初始循环中，多细胞无脊椎动物占据了翁法罗斯，智慧生命未能诞生。第<unbreak>59337</unbreak>次循环，将灭绝事件投入翁法罗斯，拥有原始神经系统的脊椎动物出现，但并未诞生文明。部分藻类植物形成近似科尔奇人的智慧集群，过度繁殖导致模拟世界出现氧化灾害，并陷入冰封。
E: In the initial cycle, multicellular invertebrates dominated Amphoreus, but no intelligent life emerged. In the <unbreak>59,337</unbreak>th cycle, extinction events were inserted, triggering the rise of vertebrates with primitive nervous systems. Still, no civilization formed. Certain algae species developed intelligence clusters akin to the Kolchis, but over-reproduction caused an oxidation disaster, freezing the simulated world.

C: 路径：死亡。原动力：平和。\n注释：高度抑制偏离行为，决策以最小扰动为准则。\n在迭代进入后期时，作为单一个体的死亡泰坦成为了对称个体，成为了两个因子。但在本循环中，两因子产生了严重的自我意识错位，「均衡」的临界值已被打破，并走向「毁灭」。
E: Track: Death. Primum Mobile: Peace.\nNote: Highly suppresses deviant behavior. Decisions are based on the principle of minimal disturbance.\nIn the later stages of iteration, the Death Titan, as a single entity, split into symmetrical selves, becoming two factors. In this cycle, however, the two factors experienced profound identity divergence. The threshold of Equilibrium was breached and tipped toward Destruction.

C: 无名泰坦大墓
E: Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan

C: 记得刚认识你的时候，你还自称「芭蕉花酱」，满怀梦想却充满迷茫，现在都已经在芮克先生的新作中崭露头角了。用你的演技和个人魅力去征服更多观众吧，你就是未来最闪耀的明星！
E: I remember when I just met you, you called yourself "Nanabloom-chan" and were filled with dreams, but were lost on the path. Now, you're already standing out in Mr. Reca's new work. Use your acting and charm to conquer the hearts of more viewers. You'll be the brightest star in the future!

E: Chimeramem

E: Can't Tell What This Is

E: \n\nAdler was saved by us when he was attacked. I stated our purpose, and he said that the Wubbaboo suspected by Hinkel of the Department of Ecology and the heliobus that Emily of the Department of Insight heard about were both energy lifeforms, and he seemed to have some sort of revelation from them.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>United in Malice</color>: Take note of enemy formations and act with caution.

C: 该模式<color=#f29e38ff>没有步数限制</color>，请在规定的时间内进行消除，尽可能提升小鸟的<color=#f29e38ff>战力</color>。
E: This mode has <color=#f29e38ff>no move limit</color>. Match and eliminate within the time limit to boost your bird's <color=#f29e38ff>power</color> as much as possible.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>助燃券</color>，可以快速刷取<color=#f29e38ff>拟造花萼/凝滞虚影</color>掉落的养成材料。
E: Using a <color=#f29e38ff>Fuel Voucher</color> lets you quickly farm upgrade materials from <color=#f29e38ff>Calyx / Stagnant Shadows</color>.

C: 按照提示的<color=#f29e38ff>顺序</color>依次点亮，可激活全部供暖装置。
E: Follow the hinted <color=#f29e38ff>order</color> to sequentially light them and activate all heating facilities.

C: 按下该键可以在<color=#f29e38ff>观察者模式</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>行动模式</color>之间切换。<color=#f29e38ff>观察者模式</color>下玩家可以获取<color=#f29e38ff>更多画面信息</color>，<color=#f29e38ff>行动模式</color>则允许玩家操控角色进行<color=#f29e38ff>移动、交互</color>。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} this button to switch between <color=#f29e38ff>Monitor Mode</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Action Mode</color>. <color=#f29e38ff>Monitor Mode</color> provides <color=#f29e38ff>additional information about the scene</color>, while <color=#f29e38ff>Action Mode</color> grants character <color=#f29e38ff>movement and interaction</color>.

C: 确定罗盘上的路线后会触发机关，<color=#f29e38ff>场景中将按照罗盘指示的状态架设出彩虹道路。</color>
E: After confirming a route on the compass, a mechanism will be triggered. <color=#f29e38ff>A rainbow path will be added to the map according to the specified state of the compass.</color>

C: 巴特鲁斯可以释放泡泡攻击，<color=#f29e38ff>按住攻击键</color>将对当前锁定目标<color=#f29e38ff>连续发出</color>泡泡弹。
E: Bartholos can unleash bubble attacks. <color=#f29e38ff>Hold down the attack button</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>continuously fire</color> bubble shots at your currently locked-on target.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>后，<color=#f29e38ff>妖火</color>会立刻向行动序列顶部<color=#f29e38ff>移动</color>。\n红色妖火<color=#f29e38ff>即将到达</color>行动序列顶部时使用<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>，能使我方<color=#f29e38ff>抢得妖火</color>。
E: After an <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> is used, <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> will immediately <color=#f29e38ff>shift</color> towards the top of the Action Order.\nUsing an <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> when the red Fiendfire is <color=#f29e38ff>just about to reach</color> the top of the Action Order will enable the team to <color=#f29e38ff>capture the Fiendfire</color>.

C: 武器组合推荐\n行动时触发：纯美的祝祷、游侠长弓、彩虹球棒、筑城之志
E: Recommended Weapon Combo:\nAction Triggered Weapon: Prayers of Beauty, Ranger's Longbow, Rainbow Bat, and Will of Architects

C: 敌人攻击力大幅提高，在攻击时将对我方造成<color=#f29e38ff>致命攻击</color>。
E: Enemy ATK is greatly increased. When they attack, they will deal <color=#f29e38ff>killing blows</color> to allies.

C: 敌人受到<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>时，获得1层<color=#f29e38ff>易伤</color>。\n集中攻击易伤层数高的敌人，可造成更高<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>。
E: When enemies receive <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color>, they are inflicted with 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>Vulnerability</color>.\nFocus attacks on enemies with the most Vulnerability stacks to deal more <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color>.

C: 丹恒担任领队时，行动卡需在全部打出后才能重新抽取。同时在最后一次晚餐会议前，将获得特殊行动卡<color=#f29e38ff>「榜样风范」</color>。
E: When Dan Heng is the leader, Action Cards can only be redrawn after they are all used. At the same time, before the final Dinner Meeting, you'll gain the special <color=#f29e38ff>Passenger Paragons</color> Action Card.

C: 合理搭配不同的武器组合以及配饰，可以获得更强力的组合效果。
E: Make reasonable Weapon-Accessory combinations to obtain stronger combo effects.

E: In "Fate/stay night," <color=#f29e38ff>character levels, Light Cone levels, Traces, and Relics</color> can be enhanced if requirements are met.

C: 位面内可获得各命途对应的<color=#f29e38ff>活动限定祝福</color>。
E: All kinds of <color=#f29e38ff>event-limited Blessings</color> corresponding to each Path can be obtained in this plane.

C: 智瞳满时可以提升星阶；<color=#f29e38ff>智瞳完全熄灭</color>时，即使挑战失败也不会降低星阶。
E: When you have enough Cognoculi, you can raise your Astronomical Division. When the <color=#f29e38ff>Cognoculi is completely extinguished</color>, your Astronomical Division will not decrease after a failed challenge.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>击破</color>该敌人弱点可使其为我方添加增益。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> this enemy's Weakness to apply buffs to allies.

C: 使用技能氮气爆发可<color=#f29e38ff>大幅提高速度</color>
E: Use the Nitrous Burst ability to <color=#f29e38ff>greatly increase your speed</color>

E: Match <color=#f29e38ff>4 or more identical fruits</color> to generate a corresponding <color=#f29e38ff>bomb</color>.

C: 在多人乱斗中，每场共有<color=#f29e38ff>6名</color>玩家参与对战。每回合开始时，玩家将从<color=#f29e38ff>剩余对手中抽取一名</color>进行对战。
E: In Battle Royale mode, every battle will have <color=#f29e38ff>6</color> participating players. Players will <color=#f29e38ff>draw one from remaining opponents</color> in each turn to battle against.

C: 「折纸小鸟对对碰」是一款<color=#f29e38ff>三消对战游戏</color>，您需要在<color=#f29e38ff>规定步数</color>内进行消除，提升小鸟的<color=#f29e38ff>战斗力</color>。
E: Origami Bird Clash is a <color=#f29e38ff>Match Three battling game</color> where you have to eliminate fruits within <color=#f29e38ff>a certain number of moves</color> to increase the Origami Bird's <color=#f29e38ff>Combat Power</color>.

C: 消除<color=#f29e38ff>特定水果</color>可为小鸟充能，<color=#f29e38ff>能量充满</color>后，小鸟将释放强力<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>辅助消除。
E: Eliminate <color=#f29e38ff>specific fruits</color> to charge the bird. Once <color=#f29e38ff>fully charged</color>, the bird will release a powerful <color=#f29e38ff>skill</color> to help eliminate fruits.

C: 在双人对战中，<color=#f29e38ff>交换2个超级炸弹</color>触发组合消除时，也将获得<color=#f29e38ff>额外步数</color>。
E: In a Duo Duel, you can also obtain <color=#f29e38ff>extra moves</color> when triggering a combo elimination via <color=#f29e38ff>Swapping 2 Super Bombs</color>.

C: 「记忆」和「照片」很相似。它看似记录了「真实」，但却在侵入「真实」、异化「真实」、篡改「真实」。也许清除其中的「失真」会使它变得可靠，也许不会。
E: "Memory" is similar to "photographs." Even though it appears to record "reality," it actually invades, alienates, and alters "reality." Perhaps removing the "distortion" will make it reliable, or perhaps not.

C: 冥河中沉眠的死龙，受炼成召引再度苏醒，化成槁骨腐肉的模样。\n它曾是「死亡」的泰坦，逆溯冥河向上，离开乌有之界于现世搁浅。它曾随冥河潮汐涌上大地，为翁法罗斯的万事万物烙上命定的终局。那些将死的，或已死的存在，皆会因它的归来感受到灵魂深处的颤栗。
E: Netherwing, slumbering dormant in the River of Souls, has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

C: 「记忆」和「照片」很相似。它看似记录了「真实」，但却在侵入「真实」、异化「真实」、篡改「真实」。也许清除其中的「失真」会使它变得可靠，也许不会。
E: "Memory" is similar to "photographs." Even though it appears to record "reality," it actually invades, alienates, and alters "reality." Perhaps removing the "distortion" will make it reliable, or perhaps not.

C: 人类从不掩饰掌控星空的欲望…当然，也包括我在内。
E: Humanity never conceals its desire to control the heavens... And I'm no exception.

C: 哇，真是没想到呢！
E: Wow, what an amazingly ordinary find!

C: 碰上我就感恩戴德吧。
E: You must be honored to meet me?

C: 虽然命运剥夺了她的名字和荣誉，但我认为她亦是当之无愧的英灵。在身为人类时，每一位英灵都曾命运多舛，却最终以他们的行动照亮了后来的人们。
E: Though fate stripped her of her name and honor, I believe she is still a Heroic Spirit worthy of her title. Every Heroic Spirit, during their life as a human, endured great hardship. Yet through their actions, they lit the way for those who came after.

C: 是时候做个了结了！
E: It's time to put an end to this!

C: 这场胜利献给你，我的御主。
E: I devote this victory to you, my Master.

C: 绝对…不能失守……
E: We must... protect...

C: 在前线待的时间久了，想回到官邸休息的愿望就会变得强烈。可一旦真的在床上躺下，对前线战况的担忧又会涌上心头…或许这就是母亲说的「责任」吧？
E: When you've been on the front line for a while, you start to get an overwhelming urge to return to the guardian's residence and rest. But then as soon as you're lying in bed, all your worries about the front line come to the fore... Perhaps that's the "responsibility" that mother used to talk about.

C: 你说，等布洛妮娅当上大守护者了，能不能让我上黄金歌剧院的舞台上表演？我给她改编一首摇滚版的《大守护者》…摇滚音乐剧！
E: When Bronya becomes the supreme guardian, do you reckon she'll let me perform at Golden Theater? I'll re-arrange that "Supreme Guardian" stage show and make it a rock 'n' roll musical!

C: 不管是反抗，摇摆，沉沦，都将……
E: Fight it or rock with it... my music conquers all!

C: 这样一来就毫无错漏了。
E: Finally, all contingencies covered.

C: 史瓦罗：目标威胁指数下降。
E: Svarog: Target threat index lowered.

C: 克拉拉：克拉拉要勇敢一点…
E: Clara: I need to be brave...

C: 你应该担心的是没有准备的人，而不是我…担心我独自探险不安全？诶…一个人才好啊。
E: There's nothing to worry about when you're prepared. It's the unprepared you should be concerned about. Oh, you're worried about me always going alone? Eh... It's better being alone.

C: 初次见面，请容许我做个简单的自我介绍。我叫托帕，隶属星际和平公司的战略投资部。星穹列车和无名客，各位的事迹我早有耳闻，幸会！身边这位，就是我的好搭档啦。账账，来和大家打个招呼！
E: Hello! Allow me to introduce myself. My name's Topaz — I work in the IPC's Strategic Investment Department. I've heard about the many great feats of the Nameless and the Astral Express — it's truly a pleasure to meet you. Oh, hehe, and this is my little second-in-command — Numby! Say hi to everyone, Numby!

C: 偌大的星空，亿万种可爱又神奇的小动物…就算只是为了它们，我也得努力呀！
E: The vast starry sky, the billions of cute, magical critters... Even if only for them, I've gotta work hard.

C: 说好了，你可不许再逗我玩了啊！
E: Alright, no more teasing, okay?

C: 我妈给我说考入太卜司，端上铁饭碗，就能松口气了。进来才知道，闲饭难吃啊……
E: My Mom said I could relax in a secure job once I passed the Divination Commission entrance exam. Now that I'm in, I feel like I should be doing more...

C: 要不，咱们还是以和为贵？
E: Let's be friends, shall we?

C: 各位还真是好身手。
E: We make a pretty good team.

C: 又来了？…被我记住的人，结果都不会很好。
E: Back again...? The fate of those I remember is never a good one.

C: 是那麒麟儿彦卿…天赐良机，我得好好瞧瞧他的剑法！
E: It's Yanqing! This is my chance to check out his moves up close!

C: 才这个点，走哪逛逛去！
E: It's so early! Let's look around!

C: 啧…各位小心！
E: Argh... Watch yourselves!

C: 命途的流向一般通往未来，但在她身上却流向过去…过去于她，究竟是好事还是坏事……
E: Destiny usually flows before us into the future, but for her, it flows into the past... As far as she is concerned, is the past a force for good or bad?

C: 略施小计。
E: Shift the balance.

C: 裳裳！这场就等你来和我搭伙登台，观众老爷们可喜欢啦~
E: Sushang! We should totally team up for this performance, the fans will go wild~

C: 持明的生命，就像一个个梦一样。
E: The life of the Vidyadhara is like a dream.

C: 当年，吾也曾阻止过小妹的做法。但就如今来看，着实给十王司带来了诸多可能性。
E: Back then, I tried to dissuade my little sister from her actions. But now, I can see how it provided the Ten-Lords Commission with many opportunities.

C: 吾身并非活人。与你交谈的，是十王赐下的偃偶之身。吾的躯壳，早已化灰。
E: You are talking to a puppet, not a living being. The Commission gifted me this body. The real me has already been reduced to ashes.

C: 「贞凶之命」，「贞凶之命」如此……
E: So this is the life of a cursed one...

C: 失策啊，在下未曾想过这辈子还能与神策将军并肩作战。
E: Never imagined that in this life I would be fighting alongside the Divine Foresight himself.

C: 你没事吧？爷爷说，吃完饭后不能剧烈运动……
E: Are you okay? Grandpa always said it's bad to exercise after eating...

C: 我不过一介医士，平生最恨舞弄权术之辈。可要想在丹鼎司站稳脚跟，也不得不使些手段，让那些弄权者无计可施才行。
E: I am just a healer, and I've always hated those who play political games. But if you want to gain a foothold in the Alchemy Commission, you must have some means to stop those who abuse their power.

C: 该收割了。
E: Time to reap.

C: 在群星间仍有通路时，这个世界也留下过无名客的足迹。只可惜，匹诺康尼到底没能记下其中任何一个名字。
E: Back when the stars were still connected, this world too saw the footprints of Nameless wanderers. Sadly, Penacony never managed to remember any of their names.

C: 就这点水平？
E: That's all you've got?

C: 来了啊，走近点让我瞧瞧。
E: You've arrived, eh? Step up, let's see you.

C: 多么具有「魅力」的毛绒。我想它十分适合坐在骑士肩甲上，成为「荣誉」的象征。
E: Such a fascinating ball of fluff. I imagine them to be exceptionally fitting perched atop a knight's shoulder, serving as a symbol of honor.

C: 愚者们的赌局从来不求胜利。比起赌徒，他们更是追求愉悦的疯子。
E: The Fools never play to win — they're more like crazed thrill seekers.

C: 既然又见面了，不如顺便来搭把手呗，拉帝奥。
E: Well, look who it is. How about you give me a hand this time, Ratio?

C: 没有意外的胜局。
E: An unsurprising win.

C: 留下回忆之处，触着碰着，都是带刺的花……
E: This haven of memories, every touch, every moment is like a thorned rose...

C: 「同谐」的家庭中并无尊卑，所有人都能沐浴在千面神的颂歌下，我们共享一切苦难与幸福。希望我的歌声也能为所有人带来安宁。
E: Within the family of the Harmony, all are equal, everyone basks in the hymns of The Thousand Faces, sharing all hardships and joys. I hope my songs can also bring peace to everyone.

C: 又见面了，这回想听什么歌？
E: Here we are again. What kind of song are you in the mood for now?

C: 巡演结束，该回去休息啦。
E: The tour is over, and it's time for some rest.

C: 这不止是一场战役。
E: This is more than a battle.

C: 进攻，执行。
E: Executing attack.

C: 为战而生，为生而战！
E: Live to fight, fight to live!

C: 飞萤扑火，向死而生。
E: Like fyreflies to a flame... life begets death.

C: 检查完毕，没有遗漏。
E: Inspection complete. Nothing suspicious.

C: 机关已解除。
E: Mechanism deactivated.

C: 天气可真他宝贝得不错，不是吗？看看今天会有哪些个小可爱倒大霉！
E: This is some fudgin' fine weather we're havin'. Wonder which little son of a nice lady is gonna run outta luck today.

C: 何其优美之音律？歌声响起时，在下亦哀嚎在地。一期荣花一世人，花亦花来人亦人，呜呼！
E: What a beautiful melody! When the singing begins, I too lament on the ground. The season of glory blooms only once in a lifetime. Alas, flowers and people come and go!

C: 你我的命运，由此交织。
E: Thus, your fate and mine become one.

C: 好耀眼的目光呐，是想把我的「心」也偷走吗？
E: Your stare is blinding. Are you trying to steal my "heart", too?

C: 灰烬中的每一步，都曾迸发火星。
E: Every step upon the ashes once kindled sparks.

C: 除了向前，别无选择。
E: There's no other choice but to move forward.

C: 感谢，我还能坚持。
E: Thank you. I can still keep going.

C: 每当大家知道我拥有天空之子的血脉，总会再三确认。我知道自己看起来和传说中的先祖相去甚远，要说对此毫不在意也不太可能…但每个人就是不一样的，对吧？
E: Whenever someone learns that I'm a descendant of the Skyfolk, they keep double-checking to make sure. I know I look a lot different from my legendary ancestors, and it'd be a lie if I said I don't care about it... But shouldn't everyone be unique?

C: 小蝶鱼，来共舞一曲吧，蝴蝶的翅膀…也能煽动海洋的潮汐。
E: Let us dance together, little butterflyfish. A butterfly's wings... can also stir up the Ocean's tides.

C: 此番不是对弈，智哲爵，我正盼与你共谋。
E: You're not my opponent in this game, Dux Sagax. I look forward to working with you.

C: 做好被彻底击溃的觉悟。
E: Ready yourself. Ruin is inevitable.

C: 与其思虑过多，不如追随直觉。
E: Let instinct guide what reason delays.

C: 想用翁法罗斯的礼节打招呼？可以。虽然我认为像往常那样就好。
E: You wish to greet me with Amphorean etiquette? Go ahead. Though I think our usual way is just fine.

C: 比「大地」的火种更为沉重的，是翁法罗斯所有生灵期待的目光。他的路已到尽头，该到我们去回应这份期待了。
E: Heavier than the Coreflame of Earth are the hopeful gazes of every living being in Amphoreus. His journey reached its end. Now it's time for us to carry that hope forward.

C: 嗯，该重新启程了。
E: Mmm. Time to set off again.

C: 一开始，除了列车，我没有其他落脚之处，「开拓」更像是逃避往事的一张车票。但不知不觉中，列车停靠的每一站都成为了我重新出发的起点。
E: At first, I had nowhere to call home but the Express. The Trailblaze? It felt more like a ticket to escape from my past than a journey forward. But before I knew it... Every stop the Express made became a new beginning for me.

C: 人家是不是很聪明？快夸夸我。
E: Aren't I smart? Come on. Gimme a compliment.

C: 海瑟音的歌声，听过一次就难以忘怀。托她的福，世界每时每刻都是一场华丽的舞会。现在，一起跳支舞吧？
E: It's hard to forget Hysilens' songs after you've heard them. Thanks to her, every second of every day in this world is a magnificent gala. So let's dance together, shall we?

C: 速战速决吧。
E: Let's make it quick.

C: 「毁灭」的意志究竟从何而来，真的是因为体内的星核么……
E: Just where did the will of Destruction come from? Was it really because of the Stellaron within me...?

C: 好，多多益善。
E: Great, the more the better.

C: 毫发无伤。
E: Not a scratch.

C: 这故事，如我们所书！
E: This story... is as we've written!

C: 英雄史诗已然成篇——在这个阿基维利也未曾抵达的世界，我们却能够以「无名客」的身份与翁法罗斯的诸位同行，见证每个人写下浓墨重彩的一笔。
E: The heroic epic has already been written. In this world that even Akivili did not reach, we were able to walk as the Nameless with the people of Amphoreus, bearing witness to the indelible marks that each person made in this book.

E: When the strongest Fig Stew in the team is knocked down, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> chance to revive with full <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>, causing this unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>, and DMG dealt to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> on the next attack. E: Embrace From the Waves

E: The Dahlia

C: 米凯与知更鸟交谈。知更鸟称花火在杀死她的同时，为她戴上了一副假面，而面具现已不见踪影。知更鸟动身打听外界情况。
E: Micah talked with Robin. Robin said that when Sparkle had killed her, she put a mask on her face, but now the mask has disappeared. Robin set out to gather information about the outside world.

C: 一瓶治愈伤痛的万灵药。
E: A bottle of panacea that heals all wounds.

C: 借用摆渡人的船只。
E: Borrow the ferryman's ship.

C: 倪科塔星有着繁琐且庄严的丧葬传统。居民们会为死者举办盛大的典仪，政府则立法禁止亵渎墓碑。时光荏苒，这颗星球逐渐被墓碑占据，留给活人的生存空间越来越少。假面愚者唔理玛在倪科塔星生活了<unbreak>40</unbreak>年，参加过上千场葬礼，来宾多以泪洗面，全无欢快的气氛。于是他为自己策划了一场特别葬礼——众目睽睽下，他的墓碑长出了推进器，伴随着劲爆的鼓点升上了天空，尾焰在草地上烧出一句墓志铭：「笑一笑吧，外面不是很宽阔吗？」
E: Planet Nikota has complex and solemn funeral traditions. Residents hold grand ceremonies for the deceased, and the government has laws prohibiting the desecration of tombstones. As time passed, the planet gradually became occupied by tombstones, leaving less and less living space for the living. Masked Fool Urima lived on Nikota for <unbreak>40</unbreak> years, attending thousands of funerals where guests would weep endlessly, with no hint of joy. So he planned a special funeral for himself: in front of everyone, his tombstone sprouted thrusters and soared into the sky to pounding beats, the exhaust flames burning an epitaph into the grass: "Come on, smile! Isn't it vast out there?"

E: Additional Ice Weakness

C: 「梦主」几乎等同于匹诺康尼本身…尽管他身上发生了某种意外，可以趁机深入调查，但总归还是小心为好。
E: The "Dreammaster" and Penacony are practically one and the same. Even though a particular incident has given us an opening to dig deeper, we should still proceed with caution.

C: 往事毕，此刻，是让黑天鹅眼见为实的时候了。
E: The past is behind us. Now, it's time for Black Swan to see it with her own eyes.

C: 去为所有人夺回「开拓」的权利，人们终将在那里找到答案。
E: Reclaim the right to Trailblaze for everyone. That's where people will ultimately find their answers.

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 击败「神主日」
E: Defeat the Great Septimus

C: 与清醒的人们会面
E: Meet up with the people who are awake

C: 还有还有，第一次去仙舟，是花姐给了那绝灭大君最后一击，这么大的事情你总不会忘吧？
E: Totally! It was Big Sis Dahlia who dealt the final blow to that Lord Ravager the first time we went to the Xianzhou. You haven't forgotten something that big, have you?

C: 人们总是这样形容它：一旦醒来，就消失得无影无踪，所以美梦才那么珍贵。
E: People always describe it this way: once you wake up, it vanishes without a trace. That's why sweet dreams are so precious.

C: 反正这风景怎么也和「美梦」搭不上边，可能是某种…「缓冲区」吧。
E: This scenery doesn't exactly scream "sweet dream" anyway. It's probably some kind of... "buffer zone" or something.

C: 是啊。我实在放心不下「死亡」，才一路追踪到这里。
E: Yeah. I can't stop thinking of "death", so I followed some people all the way here.

C: 「…火焰的子嗣们██这是你们的成人之礼…」
E: "Children of the flame ██ this marks your rite of passage."

C: 黎明一旦升起
E: And once dawn breaks

C: 博雷克林•铁尔南…我记得这个名字。一位值得敬佩的巡海游侠，历史上匹诺康尼遭受虫灾时，是他奋不顾身守护住了美梦。
E: Breukelen Tiernan... I remember that name. A Galaxy Ranger worthy of admiration. When Penacony was plagued by the Swarm Disaster in the past, he was the one who fearlessly protected our sweet dream.

C: 怎么，动了你的人，要找我算账？要不先坐下来谈谈呢，我看你也挺有耐心的。
E: What, you want to settle the score with me for messing with your people? Why don't we sit down and have a chat? You seem like a patient one to me.

C: 放心吧，我也只是顺水推舟，稍稍压制了她的力量，让你能这么容易就得手。
E: Don't worry, I only went with the flow... Suppressing her power a little to make it easier for you.

C: 在计划开始转动的瞬间，歌斐木便已为了他信奉的{RUBY_B#秩序}公义{RUBY_E#}，殉道而死。
E: The moment the plan was set in motion, Gopher Wood died a martyr's death for the {RUBY_B#the Order}just cause{RUBY_E#} he believed in.

C: 但你如今已知晓，他的说法并不尽然。在那之后，则是流萤迄今为止，为数不多的美好经历——
E: But you know now that his words weren't entirely true. What followed was one of the few beautiful memories that Firefly has held onto to this day...

C: 可是，不知你是否注意到了，在此期间，存在着一个小小的空隙——你和她并非始终同行。
E: However, you may have noticed that during this period there was a small gap. She and you weren't together the whole time.

C: 橡木之梦——诞生之地 降死之地
E: Oak Dream — The Place of Birth, The Place of Death

C: 不错，我对此处还算熟悉，足以为您引路。对你来说，这也有其意义——见证他的忏悔，也就等同于，揭晓他的罪行。
E: Indeed. I'm quite familiar with this place and can guide you. This has its own significance for you, too. Witnessing his confession is tantamount to unveiling his crimes.

C: ——在我看来，你能够怀抱希望，正因未曾直面注定的死亡。
E: ...In my eyes, you can still hold onto hope precisely because you've never faced inevitable death.

C: 只是一声悲叹，流萤女士，只是徒然。
E: Just a sigh of sorrow, Lady Firefly, of futility.

C: 虽然她不是我真正的同伴，但那位焚化工，为我留下过一簇她的火焰。
E: Though she wasn't my true companion, that Cremator left me with a spark of her flame.

C: 我准许你，以人之手，为我创生{RUBY_B#太一}神主{RUBY_E#}！
E: I permit you, with mortal hands, to bring forth {RUBY_B#Ena}the Great One{RUBY_E#}!

C: 开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
E: The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.

C: 或许也会背弃「同谐」吧。但无论如何，那只是认定家族不值得服从，无法为梦主将行的大恶辩护。
E: Perhaps I too would betray the Harmony. But in any case, that would only mean I found the Family unworthy of obedience. It doesn't justify the Dreammaster's heinous acts.

C: 流萤，我，星核猎手，这个世界…都在等待着你，跨过那一刻。
E: Firefly, me, the Stellaron Hunters, this entire world... We're all waiting for you to reach that moment.

C: {NICKNAME}，你没事。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're okay!

C: 就这么几个人？哦，也够了。
E: Just these few people? Oh well, that'll do.

C: 未成年不能参与。
E: Minors are not allowed.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要我「底牌未出」，没有一个人敢跟注到底。</color>现在，是揭开那张牌的时候了。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>So long as my "trump card" remains unplayed, none will dare see the hand through to the end.</color> And now, it's time to reveal that ace.

C: 最好别轻举妄动——你来到我面前，究竟想干什么？
E: Stay where you are! What are you trying to do by showing up in front of me?

C: 你正注视着它。
E: You're looking right at it.

C: 卡卡瓦夏
E: Kakavasha

C: 是啊，就像砂金先生那时一样，你拔刀的那一刻，虚无侵染了梦境。
E: Yes, just like with Mr. Aventurine back then. Nihility infected the Dreamscape the moment you drew your blade.

C: 你…你也是学生！但却是从好远好远的一颗星球上来到这里，完全不熟悉环境。
E: And you... You're a student too! But you came here from a really, really distant planet, completely unfamiliar with your surroundings.

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}，再答应我一个愿望……
E: So, {NICKNAME}, grant me one more wish...

C: …流萤？！
E: ...Firefly!?

C: 小奇美拉说的不无道理，你很快就找到了解决问题的方法——
E: The little chimera has a point, and you quickly find a way to solve the problem:

C: 你的伤口顷刻愈合——诸神已然接受这份代价。浓云褪去，柔和的月光倾泻而下，温热与力量一同涌入身躯。你感到前所未有地充沛，仿佛满盈的容器。
E: Your wounds heal in an instant. The pantheon has accepted this offering. The thick clouds part, letting gentle moonlight pour down as warmth and power surge through your body. You feel more invigorated than ever before, like a vessel filled to the brim.

C: 蝶糕糕，肚子饿了吗？乖，稍等就给你做点好吃的。
E: Butterfly Cake, are you hungry? Be good now, and I'll make you something yummy in a bit.

C: 毕竟已经称得上往事，或许，你需要一些小小的帮助？
E: After all, it can already be considered a thing of the past. Perhaps you need a little help?

C: 余晖残卷
E: Remnants of Twilight

C: 记忆的坟茔，已然敞开——
E: Memory's tomb has opened its maw...
